authors_text: Yingjie Chen,Huasong Zhong,Chong Chen,Chen Shen,Jianqiang Huang,Tao Wang,Yun Liang,Qianru Sun
title: On Mitigating Hard Clusters for Face Clustering
title_zh: 关于减轻人脸聚类的硬聚类
abstract: Face clustering is a promising way to scale up face recognition systems using large-scale unlabeled face images. It remains challenging to identify small or sparse face image clusters that we call hard clusters, which is caused by the heterogeneity, \ie, high variations in size and sparsity, of the clusters. Consequently, the conventional way of using a uniform threshold (to identify clusters) often leads to a terrible misclassification for the samples that should belong to hard clusters. We tackle this problem by leveraging the neighborhood information of samples and inferring the cluster memberships (of samples) in a probabilistic way. We introduce two novel modules, Neighborhood-Diffusion-based Density (NDDe) and Transition-Probability-based Distance (TPDi), based on which we can simply apply the standard Density Peak Clustering algorithm with a uniform threshold. Our experiments on multiple benchmarks show that each module contributes to the final performance of our method, and by incorporating them into other advanced face clustering methods, these two modules can boost the performance of these methods to a new state-of-the-art. Code is available at: https://github.com/echoanran/On-Mitigating-Hard-Clusters.
summary: Face clustering is a promising way to scale up face recognition systems using large-scale unlabeled face images. It remains challenging to identify small or sparse face image clusters that we call hard clusters, which is caused by the heterogeneity, \ie, high variations in size and sparsity, of the clusters. Consequently, the conventional way of using a uniform threshold (to identify clusters) often leads to a terrible misclassification for the samples that should belong to hard clusters. We tackle this problem by leveraging the neighborhood information of samples and inferring the cluster memberships (of samples) in a probabilistic way. We introduce two novel modules, Neighborhood-Diffusion-based Density (NDDe) and Transition-Probability-based Distance (TPDi), based on which we can simply apply the standard Density Peak Clustering algorithm with a uniform threshold. Our experiments on multiple benchmarks show that each module contributes to the final performance of our method, and by incorporating them into other advanced face clustering methods, these two modules can boost the performance of these methods to a new state-of-the-art. Code is available at: https://github.com/echoanran/On-Mitigating-Hard-Clusters.
abstract_zh: 人脸聚类是使用大规模未标记人脸图像扩展人脸识别系统的一种有前景的方法。识别我们称之为硬簇的小或稀疏的人脸图像簇仍​​然具有挑战性，这是由簇的异质性（即大小和稀疏性的高度变化）引起的。因此，使用统一阈值（识别聚类）的传统方法常常会导致本应属于硬聚类的样本出现严重的错误分类。我们通过利用样本的邻域信息并以概率的方式推断（样本的）集群成员资格来解决这个问题。我们引入了两个新颖的模块，基于邻域扩散的密度（NDDe）和基于转移概率的距离（TPDi），基于它们，我们可以简单地应用具有统一阈值的标准密度峰值聚类算法。我们在多个基准上的实验表明，每个模块都有助于我们方法的最终性能，并且通过将它们合并到其他先进的人脸聚类方法中，这两个模块可以将这些方法的性能提升到新的最先进水平。代码位于：https://github.com/echoanran/On-Mitigating-Hard-Clusters。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过缓解硬聚类问题来改进人脸聚类的方法，针对传统方法在处理小规模或稀疏人脸簇时的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统人脸聚类方法使用统一阈值识别簇时，因簇的异质性（大小和稀疏度差异）导致硬簇样本被错误分类，亟需解决这一问题。
AI.method: 引入基于邻域扩散密度（NDDe）和转移概率距离（TPDi）的两个模块，通过概率方式推断样本簇成员身份，并结合密度峰值聚类算法实现统一阈值下的有效聚类。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上验证了两个模块对性能的贡献，且将其集成到先进方法中可达到新的最先进水平，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 所提模块有效缓解了硬簇问题，提升了人脸聚类性能，并为其他聚类方法提供了改进思路。

authors_text: Aupendu Kar,Suresh Nehra,Jayanta Mukhopadhyay,Prabir Kumar Biswas
title: Sub-Aperture Feature Adaptation in Single Image Super-resolution Model for Light Field Imaging
title_zh: 光场成像单图像超分辨率模型中的子孔径特征自适应

abstract: With the availability of commercial Light Field (LF) cameras, LF imaging has emerged as an up and coming technology in computational photography. However, the spatial resolution is significantly constrained in commercial microlens based LF cameras because of the inherent multiplexing of spatial and angular information. Therefore, it becomes the main bottleneck for other applications of light field cameras. This paper proposes an adaptation module in a pretrained Single Image Super Resolution (SISR) network to leverage the powerful SISR model instead of using highly engineered light field imaging domain specific Super Resolution models. The adaption module consists of a Sub aperture Shift block and a fusion block. It is an adaptation in the SISR network to further exploit the spatial and angular information in LF images to improve the super resolution performance. Experimental validation shows that the proposed method outperforms existing light field super resolution algorithms. It also achieves PSNR gains of more than 1 dB across all the datasets as compared to the same pretrained SISR models for scale factor 2, and PSNR gains 0.6 to 1 dB for scale factor 4.
summary: With the availability of commercial Light Field (LF) cameras, LF imaging has emerged as an up and coming technology in computational photography. However, the spatial resolution is significantly constrained in commercial microlens based LF cameras because of the inherent multiplexing of spatial and angular information. Therefore, it becomes the main bottleneck for other applications of light field cameras. This paper proposes an adaptation module in a pretrained Single Image Super Resolution (SISR) network to leverage the powerful SISR model instead of using highly engineered light field imaging domain specific Super Resolution models. The adaption module consists of a Sub aperture Shift block and a fusion block. It is an adaptation in the SISR network to further exploit the spatial and angular information in LF images to improve the super resolution performance. Experimental validation shows that the proposed method outperforms existing light field super resolution algorithms. It also achieves PSNR gains of more than 1 dB across all the datasets as compared to the same pretrained SISR models for scale factor 2, and PSNR gains 0.6 to 1 dB for scale factor 4.
abstract_zh: 随着商用光场 (LF) 相机的出现，LF 成像已成为计算摄影领域的一项新兴技术。然而，由于空间和角度信息固有的复用性，基于商用微透镜的 LF 相机的空间分辨率受到严重限制。因此，它成为光场相机其他应用的主要瓶颈。本文在预训练的单图像超分辨率（SISR）网络中提出了一个自适应模块，以利用强大的 SISR 模型，而不是使用高度工程化的光场成像领域特定的超分辨率模型。自适应模块由子孔径移位模块和融合模块组成。它是 SISR 网络的一个改进，旨在进一步利用 LF 图像中的空间和角度信息来提高超分辨率性能。实验验证表明，该方法优于现有的光场超分辨率算法。与比例因子 2 的相同预训练 SISR 模型相比，它在所有数据集上实现了超过 1 dB 的 PSNR 增益，而对于比例因子 4，PSNR 增益为 0.6 至 1 dB。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的单图像超分辨率模型，通过子孔径特征自适应方法提升光场图像的分辨率。
AI.motivation: 商用微透镜光场相机因空间与角度信息复用导致分辨率受限，现有光场超分算法复杂且效果有限，需寻找更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 在预训练的单图像超分网络中引入自适应模块，包含子孔径位移块和融合块，以挖掘光场图像的空间与角度信息。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，该方法在放大倍数2时PSNR提升超1dB，在放大倍数4时提升0.6-1dB，优于现有光场超分算法及原预训练模型。
AI.conclusion: 子孔径特征自适应模块有效利用光场多视角信息，显著提升超分性能，为光场成像应用提供新思路。

authors_text: Kun He,Kewen Wu,Kuan Yang
title: Improved Bounds for Sampling Solutions of Random CNF Formulas
title_zh: 随机 CNF 公式采样解的改进界限
comment: 51 pages, all proofs added, and bounds slightly improved
comments: 51 pages, all proofs added, and bounds slightly improved
abstract: Let $Φ$ be a random $k$-CNF formula on $n$ variables and $m$ clauses, where each clause is a disjunction of $k$ literals chosen independently and uniformly. Our goal is to sample an approximately uniform solution of $Φ$ (or equivalently, approximate the partition function of $Φ$). Let $α=m/n$ be the density. The previous best algorithm runs in time $n^{\mathsf{poly}(k,α)}$ for any $α\lesssim2^{k/300}$ [Galanis, Goldberg, Guo, and Yang, SIAM J. Comput.'21]. Our result significantly improves both bounds by providing an almost-linear time sampler for any $α\lesssim2^{k/3}$. The density $α$ captures the \emph{average degree} in the random formula. In the worst-case model with bounded \emph{maximum degree}, current best efficient sampler works up to degree bound $2^{k/5}$ [He, Wang, and Yin, FOCS'22 and SODA'23], which is, for the first time, superseded by its average-case counterpart due to our $2^{k/3}$ bound. Our result is the first progress towards establishing the intuition that the solvability of the average-case model (random $k$-CNF formula with bounded average degree) is better than the worst-case model (standard $k$-CNF formula with bounded maximal degree) in terms of sampling solutions.

The previous best algorithm runs in time $n^{\mathsf{poly}(k,α)}$ for any $α\lesssim2^{k/300}$ [Galanis, Goldberg, Guo, and Yang, SIAM J. Comput.'21]. Our result significantly improves both bounds by providing an almost-linear time sampler for any $α\lesssim2^{k/3}$. The density $α$ captures the \emph{average degree} in the random formula. In the worst-case model with bounded \emph{maximum degree}, current best efficient sampler works up to degree bound $2^{k/5}$ [He, Wang, and Yin, FOCS'22 and SODA'23], which is, for the first time, superseded by its average-case counterpart due to our $2^{k/3}$ bound. Our result is the first progress towards establishing the intuition that the solvability of the average-case model (random $k$-CNF formula with bounded average degree) is better than the worst-case model (standard $k$-CNF formula with bounded maximal degree) in terms of sampling solutions.
abstract_zh: 令 $Φ$ 为 $n$ 变量和 $m$ 子句的随机 $k$-CNF 公式，其中每个子句都是独立且统一选择的 $k$ 文字的析取。我们的目标是对 $Φ$ 的近似均匀解进行采样（或者等效地，近似 $Φ$ 的配分函数）。令 $α=m/n$ 为密度。对于任何 $α\lesssim2^{k/300}$，先前的最佳算法在 $n^{\mathsf{poly}(k,α)}$ 时间内运行[Galanis, Goldberg,Guo, and Yang, SIAM J. Comput.'21]。通过为任何 $α\lesssim2^{k/3}$ 提供几乎线性的时间采样器，我们的结果显着改善了这两个界限。密度$α$捕获随机公式中的\emph{平均度}。在有界 \emph{最大程度} 的最坏情况模型中，当前最有效的采样器工作到程度界限 $2^{k/5}$ [He、Wang 和 Yin、FOCS'22 和 SODA'23]，由于我们的 $2^{k/3}$ 界限，它第一次被其平均情况对应物取代。我们的结果是在建立直觉方面取得的第一个进展，即在采样解决方案方面，平均情况模型（具有有界平均度的随机 $k$-CNF 公式）的可解性优于最坏情况模型（具有有界最大度的标准 $k$-CNF 公式）。

AI.tldr: 针对随机k-CNF公式，设计近似均匀解采样算法并改进理论边界。
AI.motivation: 打破此前算法在密度α≲2^{k/300}时的n^{poly(k,α)}运行时间限制，并超越最坏情形模型下的采样边界（2^{k/5}），验证平均情形模型在解采样方面的优越性。
AI.method: 通过改进随机k-CNF公式的结构分析与采样技术，将可采样的密度阈值从2^{k/300}提升至2^{k/3}，并实现几乎线性时间的算法。
AI.result: 对于任意密度α≲2^{k/3}，算法运行时间接近线性，显著优于此前n^{poly(k,α)}的边界，且首次在密度上超越最坏情形模型（2^{k/5}）。
AI.conclusion: 平均情形模型（随机k-CNF公式，有界平均度）的解采样难度低于最坏情形模型（有界最大度），该结果向验证这一直觉迈出了第一步。

search_text: Improved Bounds for Sampling Solutions of Random CNF Formulas 随机 CNF 公式采样解的改进界限 Let $Φ$ be a random $k$-CNF formula on $n$ variables and $m$ clauses, where each clause is a disjunction of $k$ literals chosen independently and uniformly. Our goal is to sample an approximately uniform solution of $Φ$ (or equivalently, approximate the partition function of $Φ$). Let $α=m/n$ be the density. The previous best algorithm runs in time $n^{\mathsf{poly}(k,α)}$ for any $α\lesssim2^{k/300}$ [Galanis, Goldberg, Guo, and Yang, SIAM J. Comput.'21]. Our result significantly improves both bounds by providing an almost-linear time sampler for any $α\lesssim2^{k/3}$. The density $α$ captures the \emph{average degree} in the random formula. In the worst-case model with bounded \emph{maximum degree}, current best efficient sampler works up to degree bound $2^{k/5}$ [He, Wang, and Yin, FOCS'22 and SODA'23], which is, for the first time, superseded by its average-case counterpart due to our $2^{k/3}$ bound. Our result is the first progress towards establishing the intuition that the solvability of the average-case model (random $k$-CNF formula with bounded average degree) is better than the worst-case model (standard $k$-CNF formula with bounded maximal degree) in terms of sampling solutions. 令 $Φ$ 为 $n$ 变量和 $m$ 子句的随机 $k$-CNF 公式，其中每个子句都是独立且统一选择的 $k$ 文字的析取。我们的目标是对 $Φ$ 的近似均匀解进行采样（或者等效地，近似 $Φ$ 的配分函数）。令 $α=m/n$ 为密度。对于任何 $α\lesssim2^{k/300}$，先前的最佳算法在 $n^{\mathsf{poly}(k,α)}$ 时间内运行[Galanis, Goldberg,Guo, and Yang, SIAM J. Comput.'21]。通过为任何 $α\lesssim2^{k/3}$ 提供几乎线性的时间采样器，我们的结果显着改善了这两个界限。密度$α$捕获随机公式中的\emph{平均度}。在有界 \emph{最大程度} 的最坏情况模型中，当前最有效的采样器工作到程度界限 $2^{k/5}$ [He、Wang 和 Yin、FOCS'22 和 SODA'23]，由于我们的 $2^{k/3}$ 界限，它第一次被其平均情况对应物取代。我们的结果是在建立直觉方面取得的第一个进展，即在采样解决方案方面，平均情况模型（具有有界平均度的随机 $k$-CNF 公式）的可解性优于最坏情况模型（具有有界最大度的标准 $k$-CNF 公式）。 针对随机k-CNF公式，设计近似均匀解采样算法并改进理论边界。 Kun He,Kewen Wu,Kuan Yang cs.DS,cs.DM,math.PR

authors_text: Songlin Fan,Wei Gao,Ge Li
title: Salient Object Detection for Point Clouds
title_zh: 点云的显着物体检测
abstract: This paper researches the unexplored task-point cloud salient object detection (SOD). Differing from SOD for images, we find the attention shift of point clouds may provoke saliency conflict, i.e., an object paradoxically belongs to salient and non-salient categories. To eschew this issue, we present a novel view-dependent perspective of salient objects, reasonably reflecting the most eye-catching objects in point cloud scenarios. Following this formulation, we introduce PCSOD, the first dataset proposed for point cloud SOD consisting of 2,872 in-/out-door 3D views. The samples in our dataset are labeled with hierarchical annotations, e.g., super-/sub-class, bounding box, and segmentation map, which endows the brilliant generalizability and broad applicability of our dataset verifying various conjectures. To evidence the feasibility of our solution, we further contribute a baseline model and benchmark five representative models for a comprehensive comparison. The proposed model can effectively analyze irregular and unordered points for detecting salient objects. Thanks to incorporating the task-tailored designs, our method shows visible superiority over other baselines, producing more satisfactory results. Extensive experiments and discussions reveal the promising potential of this research field, paving the way for further study.
summary: This paper researches the unexplored task-point cloud salient object detection (SOD). Differing from SOD for images, we find the attention shift of point clouds may provoke saliency conflict, i.e., an object paradoxically belongs to salient and non-salient categories. To eschew this issue, we present a novel view-dependent perspective of salient objects, reasonably reflecting the most eye-catching objects in point cloud scenarios. Following this formulation, we introduce PCSOD, the first dataset proposed for point cloud SOD consisting of 2,872 in-/out-door 3D views. The samples in our dataset are labeled with hierarchical annotations, e.g., super-/sub-class, bounding box, and segmentation map, which endows the brilliant generalizability and broad applicability of our dataset verifying various conjectures. To evidence the feasibility of our solution, we further contribute a baseline model and benchmark five representative models for a comprehensive comparison. The proposed model can effectively analyze irregular and unordered points for detecting salient objects. Thanks to incorporating the task-tailored designs, our method shows visible superiority over other baselines, producing more satisfactory results. Extensive experiments and discussions reveal the promising potential of this research field, paving the way for further study.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了尚未探索的任务——点云显着目标检测（SOD）。与图像的 SOD 不同，我们发现点云的注意力转移可能会引发显着性冲突，即一个对象矛盾地属于显着类别和非显着类别。为了避免这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的依赖于视图的显着对象视角，合理地反映了点云场景中最引人注目的对象。按照这个公式，我们引入了 PCSOD，这是为点云 SOD 提出的第一个数据集，由 2,872 个室内/室外 3D 视图组成。我们数据集中的样本都标有分层注释，例如超/子类、边界框和分割图，这赋予了我们的数据集验证各种猜想的出色的通用性和广泛的适用性。为了证明我们的解决方案的可行性，我们进一步提供了一个基线模型，并对五个代表性模型进行了全面比较。该模型可以有效地分析不规则和无序点以检测显着目标。由于结合了针对任务的设计，我们的方法显示出优于其他基线的明显优势，产生了更令人满意的结果。广泛的实验和讨论揭示了该研究领域的广阔潜力，为进一步研究铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文研究点云中的显著性物体检测任务，提出首个点云显著性检测数据集PCSOD，并设计基线模型解决点云场景下的显著性冲突问题。
AI.motivation: 传统图像显著性检测在点云场景中存在注意力转移导致的显著性冲突问题，现有方法无法合理反映点云中最引人注目的物体。
AI.method: 提出基于视角依赖的显著性定义，构建包含2872个室内外3D视图的PCSOD数据集，设计支持不规则点云分析的基线模型并进行多模型对比实验。
AI.result: 所提方法在显著性检测任务中优于其他基线模型，实验验证了数据集的广泛适用性及方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 点云显著性检测具有重要研究价值，PCSOD数据集为后续研究提供了基础，任务定制化设计显著提升了检测性能。

authors_text: Nicky Nirlipta Sahoo,Balamurali Murugesan,Ayantika Das,Srinivasa Karthik,Keerthi Ram,Steffen Leonhardt,Jayaraj Joseph,Mohanasankar Sivaprakasam
title: Deep learning based non-contact physiological monitoring in Neonatal Intensive Care Unit
title_zh: 基于深度学习的新生儿重症监护室非接触式生理监测
abstract: Preterm babies in the Neonatal Intensive Care Unit (NICU) have to undergo continuous monitoring of their cardiac health. Conventional monitoring approaches are contact-based, making the neonates prone to various nosocomial infections. Video-based monitoring approaches have opened up potential avenues for contactless measurement. This work presents a pipeline for remote estimation of cardiopulmonary signals from videos in NICU setup. We have proposed an end-to-end deep learning (DL) model that integrates a non-learning based approach to generate surrogate ground truth (SGT) labels for supervision, thus refraining from direct dependency on true ground truth labels. We have performed an extended qualitative and quantitative analysis to examine the efficacy of our proposed DL-based pipeline and achieved an overall average mean absolute error of 4.6 beats per minute (bpm) and root mean square error of 6.2 bpm in the estimated heart rate.
summary: Preterm babies in the Neonatal Intensive Care Unit (NICU) have to undergo continuous monitoring of their cardiac health. Conventional monitoring approaches are contact-based, making the neonates prone to various nosocomial infections. Video-based monitoring approaches have opened up potential avenues for contactless measurement. This work presents a pipeline for remote estimation of cardiopulmonary signals from videos in NICU setup. We have proposed an end-to-end deep learning (DL) model that integrates a non-learning based approach to generate surrogate ground truth (SGT) labels for supervision, thus refraining from direct dependency on true ground truth labels. We have performed an extended qualitative and quantitative analysis to examine the efficacy of our proposed DL-based pipeline and achieved an overall average mean absolute error of 4.6 beats per minute (bpm) and root mean square error of 6.2 bpm in the estimated heart rate.
abstract_zh: 新生儿重症监护病房 (NICU) 中的早产儿必须持续监测其心脏健康状况。传统的监测方法是基于接触的，使得新生儿容易发生各种院内感染。基于视频的监控方法为非接触式测量开辟了潜在途径。这项工作提出了一种用于从 NICU 设置中的视频远程估计心肺信号的管道。我们提出了一种端到端深度学习（DL）模型，该模型集成了基于非学习的方法来生成用于监督的替代地面实况（SGT）标签，从而避免直接依赖真实的地面实况标签。我们进行了扩展的定性和定量分析，以检查我们提出的基于 DL 的流程的有效性，并在估计心率中实现了 4.6 次/分钟 (bpm) 的总体平均绝对误差和 6.2 bpm 的均方根误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的无接触生理监测方法，用于新生儿重症监护室（NICU）中早产儿的心率监测。
AI.motivation: 传统接触式监测易导致新生儿院内感染，而视频监测可实现无接触测量，但需解决标签依赖问题。
AI.method: 设计端到端深度学习模型，结合非学习方法生成替代地面真实标签（SGT），减少对真实标签的依赖。
AI.result: 在估计心率中取得平均绝对误差4.6 bpm、均方根误差6.2 bpm，定性和定量分析验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为NICU提供了可行的无接触监测方案，可能降低感染风险，未来可扩展至更多生理信号监测。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的无接触生理监测方法，用于新生儿重症监护室（NICU）中早产儿的心率监测。
ai_content.motivation: 传统接触式监测易导致新生儿院内感染，而视频监测可实现无接触测量，但需解决标签依赖问题。
ai_content.method: 设计端到端深度学习模型，结合非学习方法生成替代地面真实标签（SGT），减少对真实标签的依赖。
ai_content.result: 在估计心率中取得平均绝对误差4.6 bpm、均方根误差6.2 bpm，定性和定量分析验证了方法有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法为NICU提供了可行的无接触监测方案，可能降低感染风险，未来可扩展至更多生理信号监测。

search_text: Deep learning based non-contact physiological monitoring in Neonatal Intensive Care Unit 基于深度学习的新生儿重症监护室非接触式生理监测 Preterm babies in the Neonatal Intensive Care Unit (NICU) have to undergo continuous monitoring of their cardiac health. Conventional monitoring approaches are contact-based, making the neonates prone to various nosocomial infections. Video-based monitoring approaches have opened up potential avenues for contactless measurement. This work presents a pipeline for remote estimation of cardiopulmonary signals from videos in NICU setup. We have proposed an end-to-end deep learning (DL) model that integrates a non-learning based approach to generate surrogate ground truth (SGT) labels for supervision, thus refraining from direct dependency on true ground truth labels. We have performed an extended qualitative and quantitative analysis to examine the efficacy of our proposed DL-based pipeline and achieved an overall average mean absolute error of 4.6 beats per minute (bpm) and root mean square error of 6.2 bpm in the estimated heart rate. 新生儿重症监护病房 (NICU) 中的早产儿必须持续监测其心脏健康状况。传统的监测方法是基于接触的，使得新生儿容易发生各种院内感染。基于视频的监控方法为非接触式测量开辟了潜在途径。这项工作提出了一种用于从 NICU 设置中的视频远程估计心肺信号的管道。我们提出了一种端到端深度学习（DL）模型，该模型集成了基于非学习的方法来生成用于监督的替代地面实况（SGT）标签，从而避免直接依赖真实的地面实况标签。我们进行了扩展的定性和定量分析，以检查我们提出的基于 DL 的流程的有效性，并在估计心率中实现了 4.6 次/分钟 (bpm) 的总体平均绝对误差和 6.2 bpm 的均方根误差。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的无接触生理监测方法，用于新生儿重症监护室（NICU）中早产儿的心率监测。 Nicky Nirlipta Sahoo,Balamurali Murugesan,Ayantika Das,Srinivasa Karthik,Keerthi Ram,Steffen Leonhardt,Jayaraj Joseph,Mohanasankar Sivaprakasam eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Huaying Hao,Cong Xu,Dan Zhang,Qifeng Yan,Jiong Zhang,Yue Liu,Yitian Zhao
title: Sparse-based Domain Adaptation Network for OCTA Image Super-Resolution Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于 OCTA 图像超分辨率重建的稀疏域适应网络
comment: Accepted by IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics
comments: Accepted by IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics
abstract: Retinal Optical Coherence Tomography Angiography (OCTA) with high-resolution is important for the quantification and analysis of retinal vasculature. However, the resolution of OCTA images is inversely proportional to the field of view at the same sampling frequency, which is not conducive to clinicians for analyzing larger vascular areas. In this paper, we propose a novel Sparse-based domain Adaptation Super-Resolution network (SASR) for the reconstruction of realistic 6x6 mm2/low-resolution (LR) OCTA images to high-resolution (HR) representations. To be more specific, we first perform a simple degradation of the 3x3 mm2/high-resolution (HR) image to obtain the synthetic LR image. An efficient registration method is then employed to register the synthetic LR with its corresponding 3x3 mm2 image region within the 6x6 mm2 image to obtain the cropped realistic LR image. We then propose a multi-level super-resolution model for the fully-supervised reconstruction of the synthetic data, guiding the reconstruction of the realistic LR images through a generative-adversarial strategy that allows the synthetic and realistic LR images to be unified in the feature domain. Finally, a novel sparse edge-aware loss is designed to dynamically optimize the vessel edge structure. Extensive experiments on two OCTA sets have shown that our method performs better than state-of-the-art super-resolution reconstruction methods. In addition, we have investigated the performance of the reconstruction results on retina structure segmentations, which further validate the effectiveness of our approach.
summary: Retinal Optical Coherence Tomography Angiography (OCTA) with high-resolution is important for the quantification and analysis of retinal vasculature. However, the resolution of OCTA images is inversely proportional to the field of view at the same sampling frequency, which is not conducive to clinicians for analyzing larger vascular areas. In this paper, we propose a novel Sparse-based domain Adaptation Super-Resolution network (SASR) for the reconstruction of realistic 6x6 mm2/low-resolution (LR) OCTA images to high-resolution (HR) representations. To be more specific, we first perform a simple degradation of the 3x3 mm2/high-resolution (HR) image to obtain the synthetic LR image. An efficient registration method is then employed to register the synthetic LR with its corresponding 3x3 mm2 image region within the 6x6 mm2 image to obtain the cropped realistic LR image. We then propose a multi-level super-resolution model for the fully-supervised reconstruction of the synthetic data, guiding the reconstruction of the realistic LR images through a generative-adversarial strategy that allows the synthetic and realistic LR images to be unified in the feature domain. Finally, a novel sparse edge-aware loss is designed to dynamically optimize the vessel edge structure. Extensive experiments on two OCTA sets have shown that our method performs better than state-of-the-art super-resolution reconstruction methods. In addition, we have investigated the performance of the reconstruction results on retina structure segmentations, which further validate the effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 高分辨率视网膜光学相干断层扫描血管造影（OCTA）对于视网膜血管系统的量化和分析非常重要。然而，在相同采样频率下，OCTA图像的分辨率与视野成反比，不利于临床医生分析较大的血管区域。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于稀疏域自适应超分辨率网络（SASR），用于将真实的 6x6 mm2/低分辨率（LR）OCTA 图像重建为高分辨率（HR）表示。更具体地说，我们首先对 3x3 mm2/高分辨率 (HR) 图像进行简单的降级以获得合成 ​​LR 图像。然后采用有效的配准方法将合成 LR 与其在 6x6 mm2 图像内相应的 3x3 mm2 图像区域配准，以获得裁剪后的真实 LR 图像。然后，我们提出了一种多级超分辨率模型，用于合成数据的完全监督重建，通过生成对抗策略指导真实 LR 图像的重建，该策略允许合成和真实 LR 图像在特征域中统一。最后，设计了一种新颖的稀疏边缘感知损失来动态优化血管边缘结构。对两个 OCTA 集的大量实验表明，我们的方法比最先进的超分辨率重建方法表现更好。此外，我们还研究了重建结果在视网膜结构分割上的性能，这进一步验证了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于稀疏域自适应的超分辨率网络（SASR），用于将低分辨率OCTA图像重建为高分辨率图像。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率OCTA图像对视网膜血管分析至关重要，但分辨率与视场存在矛盾，现有方法难以兼顾大范围血管分析与高分辨率。
AI.method: 通过降级高分辨率图像生成合成低分辨率图像，结合配准方法获取真实低分辨率图像；设计多级超分辨率模型与生成对抗策略实现域对齐，并引入稀疏边缘感知损失优化血管结构。
AI.result: 在两个OCTA数据集上实验表明，该方法在超分辨率重建任务中优于现有方法，且重建结果在视网膜分割任务中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 提出的SASR网络通过域自适应与稀疏约束有效提升了OCTA图像的超分辨率重建质量，为临床大范围血管分析提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Kohei Yamashita,Yuto Enyo,Shohei Nobuhara,Ko Nishino
title: nLMVS-Net: Deep Non-Lambertian Multi-View Stereo
title_zh: nLMVS-Net：深度非朗伯多视图立体
abstract: We introduce a novel multi-view stereo (MVS) method that can simultaneously recover not just per-pixel depth but also surface normals, together with the reflectance of textureless, complex non-Lambertian surfaces captured under known but natural illumination. Our key idea is to formulate MVS as an end-to-end learnable network, which we refer to as nLMVS-Net, that seamlessly integrates radiometric cues to leverage surface normals as view-independent surface features for learned cost volume construction and filtering. It first estimates surface normals as pixel-wise probability densities for each view with a novel shape-from-shading network. These per-pixel surface normal densities and the input multi-view images are then input to a novel cost volume filtering network that learns to recover per-pixel depth and surface normal. The reflectance is also explicitly estimated by alternating with geometry reconstruction. Extensive quantitative evaluations on newly established synthetic and real-world datasets show that nLMVS-Net can robustly and accurately recover the shape and reflectance of complex objects in natural settings.
summary: We introduce a novel multi-view stereo (MVS) method that can simultaneously recover not just per-pixel depth but also surface normals, together with the reflectance of textureless, complex non-Lambertian surfaces captured under known but natural illumination. Our key idea is to formulate MVS as an end-to-end learnable network, which we refer to as nLMVS-Net, that seamlessly integrates radiometric cues to leverage surface normals as view-independent surface features for learned cost volume construction and filtering. It first estimates surface normals as pixel-wise probability densities for each view with a novel shape-from-shading network. These per-pixel surface normal densities and the input multi-view images are then input to a novel cost volume filtering network that learns to recover per-pixel depth and surface normal. The reflectance is also explicitly estimated by alternating with geometry reconstruction. Extensive quantitative evaluations on newly established synthetic and real-world datasets show that nLMVS-Net can robustly and accurately recover the shape and reflectance of complex objects in natural settings.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种新颖的多视图立体（MVS）方法，该方法不仅可以同时恢复每像素深度，还可以恢复表面法线，以及在已知但自然的照明下捕获的无纹理、复杂的非朗伯表面的反射率。我们的关键思想是将 MVS 制定为端到端可学习网络，我们将其称为 nLMVS-Net，它无缝集成辐射线索，以利用表面法线作为与视图无关的表面特征来进行学习成本体积构建和过滤。它首先使用新颖的形状着色网络将表面法线估计为每个视图的像素概率密度。然后，这些每像素表面法线密度和输入的多视图图像被输入到一个新颖的成本体积过滤网络，该网络学习恢复每像素深度和表面法线。还通过与几何重建交替来明确估计反射率。对新建立的合成和真实数据集的广泛定量评估表明，nLMVS-Net 可以稳健、准确地恢复自然环境中复杂物体的形状和反射率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为nLMVS-Net的深度多视角立体视觉方法，可同时恢复无纹理复杂非朗伯表面的像素级深度、表面法线及反射率。
AI.motivation: 传统MVS方法难以处理非朗伯表面和无纹理表面的反射特性，且难以同时精确估计深度与表面属性。
AI.method: 构建端到端网络nLMVS-Net，通过形状从阴影网络估计表面法线概率密度，结合多视角图像生成代价体，并利用辐射度线索进行深度与法线联合优化，交替估计几何与反射率。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集的定量评估中，nLMVS-Net展现出对复杂物体形状和反射率的鲁棒且精确的恢复能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过整合辐射度信息与深度学习，有效解决了非朗伯表面的多视角立体重建难题，为复杂场景的三维重建提供了新思路。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法通过整合辐射度信息与深度学习，有效解决了非朗伯表面的多视角立体重建难题，为复杂场景的三维重建提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出一种名为nLMVS-Net的深度多视角立体视觉方法，可同时恢复无纹理复杂非朗伯表面的像素级深度、表面法线及反射率。
motivation: 传统MVS方法难以处理非朗伯表面和无纹理表面的反射特性，且难以同时精确估计深度与表面属性。
method: 构建端到端网络nLMVS-Net，通过形状从阴影网络估计表面法线概率密度，结合多视角图像生成代价体，并利用辐射度线索进行深度与法线联合优化，交替估计几何与反射率。
result: 在合成与真实数据集的定量评估中，nLMVS-Net展现出对复杂物体形状和反射率的鲁棒且精确的恢复能力。
conclusion: 该方法通过整合辐射度信息与深度学习，有效解决了非朗伯表面的多视角立体重建难题，为复杂场景的三维重建提供了新思路。
search_text: nLMVS-Net: Deep Non-Lambertian Multi-View Stereo nLMVS-Net：深度非朗伯多视图立体 We introduce a novel multi-view stereo (MVS) method that can simultaneously recover not just per-pixel depth but also surface normals, together with the reflectance of textureless, complex non-Lambertian surfaces captured under known but natural illumination. Our key idea is to formulate MVS as an end-to-end learnable network, which we refer to as nLMVS-Net, that seamlessly integrates radiometric cues to leverage surface normals as view-independent surface features for learned cost volume construction and filtering. It first estimates surface normals as pixel-wise probability densities for each view with a novel shape-from-shading network. These per-pixel surface normal densities and the input multi-view images are then input to a novel cost volume filtering network that learns to recover per-pixel depth and surface normal. The reflectance is also explicitly estimated by alternating with geometry reconstruction. Extensive quantitative evaluations on newly established synthetic and real-world datasets show that nLMVS-Net can robustly and accurately recover the shape and reflectance of complex objects in natural settings. 我们引入了一种新颖的多视图立体（MVS）方法，该方法不仅可以同时恢复每像素深度，还可以恢复表面法线，以及在已知但自然的照明下捕获的无纹理、复杂的非朗伯表面的反射率。我们的关键思想是将 MVS 制定为端到端可学习网络，我们将其称为 nLMVS-Net，它无缝集成辐射线索，以利用表面法线作为与视图无关的表面特征来进行学习成本体积构建和过滤。它首先使用新颖的形状着色网络将表面法线估计为每个视图的像素概率密度。然后，这些每像素表面法线密度和输入的多视图图像被输入到一个新颖的成本体积过滤网络，该网络学习恢复每像素深度和表面法线。还通过与几何重建交替来明确估计反射率。对新建立的合成和真实数据集的广泛定量评估表明，nLMVS-Net 可以稳健、准确地恢复自然环境中复杂物体的形状和反射率。 本文提出一种名为nLMVS-Net的深度多视角立体视觉方法，可同时恢复无纹理复杂非朗伯表面的像素级深度、表面法线及反射率。 Kohei Yamashita,Yuto Enyo,Shohei Nobuhara,Ko Nishino cs.CV

authors_text: Jingyuan Yang,Jie Li,Leida Li,Xiumei Wang,Yuxuan Ding,Xinbo Gao
title: Seeking Subjectivity in Visual Emotion Distribution Learning
title_zh: 寻求视觉情感分布学习的主体性
abstract: Visual Emotion Analysis (VEA), which aims to predict people's emotions towards different visual stimuli, has become an attractive research topic recently. Rather than a single label classification task, it is more rational to regard VEA as a Label Distribution Learning (LDL) problem by voting from different individuals. Existing methods often predict visual emotion distribution in a unified network, neglecting the inherent subjectivity in its crowd voting process. In psychology, the \textit{Object-Appraisal-Emotion} model has demonstrated that each individual's emotion is affected by his/her subjective appraisal, which is further formed by the affective memory. Inspired by this, we propose a novel \textit{Subjectivity Appraise-and-Match Network (SAMNet)} to investigate the subjectivity in visual emotion distribution. To depict the diversity in crowd voting process, we first propose the \textit{Subjectivity Appraising} with multiple branches, where each branch simulates the emotion evocation process of a specific individual. Specifically, we construct the affective memory with an attention-based mechanism to preserve each individual's unique emotional experience. A subjectivity loss is further proposed to guarantee the divergence between different individuals. Moreover, we propose the \textit{Subjectivity Matching} with a matching loss, aiming at assigning unordered emotion labels to ordered individual predictions in a one-to-one correspondence with the Hungarian algorithm. Extensive experiments and comparisons are conducted on public visual emotion distribution datasets, and the results demonstrate that the proposed SAMNet consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art methods. Ablation study verifies the effectiveness of our method and visualization proves its interpretability.
summary: Visual Emotion Analysis (VEA), which aims to predict people's emotions towards different visual stimuli, has become an attractive research topic recently. Rather than a single label classification task, it is more rational to regard VEA as a Label Distribution Learning (LDL) problem by voting from different individuals. Existing methods often predict visual emotion distribution in a unified network, neglecting the inherent subjectivity in its crowd voting process. In psychology, the \textit{Object-Appraisal-Emotion} model has demonstrated that each individual's emotion is affected by his/her subjective appraisal, which is further formed by the affective memory. Inspired by this, we propose a novel \textit{Subjectivity Appraise-and-Match Network (SAMNet)} to investigate the subjectivity in visual emotion distribution. To depict the diversity in crowd voting process, we first propose the \textit{Subjectivity Appraising} with multiple branches, where each branch simulates the emotion evocation process of a specific individual. Specifically, we construct the affective memory with an attention-based mechanism to preserve each individual's unique emotional experience. A subjectivity loss is further proposed to guarantee the divergence between different individuals. Moreover, we propose the \textit{Subjectivity Matching} with a matching loss, aiming at assigning unordered emotion labels to ordered individual predictions in a one-to-one correspondence with the Hungarian algorithm. Extensive experiments and comparisons are conducted on public visual emotion distribution datasets, and the results demonstrate that the proposed SAMNet consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art methods. Ablation study verifies the effectiveness of our method and visualization proves its interpretability.
abstract_zh: 视觉情感分析（VEA）旨在预测人们对不同视觉刺激的情感，近年来已成为一个有吸引力的研究课题。与单一标签分类任务相比，将 VEA 视为通过不同个体投票的标签分布学习（LDL）问题更为合理。现有方法往往预测统一网络中的视觉情感分布，忽略了人群投票过程中固有的主观性。在心理学中，\textit{对象-评价-情感}模型表明，每个人的情感受到他/她的主观评价的影响，而主观评价又由情感记忆进一步形成。受此启发，我们提出了一种新颖的 \textit{主观性评估与匹配网络（SAMNet）}来研究视觉情感分布中的主观性。为了描述人群投票过程的多样性，我们首先提出具有多个分支的\textit{主观性评估}，其中每个分支模拟特定个体的情绪唤起过程。具体来说，我们用基于注意力的机制构建情感记忆，以保留每个人独特的情感体验。进一步提出主观性损失以保证不同个体之间的分歧。此外，我们提出了具有匹配损失的\textit{主观性匹配}，旨在将无序的情感标签分配给有序的个体预测，与匈牙利算法一一对应。在公共视觉情感分布数据集上进行了大量的实验和比较，结果表明所提出的 SAMNet 始终优于最先进的方法。消融研究验证了我们方法的有效性，可视化证明了其可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过建模个体主观性差异，改进视觉情感分布学习方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将视觉情感分析视为统一分布预测任务，忽视了群体投票中个体主观性差异。心理学中的情感生成模型表明，个体情感受主观评价和记忆影响，需在模型中体现这种差异。
AI.method: 提出SAMNet网络，包含多分支的主观性评估模块（通过注意力机制建模个体情感记忆）和主观性匹配模块（利用匈牙利算法实现无序标签与个体预测的一一对应），并设计主观性损失函数强化个体差异。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集上实验表明，SAMNet在情感分布预测指标上优于现有最优方法，消融实验和可视化结果验证了方法有效性与可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模个体主观性差异，SAMNet显著提升了视觉情感分布学习的性能，为群体情感分析提供了新思路。

authors_text: Fengbin Zhu,Wenqiang Lei,Fuli Feng,Chao Wang,Haozhou Zhang,Tat-Seng Chua
title: Towards Complex Document Understanding By Discrete Reasoning
title_zh: 通过离散推理实现复杂文档理解
abstract: Document Visual Question Answering (VQA) aims to understand visually-rich documents to answer questions in natural language, which is an emerging research topic for both Natural Language Processing and Computer Vision. In this work, we introduce a new Document VQA dataset, named TAT-DQA, which consists of 3,067 document pages comprising semi-structured table(s) and unstructured text as well as 16,558 question-answer pairs by extending the TAT-QA dataset. These documents are sampled from real-world financial reports and contain lots of numbers, which means discrete reasoning capability is demanded to answer questions on this dataset. Based on TAT-DQA, we further develop a novel model named MHST that takes into account the information in multi-modalities, including text, layout and visual image, to intelligently address different types of questions with corresponding strategies, i.e., extraction or reasoning. Extensive experiments show that the MHST model significantly outperforms the baseline methods, demonstrating its effectiveness. However, the performance still lags far behind that of expert humans. We expect that our new TAT-DQA dataset would facilitate the research on deep understanding of visually-rich documents combining vision and language, especially for scenarios that require discrete reasoning. Also, we hope the proposed model would inspire researchers to design more advanced Document VQA models in future. Our dataset will be publicly available for non-commercial use at https://nextplusplus.github.io/TAT-DQA/.
summary: Document Visual Question Answering (VQA) aims to understand visually-rich documents to answer questions in natural language, which is an emerging research topic for both Natural Language Processing and Computer Vision. In this work, we introduce a new Document VQA dataset, named TAT-DQA, which consists of 3,067 document pages comprising semi-structured table(s) and unstructured text as well as 16,558 question-answer pairs by extending the TAT-QA dataset. These documents are sampled from real-world financial reports and contain lots of numbers, which means discrete reasoning capability is demanded to answer questions on this dataset. Based on TAT-DQA, we further develop a novel model named MHST that takes into account the information in multi-modalities, including text, layout and visual image, to intelligently address different types of questions with corresponding strategies, i.e., extraction or reasoning. Extensive experiments show that the MHST model significantly outperforms the baseline methods, demonstrating its effectiveness. However, the performance still lags far behind that of expert humans. We expect that our new TAT-DQA dataset would facilitate the research on deep understanding of visually-rich documents combining vision and language, especially for scenarios that require discrete reasoning. Also, we hope the proposed model would inspire researchers to design more advanced Document VQA models in future. Our dataset will be publicly available for non-commercial use at https://nextplusplus.github.io/TAT-DQA/.
abstract_zh: 文档视觉问答（VQA）旨在理解视觉丰富的文档，以回答自然语言的问题，这是自然语言处理和计算机视觉的一个新兴研究课题。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个新的文档 VQA 数据集，名为 TAT-DQA，它由 3,067 个文档页面组成，其中包括半结构化表格和非结构化文本，以及通过扩展 TAT-QA 数据集而包含的 16,558 个问答对。这些文档是从现实世界的财务报告中采样的，包含大量数字，这意味着需要离散推理能力来回答有关该数据集的问题。在 TAT-DQA 的基础上，我们进一步开发了一种名为 MHST 的新模型，该模型考虑了包括文本、布局和视觉图像在内的多模态信息，通过相应的策略（即提取或推理）智能地解决不同类型的问题。大量实验表明，MHST 模型显着优于基线方法，证明了其有效性。然而，其表现仍然远远落后于人类专家。我们期望新的 TAT-DQA 数据集将有助于对结合视觉和语言的视觉丰富文档的深入理解的研究，特别是对于需要离散推理的场景。此外，我们希望所提出的模型能够激励研究人员在未来设计更先进的文档 VQA 模型。我们的数据集将在 https://nextplusplus.github.io/TAT-DQA/ 上公开供非商业用途使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为TAT-DQA的新文档视觉问答数据集和一种多模态混合策略模型MHST，以解决需要离散推理能力的复杂文档理解问题。
AI.motivation: 现有文档视觉问答研究缺乏对需要离散推理能力的复杂场景支持，且难以同时处理结构化表格与非结构化文本的多模态信息。
AI.method: 通过扩展TAT-QA数据集构建包含3,067页财务报告的TAT-DQA数据集，开发MHST模型融合文本、布局和视觉信息，采用提取或推理策略处理不同问题类型。
AI.result: MHST模型在基准测试中显著优于现有方法，但性能仍远低于人类专家水平。
AI.conclusion: TAT-DQA数据集和MHST模型为结合视觉与语言的复杂文档理解研究提供新方向，尤其适用于需要离散推理的场景。

tldr: 本文提出一个名为TAT-DQA的新文档视觉问答数据集和一种多模态混合策略模型MHST，以解决需要离散推理能力的复杂文档理解问题。
motivation: 现有文档视觉问答研究缺乏对需要离散推理能力的复杂场景支持，且难以同时处理结构化表格与非结构化文本的多模态信息。
method: 通过扩展TAT-QA数据集构建包含3,067页财务报告的TAT-DQA数据集，开发MHST模型融合文本、布局和视觉信息，采用提取或推理策略处理不同问题类型。
result: MHST模型在基准测试中显著优于现有方法，但性能仍远低于人类专家水平。
conclusion: TAT-DQA数据集和MHST模型为结合视觉与语言的复杂文档理解研究提供新方向，尤其适用于需要离散推理的场景。
search_text: Towards Complex Document Understanding By Discrete Reasoning 通过离散推理实现复杂文档理解 Document Visual Question Answering (VQA) aims to understand visually-rich documents to answer questions in natural language, which is an emerging research topic for both Natural Language Processing and Computer Vision. In this work, we introduce a new Document VQA dataset, named TAT-DQA, which consists of 3,067 document pages comprising semi-structured table(s) and unstructured text as well as 16,558 question-answer pairs by extending the TAT-QA dataset. These documents are sampled from real-world financial reports and contain lots of numbers, which means discrete reasoning capability is demanded to answer questions on this dataset. Based on TAT-DQA, we further develop a novel model named MHST that takes into account the information in multi-modalities, including text, layout and visual image, to intelligently address different types of questions with corresponding strategies, i.e., extraction or reasoning. Extensive experiments show that the MHST model significantly outperforms the baseline methods, demonstrating its effectiveness. However, the performance still lags far behind that of expert humans. We expect that our new TAT-DQA dataset would facilitate the research on deep understanding of visually-rich documents combining vision and language, especially for scenarios that require discrete reasoning. Also, we hope the proposed model would inspire researchers to design more advanced Document VQA models in future. Our dataset will be publicly available for non-commercial use at https://nextplusplus.github.io/TAT-DQA/. 文档视觉问答（VQA）旨在理解视觉丰富的文档，以回答自然语言的问题，这是自然语言处理和计算机视觉的一个新兴研究课题。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个新的文档 VQA 数据集，名为 TAT-DQA，它由 3,067 个文档页面组成，其中包括半结构化表格和非结构化文本，以及通过扩展 TAT-QA 数据集而包含的 16,558 个问答对。这些文档是从现实世界的财务报告中采样的，包含大量数字，这意味着需要离散推理能力来回答有关该数据集的问题。在 TAT-DQA 的基础上，我们进一步开发了一种名为 MHST 的新模型，该模型考虑了包括文本、布局和视觉图像在内的多模态信息，通过相应的策略（即提取或推理）智能地解决不同类型的问题。大量实验表明，MHST 模型显着优于基线方法，证明了其有效性。然而，其表现仍然远远落后于人类专家。我们期望新的 TAT-DQA 数据集将有助于对结合视觉和语言的视觉丰富文档的深入理解的研究，特别是对于需要离散推理的场景。此外，我们希望所提出的模型能够激励研究人员在未来设计更先进的文档 VQA 模型。我们的数据集将在 https://nextplusplus.github.io/TAT-DQA/ 上公开供非商业用途使用。 本文提出一个名为TAT-DQA的新文档视觉问答数据集和一种多模态混合策略模型MHST，以解决需要离散推理能力的复杂文档理解问题。 Fengbin Zhu,Wenqiang Lei,Fuli Feng,Chao Wang,Haozhou Zhang,Tat-Seng Chua cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Di Jin,Sijia Liu,Yang Liu,Dilek Hakkani-Tur
title: Improving Bot Response Contradiction Detection via Utterance Rewriting
title_zh: 通过话语重写改进机器人响应矛盾检测
abstract: Though chatbots based on large neural models can often produce fluent responses in open domain conversations, one salient error type is contradiction or inconsistency with the preceding conversation turns. Previous work has treated contradiction detection in bot responses as a task similar to natural language inference, e.g., detect the contradiction between a pair of bot utterances. However, utterances in conversations may contain co-references or ellipsis, and using these utterances as is may not always be sufficient for identifying contradictions. This work aims to improve the contradiction detection via rewriting all bot utterances to restore antecedents and ellipsis. We curated a new dataset for utterance rewriting and built a rewriting model on it. We empirically demonstrate that this model can produce satisfactory rewrites to make bot utterances more complete. Furthermore, using rewritten utterances improves contradiction detection performance significantly, e.g., the AUPR and joint accuracy scores (detecting contradiction along with evidence) increase by 6.5% and 4.5% (absolute increase), respectively.
summary: Though chatbots based on large neural models can often produce fluent responses in open domain conversations, one salient error type is contradiction or inconsistency with the preceding conversation turns. Previous work has treated contradiction detection in bot responses as a task similar to natural language inference, e.g., detect the contradiction between a pair of bot utterances. However, utterances in conversations may contain co-references or ellipsis, and using these utterances as is may not always be sufficient for identifying contradictions. This work aims to improve the contradiction detection via rewriting all bot utterances to restore antecedents and ellipsis. We curated a new dataset for utterance rewriting and built a rewriting model on it. We empirically demonstrate that this model can produce satisfactory rewrites to make bot utterances more complete. Furthermore, using rewritten utterances improves contradiction detection performance significantly, e.g., the AUPR and joint accuracy scores (detecting contradiction along with evidence) increase by 6.5% and 4.5% (absolute increase), respectively.
abstract_zh: 尽管基于大型神经模型的聊天机器人通常可以在开放域对话中产生流畅的响应，但一种显着的错误类型是与之前的对话回合矛盾或不一致。之前的工作将机器人响应中的矛盾检测视为类似于自然语言推理的任务，例如检测一对机器人话语之间的矛盾。然而，对话中的话语可能包含共同引用或省略，并且按原样使用这些话语可能并不总是足以识别矛盾。这项工作旨在通过重写所有机器人话语以恢复先行词和省略号来改进矛盾检测。我们策划了一个用于话语重写的新数据集，并在其上构建了重写模型。我们凭经验证明该模型可以产生令人满意的重写，使机器人话语更加完整。此外，使用重写的话语可以显着提高矛盾检测性能，例如，AUPR 和联合准确度得分（检测矛盾和证据）分别增加 6.5% 和 4.5%（绝对增加）。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过改写对话中的机器人回复来提升矛盾检测效果，解决因代词和省略导致的前后文不一致问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将矛盾检测视为自然语言推理任务，但对话中的代词和省略可能导致检测不足，需通过改写补全上下文信息。
AI.method: 构建新的对话改写数据集，训练改写模型还原代词和省略内容，并基于改写后的语句提升矛盾检测性能。
AI.result: 改写模型使矛盾检测的AUPR提升6.5%，联合准确率提升4.5%。
AI.conclusion: 改写对话回复能有效增强机器人矛盾检测能力，为开放域对话系统提供新思路。

authors_text: Jiaming Zhang,Kailun Yang,Hao Shi,Simon Reiß,Kunyu Peng,Chaoxiang Ma,Haodong Fu,Philip H. S. Torr,Kaiwei Wang,Rainer Stiefelhagen
title: Behind Every Domain There is a Shift: Adapting Distortion-aware Vision Transformers for Panoramic Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 每个领域背后都有一个转变：采用失真感知视觉变压器进行全景语义分割
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI). Extended version of CVPR 2022 paper arXiv:2203.01452. Code is available at https://github.com/jamycheung/Trans4PASS
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI). Extended version of CVPR 2022 paper arXiv:2203.01452. Code is available at https://github.com/jamycheung/Trans4PASS
abstract: In this paper, we address panoramic semantic segmentation which is under-explored due to two critical challenges: (1) image distortions and object deformations on panoramas; (2) lack of semantic annotations in the 360° imagery. To tackle these problems, first, we propose the upgraded Transformer for Panoramic Semantic Segmentation, i.e., Trans4PASS+, equipped with Deformable Patch Embedding (DPE) and Deformable MLP (DMLPv2) modules for handling object deformations and image distortions whenever (before or after adaptation) and wherever (shallow or deep levels). Second, we enhance the Mutual Prototypical Adaptation (MPA) strategy via pseudo-label rectification for unsupervised domain adaptive panoramic segmentation. Third, aside from Pinhole-to-Panoramic (Pin2Pan) adaptation, we create a new dataset (SynPASS) with 9,080 panoramic images, facilitating Synthetic-to-Real (Syn2Real) adaptation scheme in 360° imagery. Extensive experiments are conducted, which cover indoor and outdoor scenarios, and each of them is investigated with Pin2Pan and Syn2Real regimens. Trans4PASS+ achieves state-of-the-art performances on four domain adaptive panoramic semantic segmentation benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/jamycheung/Trans4PASS.
summary: In this paper, we address panoramic semantic segmentation which is under-explored due to two critical challenges: (1) image distortions and object deformations on panoramas; (2) lack of semantic annotations in the 360° imagery. To tackle these problems, first, we propose the upgraded Transformer for Panoramic Semantic Segmentation, i.e., Trans4PASS+, equipped with Deformable Patch Embedding (DPE) and Deformable MLP (DMLPv2) modules for handling object deformations and image distortions whenever (before or after adaptation) and wherever (shallow or deep levels). Second, we enhance the Mutual Prototypical Adaptation (MPA) strategy via pseudo-label rectification for unsupervised domain adaptive panoramic segmentation. Third, aside from Pinhole-to-Panoramic (Pin2Pan) adaptation, we create a new dataset (SynPASS) with 9,080 panoramic images, facilitating Synthetic-to-Real (Syn2Real) adaptation scheme in 360° imagery. Extensive experiments are conducted, which cover indoor and outdoor scenarios, and each of them is investigated with Pin2Pan and Syn2Real regimens. Trans4PASS+ achieves state-of-the-art performances on four domain adaptive panoramic semantic segmentation benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/jamycheung/Trans4PASS.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了全景语义分割问题，该分割由于两个关键挑战而尚未得到充分探索：（1）全景图像的图像扭曲和对象变形； (2) 360°图像缺乏语义标注。为了解决这些问题，首先，我们提出了升级版的全景语义分割Transformer，即Trans4PASS+，配备可变形补丁嵌入（DPE）和可变形MLP（DMLPv2）模块，用于随时随地（适应之前或之后）和任何地方（浅层或深层）处理对象变形和图像扭曲。其次，我们通过伪标签校正增强了相互原型适应（MPA）策略，以实现无监督域自适应全景分割。第三，除了针孔到全景（Pin2Pan）适应之外，我们还创建了一个包含 9,080 个全景图像的新数据集（SynPASS），促进 360° 图像中的合成到真实（Syn2Real）适应方案。我们进行了广泛的实验，涵盖室内和室外场景，并且每个实验都使用 Pin2Pan 和 Syn2Real 方案进行研究。 Trans4PASS+ 在四个域自适应全景语义分割基准上实现了最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/jamycheung/Trans4PASS 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适应全景图像语义分割的变形感知视觉Transformer模型，解决全景图像中的畸变和标注不足问题。
AI.motivation: 全景图像语义分割面临图像畸变、物体变形及360°影像缺乏标注的挑战，现有方法难以有效适应不同领域数据。
AI.method: 设计Trans4PASS+模型，包含可变形补丁嵌入（DPE）和可变形MLP（DMLPv2）模块；通过伪标签校正增强互原型适应策略（MPA）；构建SynPASS数据集支持合成到真实场景的适应。
AI.result: 在四个领域自适应全景分割基准测试中达到最先进水平，覆盖室内外场景及Pin2Pan和Syn2Real两种适应方案。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模型和数据集有效解决了全景分割中的畸变适应问题，推动了跨领域全景语义分割的发展。

Extensive experiments are conducted, which cover indoor and outdoor scenarios, and each of them is investigated with Pin2Pan and Syn2Real regimens. Trans4PASS+ achieves state-of-the-art performances on four domain adaptive panoramic semantic segmentation benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/jamycheung/Trans4PASS. 在本文中，我们解决了全景语义分割问题，该分割由于两个关键挑战而尚未得到充分探索：（1）全景图像的图像扭曲和对象变形； (2) 360°图像缺乏语义标注。为了解决这些问题，首先，我们提出了升级版的全景语义分割Transformer，即Trans4PASS+，配备可变形补丁嵌入（DPE）和可变形MLP（DMLPv2）模块，用于随时随地（适应之前或之后）和任何地方（浅层或深层）处理对象变形和图像扭曲。其次，我们通过伪标签校正增强了相互原型适应（MPA）策略，以实现无监督域自适应全景分割。第三，除了针孔到全景（Pin2Pan）适应之外，我们还创建了一个包含 9,080 个全景图像的新数据集（SynPASS），促进 360° 图像中的合成到真实（Syn2Real）适应方案。我们进行了广泛的实验，涵盖室内和室外场景，并且每个实验都使用 Pin2Pan 和 Syn2Real 方案进行研究。 Trans4PASS+ 在四个域自适应全景语义分割基准上实现了最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/jamycheung/Trans4PASS 获取。 本文提出一种适应全景图像语义分割的变形感知视觉Transformer模型，解决全景图像中的畸变和标注不足问题。 Jiaming Zhang,Kailun Yang,Hao Shi,Simon Reiß,Kunyu Peng,Chaoxiang Ma,Haodong Fu,Philip H. S. Torr,Kaiwei Wang,Rainer Stiefelhagen cs.CV,cs.RO,eess.IV

authors_text: Yudong Han,Liqiang Nie,Jianhua Yin,Jianlong Wu,Yan Yan
title: Visual Perturbation-aware Collaborative Learning for Overcoming the Language Prior Problem
title_zh: 用于克服语言先验问题的视觉扰动感知协作学习
comment: 13 pages, 10 figures, submitted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence
comments: 13 pages, 10 figures, submitted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence
abstract: Several studies have recently pointed that existing Visual Question Answering (VQA) models heavily suffer from the language prior problem, which refers to capturing superficial statistical correlations between the question type and the answer whereas ignoring the image contents. Numerous efforts have been dedicated to strengthen the image dependency by creating the delicate models or introducing the extra visual annotations. However, these methods cannot sufficiently explore how the visual cues explicitly affect the learned answer representation, which is vital for language reliance alleviation. Moreover, they generally emphasize the class-level discrimination of the learned answer representation, which overlooks the more fine-grained instance-level patterns and demands further optimization. In this paper, we propose a novel collaborative learning scheme from the viewpoint of visual perturbation calibration, which can better investigate the fine-grained visual effects and mitigate the language prior problem by learning the instance-level characteristics. Specifically, we devise a visual controller to construct two sorts of curated images with different perturbation extents, based on which the collaborative learning of intra-instance invariance and inter-instance discrimination is implemented by two well-designed discriminators. Besides, we implement the information bottleneck modulator on latent space for further bias alleviation and representation calibration. We impose our visual perturbation-aware framework to three orthodox baselines and the experimental results on two diagnostic VQA-CP benchmark datasets evidently demonstrate its effectiveness. In addition, we also justify its robustness on the balanced VQA benchmark.
summary: Several studies have recently pointed that existing Visual Question Answering (VQA) models heavily suffer from the language prior problem, which refers to capturing superficial statistical correlations between the question type and the answer whereas ignoring the image contents. Numerous efforts have been dedicated to strengthen the image dependency by creating the delicate models or introducing the extra visual annotations. However, these methods cannot sufficiently explore how the visual cues explicitly affect the learned answer representation, which is vital for language reliance alleviation. Moreover, they generally emphasize the class-level discrimination of the learned answer representation, which overlooks the more fine-grained instance-level patterns and demands further optimization. In this paper, we propose a novel collaborative learning scheme from the viewpoint of visual perturbation calibration, which can better investigate the fine-grained visual effects and mitigate the language prior problem by learning the instance-level characteristics. Specifically, we devise a visual controller to construct two sorts of curated images with different perturbation extents, based on which the collaborative learning of intra-instance invariance and inter-instance discrimination is implemented by two well-designed discriminators. Besides, we implement the information bottleneck modulator on latent space for further bias alleviation and representation calibration. We impose our visual perturbation-aware framework to three orthodox baselines and the experimental results on two diagnostic VQA-CP benchmark datasets evidently demonstrate its effectiveness. In addition, we also justify its robustness on the balanced VQA benchmark.
abstract_zh: 最近的几项研究指出，现有的视觉问答（VQA）模型严重受到语言先验问题的影响，即捕获问题类型和答案之间的表面统计相关性，而忽略图像内容。通过创建精致的模型或引入额外的视觉注释，人们做出了许多努力来加强图像依赖性。然而，这些方法无法充分探索视觉线索如何明确影响学习到的答案表示，这对于缓解语言依赖至关重要。此外，他们通常强调所学习的答案表示的类级别区分，而忽略了更细粒度的实例级别模式并需要进一步优化。在本文中，我们从视觉扰动校准的角度提出了一种新颖的协作学习方案，该方案可以通过学习实例级特征更好地研究细粒度视觉效果并缓解语言先验问题。具体来说，我们设计了一个视觉控制器来构造两种具有不同扰动程度的精选图像，在此基础上，通过两个精心设计的判别器实现实例内不变性和实例间判别的协作学习。此外，我们在潜在空间上实现了信息瓶颈调制器，以进一步减轻偏差和表示校准。我们将视觉扰动感知框架应用于三个正统基线，并且两个诊断 VQA-CP 基准数据集上的实验结果明显证明了其有效性。此外，我们还在平衡 VQA 基准上证明了其稳健性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉扰动校准的协作学习框架，用于解决视觉问答（VQA）中的语言先验问题，通过强化视觉线索对答案表示的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有VQA模型过度依赖问题与答案的表面统计关联，忽视图像内容，且现有方法未能充分探索视觉线索对答案表示的影响，也未关注细粒度的实例级模式。
AI.method: 设计视觉控制器生成不同扰动程度的图像，通过两个判别器实现实例内不变性与实例间判别性的协作学习，并引入信息瓶颈调制器优化潜在空间表示。
AI.result: 在两个诊断性VQA-CP基准数据集上显著提升性能，且在平衡VQA基准中验证了方法的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过细粒度视觉效应建模和表示校准，有效缓解了语言先验问题，为VQA模型的视觉依赖优化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Taha Ceritli,Andrew P. Creagh,David A. Clifton
title: Mixture of Input-Output Hidden Markov Models for Heterogeneous Disease Progression Modeling
title_zh: 用于异质疾病进展建模的输入输出混合隐马尔可夫模型
abstract: A particular challenge for disease progression modeling is the heterogeneity of a disease and its manifestations in the patients. Existing approaches often assume the presence of a single disease progression characteristics which is unlikely for neurodegenerative disorders such as Parkinson's disease. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical time-series model that can discover multiple disease progression dynamics. The proposed model is an extension of an input-output hidden Markov model that takes into account the clinical assessments of patients' health status and prescribed medications. We illustrate the benefits of our model using a synthetically generated dataset and a real-world longitudinal dataset for Parkinson's disease.
summary: A particular challenge for disease progression modeling is the heterogeneity of a disease and its manifestations in the patients. Existing approaches often assume the presence of a single disease progression characteristics which is unlikely for neurodegenerative disorders such as Parkinson's disease. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical time-series model that can discover multiple disease progression dynamics. The proposed model is an extension of an input-output hidden Markov model that takes into account the clinical assessments of patients' health status and prescribed medications. We illustrate the benefits of our model using a synthetically generated dataset and a real-world longitudinal dataset for Parkinson's disease.
abstract_zh: 疾病进展建模的一个特殊挑战是疾病及其在患者中的表现的异质性。现有的方法通常假设存在单一疾病进展特征，这对于帕金森病等神经退行性疾病来说是不可能的。在本文中，我们提出了一种分层时间序列模型，可以发现多种疾病进展动态。所提出的模型是输入输出隐马尔可夫模型的扩展，该模型考虑了患者健康状况和处方药物的临床评估。我们使用综合生成的数据集和帕金森病的真实世界纵向数据集来说明我们的模型的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合输入输出隐马尔可夫模型，用于建模神经退行性疾病（如帕金森病）的异质性进展动态。
AI.motivation: 现有疾病进展模型假设单一病理特征，无法反映神经退行性疾病在患者间的显著异质性，需更灵活的建模方法。
AI.method: 扩展输入输出隐马尔可夫模型为分层时间序列结构，整合患者临床评估数据与用药信息，通过合成数据和帕金森病真实数据验证模型。
AI.result: 合成数据验证了模型对多动态模式的捕捉能力，真实数据表明该模型较传统方法更准确刻画帕金森病进展轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型可有效表征疾病异质性，为个性化医疗提供理论支持，未来可拓展至其他复杂慢性病的进展分析。

authors_text: Min Zhang,Zhihong Pan,Xin Zhou,C. -C. Jay Kuo
title: Enhancing Image Rescaling using Dual Latent Variables in Invertible Neural Network
title_zh: 在可逆神经网络中使用双潜变量增强图像缩放
abstract: Normalizing flow models have been used successfully for generative image super-resolution (SR) by approximating complex distribution of natural images to simple tractable distribution in latent space through Invertible Neural Networks (INN). These models can generate multiple realistic SR images from one low-resolution (LR) input using randomly sampled points in the latent space, simulating the ill-posed nature of image upscaling where multiple high-resolution (HR) images correspond to the same LR. Lately, the invertible process in INN has also been used successfully by bidirectional image rescaling models like IRN and HCFlow for joint optimization of downscaling and inverse upscaling, resulting in significant improvements in upscaled image quality. While they are optimized for image downscaling too, the ill-posed nature of image downscaling, where one HR image could be downsized to multiple LR images depending on different interpolation kernels and resampling methods, is not considered. A new downscaling latent variable, in addition to the original one representing uncertainties in image upscaling, is introduced to model variations in the image downscaling process. This dual latent variable enhancement is applicable to different image rescaling models and it is shown in extensive experiments that it can improve image upscaling accuracy consistently without sacrificing image quality in downscaled LR images. It is also shown to be effective in enhancing other INN-based models for image restoration applications like image hiding.
summary: Normalizing flow models have been used successfully for generative image super-resolution (SR) by approximating complex distribution of natural images to simple tractable distribution in latent space through Invertible Neural Networks (INN). These models can generate multiple realistic SR images from one low-resolution (LR) input using randomly sampled points in the latent space, simulating the ill-posed nature of image upscaling where multiple high-resolution (HR) images correspond to the same LR. Lately, the invertible process in INN has also been used successfully by bidirectional image rescaling models like IRN and HCFlow for joint optimization of downscaling and inverse upscaling, resulting in significant improvements in upscaled image quality. While they are optimized for image downscaling too, the ill-posed nature of image downscaling, where one HR image could be downsized to multiple LR images depending on different interpolation kernels and resampling methods, is not considered. A new downscaling latent variable, in addition to the original one representing uncertainties in image upscaling, is introduced to model variations in the image downscaling process. This dual latent variable enhancement is applicable to different image rescaling models and it is shown in extensive experiments that it can improve image upscaling accuracy consistently without sacrificing image quality in downscaled LR images. It is also shown to be effective in enhancing other INN-based models for image restoration applications like image hiding.
abstract_zh: 归一化流模型已成功用于生成图像超分辨率（SR），通过可逆神经网络（INN）将自然图像的复杂分布近似为潜在空间中的简单易处理的分布。这些模型可以使用潜在空间中的随机采样点从一个低分辨率 (LR) 输入生成多个真实的 SR 图像，模拟图像放大的不适定性质，其中多个高分辨率 (HR) 图像对应于同一 LR。最近，INN 中的可逆过程也成功地被 IRN 和 HCFlow 等双向图像缩放模型用于缩小和逆放大的联合优化，从而显着提高了放大后的图像质量。虽然它们也针对图像缩小进行了优化，但没有考虑图像缩小的不适定性质，即根据不同的插值内核和重采样方法，一张 HR 图像可以缩小为多个 LR 图像。除了表示图像放大中的不确定性的原始变量之外，还引入了一种新的缩小潜变量来对图像缩小过程中的变化进行建模。这种双潜变量增强适用于不同的图像缩放模型，并且大量实验表明，它可以一致地提高图像放大精度，而不会牺牲缩小后的 LR 图像的图像质量。它还被证明可以有效增强其他基于 INN 的模型，用于图像恢复应用（例如图像隐藏）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过引入双潜变量增强可逆神经网络（INN）以提升图像缩放效果，同时解决图像超分辨率和下采样的不确定性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于INN的图像超分辨率模型未充分考虑图像下采样的病态性（同一高分辨率图像可生成多个低分辨率图像），导致缩放质量受限。
AI.method: 在原有表示超分辨率不确定性的潜变量基础上，新增一个下采样潜变量，通过双向优化联合建模图像缩放过程中的上下采样不确定性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在提升超分辨率精度的同时保持下采样图像质量，且在图像修复等任务中表现优于现有INN模型。
AI.conclusion: 双潜变量框架有效解决了图像缩放的双向不确定性问题，为INN在图像生成与修复领域提供了更鲁棒的建模方案。

search_text: Enhancing Image Rescaling using Dual Latent Variables in Invertible Neural Network 在可逆神经网络中使用双潜变量增强图像缩放 Normalizing flow models have been used successfully for generative image super-resolution (SR) by approximating complex distribution of natural images to simple tractable distribution in latent space through Invertible Neural Networks (INN). These models can generate multiple realistic SR images from one low-resolution (LR) input using randomly sampled points in the latent space, simulating the ill-posed nature of image upscaling where multiple high-resolution (HR) images correspond to the same LR. Lately, the invertible process in INN has also been used successfully by bidirectional image rescaling models like IRN and HCFlow for joint optimization of downscaling and inverse upscaling, resulting in significant improvements in upscaled image quality. While they are optimized for image downscaling too, the ill-posed nature of image downscaling, where one HR image could be downsized to multiple LR images depending on different interpolation kernels and resampling methods, is not considered. A new downscaling latent variable, in addition to the original one representing uncertainties in image upscaling, is introduced to model variations in the image downscaling process. This dual latent variable enhancement is applicable to different image rescaling models and it is shown in extensive experiments that it can improve image upscaling accuracy consistently without sacrificing image quality in downscaled LR images. It is also shown to be effective in enhancing other INN-based models for image restoration applications like image hiding. 归一化流模型已成功用于生成图像超分辨率（SR），通过可逆神经网络（INN）将自然图像的复杂分布近似为潜在空间中的简单易处理的分布。这些模型可以使用潜在空间中的随机采样点从一个低分辨率 (LR) 输入生成多个真实的 SR 图像，模拟图像放大的不适定性质，其中多个高分辨率 (HR) 图像对应于同一 LR。最近，INN 中的可逆过程也成功地被 IRN 和 HCFlow 等双向图像缩放模型用于缩小和逆放大的联合优化，从而显着提高了放大后的图像质量。虽然它们也针对图像缩小进行了优化，但没有考虑图像缩小的不适定性质，即根据不同的插值内核和重采样方法，一张 HR 图像可以缩小为多个 LR 图像。除了表示图像放大中的不确定性的原始变量之外，还引入了一种新的缩小潜变量来对图像缩小过程中的变化进行建模。这种双潜变量增强适用于不同的图像缩放模型，并且大量实验表明，它可以一致地提高图像放大精度，而不会牺牲缩小后的 LR 图像的图像质量。它还被证明可以有效增强其他基于 INN 的模型，用于图像恢复应用（例如图像隐藏）。 本文提出通过引入双潜变量增强可逆神经网络（INN）以提升图像缩放效果，同时解决图像超分辨率和下采样的不确定性问题。 Min Zhang,Zhihong Pan,Xin Zhou,C. -C. authors_text: Ahmad Mustapha,Wael Khreich,Wasim Masr
title: A Deep Dive into Deep Cluster
title_zh: 深入探讨深层集群
abstract: Deep Learning has demonstrated a significant improvement against traditional machine learning approaches in different domains such as image and speech recognition. Their success on benchmark datasets is transferred to the real-world through pretrained models by practitioners. Pretraining visual models using supervised learning requires a significant amount of expensive data annotation. To tackle this limitation, DeepCluster - a simple and scalable unsupervised pretraining of visual representations - has been proposed. However, the underlying work of the model is not yet well understood. In this paper, we analyze DeepCluster internals and exhaustively evaluate the impact of various hyperparameters over a wide range of values on three different datasets. Accordingly, we propose an explanation of why the algorithm works in practice. We also show that DeepCluster convergence and performance highly depend on the interplay between the quality of the randomly initialized filters of the convolutional layer and the selected number of clusters. Furthermore, we demonstrate that continuous clustering is not critical for DeepCluster convergence. Therefore, early stopping of the clustering phase will reduce the training time and allow the algorithm to scale to large datasets. Finally, we derive plausible hyperparameter selection criteria in a semi-supervised setting.
summary: Deep Learning has demonstrated a significant improvement against traditional machine learning approaches in different domains such as image and speech recognition. Their success on benchmark datasets is transferred to the real-world through pretrained models by practitioners. Pretraining visual models using supervised learning requires a significant amount of expensive data annotation. To tackle this limitation, DeepCluster - a simple and scalable unsupervised pretraining of visual representations - has been proposed. However, the underlying work of the model is not yet well understood. In this paper, we analyze DeepCluster internals and exhaustively evaluate the impact of various hyperparameters over a wide range of values on three different datasets. Accordingly, we propose an explanation of why the algorithm works in practice. We also show that DeepCluster convergence and performance highly depend on the interplay between the quality of the randomly initialized filters of the convolutional layer and the selected number of clusters. Furthermore, we demonstrate that continuous clustering is not critical for DeepCluster convergence. Therefore, early stopping of the clustering phase will reduce the training time and allow the algorithm to scale to large datasets. Finally, we derive plausible hyperparameter selection criteria in a semi-supervised setting.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在图像和语音识别等不同领域表现出了相对于传统机器学习方法的显着改进。他们在基准数据集上的成功通过从业者的预训练模型转移到现实世界。使用监督学习预训练视觉模型需要大量昂贵的数据注释。为了解决这一限制，人们提出了 DeepCluster——一种简单且可扩展的无监督视觉表示预训练。然而，该模型的基础工作尚不清楚。在本文中，我们分析了 DeepCluster 内部结构，并详尽评估了各种超参数对三个不同数据集的各种值的影响。因此，我们提出了该算法在实践中为何有效的解释。我们还表明，DeepCluster 收敛和性能在很大程度上取决于卷积层随机初始化滤波器的质量和所选簇数量之间的相互作用。此外，我们证明连续聚类对于 DeepCluster 收敛并不重要。因此，尽早停止聚类阶段将减少训练时间并允许算法扩展到大型数据集。最后，我们在半监督环境中得出合理的超参数选择标准。

AI.tldr: 本文对无监督预训练方法DeepCluster进行深入分析，探讨其内部机制及超参数影响。
AI.motivation: 解决监督预训练需大量标注数据的高昂成本，探索无监督方法DeepCluster的有效性及优化方向。
AI.method: 通过分析DeepCluster内部结构，系统评估超参数在多个数据集上的影响，并验证算法收敛条件。
AI.result: 发现算法性能依赖卷积滤波器初始化质量与聚类数量，连续聚类非关键，早期停止可提升效率。
AI.conclusion: 提出半监督场景下的超参数选择准则，优化训练效率并扩展至大规模数据集。

ai_content.conclusion: 提出半监督场景下的超参数选择准则，优化训练效率并扩展至大规模数据集。

authors_text: Ansh Mittal,Shuvam Ghosal,Rishibha Bansal
title: SAVCHOI: Detecting Suspicious Activities using Dense Video Captioning with Human Object Interactions
title_zh: SAVCHOI：使用密集视频字幕和人体物体交互来检测可疑活动
abstract: Detecting suspicious activities in surveillance videos is a longstanding problem in real-time surveillance that leads to difficulties in detecting crimes. Hence, we propose a novel approach for detecting and summarizing suspicious activities in surveillance videos. We have also created ground truth summaries for the UCF-Crime video dataset. We modify a pre-existing approach for this task by leveraging the Human-Object Interaction (HOI) model for the Visual features in the Bi-Modal Transformer. Further, we validate our approach against the existing state-of-the-art algorithms for the Dense Video Captioning task for the ActivityNet Captions dataset. We observe that this formulation for Dense Captioning performs significantly better than other discussed BMT-based approaches for BLEU@1, BLEU@2, BLEU@3, BLEU@4, and METEOR. We further perform a comparative analysis of the dataset and the model to report the findings based on different NMS thresholds (searched using Genetic Algorithms). Here, our formulation outperforms all the models for BLEU@1, BLEU@2, BLEU@3, and most models for BLEU@4 and METEOR falling short of only ADV-INF Global by 25% and 0.5%, respectively.
summary: Detecting suspicious activities in surveillance videos is a longstanding problem in real-time surveillance that leads to difficulties in detecting crimes. Hence, we propose a novel approach for detecting and summarizing suspicious activities in surveillance videos. We have also created ground truth summaries for the UCF-Crime video dataset. We modify a pre-existing approach for this task by leveraging the Human-Object Interaction (HOI) model for the Visual features in the Bi-Modal Transformer. Further, we validate our approach against the existing state-of-the-art algorithms for the Dense Video Captioning task for the ActivityNet Captions dataset. We observe that this formulation for Dense Captioning performs significantly better than other discussed BMT-based approaches for BLEU@1, BLEU@2, BLEU@3, BLEU@4, and METEOR. We further perform a comparative analysis of the dataset and the model to report the findings based on different NMS thresholds (searched using Genetic Algorithms). Here, our formulation outperforms all the models for BLEU@1, BLEU@2, BLEU@3, and most models for BLEU@4 and METEOR falling short of only ADV-INF Global by 25% and 0.5%, respectively.
abstract_zh: 检测监控视频中的可疑活动是实时监控中长期存在的问题，导致犯罪侦查困难。因此，我们提出了一种检测和总结监控视频中可疑活动的新方法。我们还为 UCF-Crime 视频数据集创建了真实摘要。我们通过利用双模态转换器中视觉特征的人机交互（HOI）模型来修改此任务的现有方法。此外，我们针对 ActivityNet 字幕数据集的密集视频字幕任务的现有最先进算法验证了我们的方法。我们观察到，对于 BLEU@1、BLEU@2、BLEU@3、BLEU@4 和 METEOR，这种密集字幕配方的性能明显优于其他讨论的基于 BMT 的方法。我们进一步对数据集和模型进行比较分析，以报告基于不同 NMS 阈值的结果（使用遗传算法搜索）。在这里，我们的公式优于 BLEU@1、BLEU@2、BLEU@3 的所有模型，以及 BLEU@4 和 METEOR 的大多数模型，仅比 ADV-INF Global 分别低 25% 和 0.5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAVCHOI方法，通过结合密集视频字幕生成与人物-物体交互模型，改进可疑活动检测。
AI.motivation: 实时监控中检测犯罪活动存在困难，现有算法在准确性和效率上存在不足，需更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于双模态Transformer架构，引入Human-Object Interaction（HOI）模型处理视觉特征，并通过遗传算法优化NMS阈值进行对比分析。
AI.result: 在ActivityNet Captions数据集上，SAVCHOI在BLEU@1-3及METEOR指标上优于其他BMT方法，仅在BLEU@4和METEOR上略逊于ADV-INF Global。
AI.conclusion: SAVCHOI通过HOI建模和参数优化显著提升密集视频字幕生成效果，验证了其在可疑活动检测中的有效性。

tldr: 本文提出SAVCHOI方法，通过结合密集视频字幕生成与人物-物体交互模型，改进可疑活动检测。
motivation: 实时监控中检测犯罪活动存在困难，现有算法在准确性和效率上存在不足，需更有效的解决方案。
method: 基于双模态Transformer架构，引入Human-Object Interaction（HOI）模型处理视觉特征，并通过遗传算法优化NMS阈值进行对比分析。
result: 在ActivityNet Captions数据集上，SAVCHOI在BLEU@1-3及METEOR指标上优于其他BMT方法，仅在BLEU@4和METEOR上略逊于ADV-INF Global。
conclusion: SAVCHOI通过HOI建模和参数优化显著提升密集视频字幕生成效果，验证了其在可疑活动检测中的有效性。
search_text: SAVCHOI: Detecting Suspicious Activities using Dense Video Captioning with Human Object Interactions SAVCHOI：使用密集视频字幕和人体物体交互来检测可疑活动 Detecting suspicious activities in surveillance videos is a longstanding problem in real-time surveillance that leads to difficulties in detecting crimes. Hence, we propose a novel approach for detecting and summarizing suspicious activities in surveillance videos. We have also created ground truth summaries for the UCF-Crime video dataset. We modify a pre-existing approach for this task by leveraging the Human-Object Interaction (HOI) model for the Visual features in the Bi-Modal Transformer. Further, we validate our approach against the existing state-of-the-art algorithms for the Dense Video Captioning task for the ActivityNet Captions dataset. We observe that this formulation for Dense Captioning performs significantly better than other discussed BMT-based approaches for BLEU@1, BLEU@2, BLEU@3, BLEU@4, and METEOR. We further perform a comparative analysis of the dataset and the model to report the findings based on different NMS thresholds (searched using Genetic Algorithms). Here, our formulation outperforms all the models for BLEU@1, BLEU@2, BLEU@3, and most models for BLEU@4 and METEOR falling short of only ADV-INF Global by 25% and 0.5%, respectively. 检测监控视频中的可疑活动是实时监控中长期存在的问题，导致犯罪侦查困难。因此，我们提出了一种检测和总结监控视频中可疑活动的新方法。我们还为 UCF-Crime 视频数据集创建了真实摘要。我们通过利用双模态转换器中视觉特征的人机交互（HOI）模型来修改此任务的现有方法。此外，我们针对 ActivityNet 字幕数据集的密集视频字幕任务的现有最先进算法验证了我们的方法。我们观察到，对于 BLEU@1、BLEU@2、BLEU@3、BLEU@4 和 METEOR，这种密集字幕配方的性能明显优于其他讨论的基于 BMT 的方法。我们进一步对数据集和模型进行比较分析，以报告基于不同 NMS 阈值的结果（使用遗传算法搜索）。在这里，我们的公式优于 BLEU@1、BLEU@2、BLEU@3 的所有模型，以及 BLEU@4 和 METEOR 的大多数模型，仅比 ADV-INF Global 分别低 25% 和 0.5%。 本文提出SAVCHOI方法，通过结合密集视频字幕生成与人物-物体交互模型，改进可疑活动检测。 Ansh Mittal,Shuvam Ghosal,Rishibha Bansal cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Ahmad Mustapha,Wael Khreich,Wes Masri
title: Inter-model Interpretability: Self-supervised Models as a Case Study
title_zh: 模型间可解释性：自监督模型作为案例研究
comment: The paper is under consideration at Computer Vision and Image Understanding Journal
comments: The paper is under consideration at Computer Vision and Image Understanding Journal
abstract: Since early machine learning models, metrics such as accuracy and precision have been the de facto way to evaluate and compare trained models. However, a single metric number doesn't fully capture the similarities and differences between models, especially in the computer vision domain. A model with high accuracy on a certain dataset might provide a lower accuracy on another dataset, without any further insights. To address this problem we build on a recent interpretability technique called Dissect to introduce \textit{inter-model interpretability}, which determines how models relate or complement each other based on the visual concepts they have learned (such as objects and materials). Towards this goal, we project 13 top-performing self-supervised models into a Learned Concepts Embedding (LCE) space that reveals proximities among models from the perspective of learned concepts. We further crossed this information with the performance of these models on four computer vision tasks and 15 datasets. The experiment allowed us to categorize the models into three categories and revealed for the first time the type of visual concepts different tasks requires. This is a step forward for designing cross-task learning algorithms.
summary: Since early machine learning models, metrics such as accuracy and precision have been the de facto way to evaluate and compare trained models. However, a single metric number doesn't fully capture the similarities and differences between models, especially in the computer vision domain. A model with high accuracy on a certain dataset might provide a lower accuracy on another dataset, without any further insights. To address this problem we build on a recent interpretability technique called Dissect to introduce \textit{inter-model interpretability}, which determines how models relate or complement each other based on the visual concepts they have learned (such as objects and materials). Towards this goal, we project 13 top-performing self-supervised models into a Learned Concepts Embedding (LCE) space that reveals proximities among models from the perspective of learned concepts. We further crossed this information with the performance of these models on four computer vision tasks and 15 datasets. The experiment allowed us to categorize the models into three categories and revealed for the first time the type of visual concepts different tasks requires. This is a step forward for designing cross-task learning algorithms.
abstract_zh: 自早期的机器学习模型以来，准确性和精确度等指标已成为评估和比较训练模型的事实上的方法。然而，单个度量数字并不能完全捕捉模型之间的相似性和差异，尤其是在计算机视觉领域。在某个数据集上具有高精度的模型可能在另一个数据集上提供较低的精度，而无需任何进一步的见解。为了解决这个问题，我们基于最近的一种名为 Dissect 的可解释性技术来引入 \textit{模型间可解释性}，它决定模型如何根据它们学到的视觉概念（例如对象和材料）相互关联或互补。为了实现这一目标，我们将 13 个表现最佳的自监督模型投射到学习概念嵌入 (LCE) 空间中，从学习概念的角度揭示模型之间的相似性。我们进一步将这些信息与这些模型在 4 个计算机视觉任务和 15 个数据集上的性能进行交叉。该实验使我们能够将模型分为三类，并首次揭示了不同任务所需的视觉概念类型。这是设计跨任务学习算法的一个进步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨模型可解释性方法，通过分析自监督模型学习的视觉概念，揭示模型间的关联与差异。
AI.motivation: 传统评估指标（如准确率）无法全面反映模型在不同数据集上的表现差异，需通过模型学习的视觉概念进行更深入的比较。
AI.method: 基于Dissect技术，将13个自监督模型嵌入到学习概念空间（LCE），结合其在4个视觉任务和15个数据集上的性能进行分析。
AI.result: 将模型分为三类，并首次揭示不同任务所需的视觉概念类型，为跨任务学习算法设计提供依据。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过概念层面的模型比较，推动了跨任务学习算法的优化与创新。
