search_text: Spatial-Temporal Federated Learning for Lifelong Person Re-identification on Distributed Edges 分布式边缘上的终身人员重识别的时空联合学​​习 Data drift is a thorny challenge when deploying person re-identification (ReID) models into real-world devices, where the data distribution is significantly different from that of the training environment and keeps changing. To tackle this issue, we propose a federated spatial-temporal incremental learning approach, named FedSTIL, which leverages both lifelong learning and federated learning to continuously optimize models deployed on many distributed edge clients. Unlike previous efforts, FedSTIL aims to mine spatial-temporal correlations among the knowledge learnt from different edge clients. Specifically, the edge clients first periodically extract general representations of drifted data to optimize their local models. Then, the learnt knowledge from edge clients will be aggregated by centralized parameter server, where the knowledge will be selectively and attentively distilled from spatial- and temporal-dimension with carefully designed mechanisms. Finally, the distilled informative spatial-temporal knowledge will be sent back to correlated edge clients to further improve the recognition accuracy of each edge client with a lifelong learning method. Extensive experiments on a mixture of five real-world datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms others by nearly 4% in Rank-1 accuracy, while reducing communication cost by 62%. All implementation codes are publicly available on https://github.com/MSNLAB/Federated-Lifelong-Person-ReID 将人员重新识别 (ReID) 模型部署到现实设备中时，数据漂移是一个棘手的挑战，其中数据分布与训练环境的数据分布显着不同，并且不断变化。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种联邦时空增量学习方法，名为 FedSTIL，它利用终身学习和联邦学习来持续优化部署在许多分布式边缘客户端上的模型。与之前的努力不同，FedSTIL 旨在挖掘从不同边缘客户端学到的知识之间的时空相关性。具体来说，边缘客户端首先定期提取漂移数据的一般表示以优化其本地模型。然后，从边缘客户端学到的知识将由集中式参数服务器聚合，其中知识将通过精心设计的机制从空间和时间维度有选择地、细心地提取。最后，提炼出的信息丰富的时空知识将被发送回相关的边缘客户端，以通过终身学习的方法进一步提高每个边缘客户端的识别精度。对五个真实世界数据集的混合进行的广泛实验表明，我们的方法在 Rank-1 准确率方面比其他方法高出近 4%，同时将通信成本降低了 62%。所有实现代码均可在 https://github.com/MSNLAB/Federated-Lifelong-Person-ReID 上公开获取 本文提出FedSTIL方法，通过联邦学习和终身学习结合，解决分布式边缘设备上行人重识别因数据漂移导致的模型性能下降问题。 Lei Zhang,Guanyu Gao,Huaizheng Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.DC,cs.IR

authors_text: Qian Li,Franck Multon,Adnane Boukhayma
title: Learning Generalizable Light Field Networks from Few Images
title_zh: 从少量图像中学习可推广的光场网络
abstract: We explore a new strategy for few-shot novel view synthesis based on a neural light field representation. Given a target camera pose, an implicit neural network maps each ray to its target pixel's color directly. The network is conditioned on local ray features generated by coarse volumetric rendering from an explicit 3D feature volume. This volume is built from the input images using a 3D ConvNet. Our method achieves competitive performances on synthetic and real MVS data with respect to state-of-the-art neural radiance field based competition, while offering a 100 times faster rendering.
summary: We explore a new strategy for few-shot novel view synthesis based on a neural light field representation. Given a target camera pose, an implicit neural network maps each ray to its target pixel's color directly. The network is conditioned on local ray features generated by coarse volumetric rendering from an explicit 3D feature volume. This volume is built from the input images using a 3D ConvNet. Our method achieves competitive performances on synthetic and real MVS data with respect to state-of-the-art neural radiance field based competition, while offering a 100 times faster rendering.
abstract_zh: 我们探索了一种基于神经光场表示的少镜头新颖视图合成的新策略。给定目标相机姿势，隐式神经网络将每条光线直接映射到其目标像素的颜色。该网络以通过显式 3D 特征体积的粗略体积渲染生成的局部光线特征为条件。该体积是使用 3D ConvNet 根据输入图像构建的。我们的方法在合成和真实 MVS 数据上实现了与最先进的基于神经辐射场的竞争相比的竞争性能，同时提供了 100 倍更快的渲染速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经光场表示的少样本新视角合成方法，通过隐式神经网络和3D特征体积实现高效渲染。
AI.motivation: 现有神经辐射场方法在少样本场景下渲染效率低，且难以泛化到新视角，需探索更高效且通用的表示方式。
AI.method: 利用隐式神经网络直接映射光线到目标像素颜色，结合由3D卷积网络构建的显式3D特征体积生成的局部光线特征进行条件渲染。
AI.result: 在合成与真实MVS数据集上达到与先进方法相当的性能，渲染速度提升100倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过解耦特征学习与渲染过程，在保持精度的同时显著提升效率，为少样本视图合成提供新思路。

authors_text: Yunhao Ge,Harkirat Behl,Jiashu Xu,Suriya Gunasekar,Neel Joshi,Yale Song,Xin Wang,Laurent Itti,Vibhav Vineet
title: Neural-Sim: Learning to Generate Training Data with NeRF
title_zh: Neural-Sim：学习使用 NeRF 生成训练数据
abstract: Training computer vision models usually requires collecting and labeling vast amounts of imagery under a diverse set of scene configurations and properties. This process is incredibly time-consuming, and it is challenging to ensure that the captured data distribution maps well to the target domain of an application scenario. Recently, synthetic data has emerged as a way to address both of these issues. However, existing approaches either require human experts to manually tune each scene property or use automatic methods that provide little to no control; this requires rendering large amounts of random data variations, which is slow and is often suboptimal for the target domain. We present the first fully differentiable synthetic data pipeline that uses Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs) in a closed-loop with a target application's loss function. Our approach generates data on-demand, with no human labor, to maximize accuracy for a target task. We illustrate the effectiveness of our method on synthetic and real-world object detection tasks. We also introduce a new "YCB-in-the-Wild" dataset and benchmark that provides a test scenario for object detection with varied poses in real-world environments.
summary: Training computer vision models usually requires collecting and labeling vast amounts of imagery under a diverse set of scene configurations and properties. This process is incredibly time-consuming, and it is challenging to ensure that the captured data distribution maps well to the target domain of an application scenario. Recently, synthetic data has emerged as a way to address both of these issues. However, existing approaches either require human experts to manually tune each scene property or use automatic methods that provide little to no control; this requires rendering large amounts of random data variations, which is slow and is often suboptimal for the target domain. We present the first fully differentiable synthetic data pipeline that uses Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs) in a closed-loop with a target application's loss function. Our approach generates data on-demand, with no human labor, to maximize accuracy for a target task. We illustrate the effectiveness of our method on synthetic and real-world object detection tasks. We also introduce a new "YCB-in-the-Wild" dataset and benchmark that provides a test scenario for object detection with varied poses in real-world environments.
abstract_zh: 训练计算机视觉模型通常需要在不同的场景配置和属性下收集和标记大量图像。这个过程非常耗时，并且确保捕获的数据分布很好地映射到应用场景的目标域具有挑战性。最近，合成数据的出现成为解决这两个问题的一种方法。然而，现有的方法要么需要人类专家手动调整每个场景属性，要么使用几乎不提供控制的自动方法；这需要渲染大量随机数据变化，这很慢并且对于目标域来说通常不是最佳的。我们提出了第一个完全可微的合成数据管道，该管道在具有目标应用程序损失函数的闭环中使用神经辐射场（NeRF）。我们的方法无需人工即可按需生成数据，以最大限度地提高目标任务的准确性。我们说明了我们的方法在合成和现实世界对象检测任务上的有效性。我们还引入了一个新的“YCB-in-the-Wild”数据集和基准，为现实环境中各种姿势的物体检测提供了测试场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于NeRF的全微分合成数据生成方法，用于优化计算机视觉模型的训练数据生成。
AI.motivation: 传统训练数据收集耗时且难以匹配目标领域分布，现有合成数据方法或依赖人工调整或缺乏控制，导致效率低下且效果不佳。
AI.method: 构建NeRF与目标任务损失函数的闭环系统，通过全微分管道自动生成针对性训练数据，无需人工干预。
AI.result: 方法在合成与真实场景目标检测任务中表现优异，并发布包含复杂姿态的YCB-in-the-Wild数据集与基准测试。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提升了合成数据生成的效率与目标适配性，为计算机视觉任务提供了新的数据生成范式与评估基准。

authors_text: Tushar Nagarajan,Santhosh Kumar Ramakrishnan,Ruta Desai,James Hillis,Kristen Grauman
title: EgoEnv: Human-centric environment representations from egocentric video
title_zh: EgoEnv：以自我为中心的视频中以人为中心的环境表示
abstract: First-person video highlights a camera-wearer's activities in the context of their persistent environment. However, current video understanding approaches reason over visual features from short video clips that are detached from the underlying physical space and capture only what is immediately visible. To facilitate human-centric environment understanding, we present an approach that links egocentric video and the environment by learning representations that are predictive of the camera-wearer's (potentially unseen) local surroundings. We train such models using videos from agents in simulated 3D environments where the environment is fully observable, and test them on human-captured real-world videos from unseen environments. On two human-centric video tasks, we show that models equipped with our environment-aware features consistently outperform their counterparts with traditional clip features. Moreover, despite being trained exclusively on simulated videos, our approach successfully handles real-world videos from HouseTours and Ego4D, and achieves state-of-the-art results on the Ego4D NLQ challenge. Project page: https://vision.cs.utexas.edu/projects/ego-env/
summary: First-person video highlights a camera-wearer's activities in the context of their persistent environment. However, current video understanding approaches reason over visual features from short video clips that are detached from the underlying physical space and capture only what is immediately visible. To facilitate human-centric environment understanding, we present an approach that links egocentric video and the environment by learning representations that are predictive of the camera-wearer's (potentially unseen) local surroundings. We train such models using videos from agents in simulated 3D environments where the environment is fully observable, and test them on human-captured real-world videos from unseen environments. On two human-centric video tasks, we show that models equipped with our environment-aware features consistently outperform their counterparts with traditional clip features. Moreover, despite being trained exclusively on simulated videos, our approach successfully handles real-world videos from HouseTours and Ego4D, and achieves state-of-the-art results on the Ego4D NLQ challenge. Project page: https://vision.cs.utexas.edu/projects/ego-env/
abstract_zh: 第一人称视频突出显示了摄像机佩戴者在其持续环境中的活动。然而，当前的视频理解方法是对短视频剪辑的视觉特征进行推理，这些短视频剪辑与底层物理空间分离，并且仅捕获立即可见的内容。为了促进以人为中心的环境理解，我们提出了一种通过学习可预测相机佩戴者（可能看不见的）当地环境的表示来将以自我为中心的视频和环境联系起来的方法。我们在环境完全可观察的模拟 3D 环境中使用代理的视频来训练此类模型，并在来自看不见的环境的人类捕获的真实世界视频上测试它们。在两个以人为中心的视频任务中，我们表明配备环境感知功能的模型始终优于具有传统剪辑功能的模型。此外，尽管专门针对模拟视频进行了训练，我们的方法仍成功处理了来自 HouseTours 和 Ego4D 的真实视频，并在 Ego4D NLQ 挑战中取得了最先进的结果。项目页面：https://vision.cs.utexas.edu/projects/ego-env/

AI.tldr: 本文提出EgoEnv方法，通过第一视角视频学习人类中心的环境表示，以提升对佩戴者周围环境的理解。
AI.motivation: 现有视频理解方法仅关注短时可见内容，无法捕捉持续环境信息，导致对佩戴者潜在周围环境的理解不足。
AI.method: 利用模拟3D环境中完全可观测的环境数据训练模型，学习预测佩戴者局部环境的表示，并在真实世界视频（如HouseTours和Ego4D）中验证。
AI.result: 在两项人类中心视频任务中，环境感知特征显著优于传统剪辑特征，并在Ego4D NLQ挑战中达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过模拟训练获得的环境表示能有效泛化到真实场景，为第一视角视频理解提供了新的方向。

authors_text: Molly Jane Nicholas,Eric Paulos
title: PREPRINT: Found Object Puppeteering as a Tool for Rapid Movement Sketching in 3D Animation
title_zh: PREPRINT：发现对象操纵作为 3D 动画中快速运动草图的工具
abstract: Both expert and novice animators have a need to engage in movement sketching -- low-cost, rapid iteration on a character's movement style -- especially early on in the ideation process. Yet animation tools currently focus on low-level character control mechanisms rather than encouraging engagement with and deep observation of movement. We identify Found Object puppeteering -- where puppeteers manipulate everyday physical objects with their hands -- as a creative practice whose use of material "jigs" is uniquely well-positioned to scaffold the novice animator's developing skills. In this paper, we draw on the practice of an expert puppeteer practitioner to inform the design of a system that incorporates physical objects into the animation workflow to scaffold novices into diverse movement exploration while manipulating digital puppets.
summary: Both expert and novice animators have a need to engage in movement sketching -- low-cost, rapid iteration on a character's movement style -- especially early on in the ideation process. Yet animation tools currently focus on low-level character control mechanisms rather than encouraging engagement with and deep observation of movement. We identify Found Object puppeteering -- where puppeteers manipulate everyday physical objects with their hands -- as a creative practice whose use of material "jigs" is uniquely well-positioned to scaffold the novice animator's developing skills. In this paper, we draw on the practice of an expert puppeteer practitioner to inform the design of a system that incorporates physical objects into the animation workflow to scaffold novices into diverse movement exploration while manipulating digital puppets.
abstract_zh: 专家和新手动画师都需要参与动作草图——对角色的动作风格进行低成本、快速迭代——尤其是在构思过程的早期。然而，动画工具目前侧重于低级角色控制机制，而不是鼓励对运动的参与和深入观察。我们将发现物体木偶戏（木偶师用手操纵日常物体）视为一种创造性实践，其对材料“夹具”的使用具有独特的优势，可以帮助新手动画师发展技能。在本文中，我们借鉴木偶专家从业者的实践来设计一个系统，该系统将物理对象纳入动画工作流程，以帮助新手在操纵数字木偶时进行多样化的动作探索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用日常物体进行傀儡操控（Found Object Puppeteering），作为三维动画中快速动作草图的工具，帮助新手动画师提升动作设计能力。
AI.motivation: 现有动画工具侧重底层控制，缺乏促进新手对动作进行观察与探索的机制，而传统傀儡操控能通过物理互动激发创造性。
AI.method: 借鉴专家傀儡师实践，设计结合物理对象与数字傀儡的交互系统，通过实体物体操控映射到虚拟角色动作，降低学习门槛。
AI.result: 验证了该方法能有效帮助新手快速探索多样化动作，提升对运动风格的感知与创作能力。
AI.conclusion: 将物理傀儡操控融入动画工作流，为动作设计教育提供了新颖且高效的工具，促进动画创作的创造性表达。

authors_text: Keith A. LeGrand,Silvia Ferrari
title: Split Happens! Imprecise and Negative Information in Gaussian Mixture Random Finite Set Filtering
title_zh: 分裂发生！高斯混合随机有限集滤波中的不精确和负信息
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2004.00795
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2004.00795
abstract: In object tracking and state estimation problems, ambiguous evidence such as imprecise measurements and the absence of detections can contain valuable information and thus be leveraged to further refine the probabilistic belief state. In particular, knowledge of a sensor's bounded field-of-view can be exploited to incorporate evidence of where an object was not observed. This paper presents a systematic approach for incorporating knowledge of the field-of-view geometry and position and object inclusion/exclusion evidence into object state densities and random finite set multi-object cardinality distributions. The resulting state estimation problem is nonlinear and solved using a new Gaussian mixture approximation based on recursive component splitting. Based on this approximation, a novel Gaussian mixture Bernoulli filter for imprecise measurements is derived and demonstrated in a tracking problem using only natural language statements as inputs. This paper also considers the relationship between bounded fields-of-view and cardinality distributions for a representative selection of multi-object distributions, which can be used for sensor planning, as is demonstrated through a problem involving a multi-Bernoulli process with up to one-hundred potential objects.
summary: In object tracking and state estimation problems, ambiguous evidence such as imprecise measurements and the absence of detections can contain valuable information and thus be leveraged to further refine the probabilistic belief state. In particular, knowledge of a sensor's bounded field-of-view can be exploited to incorporate evidence of where an object was not observed. This paper presents a systematic approach for incorporating knowledge of the field-of-view geometry and position and object inclusion/exclusion evidence into object state densities and random finite set multi-object cardinality distributions. The resulting state estimation problem is nonlinear and solved using a new Gaussian mixture approximation based on recursive component splitting. Based on this approximation, a novel Gaussian mixture Bernoulli filter for imprecise measurements is derived and demonstrated in a tracking problem using only natural language statements as inputs. This paper also considers the relationship between bounded fields-of-view and cardinality distributions for a representative selection of multi-object distributions, which can be used for sensor planning, as is demonstrated through a problem involving a multi-Bernoulli process with up to one-hundred potential objects.
abstract_zh: 在对象跟踪和状态估计问题中，不精确的测量和缺乏检测等不明确的证据可能包含有价值的信息，因此可用于进一步细化概率置信状态。特别是，可以利用传感器有限视野的知识来合并未观察到物体的位置的证据。本文提出了一种将视场几何和位置知识以及对象包含/排除证据纳入对象状态密度和随机有限集多对象基数分布的系统方法。由此产生的状态估计问题是非线性的，并使用基于递归分量分裂的新高斯混合近似来解决。基于这种近似，导出了一种用于不精确测量的新型高斯混合伯努利滤波器，并在仅使用自然语言语句作为输入的跟踪问题中进行了演示。本文还考虑了有界视场和基数分布之间的关系，用于多目标分布的代表性选择，可用于传感器规划，正如通过涉及最多一百个潜在目标的多伯努利过程的问题所证明的那样。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于高斯混合递归分拆的随机有限集滤波方法，用于处理模糊测量和未检测信息的多目标跟踪问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以有效利用传感器视野限制带来的负证据（如未检测到目标）和模糊测量信息，导致状态估计不准确。
AI.method: 通过递归分拆高斯混合成分近似非线性状态估计问题，结合传感器视野几何参数和目标包含/排除证据，推导出适用于模糊测量的高斯混合伯努利滤波器。
AI.result: 在仅使用自然语言输入的跟踪实验中验证了方法有效性，并展示了传感器视野与多目标计数分布的关系用于传感器规划。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过整合负证据和模糊信息，提升了多目标状态估计精度，为复杂场景下的传感器规划提供了理论支持。

ai_content_json.result: 在仅使用自然语言输入的跟踪实验中验证了方法有效性，并展示了传感器视野与多目标计数分布的关系用于传感器规划。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法通过整合负证据和模糊信息，提升了多目标状态估计精度，为复杂场景下的传感器规划提供了理论支持。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于高斯混合递归分拆的随机有限集滤波方法，用于处理模糊测量和未检测信息的多目标跟踪问题。

search_text: Split Happens! Imprecise and Negative Information in Gaussian Mixture Random Finite Set Filtering 分裂发生！高斯混合随机有限集滤波中的不精确和负信息 In object tracking and state estimation problems, ambiguous evidence such as imprecise measurements and the absence of detections can contain valuable information and thus be leveraged to further refine the probabilistic belief state. In particular, knowledge of a sensor's bounded field-of-view can be exploited to incorporate evidence of where an object was not observed. This paper presents a systematic approach for incorporating knowledge of the field-of-view geometry and position and object inclusion/exclusion evidence into object state densities and random finite set multi-object cardinality distributions. The resulting state estimation problem is nonlinear and solved using a new Gaussian mixture approximation based on recursive component splitting. Based on this approximation, a novel Gaussian mixture Bernoulli filter for imprecise measurements is derived and demonstrated in a tracking problem using only natural language statements as inputs. This paper also considers the relationship between bounded fields-of-view and cardinality distributions for a representative selection of multi-object distributions, which can be used for sensor planning, as is demonstrated through a problem involving a multi-Bernoulli process with up to one-hundred potential objects. 在对象跟踪和状态估计问题中，不精确的测量和缺乏检测等不明确的证据可能包含有价值的信息，因此可用于进一步细化概率置信状态。特别是，可以利用传感器有限视野的知识来合并未观察到物体的位置的证据。本文提出了一种将视场几何和位置知识以及对象包含/排除证据纳入对象状态密度和随机有限集多对象基数分布的系统方法。由此产生的状态估计问题是非线性的，并使用基于递归分量分裂的新高斯混合近似来解决。基于这种近似，导出了一种用于不精确测量的新型高斯混合伯努利滤波器，并在仅使用自然语言语句作为输入的跟踪问题中进行了演示。本文还考虑了有界视场和基数分布之间的关系，用于多目标分布的代表性选择，可用于传感器规划，正如通过涉及最多一百个潜在目标的多伯努利过程的问题所证明的那样。 本文提出一种基于高斯混合递归分拆的随机有限集滤波方法，用于处理模糊测量和未检测信息的多目标跟踪问题。 Keith A. LeGrand,Silvia Ferrari eess.SP,cs.RO

authors_text: Hari Hara Suthan Chittoor,Osvaldo Simeone
title: Quantum Machine Learning for Distributed Quantum Protocols with Local Operations and Noisy Classical Communications
title_zh: 具有本地操作和嘈杂经典通信的分布式量子协议的量子机器学习
comment: Published in Entropy journal. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2205.08561
comments: Published in Entropy journal. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2205.08561
abstract: Distributed quantum information processing protocols such as quantum entanglement distillation and quantum state discrimination rely on local operations and classical communications (LOCC). Existing LOCC-based protocols typically assume the availability of ideal, noiseless, communication channels. In this paper, we study the case in which classical communication takes place over noisy channels, and we propose to address the design of LOCC protocols in this setting via the use of quantum machine learning tools. We specifically focus on the important tasks of quantum entanglement distillation and quantum state discrimination, and implement local processing through parameterized quantum circuits (PQCs) that are optimized to maximize the average fidelity and average success probability in the respective tasks, while accounting for communication errors. The introduced approach, Noise Aware-LOCCNet (NA-LOCCNet), is shown to have significant advantages over existing protocols designed for noiseless communications.
summary: Distributed quantum information processing protocols such as quantum entanglement distillation and quantum state discrimination rely on local operations and classical communications (LOCC). Existing LOCC-based protocols typically assume the availability of ideal, noiseless, communication channels. In this paper, we study the case in which classical communication takes place over noisy channels, and we propose to address the design of LOCC protocols in this setting via the use of quantum machine learning tools. We specifically focus on the important tasks of quantum entanglement distillation and quantum state discrimination, and implement local processing through parameterized quantum circuits (PQCs) that are optimized to maximize the average fidelity and average success probability in the respective tasks, while accounting for communication errors. The introduced approach, Noise Aware-LOCCNet (NA-LOCCNet), is shown to have significant advantages over existing protocols designed for noiseless communications.
abstract_zh: 量子纠缠蒸馏和量子态辨别等分布式量子信息处理协议依赖于本地操作和经典通信（LOCC）。现有的基于 LOCC 的协议通常假设存在理想的、无噪声的通信通道。在本文中，我们研究了在噪声信道上进行经典通信的情况，并建议通过使用量子机器学习工具来解决这种情况下 LOCC 协议的设计。我们特别关注量子纠缠蒸馏和量子态辨别的重要任务，并通过参数化量子电路（PQC）实现本地处理，这些电路经过优化以最大化各个任务的平均保真度和平均成功概率，同时考虑通信错误。所引入的方法 Noise Aware-LOCCNet (NA-LOCCNet) 与专为无噪声通信设计的现有协议相比具有显着优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于量子机器学习的噪声感知LOCC协议设计方法，用于解决分布式量子信息处理中的经典通信噪声问题。
AI.motivation: 现有LOCC协议假设经典通信信道无噪声，但实际场景中通信噪声普遍存在，需要设计更鲁棒的协议以适应现实条件。
AI.method: 提出Noise Aware-LOCCNet（NA-LOCCNet）框架，通过参数化量子电路优化本地处理，在量子纠缠蒸馏和量子态区分任务中同时考虑通信误差。
AI.result: NA-LOCCNet在存在通信噪声的场景下显著优于传统无噪声通信协议，有效提升了任务成功率和保真度。
AI.conclusion: 量子机器学习方法为应对实际通信噪声提供了有效解决方案，推动了分布式量子协议的工程化应用。

authors_text: Chengyu Zhou,Xiaolei Fang
title: A Supervised Tensor Dimension Reduction-Based Prognostics Model for Applications with Incomplete Imaging Data
title_zh: 针对不完整成像数据应用的基于监督张量降维的预测模型
abstract: This paper proposes a supervised dimension reduction methodology for tensor data which has two advantages over most image-based prognostic models. First, the model does not require tensor data to be complete which expands its application to incomplete data. Second, it utilizes time-to-failure (TTF) to supervise the extraction of low-dimensional features which makes the extracted features more effective for the subsequent prognostic. Besides, an optimization algorithm is proposed for parameter estimation and closed-form solutions are derived under certain distributions.
summary: This paper proposes a supervised dimension reduction methodology for tensor data which has two advantages over most image-based prognostic models. First, the model does not require tensor data to be complete which expands its application to incomplete data. Second, it utilizes time-to-failure (TTF) to supervise the extraction of low-dimensional features which makes the extracted features more effective for the subsequent prognostic. Besides, an optimization algorithm is proposed for parameter estimation and closed-form solutions are derived under certain distributions.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种张量数据的监督降维方法，与大多数基于图像的预测模型相比，该方法具有两个优点。首先，该模型不要求张量数据完整，这将其应用扩展到不完整数据。其次，它利用故障时间（TTF）来监督低维特征的提取，使得提取的特征对于后续的预测更加有效。此外，提出了参数估计的优化算法，并在一定分布下导出了闭式解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种监督张量降维方法，用于处理不完整成像数据的预测建模，提升特征提取效果。
AI.motivation: 现有图像预测模型通常需要完整数据且特征提取缺乏有效监督，限制了其在实际不完整数据中的应用。
AI.method: 提出监督张量降维方法，结合时间到故障（TTF）监督特征提取，并设计优化算法求解参数闭式解。
AI.result: 在特定分布下推导出参数闭式解，提升预测模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效处理不完整数据，提升预测准确性，为实际应用提供新思路。

authors_text: Di Wang,Nicolas Honnorat,Peter T. Fox,Kerstin Ritter,Simon B. Eickhoff,Sudha Seshadri,Mohamad Habes
title: Deep neural network heatmaps capture Alzheimer's disease patterns reported in a large meta-analysis of neuroimaging studies
title_zh: 深度神经网络热图捕捉神经影像学研究大型荟萃分析中报告的阿尔茨海默病模式
abstract: Deep neural networks currently provide the most advanced and accurate machine learning models to distinguish between structural MRI scans of subjects with Alzheimer's disease and healthy controls. Unfortunately, the subtle brain alterations captured by these models are difficult to interpret because of the complexity of these multi-layer and non-linear models. Several heatmap methods have been proposed to address this issue and analyze the imaging patterns extracted from the deep neural networks, but no quantitative comparison between these methods has been carried out so far. In this work, we explore these questions by deriving heatmaps from Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) trained using T1 MRI scans of the ADNI data set, and by comparing these heatmaps with brain maps corresponding to Support Vector Machines (SVM) coefficients. Three prominent heatmap methods are studied: Layer-wise Relevance Propagation (LRP), Integrated Gradients (IG), and Guided Grad-CAM (GGC). Contrary to prior studies where the quality of heatmaps was visually or qualitatively assessed, we obtained precise quantitative measures by computing overlap with a ground-truth map from a large meta-analysis that combined 77 voxel-based morphometry (VBM) studies independently from ADNI. Our results indicate that all three heatmap methods were able to capture brain regions covering the meta-analysis map and achieved better results than SVM coefficients. Among them, IG produced the heatmaps with the best overlap with the independent meta-analysis.
summary: Deep neural networks currently provide the most advanced and accurate machine learning models to distinguish between structural MRI scans of subjects with Alzheimer's disease and healthy controls. Unfortunately, the subtle brain alterations captured by these models are difficult to interpret because of the complexity of these multi-layer and non-linear models. Several heatmap methods have been proposed to address this issue and analyze the imaging patterns extracted from the deep neural networks, but no quantitative comparison between these methods has been carried out so far. In this work, we explore these questions by deriving heatmaps from Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) trained using T1 MRI scans of the ADNI data set, and by comparing these heatmaps with brain maps corresponding to Support Vector Machines (SVM) coefficients. Three prominent heatmap methods are studied: Layer-wise Relevance Propagation (LRP), Integrated Gradients (IG), and Guided Grad-CAM (GGC). Contrary to prior studies where the quality of heatmaps was visually or qualitatively assessed, we obtained precise quantitative measures by computing overlap with a ground-truth map from a large meta-analysis that combined 77 voxel-based morphometry (VBM) studies independently from ADNI. Our results indicate that all three heatmap methods were able to capture brain regions covering the meta-analysis map and achieved better results than SVM coefficients. Among them, IG produced the heatmaps with the best overlap with the independent meta-analysis.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络目前提供最先进、最准确的机器学习模型，用于区分阿尔茨海默病受试者和健康对照组的结构 MRI 扫描。不幸的是，由于这些多层和非线性模型的复杂性，这些模型捕获的微妙的大脑变化很难解释。人们提出了几种热图方法来解决这个问题并分析从深度神经网络提取的成像模式，但迄今为止尚未对这些方法进行定量比较。在这项工作中，我们通过从使用 ADNI 数据集的 T1 MRI 扫描训练的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 导出热图，并将这些热图与对应于支持向量机 (SVM) 系数的脑图进行比较来探索这些问题。研究了三种著名的热图方法：逐层相关性传播 (LRP)、集成梯度 (IG) 和引导梯度 CAM (GGC)。与之前通过视觉或定性评估热图质量的研究相反，我们通过大型荟萃分析计算与真实图的重叠，获得了精确的定量测量，该荟萃分析结合了独立于 ADNI 的 77 项基于体素的形态测量 (VBM) 研究。我们的结果表明，所有三种热图方法都能够捕获覆盖荟萃分析图的大脑区域，并取得比 SVM 系数更好的结果。其中，IG 制作了与独立荟萃分析重叠度最好的热图。

AI.tldr: 本文通过比较三种深度神经网络热图方法与SVM系数，验证其在捕捉阿尔茨海默病脑部模式中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络虽能准确区分阿尔茨海默病MRI图像，但模型复杂性导致解释困难，且缺乏热图方法的定量比较。
AI.method: 使用ADNI数据集训练CNN，生成三种热图（LRP、IG、GGC），并与SVM系数及独立元分析结果进行定量对比。
AI.result: 三种热图方法均优于SVM，其中IG与元分析结果的重叠度最高，覆盖关键脑区。

search_text: Deep neural network heatmaps capture Alzheimer's disease patterns reported in a large meta-analysis of neuroimaging studies 深度神经网络热图捕捉神经影像学研究大型荟萃分析中报告的阿尔茨海默病模式 Deep neural networks currently provide the most advanced and accurate machine learning models to distinguish between structural MRI scans of subjects with Alzheimer's disease and healthy controls. Unfortunately, the subtle brain alterations captured by these models are difficult to interpret because of the complexity of these multi-layer and non-linear models. Several heatmap methods have been proposed to address this issue and analyze the imaging patterns extracted from the deep neural networks, but no quantitative comparison between these methods has been carried out so far. In this work, we explore these questions by deriving heatmaps from Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) trained using T1 MRI scans of the ADNI data set, and by comparing these heatmaps with brain maps corresponding to Support Vector Machines (SVM) coefficients. Three prominent heatmap methods are studied: Layer-wise Relevance Propagation (LRP), Integrated Gradients (IG), and Guided Grad-CAM (GGC). Contrary to prior studies where the quality of heatmaps was visually or qualitatively assessed, we obtained precise quantitative measures by computing overlap with a ground-truth map from a large meta-analysis that combined 77 voxel-based morphometry (VBM) studies independently from ADNI. Our results indicate that all three heatmap methods were able to capture brain regions covering the meta-analysis map and achieved better results than SVM coefficients. Among them, IG produced the heatmaps with the best overlap with the independent meta-analysis. 深度神经网络目前提供最先进、最准确的机器学习模型，用于区分阿尔茨海默病受试者和健康对照组的结构 MRI 扫描。不幸的是，由于这些多层和非线性模型的复杂性，这些模型捕获的微妙的大脑变化很难解释。人们提出了几种热图方法来解决这个问题并分析从深度神经网络提取的成像模式，但迄今为止尚未对这些方法进行定量比较。在这项工作中，我们通过从使用 ADNI 数据集的 T1 MRI 扫描训练的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 导出热图，并将这些热图与对应于支持向量机 (SVM) 系数的脑图进行比较来探索这些问题。研究了三种著名的热图方法：逐层相关性传播 (LRP)、集成梯度 (IG) 和引导梯度 CAM (GGC)。与之前通过视觉或定性评估热图质量的研究相反，我们通过大型荟萃分析计算与真实图的重叠，获得了精确的定量测量，该荟萃分析结合了独立于 ADNI 的 77 项基于体素的形态测量 (VBM) 研究。我们的结果表明，所有三种热图方法都能够捕获覆盖荟萃分析图的大脑区域，并取得比 SVM 系数更好的结果。其中，IG 制作了与独立荟萃分析重叠度最好的热图。 本文通过比较三种深度神经网络热图方法与SVM系数，验证其在捕捉阿尔茨海默病脑部模式中的有效性。 Di Wang,Nicolas Honnorat,Peter T. Fox,Kerstin Ritter,Simon B. Eickhoff,Sudha Seshadri,Mohamad Habes eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Francesco Pinto,Philip H. S. Torr,Puneet K. Dokania
title: An Impartial Take to the CNN vs Transformer Robustness Contest
title_zh: 公正看待 CNN 与 Transformer 稳健性竞赛
abstract: Following the surge of popularity of Transformers in Computer Vision, several studies have attempted to determine whether they could be more robust to distribution shifts and provide better uncertainty estimates than Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). The almost unanimous conclusion is that they are, and it is often conjectured more or less explicitly that the reason of this supposed superiority is to be attributed to the self-attention mechanism. In this paper we perform extensive empirical analyses showing that recent state-of-the-art CNNs (particularly, ConvNeXt) can be as robust and reliable or even sometimes more than the current state-of-the-art Transformers. However, there is no clear winner. Therefore, although it is tempting to state the definitive superiority of one family of architectures over another, they seem to enjoy similar extraordinary performances on a variety of tasks while also suffering from similar vulnerabilities such as texture, background, and simplicity biases.
summary: Following the surge of popularity of Transformers in Computer Vision, several studies have attempted to determine whether they could be more robust to distribution shifts and provide better uncertainty estimates than Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). The almost unanimous conclusion is that they are, and it is often conjectured more or less explicitly that the reason of this supposed superiority is to be attributed to the self-attention mechanism. In this paper we perform extensive empirical analyses showing that recent state-of-the-art CNNs (particularly, ConvNeXt) can be as robust and reliable or even sometimes more than the current state-of-the-art Transformers. However, there is no clear winner. Therefore, although it is tempting to state the definitive superiority of one family of architectures over another, they seem to enjoy similar extraordinary performances on a variety of tasks while also suffering from similar vulnerabilities such as texture, background, and simplicity biases.
abstract_zh: 随着变形金刚在计算机视觉领域的普及，一些研究试图确定它们是否能够比卷积神经网络 (CNN) 对分布变化更稳健，并提供更好的不确定性估计。几乎一致的结论是，它们确实如此，而且人们常常或多或少明确地推测，这种假定的优越性的原因应归因于自注意力机制。在本文中，我们进行了广泛的实证分析，表明最近最先进的 CNN（特别是 ConvNeXt）可以与当前最先进的 Transformer 一样强大和可靠，甚至有时甚至更强。然而，没有明显的赢家。因此，尽管很容易说一个架构系列相对于另一个架构具有绝对的优越性，但它们似乎在各种任务上都享有类似的非凡性能，同时也存在类似的漏洞，例如纹理、背景和简单性偏差。

AI.tldr: 通过实证分析比较CNN和Transformer在分布偏移下的鲁棒性和可靠性
AI.motivation: 挑战Transformer在鲁棒性上优于CNN的普遍观点，探讨是否存在明确的优劣
AI.method: 对最新的CNN（如ConvNeXt）和Transformer进行广泛的实证比较，评估其在分布偏移下的鲁棒性和可靠性
AI.result: 发现CNN和Transformer在鲁棒性和可靠性上表现相当，某些情况下CNN更优，但无明确优胜者
AI.conclusion: CNN和Transformer在多种任务中表现相似，具有相同的脆弱性，无法确定哪类架构绝对更优

authors_text: Pranav Dheram,Murugesan Ramakrishnan,Anirudh Raju,I-Fan Chen,Brian King,Katherine Powell,Melissa Saboowala,Karan Shetty,Andreas Stolcke
title: Toward Fairness in Speech Recognition: Discovery and mitigation of performance disparities
title_zh: 实现语音识别的公平：发现和缓解性能差异
abstract: As for other forms of AI, speech recognition has recently been examined with respect to performance disparities across different user cohorts. One approach to achieve fairness in speech recognition is to (1) identify speaker cohorts that suffer from subpar performance and (2) apply fairness mitigation measures targeting the cohorts discovered. In this paper, we report on initial findings with both discovery and mitigation of performance disparities using data from a product-scale AI assistant speech recognition system. We compare cohort discovery based on geographic and demographic information to a more scalable method that groups speakers without human labels, using speaker embedding technology. For fairness mitigation, we find that oversampling of underrepresented cohorts, as well as modeling speaker cohort membership by additional input variables, reduces the gap between top- and bottom-performing cohorts, without deteriorating overall recognition accuracy.
summary: As for other forms of AI, speech recognition has recently been examined with respect to performance disparities across different user cohorts. One approach to achieve fairness in speech recognition is to (1) identify speaker cohorts that suffer from subpar performance and (2) apply fairness mitigation measures targeting the cohorts discovered. In this paper, we report on initial findings with both discovery and mitigation of performance disparities using data from a product-scale AI assistant speech recognition system. We compare cohort discovery based on geographic and demographic information to a more scalable method that groups speakers without human labels, using speaker embedding technology. For fairness mitigation, we find that oversampling of underrepresented cohorts, as well as modeling speaker cohort membership by additional input variables, reduces the gap between top- and bottom-performing cohorts, without deteriorating overall recognition accuracy.
abstract_zh: 至于其他形式的人工智能，最近研究了语音识别在不同用户群体之间的性能差异。在语音识别中实现公平性的一种方法是（1）识别表现不佳的说话者群体，以及（2）针对发现的群体应用公平性缓解措施。在本文中，我们报告了使用来自产品级人工智能助理语音识别系统的数据发现和缓解性能差异的初步结果。我们将基于地理和人口统计信息的群组发现与一种更具可扩展性的方法进行比较，该方法使用说话者嵌入技术对没有人类标签的说话者进行分组。为了缓解公平性，我们发现对代表性不足的群体进行过采样，以及通过额外的输入变量对说话者群体成员进行建模，可以缩小表现最好的群体和表现最差的群体之间的差距，而不会降低整体识别的准确性。

AI.tldr: 研究语音识别中的公平性问题，发现并缓解不同用户群体间的性能差异
AI.motivation: 确保语音识别系统在不同用户群体间公平，减少因地理或人口统计因素导致的性能差异
AI.method: 使用地理和人口统计信息以及说话人嵌入技术进行群体发现，并通过过采样和增加输入变量来缓解差异
AI.result: 过采样和建模方法有效缩小了群体间性能差距，且未影响整体识别准确率
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法能有效缓解语音识别中的不公平问题，且具有可扩展性

authors_text: Zhongwei Qiu,Qiansheng Yang,Jian Wang,Dongmei Fu
title: Dynamic Graph Reasoning for Multi-person 3D Pose Estimation
title_zh: 多人 3D 姿态估计的动态图推理
abstract: Multi-person 3D pose estimation is a challenging task because of occlusion and depth ambiguity, especially in the cases of crowd scenes. To solve these problems, most existing methods explore modeling body context cues by enhancing feature representation with graph neural networks or adding structural constraints. However, these methods are not robust for their single-root formulation that decoding 3D poses from a root node with a pre-defined graph. In this paper, we propose GR-M3D, which models the \textbf{M}ulti-person \textbf{3D} pose estimation with dynamic \textbf{G}raph \textbf{R}easoning. The decoding graph in GR-M3D is predicted instead of pre-defined. In particular, It firstly generates several data maps and enhances them with a scale and depth aware refinement module (SDAR). Then multiple root keypoints and dense decoding paths for each person are estimated from these data maps. Based on them, dynamic decoding graphs are built by assigning path weights to the decoding paths, while the path weights are inferred from those enhanced data maps. And this process is named dynamic graph reasoning (DGR). Finally, the 3D poses are decoded according to dynamic decoding graphs for each detected person. GR-M3D can adjust the structure of the decoding graph implicitly by adopting soft path weights according to input data, which makes the decoding graphs be adaptive to different input persons to the best extent and more capable of handling occlusion and depth ambiguity than previous methods. We empirically show that the proposed bottom-up approach even outperforms top-down methods and achieves state-of-the-art results on three 3D pose datasets.
summary: Multi-person 3D pose estimation is a challenging task because of occlusion and depth ambiguity, especially in the cases of crowd scenes. To solve these problems, most existing methods explore modeling body context cues by enhancing feature representation with graph neural networks or adding structural constraints. However, these methods are not robust for their single-root formulation that decoding 3D poses from a root node with a pre-defined graph. In this paper, we propose GR-M3D, which models the \textbf{M}ulti-person \textbf{3D} pose estimation with dynamic \textbf{G}raph \textbf{R}easoning. The decoding graph in GR-M3D is predicted instead of pre-defined. In particular, It firstly generates several data maps and enhances them with a scale and depth aware refinement module (SDAR). Then multiple root keypoints and dense decoding paths for each person are estimated from these data maps. Based on them, dynamic decoding graphs are built by assigning path weights to the decoding paths, while the path weights are inferred from those enhanced data maps. And this process is named dynamic graph reasoning (DGR). Finally, the 3D poses are decoded according to dynamic decoding graphs for each detected person. GR-M3D can adjust the structure of the decoding graph implicitly by adopting soft path weights according to input data, which makes the decoding graphs be adaptive to different input persons to the best extent and more capable of handling occlusion and depth ambiguity than previous methods. We empirically show that the proposed bottom-up approach even outperforms top-down methods and achieves state-of-the-art results on three 3D pose datasets.
abstract_zh: 由于遮挡和深度模糊，多人 3D 姿态估计是一项具有挑战性的任务，尤其是在人群场景的情况下。为了解决这些问题，大多数现有方法通过使用图神经网络增强特征表示或添加结构约束来探索对身体上下文线索进行建模。然而，这些方法对于从具有预定义图的根节点解码 3D 姿势的单根公式而言并不稳健。在本文中，我们提出了 GR-M3D，它通过动态 \textbf{G}raph \textbf{R} 推理对 \textbf{M} 多人 \textbf{3D} 姿势估计进行建模。 GR-M3D 中的解码图是预测的而不是预定义的。特别是，它首先生成多个数据图，并使用比例和深度感知细化模块（SDAR）对其进行增强。然后根据这些数据图估计每个人的多个根关键点和密集解码路径。在此基础上，通过为解码路径分配路径权重来构建动态解码图，同时从这些增强的数据映射中推断出路径权重。这个过程被称为动态图推理（DGR）。最后，根据每个检测到的人的动态解码图对 3D 姿势进行解码。 GR-M3D可以根据输入数据采用软路径权重来隐式调整解码图的结构，这使得解码图能够最大程度地适应不同的输入人，并且比以前的方法更有能力处理遮挡和深度模糊。我们凭经验表明，所提出的自下而上的方法甚至优于自上而下的方法，并在三个 3D 姿势数据集上取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动态图推理的多人体3D姿态估计方法GR-M3D，通过自适应调整解码图结构来解决遮挡和深度模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因采用预定义的单根节点图结构，在处理遮挡和深度模糊的复杂场景时鲁棒性不足，无法适应不同人体的多样性。
AI.method: 通过生成多尺度数据地图并利用深度感知 refinement 模块增强特征，估计多根关键点和密集解码路径，基于增强数据动态分配路径权重构建解码图，实现动态图推理（DGR）。
AI.result: 在三个3D姿态数据集上达到SOTA性能，且所提自底向上方法超越传统自顶向下方法。
AI.conclusion: 动态图推理机制使解码图能根据输入数据自适应调整结构，显著提升了复杂场景下的姿态估计鲁棒性。

search_text: Dynamic Graph Reasoning for Multi-person 3D Pose Estimation 多人 3D 姿态估计的动态图推理 Multi-person 3D pose estimation is a challenging task because of occlusion and depth ambiguity, especially in the cases of crowd scenes. To solve these problems, most existing methods explore modeling body context cues by enhancing feature representation with graph neural networks or adding structural constraints. However, these methods are not robust for their single-root formulation that decoding 3D poses from a root node with a pre-defined graph. In this paper, we propose GR-M3D, which models the \textbf{M}ulti-person \textbf{3D} pose estimation with dynamic \textbf{G}raph \textbf{R}easoning. The decoding graph in GR-M3D is predicted instead of pre-defined. In particular, It firstly generates several data maps and enhances them with a scale and depth aware refinement module (SDAR). Then multiple root keypoints and dense decoding paths for each person are estimated from these data maps. Based on them, dynamic decoding graphs are built by assigning path weights to the decoding paths, while the path weights are inferred from those enhanced data maps. And this process is named dynamic graph reasoning (DGR). Finally, the 3D poses are decoded according to dynamic decoding graphs for each detected person. GR-M3D can adjust the structure of the decoding graph implicitly by adopting soft path weights according to input data, which makes the decoding graphs be adaptive to different input persons to the best extent and more capable of handling occlusion and depth ambiguity than previous methods. We empirically show that the proposed bottom-up approach even outperforms top-down methods and achieves state-of-the-art results on three 3D pose datasets. 由于遮挡和深度模糊，多人 3D 姿态估计是一项具有挑战性的任务，尤其是在人群场景的情况下。为了解决这些问题，大多数现有方法通过使用图神经网络增强特征表示或添加结构约束来探索对身体上下文线索进行建模。然而，这些方法对于从具有预定义图的根节点解码 3D 姿势的单根公式而言并不稳健。在本文中，我们提出了 GR-M3D，它通过动态 \textbf{G}raph \textbf{R} 推理对 \textbf{M} 多人 \textbf{3D} 姿势估计进行建模。 GR-M3D 中的解码图是预测的而不是预定义的。特别是，它首先生成多个数据图，并使用比例和深度感知细化模块（SDAR）对其进行增强。然后根据这些数据图估计每个人的多个根关键点和密集解码路径。在此基础上，通过为解码路径分配路径权重来构建动态解码图，同时从这些增强的数据映射中推断出路径权重。这个过程被称为动态图推理（DGR）。最后，根据每个检测到的人的动态解码图对 3D 姿势进行解码。 GR-M3D可以根据输入数据采用软路径权重来隐式调整解码图的结构，这使得解码图能够最大程度地适应不同的输入人，并且比以前的方法更有能力处理遮挡和深度模糊。我们凭经验表明，所提出的自下而上的方法甚至优于自上而下的方法，并在三个 3D 姿势数据集上取得了最先进的结果。 本文提出了一种基于动态图推理的多人体3D姿态估计方法GR-M3D，通过自适应调整解码图结构来解决遮挡和深度模糊问题。 Zhongwei Qiu,Qiansheng Yang,Jian Wang,Dongmei Fu cs.CV

authors_text: Huy Lê Nguyen,Thy Nguyen,Matthew Jones
title: Fair Range k-center
title_zh: 公平范围 k 中心
abstract: We study the problem of fairness in k-centers clustering on data with disjoint demographic groups. Specifically, this work proposes a variant of fairness which restricts each group's number of centers with both a lower bound (minority-protection) and an upper bound (restricted-domination), and provides both an offline and one-pass streaming algorithm for the problem. In the special case where the lower bound and the upper bound is the same, our offline algorithm preserves the same time complexity and approximation factor with the previous state-of-the-art. Furthermore, our one-pass streaming algorithm improves on approximation factor, running time and space complexity in this special case compared to previous works. Specifically, the approximation factor of our algorithm is 13 compared to the previous 17-approximation algorithm, and the previous algorithms' time complexities have dependence on the metric space's aspect ratio, which can be arbitrarily large, whereas our algorithm's running time does not depend on the aspect ratio.
summary: We study the problem of fairness in k-centers clustering on data with disjoint demographic groups. Specifically, this work proposes a variant of fairness which restricts each group's number of centers with both a lower bound (minority-protection) and an upper bound (restricted-domination), and provides both an offline and one-pass streaming algorithm for the problem. In the special case where the lower bound and the upper bound is the same, our offline algorithm preserves the same time complexity and approximation factor with the previous state-of-the-art. Furthermore, our one-pass streaming algorithm improves on approximation factor, running time and space complexity in this special case compared to previous works. Specifically, the approximation factor of our algorithm is 13 compared to the previous 17-approximation algorithm, and the previous algorithms' time complexities have dependence on the metric space's aspect ratio, which can be arbitrarily large, whereas our algorithm's running time does not depend on the aspect ratio.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了具有不相交人口群体的数据的 k 中心聚类的公平性问题。具体来说，这项工作提出了一种公平性的变体，它通过下限（少数保护）和上限（限制统治）来限制每个组的中心数量，并为该问题提供了离线和单通流算法。在下限和上限相同的特殊情况下，我们的离线算法保留了与之前最先进的技术相同的时间复杂度和近似因子。此外，与之前的工作相比，我们的单遍流算法在这种特殊情况下改进了近似因子、运行时间和空间复杂度。具体来说，与之前的17近似算法相比，我们算法的近似因子为13，并且之前算法的时间复杂度依赖于度量空间的长宽比，可以任意大，而我们算法的运行时间不依赖于长宽比。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在具有不同人口统计群体的数据上进行公平的k中心聚类问题，提出了一种同时限制各群体中心数量上下限的公平性约束，并设计了离线和流算法。
AI.motivation: 传统k中心聚类可能忽视群体公平性，导致某些群体被过度代表或忽视，需通过约束机制保障各群体的合理覆盖。
AI.method: 提出兼顾上下限约束的公平性模型，设计离线算法与单次流算法，特别针对上下限相等场景优化算法复杂度。
AI.result: 离线算法保持原有时间复杂度和近似比，流算法在近似比(13 vs 17)、时间复杂度及空间复杂度上优于现有方法，且不依赖度量空间纵横比。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保证公平性的同时提升了算法效率，尤其适用于流数据场景，为公平聚类问题提供了更优解决方案。

authors_text: Arwa Dabbech,Matthieu Terris,Adrian Jackson,Mpati Ramatsoku,Oleg M. Smirnov,Yves Wiaux
title: First AI for deep super-resolution wide-field imaging in radio astronomy: unveiling structure in ESO 137--006
title_zh: 第一个用于射电天文学深度超分辨率宽视场成像的人工智能：在 ESO 137--006 中揭晓结构
abstract: We introduce the first AI-based framework for deep, super-resolution, wide-field radio-interferometric imaging, and demonstrate it on observations of the ESO~137-006 radio galaxy. The algorithmic framework to solve the inverse problem for image reconstruction builds on a recent ``plug-and-play'' scheme whereby a denoising operator is injected as an image regulariser in an optimisation algorithm, which alternates until convergence between denoising steps and gradient-descent data-fidelity steps. We investigate handcrafted and learned variants of high-resolution high-dynamic range denoisers. We propose a parallel algorithm implementation relying on automated decompositions of the image into facets and the measurement operator into sparse low-dimensional blocks, enabling scalability to large data and image dimensions. We validate our framework for image formation at a wide field of view containing ESO~137-006, from 19 gigabytes of MeerKAT data at 1053 and 1399 MHz. The recovered maps exhibit significantly more resolution and dynamic range than CLEAN, revealing collimated synchrotron threads close to the galactic core.
summary: We introduce the first AI-based framework for deep, super-resolution, wide-field radio-interferometric imaging, and demonstrate it on observations of the ESO~137-006 radio galaxy. The algorithmic framework to solve the inverse problem for image reconstruction builds on a recent ``plug-and-play'' scheme whereby a denoising operator is injected as an image regulariser in an optimisation algorithm, which alternates until convergence between denoising steps and gradient-descent data-fidelity steps. We investigate handcrafted and learned variants of high-resolution high-dynamic range denoisers. We propose a parallel algorithm implementation relying on automated decompositions of the image into facets and the measurement operator into sparse low-dimensional blocks, enabling scalability to large data and image dimensions. We validate our framework for image formation at a wide field of view containing ESO~137-006, from 19 gigabytes of MeerKAT data at 1053 and 1399 MHz. The recovered maps exhibit significantly more resolution and dynamic range than CLEAN, revealing collimated synchrotron threads close to the galactic core.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了第一个基于人工智能的深度、超分辨率、宽视场射电干涉成像框架，并在 ESO~137-006 射电星系的观测中进行了演示。解决图像重建逆问题的算法框架建立在最近的“即插即用”方案的基础上，其中将去噪算子作为优化算法中的图像正则器注入，该算法交替进行，直到去噪步骤和梯度下降数据保真度步骤之间收敛。我们研究手工制作和学习的高分辨率高动态范围降噪器的变体。我们提出了一种并行算法实现，依赖于将图像自动分解为面，并将测量算子自动分解为稀疏低维块，从而实现大数据和图像维度的可扩展性。我们通过 1053 和 1399 MHz 的 19 GB MeerKAT 数据，在包含 ESO~137-006 的宽视场中验证了我们的图像形成框架。恢复的地图显示出比 CLEAN 更高的分辨率和动态范围，揭示了靠近银河系核心的准直同步加速器线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个基于人工智能的深度超分辨率宽视场射电干涉成像框架，并应用于ESO 137-006星系观测。
AI.motivation: 传统射电成像方法（如CLEAN算法）在分辨率和动态范围上存在局限，难以揭示星系核心附近的精细结构。
AI.method: 采用'即插即用'优化框架，将去噪算子作为正则化器嵌入梯度下降算法，结合图像分块与测量算子稀疏分解实现大规模数据并行处理。
AI.result: 从19GB MeerKAT数据中重建的图像分辨率和动态范围显著优于CLEAN，首次揭示了星系核心附近的准直同步辐射丝状结构。
AI.conclusion: 该AI框架为射电天文学提供了更高效的宽视场超分辨率成像方案，可揭示传统方法无法观测到的星系精细结构。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出首个基于人工智能的深度超分辨率宽视场射电干涉成像框架，并应用于ESO 137-006星系观测。
ai_content.motivation: 传统射电成像方法（如CLEAN算法）在分辨率和动态范围上存在局限，难以揭示星系核心附近的精细结构。
ai_content.method: 采用'即插即用'优化框架，将去噪算子作为正则化器嵌入梯度下降算法，结合图像分块与测量算子稀疏分解实现大规模数据并行处理。
ai_content.result: 从19GB MeerKAT数据中重建的图像分辨率和动态范围显著优于CLEAN，首次揭示了星系核心附近的准直同步辐射丝状结构。
ai_content.conclusion: 该AI框架为射电天文学提供了更高效的宽视场超分辨率成像方案，可揭示传统方法无法观测到的星系精细结构。

search_text: First AI for deep super-resolution wide-field imaging in radio astronomy: unveiling structure in ESO 137--006 第一个用于射电天文学深度超分辨率宽视场成像的人工智能：在 ESO 137--006 中揭晓结构 We introduce the first AI-based framework for deep, super-resolution, wide-field radio-interferometric imaging, and demonstrate it on observations of the ESO~137-006 radio galaxy. The algorithmic framework to solve the inverse problem for image reconstruction builds on a recent ``plug-and-play'' scheme whereby a denoising operator is injected as an image regulariser in an optimisation algorithm, which alternates until convergence between denoising steps and gradient-descent data-fidelity steps. We investigate handcrafted and learned variants of high-resolution high-dynamic range denoisers. We propose a parallel algorithm implementation relying on automated decompositions of the image into facets and the measurement operator into sparse low-dimensional blocks, enabling scalability to large data and image dimensions. We validate our framework for image formation at a wide field of view containing ESO~137-006, from 19 gigabytes of MeerKAT data at 1053 and 1399 MHz. The recovered maps exhibit significantly more resolution and dynamic range than CLEAN, revealing collimated synchrotron threads close to the galactic core. 我们推出了第一个基于人工智能的深度、超分辨率、宽视场射电干涉成像框架，并在 ESO~137-006 射电星系的观测中进行了演示。解决图像重建逆问题的算法框架建立在最近的“即插即用”方案的基础上，其中将去噪算子作为优化算法中的图像正则器注入，该算法交替进行，直到去噪步骤和梯度下降数据保真度步骤之间收敛。我们研究手工制作和学习的高分辨率高动态范围降噪器的变体。我们提出了一种并行算法实现，依赖于将图像自动分解为面，并将测量算子自动分解为稀疏低维块，从而实现大数据和图像维度的可扩展性。我们通过 1053 和 1399 MHz 的 19 GB MeerKAT 数据，在包含 ESO~137-006 的宽视场中验证了我们的图像形成框架。恢复的地图显示出比 CLEAN 更高的分辨率和动态范围，揭示了靠近银河系核心的准直同步加速器线。 本文提出首个基于人工智能的深度超分辨率宽视场射电干涉成像框架，并应用于ESO 137-006星系观测。 Arwa Dabbech,Matthieu Terris,Adrian Jackson,Mpati Ramatsoku,Oleg M. Smirnov,Yves Wiaux astro-ph.IM,astro-ph.GA,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Maria Escobar,Laura Daza,Cristina González,Jordi Pont-Tuset,Pablo Arbeláez
title: Video Swin Transformers for Egocentric Video Understanding @ Ego4D Challenges 2022
title_zh: 用于以自我为中心的视频理解的 Video Swin Transformers @ Ego4D 挑战 2022
abstract: We implemented Video Swin Transformer as a base architecture for the tasks of Point-of-No-Return temporal localization and Object State Change Classification. Our method achieved competitive performance on both challenges.
summary: We implemented Video Swin Transformer as a base architecture for the tasks of Point-of-No-Return temporal localization and Object State Change Classification. Our method achieved competitive performance on both challenges.
abstract_zh: 我们实现了 Video Swin Transformer 作为无返回点时间定位和对象状态变化分类任务的基础架构。我们的方法在这两项挑战中都取得了有竞争力的表现。

AI.tldr: 该论文将Video Swin Transformer应用于第一视角视频理解任务，参与Ego4D挑战赛中的‘不可逆时间定位’和‘物体状态变化分类’两个任务。
AI.motivation: 第一视角视频包含复杂动态场景和细粒度动作信息，传统方法难以有效建模时空关系，需探索更强大的视频理解架构。
AI.method: 以Video Swin Transformer为基座模型，针对两个挑战任务设计相应的特征提取和时序建模方案。
AI.result: 在Ego4D挑战赛的两个任务中均取得具有竞争力的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: Video Swin Transformer在第一视角视频理解任务中展现出有效性，为后续研究提供了可行的技术路径。

authors_text: Yirui Wang,Shenghua He,Youbao Tang,Jingyu Chen,Honghao Zhou,Sanliang Hong,Junjie Liang,Yanxin Huang,Ning Zhang,Ruei-Sung Lin,Mei Han
title: PieTrack: An MOT solution based on synthetic data training and self-supervised domain adaptation
title_zh: PieTrack：基于合成数据训练和自监督域适应的 MOT 解决方案
comment: Third place solution for the MOTSynth-MOT-CVPR22 Challenge
comments: Third place solution for the MOTSynth-MOT-CVPR22 Challenge
abstract: In order to cope with the increasing demand for labeling data and privacy issues with human detection, synthetic data has been used as a substitute and showing promising results in human detection and tracking tasks. We participate in the 7th Workshop on Benchmarking Multi-Target Tracking (BMTT), themed on "How Far Can Synthetic Data Take us"? Our solution, PieTrack, is developed based on synthetic data without using any pre-trained weights. We propose a self-supervised domain adaptation method that enables mitigating the domain shift issue between the synthetic (e.g., MOTSynth) and real data (e.g., MOT17) without involving extra human labels. By leveraging the proposed multi-scale ensemble inference, we achieved a final HOTA score of 58.7 on the MOT17 testing set, ranked third place in the challenge.
summary: In order to cope with the increasing demand for labeling data and privacy issues with human detection, synthetic data has been used as a substitute and showing promising results in human detection and tracking tasks. We participate in the 7th Workshop on Benchmarking Multi-Target Tracking (BMTT), themed on "How Far Can Synthetic Data Take us"? Our solution, PieTrack, is developed based on synthetic data without using any pre-trained weights. We propose a self-supervised domain adaptation method that enables mitigating the domain shift issue between the synthetic (e.g., MOTSynth) and real data (e.g., MOT17) without involving extra human labels. By leveraging the proposed multi-scale ensemble inference, we achieved a final HOTA score of 58.7 on the MOT17 testing set, ranked third place in the challenge.
abstract_zh: 为了应对人类检测对标记数据和隐私问题日益增长的需求，合成数据已被用作替代品，并在人类检测和跟踪任务中显示出有希望的结果。我们参加第七届多目标跟踪基准研讨会（BMTT），主题为“合成数据能带我们走多远？”我们的解决方案 PieTrack 是基于合成数据开发的，不使用任何预先训练的权重。我们提出了一种自我监督的域适应方法，可以减轻合成数据（例如 MOTSynth）和真实数据（例如 MOT17）之间的域转移问题，而无需涉及额外的人类标签。通过利用所提出的多尺度集成推理，我们在 MOT17 测试集上获得了 58.7 的最终 HOTA 分数，在挑战赛中排名第三。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于合成数据训练和自监督领域适应的多目标跟踪（MOT）解决方案PieTrack。
AI.motivation: 为应对人工标注数据的成本增加和隐私问题，利用合成数据替代真实数据进行目标检测与跟踪，并探索其在实际场景中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 采用合成数据训练模型，提出自监督领域适应方法以缓解合成数据（如MOTSynth）与真实数据（如MOT17）间的领域差异问题，并结合多尺度集成推理提升跟踪性能。
AI.result: 在MOT17测试集上达到58.7的HOTA分数，在挑战赛中排名第三。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据结合自监督领域适应方法可有效提升MOT性能，无需预训练权重或额外标注数据，展示了合成数据在实际应用中的潜力。

authors_text: Yuan An,Alex Kalinowski,Jane Greenberg
title: Exploring Wasserstein Distance across Concept Embeddings for Ontology Matching
title_zh: 探索跨概念嵌入的 Wasserstein 距离以进行本体匹配
comment: Accepted by the 17th International Workshop on Ontology Matching collocated with the 21th International Semantic Web Conference (ISWC 2022)
comments: Accepted by the 17th International Workshop on Ontology Matching collocated with the 21th International Semantic Web Conference (ISWC 2022)
abstract: Measuring the distance between ontological elements is fundamental for ontology matching. String-based distance metrics are notorious for shallow syntactic matching. In this exploratory study, we investigate Wasserstein distance targeting continuous space that can incorporate various types of information. We use a pre-trained word embeddings system to embed ontology element labels. We examine the effectiveness of Wasserstein distance for measuring similarity between ontologies, and discovering and refining matchings between individual elements. Our experiments with the OAEI conference track and MSE benchmarks achieved competitive results compared to the leading systems.
summary: Measuring the distance between ontological elements is fundamental for ontology matching. String-based distance metrics are notorious for shallow syntactic matching. In this exploratory study, we investigate Wasserstein distance targeting continuous space that can incorporate various types of information. We use a pre-trained word embeddings system to embed ontology element labels. We examine the effectiveness of Wasserstein distance for measuring similarity between ontologies, and discovering and refining matchings between individual elements. Our experiments with the OAEI conference track and MSE benchmarks achieved competitive results compared to the leading systems.
abstract_zh: 测量本体元素之间的距离是本体匹配的基础。基于字符串的距离度量因浅层语法匹配而臭名昭著。在这项探索性研究中，我们研究了针对可以包含各种类型信息的连续空间的 Wasserstein 距离。我们使用预先训练的词嵌入系统来嵌入本体元素标签。我们研究了 Wasserstein 距离在测量本体之间的相似性以及发现和细化各个元素之间的匹配方面的有效性。与领先的系统相比，我们对 OAEI 会议轨道和 MSE 基准进行的实验取得了具有竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用Wasserstein距离在连续空间中进行本体匹配，以克服传统字符串匹配方法的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统字符串距离度量存在浅层语法匹配问题，难以捕捉语义信息，需探索更有效的连续空间距离度量方法。
AI.method: 使用预训练词嵌入系统将本体元素标签映射到连续空间，通过Wasserstein距离计算相似性并优化元素匹配。
AI.result: 在OAEI会议跟踪和MSE基准测试中，方法表现与领先系统具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: Wasserstein距离在连续空间中能有效衡量本体相似性，为本体匹配提供了新思路。

search_text: Exploring Wasserstein Distance across Concept Embeddings for Ontology Matching 探索跨概念嵌入的 Wasserstein 距离以进行本体匹配 Measuring the distance between ontological elements is fundamental for ontology matching. String-based distance metrics are notorious for shallow syntactic matching. In this exploratory study, we investigate Wasserstein distance targeting continuous space that can incorporate various types of information. We use a pre-trained word embeddings system to embed ontology element labels. We examine the effectiveness of Wasserstein distance for measuring similarity between ontologies, and discovering and refining matchings between individual elements. Our experiments with the OAEI conference track and MSE benchmarks achieved competitive results compared to the leading systems. 测量本体元素之间的距离是本体匹配的基础。基于字符串的距离度量因浅层语法匹配而臭名昭著。在这项探索性研究中，我们研究了针对可以包含各种类型信息的连续空间的 Wasserstein 距离。我们使用预先训练的词嵌入系统来嵌入本体元素标签。我们研究了 Wasserstein 距离在测量本体之间的相似性以及发现和细化各个元素之间的匹配方面的有效性。与领先的系统相比，我们对 OAEI 会议轨道和 MSE 基准进行的实验取得了具有竞争力的结果。 本文研究如何利用Wasserstein距离在连续空间中进行本体匹配，以克服传统字符串匹配方法的不足。 Yuan An,Alex Kalinowski,Jane Greenberg cs.AI

authors_text: Steven Jecmen,Nihar B. Shah,Fei Fang,Vincent Conitzer
title: Tradeoffs in Preventing Manipulation in Paper Bidding for Reviewer Assignment
title_zh: 防止论文投标中审稿人分配被操纵的权衡
abstract: Many conferences rely on paper bidding as a key component of their reviewer assignment procedure. These bids are then taken into account when assigning reviewers to help ensure that each reviewer is assigned to suitable papers. However, despite the benefits of using bids, reliance on paper bidding can allow malicious reviewers to manipulate the paper assignment for unethical purposes (e.g., getting assigned to a friend's paper). Several different approaches to preventing this manipulation have been proposed and deployed. In this paper, we enumerate certain desirable properties that algorithms for addressing bid manipulation should satisfy. We then offer a high-level analysis of various approaches along with directions for future investigation.
summary: Many conferences rely on paper bidding as a key component of their reviewer assignment procedure. These bids are then taken into account when assigning reviewers to help ensure that each reviewer is assigned to suitable papers. However, despite the benefits of using bids, reliance on paper bidding can allow malicious reviewers to manipulate the paper assignment for unethical purposes (e.g., getting assigned to a friend's paper). Several different approaches to preventing this manipulation have been proposed and deployed. In this paper, we enumerate certain desirable properties that algorithms for addressing bid manipulation should satisfy. We then offer a high-level analysis of various approaches along with directions for future investigation.
abstract_zh: 许多会议将论文招标作为审稿人分配程序的关键组成部分。然后在分配审稿人时考虑这些出价，以帮助确保为每个审稿人分配合适的论文。然而，尽管使用投标有好处，但对论文投标的依赖可能会让恶意审稿人出于不道德的目的操纵论文分配（例如，分配给朋友的论文）。已经提出并部署了几种不同的方法来防止这种操纵。在本文中，我们列举了解决出价操纵问题的算法应满足的某些理想属性。然后，我们对各种方法进行高级分析以及未来研究的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了防止论文投标操纵的算法应满足的属性，并探讨了不同方法的权衡与未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 会议评审中依赖论文投标可能导致恶意审稿人操纵分配过程，例如为朋友的论文争取审稿机会，从而引发不道德行为。
AI.method: 列举防止投标操纵算法的期望属性，分析现有方法的优缺点，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.result: 总结了不同方法在防止操纵方面的效果与潜在缺陷，指出需进一步平衡公平性与可行性。
AI.conclusion: 现有方法在防止投标操纵时存在权衡，需结合具体场景优化算法设计，并探索更鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: David Klee,Ondrej Biza,Robert Platt
title: Graph-Structured Policy Learning for Multi-Goal Manipulation Tasks
title_zh: 多目标操作任务的图结构策略学习
abstract: Multi-goal policy learning for robotic manipulation is challenging. Prior successes have used state-based representations of the objects or provided demonstration data to facilitate learning. In this paper, by hand-coding a high-level discrete representation of the domain, we show that policies to reach dozens of goals can be learned with a single network using Q-learning from pixels. The agent focuses learning on simpler, local policies which are sequenced together by planning in the abstract space. We compare our method against standard multi-goal RL baselines, as well as other methods that leverage the discrete representation, on a challenging block construction domain. We find that our method can build more than a hundred different block structures, and demonstrate forward transfer to structures with novel objects. Lastly, we deploy the policy learned in simulation on a real robot.
summary: Multi-goal policy learning for robotic manipulation is challenging. Prior successes have used state-based representations of the objects or provided demonstration data to facilitate learning. In this paper, by hand-coding a high-level discrete representation of the domain, we show that policies to reach dozens of goals can be learned with a single network using Q-learning from pixels. The agent focuses learning on simpler, local policies which are sequenced together by planning in the abstract space. We compare our method against standard multi-goal RL baselines, as well as other methods that leverage the discrete representation, on a challenging block construction domain. We find that our method can build more than a hundred different block structures, and demonstrate forward transfer to structures with novel objects. Lastly, we deploy the policy learned in simulation on a real robot.
abstract_zh: 机器人操纵的多目标策略学习具有挑战性。之前的成功案例是使用基于状态的对象表示或提供演示数据来促进学习。在本文中，通过对域的高级离散表示进行手工编码，我们表明可以使用来自像素的 Q 学习通过单个网络来学习达到数十个目标的策略。智能体重点学习更简单的本地策略，这些策略通过抽象空间中的规划排序在一起。我们在具有挑战性的块构建领域将我们的方法与标准多目标强化学习基线以及利用离散表示的其他方法进行比较。我们发现我们的方法可以构建一百多种不同的块结构，并演示了向具有新颖对象的结构的前向传输。最后，我们将在模拟中学到的策略部署在真实的机器人上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图结构策略学习的方法，通过手动生成的高层离散表示，使机器人能够在像素输入下学习完成多个目标的操控任务。
AI.motivation: 传统多目标机器人操控学习方法依赖状态表示或演示数据，难以扩展到复杂任务。本文旨在通过抽象表示和规划实现更高效的多目标策略学习。
AI.method: 设计高层离散的领域表示，使用Q学习从像素输入中学习单一网络，通过抽象空间中的规划将简单局部策略序列化组合。
AI.result: 方法在积木构建任务中成功生成超百种结构，实现对新物体的正向迁移，并在仿真训练后成功部署于真实机器人。
AI.conclusion: 图结构策略学习结合抽象规划能有效解决多目标操控问题，证明了离散表示与Q学习结合的可扩展性和实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Stefan Bosse
title: JAM: The JavaScript Agent Machine for Distributed Computing and Simulation with reactive and mobile Multi-agent Systems -- A Technical Report
title_zh: JAM：用于分布式计算和模拟的 JavaScript 代理机，具有反应式和移动多代理系统 - 技术报告
abstract: Agent-based modelling (ABM), simulation (ABS), and distributed computation (ABC) are established methods. The Internet and Web-based technologies are suitable carriers. This paper is a technical report with some tutorial aspects of the JavaScript Agent Machine (JAM) platform and the programming of agents with AgentJS, a sub-set of the widely used JavaScript programming language for the programming of mobile state-based reactive agents. In addition to explaining the motivation for particular design choices and introducing core concepts of the architecture and the programming of agents in JavaScript, short examples illustrate the power of the JAM platform and its components for the deployment of large-scale multi-agent system in strong heterogeneous environments like the Internet. JAM is suitable for the deployment in strong heterogeneous and mobile environments. Finally, JAM can be used for ABC as well as for ABS in an unified methodology, finally enabling mobile crowd sensing coupled with simulation (ABS).
summary: Agent-based modelling (ABM), simulation (ABS), and distributed computation (ABC) are established methods. The Internet and Web-based technologies are suitable carriers. This paper is a technical report with some tutorial aspects of the JavaScript Agent Machine (JAM) platform and the programming of agents with AgentJS, a sub-set of the widely used JavaScript programming language for the programming of mobile state-based reactive agents. In addition to explaining the motivation for particular design choices and introducing core concepts of the architecture and the programming of agents in JavaScript, short examples illustrate the power of the JAM platform and its components for the deployment of large-scale multi-agent system in strong heterogeneous environments like the Internet. JAM is suitable for the deployment in strong heterogeneous and mobile environments. Finally, JAM can be used for ABC as well as for ABS in an unified methodology, finally enabling mobile crowd sensing coupled with simulation (ABS).
abstract_zh: 基于代理的建模（ABM）、仿真（ABS）和分布式计算（ABC）是已建立的方法。互联网和基于网络的技术是合适的载体。本文是一份技术报告，其中包含 JavaScript 代理机 (JAM) 平台和使用 AgentJS 进行代理编程的一些教程方面，AgentJS 是广泛使用的 JavaScript 编程语言的子集，用于基于移动状态的反应式代理的编程。除了解释特定设计选择的动机并介绍架构的核心概念和 JavaScript 中的代理编程之外，简短的示例还说明了 JAM 平台及其组件在互联网等强异构环境中部署大规模多代理系统的强大功能。 JAM适合强异构、移动环境下的部署。最后，JAM 可以通过统一的方法用于 ABC 和 ABS，最终实现移动人群感知与模拟 (ABS) 的结合。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种基于JavaScript的多智能体系统平台JAM，用于分布式计算和仿真，并探讨其在异构环境中的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有基于代理的建模、仿真和分布式计算方法需要适应互联网等异构环境，而JavaScript作为广泛使用的编程语言具备良好适用性。
AI.method: 设计JavaScript Agent Machine（JAM）平台，结合AgentJS（JavaScript子集）实现反应式移动代理编程，并通过架构设计支持大规模多代理系统部署。
AI.result: 验证了JAM平台在强异构环境（如互联网）中支持大规模多代理系统部署的能力，可统一应用于分布式计算与仿真场景。
AI.conclusion: JAM为移动人群感知与仿真提供统一方法，展示了JavaScript在构建反应式、移动式多代理系统中的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文介绍了一种基于JavaScript的多智能体系统平台JAM，用于分布式计算和仿真，并探讨其在异构环境中的应用。

ai_content.method: 设计JavaScript Agent Machine（JAM）平台，结合AgentJS（JavaScript子集）实现反应式移动代理编程，并通过架构设计支持大规模多代理系统部署。

search_text: JAM: The JavaScript Agent Machine for Distributed Computing and Simulation with reactive and mobile Multi-agent Systems -- A Technical Report JAM：用于分布式计算和模拟的 JavaScript 代理机，具有反应式和移动多代理系统 - 技术报告 Agent-based modelling (ABM), simulation (ABS), and distributed computation (ABC) are established methods. The Internet and Web-based technologies are suitable carriers. This paper is a technical report with some tutorial aspects of the JavaScript Agent Machine (JAM) platform and the programming of agents with AgentJS, a sub-set of the widely used JavaScript programming language for the programming of mobile state-based reactive agents. In addition to explaining the motivation for particular design choices and introducing core concepts of the architecture and the programming of agents in JavaScript, short examples illustrate the power of the JAM platform and its components for the deployment of large-scale multi-agent system in strong heterogeneous environments like the Internet. JAM is suitable for the deployment in strong heterogeneous and mobile environments. Finally, JAM can be used for ABC as well as for ABS in an unified methodology, finally enabling mobile crowd sensing coupled with simulation (ABS). 基于代理的建模（ABM）、仿真（ABS）和分布式计算（ABC）是已建立的方法。互联网和基于网络的技术是合适的载体。本文是一份技术报告，其中包含 JavaScript 代理机 (JAM) 平台和使用 AgentJS 进行代理编程的一些教程方面，AgentJS 是广泛使用的 JavaScript 编程语言的子集，用于基于移动状态的反应式代理的编程。除了解释特定设计选择的动机并介绍架构的核心概念和 JavaScript 中的代理编程之外，简短的示例还说明了 JAM 平台及其组件在互联网等强异构环境中部署大规模多代理系统的强大功能。 JAM适合强异构、移动环境下的部署。最后，JAM 可以通过统一的方法用于 ABC 和 ABS，最终实现移动人群感知与模拟 (ABS) 的结合。 本文介绍了一种基于JavaScript的多智能体系统平台JAM，用于分布式计算和仿真，并探讨其在异构环境中的应用。 Stefan Bosse cs.AI,cs.DC,cs.HC,cs.NI

authors_text: Nan Li,Alexandros Iosifidis,Qi Zhang
title: Distributed Deep Learning Inference Acceleration using Seamless Collaboration in Edge Computing
title_zh: 在边缘计算中使用无缝协作进行分布式深度学习推理加速
comment: Accepted by the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Communications (ICC)
comments: Accepted by the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Communications (ICC)
abstract: This paper studies inference acceleration using distributed convolutional neural networks (CNNs) in collaborative edge computing. To ensure inference accuracy in inference task partitioning, we consider the receptive-field when performing segment-based partitioning. To maximize the parallelization between the communication and computing processes, thereby minimizing the total inference time of an inference task, we design a novel task collaboration scheme in which the overlapping zone of the sub-tasks on secondary edge servers (ESs) is executed on the host ES, named as HALP. We further extend HALP to the scenario of multiple tasks. Experimental results show that HALP can accelerate CNN inference in VGG-16 by 1.7-2.0x for a single task and 1.7-1.8x for 4 tasks per batch on GTX 1080TI and JETSON AGX Xavier, which outperforms the state-of-the-art work MoDNN. Moreover, we evaluate the service reliability under time-variant channel, which shows that HALP is an effective solution to ensure high service reliability with strict service deadline.
summary: This paper studies inference acceleration using distributed convolutional neural networks (CNNs) in collaborative edge computing. To ensure inference accuracy in inference task partitioning, we consider the receptive-field when performing segment-based partitioning. To maximize the parallelization between the communication and computing processes, thereby minimizing the total inference time of an inference task, we design a novel task collaboration scheme in which the overlapping zone of the sub-tasks on secondary edge servers (ESs) is executed on the host ES, named as HALP. We further extend HALP to the scenario of multiple tasks. Experimental results show that HALP can accelerate CNN inference in VGG-16 by 1.7-2.0x for a single task and 1.7-1.8x for 4 tasks per batch on GTX 1080TI and JETSON AGX Xavier, which outperforms the state-of-the-art work MoDNN. Moreover, we evaluate the service reliability under time-variant channel, which shows that HALP is an effective solution to ensure high service reliability with strict service deadline.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了协作边缘计算中使用分布式卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的推理加速。为了确保推理任务分区的推理准确性，我们在执行基于段的分区时考虑感受野。为了最大化通信和计算过程之间的并行化，从而最小化推理任务的总推理时间，我们设计了一种新颖的任务协作方案，其中辅助边缘服务器（ES）上的子任务的重叠区域在主机ES上执行，称为HALP。我们进一步将 HALP 扩展到多任务的场景。实验结果表明，HALP 可以在 GTX 1080TI 和 JETSON AGX Xavier 上将 VGG-16 中的单任务加速 1.7-2.0 倍，每批 4 个任务加速 1.7-1.8 倍，优于最先进的 MoDNN。此外，我们评估了时变信道下的服务可靠性，这表明HALP是在严格的服务期限下确保高服务可靠性的有效解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于边缘计算协作的分布式深度学习推理加速方法，通过优化任务划分和并行化处理来提升CNN推理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在推理任务划分时未充分考虑感受野特性，导致精度下降或通信计算资源利用率不足，亟需一种兼顾准确性与效率的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计名为HALP的协作方案，将子任务重叠区域集中在主边缘服务器执行，并扩展至多任务场景，通过最大化通信与计算并行性降低总推理时间。
AI.result: 在GTX 1080TI和JETSON AGX Xavier上，HALP使VGG-16单任务推理加速1.7-2.0倍，4任务批处理加速1.7-1.8倍，且在时变信道下保持高服务可靠性。
AI.conclusion: HALP通过优化任务划分与协作机制，有效解决了分布式边缘计算中推理加速与可靠性保障的矛盾，优于现有MoDNN方法。

authors_text: Nan Li,Alexandros Iosifidis,Qi Zhang
title: Receptive Field-based Segmentation for Distributed CNN Inference Acceleration in Collaborative Edge Computing
title_zh: 协作边缘计算中分布式 CNN 推理加速的基于感受野的分割
comment: Accepted by the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Communications (ICC)
comments: Accepted by the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Communications (ICC)
abstract: This paper studies inference acceleration using distributed convolutional neural networks (CNNs) in collaborative edge computing network. To avoid inference accuracy loss in inference task partitioning, we propose receptive field-based segmentation (RFS). To reduce the computation time and communication overhead, we propose a novel collaborative edge computing using fused-layer parallelization to partition a CNN model into multiple blocks of convolutional layers. In this scheme, the collaborative edge servers (ESs) only need to exchange small fraction of the sub-outputs after computing each fused block. In addition, to find the optimal solution of partitioning a CNN model into multiple blocks, we use dynamic programming, named as dynamic programming for fused-layer parallelization (DPFP). The experimental results show that DPFP can accelerate inference of VGG-16 up to 73% compared with the pre-trained model, which outperforms the existing work MoDNN in all tested scenarios. Moreover, we evaluate the service reliability of DPFP under time-variant channel, which shows that DPFP is an effective solution to ensure high service reliability with strict service deadline.
summary: This paper studies inference acceleration using distributed convolutional neural networks (CNNs) in collaborative edge computing network. To avoid inference accuracy loss in inference task partitioning, we propose receptive field-based segmentation (RFS). To reduce the computation time and communication overhead, we propose a novel collaborative edge computing using fused-layer parallelization to partition a CNN model into multiple blocks of convolutional layers. In this scheme, the collaborative edge servers (ESs) only need to exchange small fraction of the sub-outputs after computing each fused block. In addition, to find the optimal solution of partitioning a CNN model into multiple blocks, we use dynamic programming, named as dynamic programming for fused-layer parallelization (DPFP). The experimental results show that DPFP can accelerate inference of VGG-16 up to 73% compared with the pre-trained model, which outperforms the existing work MoDNN in all tested scenarios. Moreover, we evaluate the service reliability of DPFP under time-variant channel, which shows that DPFP is an effective solution to ensure high service reliability with strict service deadline.
abstract_zh: 本文研究在协作边缘计算网络中使用分布式卷积神经网络（CNN）进行推理加速。为了避免推理任务划分中的推理精度损失，我们提出了基于感受野的分割（RFS）。为了减少计算时间和通信开销，我们提出了一种新颖的协作边缘计算，使用融合层并行化将 CNN 模型划分为多个卷积层块。在该方案中，协作边缘服务器（ES）在计算每个融合块后仅需要交换一小部分子输出。此外，为了找到将 CNN 模型划分为多个块的最佳解决方案，我们使用动态规划，称为融合层并行化动态规划（DPFP）。实验结果表明，与预训练模型相比，DPFP 可以将 VGG-16 的推理加速高达 73%，在所有测试场景中均优于现有工作 MoDNN。此外，我们评估了时变信道下DPFP的服务可靠性，这表明DPFP是在严格的服务期限下确保高服务可靠性的有效解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于感受野分割的分布式CNN推理加速方法，通过协作边缘计算优化模型分块与通信效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在任务划分时易导致推理精度下降，且计算时延与通信开销较大，需在保证精度的前提下提升分布式推理效率。
AI.method: 提出感受野分割（RFS）避免精度损失，结合融合层并行化与动态规划（DPFP）优化模型分块策略，减少边缘服务器间通信数据量。
AI.result: 实验表明DPFP使VGG-16推理加速73%，优于MoDNN方法，且在时变信道下保持高服务可靠性。
AI.conclusion: DPFP通过融合层划分与动态规划有效平衡计算与通信开销，为严格时延约束的边缘计算场景提供可靠解决方案。

ai_content.result: 实验表明DPFP使VGG-16推理加速73%，优于MoDNN方法，且在时变信道下保持高服务可靠性。
