In addition, to find the optimal solution of partitioning a CNN model into multiple blocks, we use dynamic programming, named as dynamic programming for fused-layer parallelization (DPFP). The experimental results show that DPFP can accelerate inference of VGG-16 up to 73% compared with the pre-trained model, which outperforms the existing work MoDNN in all tested scenarios. Moreover, we evaluate the service reliability of DPFP under time-variant channel, which shows that DPFP is an effective solution to ensure high service reliability with strict service deadline. 本文研究在协作边缘计算网络中使用分布式卷积神经网络（CNN）进行推理加速。为了避免推理任务划分中的推理精度损失，我们提出了基于感受野的分割（RFS）。为了减少计算时间和通信开销，我们提出了一种新颖的协作边缘计算，使用融合层并行化将 CNN 模型划分为多个卷积层块。在该方案中，协作边缘服务器（ES）在计算每个融合块后仅需要交换一小部分子输出。此外，为了找到将 CNN 模型划分为多个块的最佳解决方案，我们使用动态规划，称为融合层并行化动态规划（DPFP）。实验结果表明，与预训练模型相比，DPFP 可以将 VGG-16 的推理加速高达 73%，在所有测试场景中均优于现有工作 MoDNN。此外，我们评估了时变信道下DPFP的服务可靠性，这表明DPFP是在严格的服务期限下确保高服务可靠性的有效解决方案。 本文提出基于感受野分割的分布式CNN推理加速方法，通过协作边缘计算优化模型分块与通信效率。 Nan Li,Alexandros Iosifidis,Qi Zhang cs.DC,cs.AI

authors_text: Nandita Bhaskhar,Daniel L. Rubin,Christopher Lee-Messer
title: TRUST-LAPSE: An Explainable and Actionable Mistrust Scoring Framework for Model Monitoring
title_zh: 信任缺失：用于模型监控的可解释且可操作的不信任评分框架
comment: Keywords: Mistrust Scores, Latent-Space, Model monitoring, Trustworthy AI, Explainable AI, Semantic-guided AI
comments: Keywords: Mistrust Scores, Latent-Space, Model monitoring, Trustworthy AI, Explainable AI, Semantic-guided AI
abstract: Continuous monitoring of trained ML models to determine when their predictions should and should not be trusted is essential for their safe deployment. Such a framework ought to be high-performing, explainable, post-hoc and actionable. We propose TRUST-LAPSE, a "mistrust" scoring framework for continuous model monitoring. We assess the trustworthiness of each input sample's model prediction using a sequence of latent-space embeddings. Specifically, (a) our latent-space mistrust score estimates mistrust using distance metrics (Mahalanobis distance) and similarity metrics (cosine similarity) in the latent-space and (b) our sequential mistrust score determines deviations in correlations over the sequence of past input representations in a non-parametric, sliding-window based algorithm for actionable continuous monitoring. We evaluate TRUST-LAPSE via two downstream tasks: (1) distributionally shifted input detection, and (2) data drift detection. We evaluate across diverse domains - audio and vision using public datasets and further benchmark our approach on challenging, real-world electroencephalograms (EEG) datasets for seizure detection. Our latent-space mistrust scores achieve state-of-the-art results with AUROCs of 84.1 (vision), 73.9 (audio), and 77.1 (clinical EEGs), outperforming baselines by over 10 points. We expose critical failures in popular baselines that remain insensitive to input semantic content, rendering them unfit for real-world model monitoring. We show that our sequential mistrust scores achieve high drift detection rates; over 90% of the streams show < 20% error for all domains. Through extensive qualitative and quantitative evaluations, we show that our mistrust scores are more robust and provide explainability for easy adoption into practice.
summary: Continuous monitoring of trained ML models to determine when their predictions should and should not be trusted is essential for their safe deployment. Such a framework ought to be high-performing, explainable, post-hoc and actionable. We propose TRUST-LAPSE, a "mistrust" scoring framework for continuous model monitoring. We assess the trustworthiness of each input sample's model prediction using a sequence of latent-space embeddings. Specifically, (a) our latent-space mistrust score estimates mistrust using distance metrics (Mahalanobis distance) and similarity metrics (cosine similarity) in the latent-space and (b) our sequential mistrust score determines deviations in correlations over the sequence of past input representations in a non-parametric, sliding-window based algorithm for actionable continuous monitoring. We evaluate TRUST-LAPSE via two downstream tasks: (1) distributionally shifted input detection, and (2) data drift detection. We evaluate across diverse domains - audio and vision using public datasets and further benchmark our approach on challenging, real-world electroencephalograms (EEG) datasets for seizure detection. Our latent-space mistrust scores achieve state-of-the-art results with AUROCs of 84.1 (vision), 73.9 (audio), and 77.1 (clinical EEGs), outperforming baselines by over 10 points. We expose critical failures in popular baselines that remain insensitive to input semantic content, rendering them unfit for real-world model monitoring. We show that our sequential mistrust scores achieve high drift detection rates; over 90% of the streams show < 20% error for all domains. Through extensive qualitative and quantitative evaluations, we show that our mistrust scores are more robust and provide explainability for easy adoption into practice.
abstract_zh: 持续监控训练有素的机器学习模型，以确定何时应该信任其预测，何时不应信任其预测，这对于其安全部署至关重要。这样的框架应该是高性能的、可解释的、事后的和可操作的。我们提出了 TRUST-LAPSE，一种用于持续模型监控的“不信任”评分框架。我们使用一系列潜在空间嵌入来评估每个输入样本的模型预测的可信度。具体来说，（a）我们的潜在空间不信任得分使用潜在空间中的距离度量（马哈拉诺比斯距离）和相似性度量（余弦相似性）来估计不信任；（b）我们的顺序不信任得分确定非参数、基于滑动窗口的算法中过去输入表示序列的相关性偏差，用于可操作的连续监控。我们通过两个下游任务评估 TRUST-LAPSE：(1) 分布偏移输入检测，以及 (2) 数据漂移检测。我们使用公共数据集对不同领域（音频和视觉）进行评估，并进一步在具有挑战性的现实世界脑电图（EEG）数据集上对我们的方法进行基准测试，以检测癫痫发作。我们的潜在空间不信任分数达到了最先进的结果，AUROC 为 84.1（视觉）、73.9（音频）和 77.1（临床脑电图），比基线高出 10 多分。我们暴露了流行基线中的严重故障，这些故障对输入语义内容仍然不敏感，导致它们不适合现实世界的模型监控。我们表明，我们的连续不信任分数实现了高漂移检测率；超过 90% 的流显示所有域的错误率 < 20%。通过广泛的定性和定量评估，我们表明我们的不信任分数更加稳健，并提供了可解释性，以便于在实践中轻松采用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TRUST-LAPSE框架，通过可解释的‘不信任’评分机制实现机器学习模型的持续监控。
AI.motivation: 现有模型监控方法对输入语义内容不敏感，且缺乏可操作性，难以应对实际场景中的分布偏移和数据漂移问题。
AI.method: 基于潜在空间嵌入，结合马氏距离和余弦相似度计算不信任评分；采用滑动窗口算法分析序列输入的关联性偏差，实现动态监控。
AI.result: 在视觉、音频及临床EEG数据集上达到84.1/73.9/77.1的AUROC值，较基线提升超10个百分点，90%以上场景的漂移检测误差低于20%。
AI.conclusion: TRUST-LAPSE通过鲁棒的不信任评分机制和可解释性设计，有效解决了实际模型监控中的关键问题，具备实际部署价值。

authors_text: Fenia Christopoulou,Gerasimos Lampouras,Milan Gritta,Guchun Zhang,Yinpeng Guo,Zhongqi Li,Qi Zhang,Meng Xiao,Bo Shen,Lin Li,Hao Yu,Li Yan,Pingyi Zhou,Xin Wang,Yuchi Ma,Ignacio Iacobacci,Yasheng Wang,Guangtai Liang,Jiansheng Wei,Xin Jiang,Qianxiang Wang,Qun Liu
title: PanGu-Coder: Program Synthesis with Function-Level Language Modeling
title_zh: PanGu-Coder：使用函数级语言建模进行程序综合
abstract: We present PanGu-Coder, a pretrained decoder-only language model adopting the PanGu-Alpha architecture for text-to-code generation, i.e. the synthesis of programming language solutions given a natural language problem description. We train PanGu-Coder using a two-stage strategy: the first stage employs Causal Language Modelling (CLM) to pre-train on raw programming language data, while the second stage uses a combination of Causal Language Modelling and Masked Language Modelling (MLM) training objectives that focus on the downstream task of text-to-code generation and train on loosely curated pairs of natural language program definitions and code functions. Finally, we discuss PanGu-Coder-FT, which is fine-tuned on a combination of competitive programming problems and code with continuous integration tests. We evaluate PanGu-Coder with a focus on whether it generates functionally correct programs and demonstrate that it achieves equivalent or better performance than similarly sized models, such as CodeX, while attending a smaller context window and training on less data.
summary: We present PanGu-Coder, a pretrained decoder-only language model adopting the PanGu-Alpha architecture for text-to-code generation, i.e. the synthesis of programming language solutions given a natural language problem description. We train PanGu-Coder using a two-stage strategy: the first stage employs Causal Language Modelling (CLM) to pre-train on raw programming language data, while the second stage uses a combination of Causal Language Modelling and Masked Language Modelling (MLM) training objectives that focus on the downstream task of text-to-code generation and train on loosely curated pairs of natural language program definitions and code functions. Finally, we discuss PanGu-Coder-FT, which is fine-tuned on a combination of competitive programming problems and code with continuous integration tests. We evaluate PanGu-Coder with a focus on whether it generates functionally correct programs and demonstrate that it achieves equivalent or better performance than similarly sized models, such as CodeX, while attending a smaller context window and training on less data.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 PanGu-Coder，一种预训练的仅解码器语言模型，采用 PanGu-Alpha 架构进行文本到代码生成，即给定自然语言问题描述的编程语言解决方案的综合。我们使用两阶段策略来训练 PanGu-Coder：第一阶段采用因果语言模型（CLM）对原始编程语言数据进行预训练，而第二阶段结合使用因果语言模型和掩码语言模型（MLM）训练目标，重点关注文本到代码生成的下游任务，并训练松散的自然语言程序定义和代码函数对。最后，我们讨论 PanGu-Coder-FT，它结合了竞争性编程问题和持续集成测试的代码进行了微调。我们评估 PanGu-Coder 的重点是它是否生成功能正确的程序，并证明它比类似大小的模型（例如 CodeX）实现了相同或更好的性能，同时参与较小的上下文窗口和较少的数据训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PanGu-Coder，一个基于PanGu-Alpha架构的预训练解码器模型，用于根据自然语言描述生成功能正确的程序代码。
AI.motivation: 现有代码生成模型在上下文窗口和训练数据量受限时难以保证生成代码的功能正确性，需探索更高效的训练方法。
AI.method: 采用两阶段训练策略：第一阶段用因果语言建模（CLM）预训练编程语言数据，第二阶段结合CLM和掩码语言建模（MLM）训练自然语言-代码对，并通过编程问题与持续集成测试数据进行微调。
AI.result: PanGu-Coder在功能正确性指标上达到与CodeX等同类模型相当或更优的性能，且在更小的上下文窗口和更少训练数据下实现。
AI.conclusion: PanGu-Coder验证了函数级语言建模在代码生成任务中的有效性，为高效文本到代码合成提供了新思路。

We train PanGu-Coder using a two-stage strategy: the first stage employs Causal Language Modelling (CLM) to pre-train on raw programming language data, while the second stage uses a combination of Causal Language Modelling and Masked Language Modelling (MLM) training objectives that focus on the downstream task of text-to-code generation and train on loosely curated pairs of natural language program definitions and code functions. Finally, we discuss PanGu-Coder-FT, which is fine-tuned on a combination of competitive programming problems and code with continuous integration tests. We evaluate PanGu-Coder with a focus on whether it generates functionally correct programs and demonstrate that it achieves equivalent or better performance than similarly sized models, such as CodeX, while attending a smaller context window and training on less data. 我们提出了 PanGu-Coder，一种预训练的仅解码器语言模型，采用 PanGu-Alpha 架构进行文本到代码生成，即给定自然语言问题描述的编程语言解决方案的综合。我们使用两阶段策略来训练 PanGu-Coder：第一阶段采用因果语言模型（CLM）对原始编程语言数据进行预训练，而第二阶段结合使用因果语言模型和掩码语言模型（MLM）训练目标，重点关注文本到代码生成的下游任务，并训练松散的自然语言程序定义和代码函数对。最后，我们讨论 PanGu-Coder-FT，它结合了竞争性编程问题和持续集成测试的代码进行了微调。我们评估 PanGu-Coder 的重点是它是否生成功能正确的程序，并证明它比类似大小的模型（例如 CodeX）实现了相同或更好的性能，同时参与较小的上下文窗口和较少的数据训练。 本文提出PanGu-Coder，一个基于PanGu-Alpha架构的预训练解码器模型，用于根据自然语言描述生成功能正确的程序代码。 Fenia Christopoulou,Gerasimos Lampouras,Milan Gritta,Guchun Zhang,Yinpeng Guo,Zhongqi Li,Qi Zhang,Meng Xiao,Bo Shen,Lin Li,Hao Yu,Li Yan,Pingyi Zhou,Xin Wang,Yuchi Ma,Ignacio Iacobacci,Yasheng Wang,Guangtai Liang,Jiansheng Wei,Xin Jiang,Qianxiang Wang,Qun Liu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.PL,cs.SE

authors_text: Sai Mitheran,Anushri Suresh,Nisha J. S.,Varun P. Gopi
title: Rich Feature Distillation with Feature Affinity Module for Efficient Image Dehazing
title_zh: 具有特征亲和模块的丰富特征蒸馏，可实现高效图像去雾
abstract: Single-image haze removal is a long-standing hurdle for computer vision applications. Several works have been focused on transferring advances from image classification, detection, and segmentation to the niche of image dehazing, primarily focusing on contrastive learning and knowledge distillation. However, these approaches prove computationally expensive, raising concern regarding their applicability to on-the-edge use-cases. This work introduces a simple, lightweight, and efficient framework for single-image haze removal, exploiting rich "dark-knowledge" information from a lightweight pre-trained super-resolution model via the notion of heterogeneous knowledge distillation. We designed a feature affinity module to maximize the flow of rich feature semantics from the super-resolution teacher to the student dehazing network. In order to evaluate the efficacy of our proposed framework, its performance as a plug-and-play setup to a baseline model is examined. Our experiments are carried out on the RESIDE-Standard dataset to demonstrate the robustness of our framework to the synthetic and real-world domains. The extensive qualitative and quantitative results provided establish the effectiveness of the framework, achieving gains of upto 15\% (PSNR) while reducing the model size by $\sim$20 times.
summary: Single-image haze removal is a long-standing hurdle for computer vision applications. Several works have been focused on transferring advances from image classification, detection, and segmentation to the niche of image dehazing, primarily focusing on contrastive learning and knowledge distillation. However, these approaches prove computationally expensive, raising concern regarding their applicability to on-the-edge use-cases. This work introduces a simple, lightweight, and efficient framework for single-image haze removal, exploiting rich "dark-knowledge" information from a lightweight pre-trained super-resolution model via the notion of heterogeneous knowledge distillation. We designed a feature affinity module to maximize the flow of rich feature semantics from the super-resolution teacher to the student dehazing network. In order to evaluate the efficacy of our proposed framework, its performance as a plug-and-play setup to a baseline model is examined. Our experiments are carried out on the RESIDE-Standard dataset to demonstrate the robustness of our framework to the synthetic and real-world domains. The extensive qualitative and quantitative results provided establish the effectiveness of the framework, achieving gains of upto 15\% (PSNR) while reducing the model size by $\sim$20 times.
abstract_zh: 单图像去雾是计算机视觉应用的一个长期障碍。有几项工作专注于将图像分类、检测和分割的进步转移到图像去雾领域，主要关注对比学习和知识蒸馏。然而，这些方法的计算成本很高，引发了人们对其对边缘用例的适用性的担忧。这项工作引入了一种简单、轻量级且高效的单图像去雾框架，通过异构知识蒸馏的概念，从轻量级预训练的超分辨率模型中利用丰富的“暗知识”信息。我们设计了一个特征亲和力模块，以最大限度地提高从超分辨率教师到学生去雾网络的丰富特征语义的流动。为了评估我们提出的框架的有效性，检查了它作为基线模型的即插即用设置的性能。我们的实验是在 RESIDE-Standard 数据集上进行的，以证明我们的框架对合成和现实世界领域的鲁棒性。提供的广泛定性和定量结果证实了该框架的有效性，实现了高达 15\% (PSNR) 的增益，同时将模型大小减少了 $\sim$20 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于异构知识蒸馏和特征亲和模块的高效图像去雾框架，通过轻量化模型设计实现性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有图像去雾方法计算成本高，难以满足边缘设备的部署需求，需开发更轻量且保持性能的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计特征亲和模块实现超分辨率教师模型与去雾学生网络间的异构知识蒸馏，最大化特征语义传递。
AI.result: 在RESIDE-Standard数据集上实现PSNR提升15%且模型体积缩小20倍，验证了框架在合成与真实场景的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架在保持性能的同时显著降低计算成本，为边缘设备部署提供可行方案，未来可探索更多蒸馏策略优化。

authors_text: Javier Melchor,Balam Sotelo,Jorge Vera,Horacio Corral
title: Brain tumor detection using artificial convolutional neural networks
title_zh: 使用人工卷积神经网络检测脑肿瘤
abstract: In this paper, a convolutional neural network (CNN) was used to classify NMR images of human brains with 4 different types of tumors: meningioma, glioma and pituitary gland tumors. During the training phase of this project, an accuracy of 100% was obtained, meanwhile, in the evaluation phase the precision was 96%.
summary: In this paper, a convolutional neural network (CNN) was used to classify NMR images of human brains with 4 different types of tumors: meningioma, glioma and pituitary gland tumors. During the training phase of this project, an accuracy of 100% was obtained, meanwhile, in the evaluation phase the precision was 96%.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，使用卷积神经网络（CNN）对人脑 4 种不同类型肿瘤的 NMR 图像进行分类：脑膜瘤、神经胶质瘤和垂体肿瘤。在该项目的训练阶段，准确率达到了100%，同时，在评估阶段，准确率达到了96%。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出使用卷积神经网络（CNN）对人类脑部NMR图像中的四种肿瘤类型进行分类检测。
AI.motivation: 通过深度学习方法提高脑肿瘤分类的准确率，辅助医学影像诊断。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络模型对脑部NMR图像进行特征提取和分类，使用训练集和测试集验证模型性能。
AI.result: 训练阶段达到100%准确率，评估阶段精确率为96%。
AI.conclusion: 卷积神经网络在脑肿瘤分类任务中表现出高准确性和可靠性，具有潜在的医学应用价值。

authors_text: Jingkang Yang,Yi Zhe Ang,Zujin Guo,Kaiyang Zhou,Wayne Zhang,Ziwei Liu
title: Panoptic Scene Graph Generation
title_zh: 全景场景图生成
comment: Accepted to ECCV'22 (Paper ID #222, Final Score 2222). Project Page: https://psgdataset.org/. OpenPSG Codebase: https://github.com/Jingkang50/OpenPSG
comments: Accepted to ECCV'22 (Paper ID #222, Final Score 2222). Project Page: https://psgdataset.org/. OpenPSG Codebase: https://github.com/Jingkang50/OpenPSG
abstract: Existing research addresses scene graph generation (SGG) -- a critical technology for scene understanding in images -- from a detection perspective, i.e., objects are detected using bounding boxes followed by prediction of their pairwise relationships. We argue that such a paradigm causes several problems that impede the progress of the field. For instance, bounding box-based labels in current datasets usually contain redundant classes like hairs, and leave out background information that is crucial to the understanding of context. In this work, we introduce panoptic scene graph generation (PSG), a new problem task that requires the model to generate a more comprehensive scene graph representation based on panoptic segmentations rather than rigid bounding boxes. A high-quality PSG dataset, which contains 49k well-annotated overlapping images from COCO and Visual Genome, is created for the community to keep track of its progress. For benchmarking, we build four two-stage baselines, which are modified from classic methods in SGG, and two one-stage baselines called PSGTR and PSGFormer, which are based on the efficient Transformer-based detector, i.e., DETR. While PSGTR uses a set of queries to directly learn triplets, PSGFormer separately models the objects and relations in the form of queries from two Transformer decoders, followed by a prompting-like relation-object matching mechanism. In the end, we share insights on open challenges and future directions.
summary: Existing research addresses scene graph generation (SGG) -- a critical technology for scene understanding in images -- from a detection perspective, i.e., objects are detected using bounding boxes followed by prediction of their pairwise relationships. We argue that such a paradigm causes several problems that impede the progress of the field. For instance, bounding box-based labels in current datasets usually contain redundant classes like hairs, and leave out background information that is crucial to the understanding of context. In this work, we introduce panoptic scene graph generation (PSG), a new problem task that requires the model to generate a more comprehensive scene graph representation based on panoptic segmentations rather than rigid bounding boxes. A high-quality PSG dataset, which contains 49k well-annotated overlapping images from COCO and Visual Genome, is created for the community to keep track of its progress. For benchmarking, we build four two-stage baselines, which are modified from classic methods in SGG, and two one-stage baselines called PSGTR and PSGFormer, which are based on the efficient Transformer-based detector, i.e., DETR. While PSGTR uses a set of queries to directly learn triplets, PSGFormer separately models the objects and relations in the form of queries from two Transformer decoders, followed by a prompting-like relation-object matching mechanism. In the end, we share insights on open challenges and future directions.
abstract_zh: 现有的研究从检测的角度解决场景图生成（SGG）——图像中场景理解的关键技术——即使用边界框检测对象，然后预测它们的成对关系。我们认为这种范式会导致一些阻碍该领域进步的问题。例如，当前数据集中基于边界框的标签通常包含头发等冗余类，并且遗漏了对于理解上下文至关重要的背景信息。在这项工作中，我们引入了全景场景图生成（PSG），这是一项新的问题任务，要求模型基于全景分割而不是刚性边界框生成更全面的场景图表示。为社区创建了一个高质量的 PSG 数据集，其中包含来自 COCO 和 Visual Genome 的 49k 个注释良好的重叠图像，以跟踪其进展。为了进行基准测试，我们构建了四个两阶段基线，它们是从 SGG 中的经典方法修改而来的，以及两个称为 PSGTR 和 PSGFormer 的一阶段基线，它们基于高效的基于 Transformer 的检测器，即 DETR。 PSGTR 使用一组查询来直接学习三元组，而 PSGFormer 以来自两个 Transformer 解码器的查询形式分别对对象和关系进行建模，然后是类似提示的关系对象匹配机制。最后，我们分享对开放挑战和未来方向的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于全景分割的场景图生成方法（PSG），以解决传统基于边界框的场景图生成（SGG）存在的冗余类别和背景信息缺失问题。
AI.motivation: 传统SGG方法依赖边界框检测，导致冗余类别（如头发）和关键背景信息缺失，限制了场景理解的进展。
AI.method: 构建包含49k标注图像的PSG数据集，提出两种基线方法：基于Transformer的PSGTR和PSGFormer，后者通过双解码器分别建模对象与关系，并采用类似提示的匹配机制。
AI.result: 建立了PSG基准测试框架，验证了所提方法的有效性，并为社区提供了高质量数据集以推动研究进展。
AI.conclusion: PSG为场景图生成提供了新方向，但仍需解决开放挑战，如更高效的模型设计和跨数据集泛化能力提升。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于全景分割的场景图生成方法（PSG），以解决传统基于边界框的场景图生成（SGG）存在的冗余类别和背景信息缺失问题。

ai_content.result: 建立了PSG基准测试框架，验证了所提方法的有效性，并为社区提供了高质量数据集以推动研究进展。

search_text: Panoptic Scene Graph Generation 全景场景图生成 Existing research addresses scene graph generation (SGG) -- a critical technology for scene understanding in images -- from a detection perspective, i.e., objects are detected using bounding boxes followed by prediction of their pairwise relationships. We argue that such a paradigm causes several problems that impede the progress of the field. For instance, bounding box-based labels in current datasets usually contain redundant classes like hairs, and leave out background information that is crucial to the understanding of context. In this work, we introduce panoptic scene graph generation (PSG), a new problem task that requires the model to generate a more comprehensive scene graph representation based on panoptic segmentations rather than rigid bounding boxes. A high-quality PSG dataset, which contains 49k well-annotated overlapping images from COCO and Visual Genome, is created for the community to keep track of its progress. For benchmarking, we build four two-stage baselines, which are modified from classic methods in SGG, and two one-stage baselines called PSGTR and PSGFormer, which are based on the efficient Transformer-based detector, i.e., DETR. While PSGTR uses a set of queries to directly learn triplets, PSGFormer separately models the objects and relations in the form of queries from two Transformer decoders, followed by a prompting-like relation-object matching mechanism. In the end, we share insights on open challenges and future directions. 现有的研究从检测的角度解决场景图生成（SGG）——图像中场景理解的关键技术——即使用边界框检测对象，然后预测它们的成对关系。我们认为这种范式会导致一些阻碍该领域进步的问题。例如，当前数据集中基于边界框的标签通常包含头发等冗余类，并且遗漏了对于理解上下文至关重要的背景信息。在这项工作中，我们引入了全景场景图生成（PSG），这是一项新的问题任务，要求模型基于全景分割而不是刚性边界框生成更全面的场景图表示。为社区创建了一个高质量的 PSG 数据集，其中包含来自 COCO 和 Visual Genome 的 49k 个注释良好的重叠图像，以跟踪其进展。为了进行基准测试，我们构建了四个两阶段基线，它们是从 SGG 中的经典方法修改而来的，以及两个称为 PSGTR 和 PSGFormer 的一阶段基线，它们基于高效的基于 Transformer 的检测器，即 DETR。 PSGTR 使用一组查询来直接学习三元组，而 PSGFormer 以来自两个 Transformer 解码器的查询形式分别对对象和关系进行建模，然后是类似提示的关系对象匹配机制。最后，我们分享对开放挑战和未来方向的见解。 本文提出了一种基于全景分割的场景图生成方法（PSG），以解决传统基于边界框的场景图生成（SGG）存在的冗余类别和背景信息缺失问题。 Jingkang Yang,Yi Zhe Ang,Zujin Guo,Kaiyang Zhou,Wayne Zhang,Ziwei Liu cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG,cs.MM

authors_text: Adarsh Sehgal,Muskan Sehgal,Hung Manh La,George Bebis
title: Deep Learning Hyperparameter Optimization for Breast Mass Detection in Mammograms
title_zh: 乳房 X 光检查中乳腺肿块检测的深度学习超参数优化
abstract: Accurate breast cancer diagnosis through mammography has the potential to save millions of lives around the world. Deep learning (DL) methods have shown to be very effective for mass detection in mammograms. Additional improvements of current DL models will further improve the effectiveness of these methods. A critical issue in this context is how to pick the right hyperparameters for DL models. In this paper, we present GA-E2E, a new approach for tuning the hyperparameters of DL models for brest cancer detection using Genetic Algorithms (GAs). Our findings reveal that differences in parameter values can considerably alter the area under the curve (AUC), which is used to determine a classifier's performance.
summary: Accurate breast cancer diagnosis through mammography has the potential to save millions of lives around the world. Deep learning (DL) methods have shown to be very effective for mass detection in mammograms. Additional improvements of current DL models will further improve the effectiveness of these methods. A critical issue in this context is how to pick the right hyperparameters for DL models. In this paper, we present GA-E2E, a new approach for tuning the hyperparameters of DL models for brest cancer detection using Genetic Algorithms (GAs). Our findings reveal that differences in parameter values can considerably alter the area under the curve (AUC), which is used to determine a classifier's performance.
abstract_zh: 通过乳房X光检查进行准确的乳腺癌诊断有可能挽救全世界数百万人的生命。深度学习 (DL) 方法已被证明对于乳房 X 光检查中的质量检测非常有效。当前深度学习模型的进一步改进将进一步提高这些方法的有效性。在这种情况下，一个关键问题是如何为深度学习模型选择正确的超参数。在本文中，我们提出了 GA-E2E，这是一种使用遗传算法 (GA) 调整 DL 模型超参数以进行乳腺癌检测的新方法。我们的研究结果表明，参数值的差异可以显着改变曲线下面积 (AUC)，该曲线用于确定分类器的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GA-E2E方法，利用遗传算法优化深度学习模型超参数以提高乳腺肿块检测性能。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在乳腺X光检测中效果显著但需进一步优化，超参数选择是影响模型性能的关键因素。
AI.method: 设计基于遗传算法（GA）的端到端超参数优化框架GA-E2E，自动调整深度学习模型参数。
AI.result: 实验表明不同参数组合对AUC指标影响显著，GA-E2E能有效提升分类器性能。
AI.conclusion: 遗传算法优化超参数可增强乳腺癌检测模型效果，为医学影像分析提供新方法。

authors_text: Cheng-hsin Wuu,Ningyuan Zheng,Scott Ardisson,Rohan Bali,Danielle Belko,Eric Brockmeyer,Lucas Evans,Timothy Godisart,Hyowon Ha,Xuhua Huang,Alexander Hypes,Taylor Koska,Steven Krenn,Stephen Lombardi,Xiaomin Luo,Kevyn McPhail,Laura Millerschoen,Michal Perdoch,Mark Pitts,Alexander Richard,Jason Saragih,Junko Saragih,Takaaki Shiratori,Tomas Simon,Matt Stewart, et al. title: Multiface: A Dataset for Neural Face Rendering
title_zh: Multiface：神经人脸渲染数据集
abstract: Photorealistic avatars of human faces have come a long way in recent years, yet research along this area is limited by a lack of publicly available, high-quality datasets covering both, dense multi-view camera captures, and rich facial expressions of the captured subjects. In this work, we present Multiface, a new multi-view, high-resolution human face dataset collected from 13 identities at Reality Labs Research for neural face rendering. We introduce Mugsy, a large scale multi-camera apparatus to capture high-resolution synchronized videos of a facial performance. The goal of Multiface is to close the gap in accessibility to high quality data in the academic community and to enable research in VR telepresence. Along with the release of the dataset, we conduct ablation studies on the influence of different model architectures toward the model's interpolation capacity of novel viewpoint and expressions. With a conditional VAE model serving as our baseline, we found that adding spatial bias, texture warp field, and residual connections improves performance on novel view synthesis. Our code and data is available at: https://github.com/facebookresearch/multiface
summary: Photorealistic avatars of human faces have come a long way in recent years, yet research along this area is limited by a lack of publicly available, high-quality datasets covering both, dense multi-view camera captures, and rich facial expressions of the captured subjects. In this work, we present Multiface, a new multi-view, high-resolution human face dataset collected from 13 identities at Reality Labs Research for neural face rendering. We introduce Mugsy, a large scale multi-camera apparatus to capture high-resolution synchronized videos of a facial performance. The goal of Multiface is to close the gap in accessibility to high quality data in the academic community and to enable research in VR telepresence. Along with the release of the dataset, we conduct ablation studies on the influence of different model architectures toward the model's interpolation capacity of novel viewpoint and expressions. With a conditional VAE model serving as our baseline, we found that adding spatial bias, texture warp field, and residual connections improves performance on novel view synthesis. Our code and data is available at: https://github.com/facebookresearch/multiface
abstract_zh: 近年来，逼真的人脸化身取得了长足的进步，但由于缺乏公开的高质量数据集，该领域的研究受到限制，这些数据集涵盖密集的多视图相机捕获和捕获对象的丰富面部表情。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Multiface，这是一个新的多视图、高分辨率人脸数据集，从 Reality Labs Research 的 13 个身份中收集，用于神经人脸渲染。我们介绍 Mugsy，一种大型多摄像头设备，用于捕捉面部表演的高分辨率同步视频。 Multiface 的目标是缩小学术界在获取高质量数据方面的差距，并促进 VR 远程呈现的研究。随着数据集的发布，我们对不同模型架构对模型新观点和表达的插值能力的影响进行了消融研究。以条件 VAE 模型作为基线，我们发现添加空间偏差、纹理扭曲场和残差连接可以提高新颖视图合成的性能。我们的代码和数据位于：https://github.com/facebookresearch/multiface

AI.tldr: 本文提出Multiface数据集及配套多摄像头系统Mugsy，用于神经人脸渲染研究。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏公开的高质量多视角人脸数据集，限制了神经渲染和VR远程呈现技术的发展。
AI.method: 构建多摄像头设备Mugsy采集13个身份的高分辨率同步视频，通过条件VAE模型进行消融实验，验证空间偏置、纹理变形场和残差连接对新视角合成的影响。
AI.result: 改进后的模型在新视角和表情合成任务中表现优于基线模型，验证了架构优化的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Multiface数据集为学术界提供了高质量资源，推动神经人脸渲染研究，代码和数据已开源。

authors_text: Frederik Träuble,Anirudh Goyal,Nasim Rahaman,Michael Mozer,Kenji Kawaguchi,Yoshua Bengio,Bernhard Schölkopf
title: Discrete Key-Value Bottleneck
title_zh: 离散键值瓶颈
abstract: Deep neural networks perform well on classification tasks where data streams are i.i.d. and labeled data is abundant. Challenges emerge with non-stationary training data streams such as continual learning. One powerful approach that has addressed this challenge involves pre-training of large encoders on volumes of readily available data, followed by task-specific tuning. Given a new task, however, updating the weights of these encoders is challenging as a large number of weights needs to be fine-tuned, and as a result, they forget information about the previous tasks. In the present work, we propose a model architecture to address this issue, building upon a discrete bottleneck containing pairs of separate and learnable key-value codes. Our paradigm will be to encode; process the representation via a discrete bottleneck; and decode. Here, the input is fed to the pre-trained encoder, the output of the encoder is used to select the nearest keys, and the corresponding values are fed to the decoder to solve the current task. The model can only fetch and re-use a sparse number of these key-value pairs during inference, enabling localized and context-dependent model updates. We theoretically investigate the ability of the discrete key-value bottleneck to minimize the effect of learning under distribution shifts and show that it reduces the complexity of the hypothesis class. We empirically verify the proposed method under challenging class-incremental learning scenarios and show that the proposed model - without any task boundaries - reduces catastrophic forgetting across a wide variety of pre-trained models, outperforming relevant baselines on this task.
summary: Deep neural networks perform well on classification tasks where data streams are i.i.d. and labeled data is abundant. Challenges emerge with non-stationary training data streams such as continual learning. One powerful approach that has addressed this challenge involves pre-training of large encoders on volumes of readily available data, followed by task-specific tuning. Given a new task, however, updating the weights of these encoders is challenging as a large number of weights needs to be fine-tuned, and as a result, they forget information about the previous tasks. In the present work, we propose a model architecture to address this issue, building upon a discrete bottleneck containing pairs of separate and learnable key-value codes. Our paradigm will be to encode; process the representation via a discrete bottleneck; and decode. Here, the input is fed to the pre-trained encoder, the output of the encoder is used to select the nearest keys, and the corresponding values are fed to the decoder to solve the current task. The model can only fetch and re-use a sparse number of these key-value pairs during inference, enabling localized and context-dependent model updates. We theoretically investigate the ability of the discrete key-value bottleneck to minimize the effect of learning under distribution shifts and show that it reduces the complexity of the hypothesis class. We empirically verify the proposed method under challenging class-incremental learning scenarios and show that the proposed model - without any task boundaries - reduces catastrophic forgetting across a wide variety of pre-trained models, outperforming relevant baselines on this task.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络在数据流独立同分布的分类任务上表现良好。并且标注数据丰富。非平稳训练数据流（例如持续学习）出现了挑战。解决这一挑战的一种强大方法是使用大量可用数据对大型编码器进行预训练，然后进行特定于任务的调整。然而，对于新任务，更新这些编码器的权重具有挑战性，因为需要微调大量权重，因此，它们会忘记有关先前任务的信息。在目前的工作中，我们提出了一种模型架构来解决这个问题，该模型架构建立在包含成对的独立且可学习的键值代码的离散瓶颈之上。我们的范例是编码；通过离散瓶颈处理表示；并解码。在这里，输入被馈送到预训练的编码器，编码器的输出用于选择最近的键，并且相应的值被馈送到解码器以解决当前任务。该模型只能在推理过程中获取和重用这些稀疏数量的键值对，从而实现本地化和上下文相关的模型更新。我们从理论上研究了离散键值瓶颈在分布变化下最小化学习效果的能力，并表明它降低了假设类的复杂性。我们在具有挑战性的类增量学习场景下实证验证了所提出的方法，并表明所提出的模型（没有任何任务边界）减少了各种预训练模型的灾难性遗忘，优于该任务的相关基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种离散键值瓶颈模型架构，通过稀疏键值对的局部更新解决持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 预训练编码器在持续学习任务中因需微调大量权重而易遗忘先前任务信息，传统方法难以有效应对非平稳数据流带来的分布偏移挑战。
AI.method: 构建包含可学习键值对的离散瓶颈模块，通过编码器提取特征后匹配最近键，利用对应值解码完成任务，仅激活少量键值对实现上下文相关的局部参数更新。
AI.result: 理论分析证明该结构能降低假设类复杂度，实验显示在无任务边界条件下，该方法在多种预训练模型上均优于基线方法，显著减少类别增量学习场景中的灾难性遗忘。
AI.conclusion: 离散键值瓶颈机制通过稀疏激活策略有效平衡了新任务学习与旧知识保留，为持续学习提供了通用且高效的解决方案。

search_text: Discrete Key-Value Bottleneck 离散键值瓶颈 Deep neural networks perform well on classification tasks where data streams are i.i.d. and labeled data is abundant. Challenges emerge with non-stationary training data streams such as continual learning. One powerful approach that has addressed this challenge involves pre-training of large encoders on volumes of readily available data, followed by task-specific tuning. Given a new task, however, updating the weights of these encoders is challenging as a large number of weights needs to be fine-tuned, and as a result, they forget information about the previous tasks. In the present work, we propose a model architecture to address this issue, building upon a discrete bottleneck containing pairs of separate and learnable key-value codes. Our paradigm will be to encode; process the representation via a discrete bottleneck; and decode. Here, the input is fed to the pre-trained encoder, the output of the encoder is used to select the nearest keys, and the corresponding values are fed to the decoder to solve the current task. The model can only fetch and re-use a sparse number of these key-value pairs during inference, enabling localized and context-dependent model updates. We theoretically investigate the ability of the discrete key-value bottleneck to minimize the effect of learning under distribution shifts and show that it reduces the complexity of the hypothesis class. We empirically verify the proposed method under challenging class-incremental learning scenarios and show that the proposed model - without any task boundaries - reduces catastrophic forgetting across a wide variety of pre-trained models, outperforming relevant baselines on this task. 深度神经网络在数据流独立同分布的分类任务上表现良好。并且标注数据丰富。非平稳训练数据流（例如持续学习）出现了挑战。解决这一挑战的一种强大方法是使用大量可用数据对大型编码器进行预训练，然后进行特定于任务的调整。然而，对于新任务，更新这些编码器的权重具有挑战性，因为需要微调大量权重，因此，它们会忘记有关先前任务的信息。在目前的工作中，我们提出了一种模型架构来解决这个问题，该模型架构建立在包含成对的独立且可学习的键值代码的离散瓶颈之上。我们的范例是编码；通过离散瓶颈处理表示；并解码。在这里，输入被馈送到预训练的编码器，编码器的输出用于选择最近的键，并且相应的值被馈送到解码器以解决当前任务。该模型只能在推理过程中获取和重用这些稀疏数量的键值对，从而实现本地化和上下文相关的模型更新。我们从理论上研究了离散键值瓶颈在分布变化下最小化学习效果的能力，并表明它降低了假设类的复杂性。我们在具有挑战性的类增量学习场景下实证验证了所提出的方法，并表明所提出的模型（没有任何任务边界）减少了各种预训练模型的灾难性遗忘，优于该任务的相关基线。 本文提出一种离散键值瓶颈模型架构，通过稀疏键值对的局部更新解决持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。 Frederik Träuble,Anirudh Goyal,Nasim Rahaman,Michael Mozer,Kenji Kawaguchi,Yoshua Bengio,Bernhard Schölkopf cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Sheik Murad Hassan Anik,Xinghua Gao,Na Meng
title: Machine learning approach in the development of building occupant personas
title_zh: 机器学习方法在建筑居住者角色开发中的应用
abstract: The user persona is a communication tool for designers to generate a mental model that describes the archetype of users. Developing building occupant personas is proven to be an effective method for human-centered smart building design, which considers occupant comfort, behavior, and energy consumption. Optimization of building energy consumption also requires a deep understanding of occupants' preferences and behaviors. The current approaches to developing building occupant personas face a major obstruction of manual data processing and analysis. In this study, we propose and evaluate a machine learning-based semi-automated approach to generate building occupant personas. We investigate the 2015 Residential Energy Consumption Dataset with five machine learning techniques - Linear Discriminant Analysis, K Nearest Neighbors, Decision Tree (Random Forest), Support Vector Machine, and AdaBoost classifier - for the prediction of 16 occupant characteristics, such as age, education, and, thermal comfort. The models achieve an average accuracy of 61% and accuracy over 90% for attributes including the number of occupants in the household, their age group, and preferred usage of heating or cooling equipment. The results of the study show the feasibility of using machine learning techniques for the development of building occupant persona to minimize human effort.
summary: The user persona is a communication tool for designers to generate a mental model that describes the archetype of users. Developing building occupant personas is proven to be an effective method for human-centered smart building design, which considers occupant comfort, behavior, and energy consumption. Optimization of building energy consumption also requires a deep understanding of occupants' preferences and behaviors. The current approaches to developing building occupant personas face a major obstruction of manual data processing and analysis. In this study, we propose and evaluate a machine learning-based semi-automated approach to generate building occupant personas. We investigate the 2015 Residential Energy Consumption Dataset with five machine learning techniques - Linear Discriminant Analysis, K Nearest Neighbors, Decision Tree (Random Forest), Support Vector Machine, and AdaBoost classifier - for the prediction of 16 occupant characteristics, such as age, education, and, thermal comfort. The models achieve an average accuracy of 61% and accuracy over 90% for attributes including the number of occupants in the household, their age group, and preferred usage of heating or cooling equipment. The results of the study show the feasibility of using machine learning techniques for the development of building occupant persona to minimize human effort.
abstract_zh: 用户角色是设计师的沟通工具，用于生成描述用户原型的心智模型。开发建筑居住者角色被证明是以人为本的智能建筑设计的有效方法，它考虑了居住者的舒适度、行为和能源消耗。建筑能耗的优化还需要深入了解居住者的偏好和行为。当前开发建筑居住者角色的方法面临手动数据处理和分析的主要障碍。在这项研究中，我们提出并评估了一种基于机器学习的半自动化方法来生成建筑居住者角色。我们使用五种机器学习技术（线性判别分析、K 最近邻、决策树（随机森林）、支持向量机和 AdaBoost 分类器）研究 2015 年住宅能源消耗数据集，以预测 16 项居住者特征，例如年龄、教育程度和热舒适度。这些模型的平均准确度为 61%，对于家庭成员人数、年龄组以及供暖或制冷设备的偏好使用等属性的准确度超过 90%。研究结果表明，使用机器学习技术来开发建筑居住者角色以最大限度地减少人力的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的半自动化方法，用于生成建筑使用者人物画像，以提高以人为中心的智能建筑设计效率。
AI.motivation: 传统建筑使用者画像开发依赖人工数据分析，效率低且难以处理复杂数据，需通过机器学习技术提升自动化水平并减少人工干预。
AI.method: 采用线性判别分析、K近邻、决策树（随机森林）、支持向量机和AdaBoost分类器五种机器学习方法，基于2015年住宅能源消耗数据集预测16个用户特征。
AI.result: 模型平均准确率为61%，其中家庭成员数量、年龄组及供暖/制冷设备使用偏好等属性准确率超过90%。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习技术可有效辅助建筑使用者画像开发，显著降低人工工作量，为智能建筑设计提供数据支持。

authors_text: Yuhang Jiang,Wenping Tong
title: Improved lightweight identification of agricultural diseases based on MobileNetV3
title_zh: 基于MobileNetV3改进的农业病害轻量级识别
abstract: At present, the identification of agricultural pests and diseases has the problem that the model is not lightweight enough and difficult to apply. Based on MobileNetV3, this paper introduces the Coordinate Attention block. The parameters of MobileNetV3-large are reduced by 22%, the model size is reduced by 19.7%, and the accuracy is improved by 0.92%. The parameters of MobileNetV3-small are reduced by 23.4%, the model size is reduced by 18.3%, and the accuracy is increased by 0.40%. In addition, the improved MobileNetV3-small was migrated to Jetson Nano for testing. The accuracy increased by 2.48% to 98.31%, and the inference speed increased by 7.5%. It provides a reference for deploying the agricultural pest identification model to embedded devices.
summary: At present, the identification of agricultural pests and diseases has the problem that the model is not lightweight enough and difficult to apply. Based on MobileNetV3, this paper introduces the Coordinate Attention block. The parameters of MobileNetV3-large are reduced by 22%, the model size is reduced by 19.7%, and the accuracy is improved by 0.92%. The parameters of MobileNetV3-small are reduced by 23.4%, the model size is reduced by 18.3%, and the accuracy is increased by 0.40%. In addition, the improved MobileNetV3-small was migrated to Jetson Nano for testing. The accuracy increased by 2.48% to 98.31%, and the inference speed increased by 7.5%. It provides a reference for deploying the agricultural pest identification model to embedded devices.
abstract_zh: 目前农业病虫害识别存在模型不够轻量、难以应用的问题。本文基于MobileNetV3，引入了Cooperative Attention块。 MobileNetV3-large的参数减少了22%，模型尺寸减少了19.7%，精度提高了0.92%。 MobileNetV3-small的参数减少了23.4%，模型尺寸减少了18.3%，精度提高了0.40%。此外，改进后的MobileNetV3-small被迁移到Jetson Nano上进行测试。准确率提升2.48%达到98.31%，推理速度提升7.5%。为将农业害虫识别模型部署到嵌入式设备提供参考。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于MobileNetV3改进的轻量级农业病害识别模型，通过引入Coordinate Attention模块优化模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有农业病虫害识别模型存在参数量大、模型体积大且难以部署到嵌入式设备的问题。
AI.method: 在MobileNetV3基础上引入Coordinate Attention机制，分别对large和small版本进行参数优化，并迁移至Jetson Nano平台测试。
AI.result: MobileNetV3-large参数减少22%、体积减少19.7%、准确率提升0.92%；small版本参数减少23.4%、体积减少18.3%、准确率提升0.40%；Jetson Nano上准确率达98.31%，推理速度提升7.5%。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的模型在保持高精度的同时显著降低参数量和体积，为农业病害识别模型在嵌入式设备的部署提供了可行方案。

search_text: Improved lightweight identification of agricultural diseases based on MobileNetV3 基于MobileNetV3改进的农业病害轻量级识别 At present, the identification of agricultural pests and diseases has the problem that the model is not lightweight enough and difficult to apply. Based on MobileNetV3, this paper introduces the Coordinate Attention block. The parameters of MobileNetV3-large are reduced by 22%, the model size is reduced by 19.7%, and the accuracy is improved by 0.92%. The parameters of MobileNetV3-small are reduced by 23.4%, the model size is reduced by 18.3%, and the accuracy is increased by 0.40%. In addition, the improved MobileNetV3-small was migrated to Jetson Nano for testing. The accuracy increased by 2.48% to 98.31%, and the inference speed increased by 7.5%. It provides a reference for deploying the agricultural pest identification model to embedded devices. 目前农业病虫害识别存在模型不够轻量、难以应用的问题。本文基于MobileNetV3，引入了Cooperative Attention块。 MobileNetV3-large的参数减少了22%，模型尺寸减少了19.7%，精度提高了0.92%。 MobileNetV3-small的参数减少了23.4%，模型尺寸减少了18.3%，精度提高了0.40%。此外，改进后的MobileNetV3-small被迁移到Jetson Nano上进行测试。准确率提升2.48%达到98.31%，推理速度提升7.5%。为将农业害虫识别模型部署到嵌入式设备提供参考。 本文提出基于MobileNetV3改进的轻量级农业病害识别模型，通过引入Coordinate Attention模块优化模型性能。 Yuhang Jiang,Wenping Tong cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Zhenrui Yue,Huimin Zeng,Ziyi Kou,Lanyu Shang,Dong Wang
title: Defending Substitution-Based Profile Pollution Attacks on Sequential Recommenders
title_zh: 防御对顺序推荐器的基于替换的配置文件污染攻击
abstract: While sequential recommender systems achieve significant improvements on capturing user dynamics, we argue that sequential recommenders are vulnerable against substitution-based profile pollution attacks. To demonstrate our hypothesis, we propose a substitution-based adversarial attack algorithm, which modifies the input sequence by selecting certain vulnerable elements and substituting them with adversarial items. In both untargeted and targeted attack scenarios, we observe significant performance deterioration using the proposed profile pollution algorithm. Motivated by such observations, we design an efficient adversarial defense method called Dirichlet neighborhood sampling. Specifically, we sample item embeddings from a convex hull constructed by multi-hop neighbors to replace the original items in input sequences. During sampling, a Dirichlet distribution is used to approximate the probability distribution in the neighborhood such that the recommender learns to combat local perturbations. Additionally, we design an adversarial training method tailored for sequential recommender systems. In particular, we represent selected items with one-hot encodings and perform gradient ascent on the encodings to search for the worst case linear combination of item embeddings in training. As such, the embedding function learns robust item representations and the trained recommender is resistant to test-time adversarial examples. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness of both our attack and defense methods, which consistently outperform baselines by a significant margin across model architectures and datasets.
summary: While sequential recommender systems achieve significant improvements on capturing user dynamics, we argue that sequential recommenders are vulnerable against substitution-based profile pollution attacks. To demonstrate our hypothesis, we propose a substitution-based adversarial attack algorithm, which modifies the input sequence by selecting certain vulnerable elements and substituting them with adversarial items. In both untargeted and targeted attack scenarios, we observe significant performance deterioration using the proposed profile pollution algorithm. Motivated by such observations, we design an efficient adversarial defense method called Dirichlet neighborhood sampling. Specifically, we sample item embeddings from a convex hull constructed by multi-hop neighbors to replace the original items in input sequences. During sampling, a Dirichlet distribution is used to approximate the probability distribution in the neighborhood such that the recommender learns to combat local perturbations. Additionally, we design an adversarial training method tailored for sequential recommender systems. In particular, we represent selected items with one-hot encodings and perform gradient ascent on the encodings to search for the worst case linear combination of item embeddings in training. As such, the embedding function learns robust item representations and the trained recommender is resistant to test-time adversarial examples. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness of both our attack and defense methods, which consistently outperform baselines by a significant margin across model architectures and datasets.
abstract_zh: 虽然顺序推荐系统在捕获用户动态方面取得了显着改进，但我们认为顺序推荐系统容易受到基于替换的配置文件污染攻击。为了证明我们的假设，我们提出了一种基于替换的对抗性攻击算法，该算法通过选择某些易受攻击的元素并用对抗性项目替换它们来修改输入序列。在非目标和目标攻击场景中，我们使用所提出的配置文件污染算法观察到性能显着下降。受这些观察的启发，我们设计了一种有效的对抗性防御方法，称为狄利克雷邻域采样。具体来说，我们从由多跳邻居构建的凸包中对项目嵌入进行采样，以替换输入序列中的原始项目。在采样过程中，狄利克雷分布用于近似邻域中的概率分布，以便推荐器学会对抗局部扰动。此外，我们设计了一种针对顺序推荐系统的对抗性训练方法。特别是，我们用 one-hot 编码表示选定的项目，并对编码执行梯度上升，以搜索训练中项目嵌入的最坏情况线性组合。因此，嵌入函数学习鲁棒的项目表示，并且训练有素的推荐器能够抵抗测试时的对抗性示例。大量的实验证明了我们的攻击和防御方法的有效性，这些方法在模型架构和数据集上始终明显优于基线。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于替换的用户画像污染攻击方法，并设计防御策略以增强序列推荐系统的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 序列推荐系统易受替换型攻击，导致推荐性能下降，需有效防御方法。
AI.method: 提出替换攻击算法，并设计Dirichlet邻域采样和对抗训练方法，通过多跳邻居凸包采样及梯度上升优化嵌入表示。
AI.result: 实验表明，攻防方法在不同模型和数据集上均显著优于现有基线。
AI.conclusion: 本文有效防御了替换型攻击，提升了序列推荐系统的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Jona Ruthardt,Thomas Michalke
title: A System-driven Automatic Ground Truth Generation Method for DL Inner-City Driving Corridor Detectors
title_zh: 一种系统驱动的DL内城驾驶走廊检测器自动地面实况生成方法
abstract: Data-driven perception approaches are well-established in automated driving systems. In many fields even super-human performance is reached. Unlike prediction and planning approaches, mainly supervised learning algorithms are used for the perception domain. Therefore, a major remaining challenge is the efficient generation of ground truth data. As perception modules are positioned close to the sensor, they typically run on raw sensor data of high bandwidth. Due to that, the generation of ground truth labels typically causes a significant manual effort, which leads to high costs for the labelling itself and the necessary quality control. In this contribution, we propose an automatic labeling approach for semantic segmentation of the drivable ego corridor that reduces the manual effort by a factor of 150 and more. The proposed holistic approach could be used in an automated data loop, allowing a continuous improvement of the depending perception modules.
summary: Data-driven perception approaches are well-established in automated driving systems. In many fields even super-human performance is reached. Unlike prediction and planning approaches, mainly supervised learning algorithms are used for the perception domain. Therefore, a major remaining challenge is the efficient generation of ground truth data. As perception modules are positioned close to the sensor, they typically run on raw sensor data of high bandwidth. Due to that, the generation of ground truth labels typically causes a significant manual effort, which leads to high costs for the labelling itself and the necessary quality control. In this contribution, we propose an automatic labeling approach for semantic segmentation of the drivable ego corridor that reduces the manual effort by a factor of 150 and more. The proposed holistic approach could be used in an automated data loop, allowing a continuous improvement of the depending perception modules.
abstract_zh: 数据驱动的感知方法在自动驾驶系统中已经很成熟。在许多领域甚至达到了超人的表现。与预测和规划方法不同，监督学习算法主要用于感知领域。因此，剩下的一个主要挑战是有效生成地面实况数据。由于感知模块靠近传感器，因此它们通常在高带宽的原始传感器数据上运行。因此，真实标签的生成通常需要大量的手动工作，这导致标签本身和必要的质量控制成本高昂。在这篇文章中，我们提出了一种用于可驾驶自我走廊语义分割的自动标记方法，该方法将手动工作量减少了 150 倍甚至更多。所提出的整体方法可以用于自动数据循环中，从而允许不断改进相关的感知模块。

AI.tldr: 提出一种系统驱动的自动地面真实数据生成方法，用于深度学习的城区驾驶走廊检测器，以减少人工标注的工作量。
AI.motivation: 传统人工标注地面真实数据成本高且效率低，制约了自动驾驶感知模块的优化与迭代。
AI.method: 设计自动标注方法对可行驶区域进行语义分割，并整合至自动化数据循环系统中以降低人工干预。
AI.result: 人工标注工作量减少150倍以上，支持感知模块的持续性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著降低数据标注成本，为自动驾驶系统提供了高效的数据闭环优化方案。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种系统驱动的自动地面真实数据生成方法，用于深度学习的城区驾驶走廊检测器，以减少人工标注的工作量。

authors_text: Prafull Sharma,Ayush Tewari,Yilun Du,Sergey Zakharov,Rares Ambrus,Adrien Gaidon,William T. Freeman,Fredo Durand,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,Vincent Sitzmann
title: Neural Groundplans: Persistent Neural Scene Representations from a Single Image
title_zh: 神经平面图：来自单个图像的持久神经场景表示
abstract: We present a method to map 2D image observations of a scene to a persistent 3D scene representation, enabling novel view synthesis and disentangled representation of the movable and immovable components of the scene. Motivated by the bird's-eye-view (BEV) representation commonly used in vision and robotics, we propose conditional neural groundplans, ground-aligned 2D feature grids, as persistent and memory-efficient scene representations. Our method is trained self-supervised from unlabeled multi-view observations using differentiable rendering, and learns to complete geometry and appearance of occluded regions. In addition, we show that we can leverage multi-view videos at training time to learn to separately reconstruct static and movable components of the scene from a single image at test time. The ability to separately reconstruct movable objects enables a variety of downstream tasks using simple heuristics, such as extraction of object-centric 3D representations, novel view synthesis, instance-level segmentation, 3D bounding box prediction, and scene editing. This highlights the value of neural groundplans as a backbone for efficient 3D scene understanding models.
summary: We present a method to map 2D image observations of a scene to a persistent 3D scene representation, enabling novel view synthesis and disentangled representation of the movable and immovable components of the scene. Motivated by the bird's-eye-view (BEV) representation commonly used in vision and robotics, we propose conditional neural groundplans, ground-aligned 2D feature grids, as persistent and memory-efficient scene representations. Our method is trained self-supervised from unlabeled multi-view observations using differentiable rendering, and learns to complete geometry and appearance of occluded regions. In addition, we show that we can leverage multi-view videos at training time to learn to separately reconstruct static and movable components of the scene from a single image at test time. The ability to separately reconstruct movable objects enables a variety of downstream tasks using simple heuristics, such as extraction of object-centric 3D representations, novel view synthesis, instance-level segmentation, 3D bounding box prediction, and scene editing. This highlights the value of neural groundplans as a backbone for efficient 3D scene understanding models.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种将场景的 2D 图像观察映射到持久 3D 场景表示的方法，从而实现场景的可移动和不可移动组件的新颖视图合成和解开表示。受视觉和机器人技术中常用的鸟瞰图（BEV）表示的启发，我们提出了条件神经平面图、地面对齐的 2D 特征网格，作为持久且内存高效的场景表示。我们的方法是使用可微渲染从未标记的多视图观察中进行自我监督训练，并学习完成遮挡区域的几何形状和外观。此外，我们还表明，我们可以在训练时利用多视图视频来学习在测试时从单个图像中分别重建场景的静态和可移动组件。单独重建可移动对象的能力可以使用简单的启发式方法实现各种下游任务，例如提取以对象为中心的 3D 表示、新颖的视图合成、实例级分割、3D 边界框预测和场景编辑。这凸显了神经平面作为高效 3D 场景理解模型支柱的价值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从单张图像生成持久3D场景表示的方法，用于新视角合成和分离场景的可移动与不可移动组件。
AI.motivation: 受鸟瞰图（BEV）表示启发，旨在创建持久且内存高效的场景表示以解决传统方法在复杂场景建模中的不足。
AI.method: 通过自监督学习和可微渲染技术，利用多视角观测训练模型补全遮挡区域，并利用多视角视频学习分离静态与动态场景组件。
AI.result: 实现单张图像下静态/动态组件的分离重建，支持物体级分割、3D框预测等下游任务，提升场景理解效率。
AI.conclusion: 神经地面图作为高效3D场景理解模型的核心，为多任务场景处理提供了统一的表示框架。

authors_text: Darius Afchar,Romain Hennequin,Vincent Guigue
title: Learning Unsupervised Hierarchies of Audio Concepts
title_zh: 学习音频概念的无监督层次结构
abstract: Music signals are difficult to interpret from their low-level features, perhaps even more than images: e.g. highlighting part of a spectrogram or an image is often insufficient to convey high-level ideas that are genuinely relevant to humans. In computer vision, concept learning was therein proposed to adjust explanations to the right abstraction level (e.g. detect clinical concepts from radiographs). These methods have yet to be used for MIR. In this paper, we adapt concept learning to the realm of music, with its particularities. For instance, music concepts are typically non-independent and of mixed nature (e.g. genre, instruments, mood), unlike previous work that assumed disentangled concepts. We propose a method to learn numerous music concepts from audio and then automatically hierarchise them to expose their mutual relationships. We conduct experiments on datasets of playlists from a music streaming service, serving as a few annotated examples for diverse concepts. Evaluations show that the mined hierarchies are aligned with both ground-truth hierarchies of concepts -- when available -- and with proxy sources of concept similarity in the general case.
summary: Music signals are difficult to interpret from their low-level features, perhaps even more than images: e.g. highlighting part of a spectrogram or an image is often insufficient to convey high-level ideas that are genuinely relevant to humans. In computer vision, concept learning was therein proposed to adjust explanations to the right abstraction level (e.g. detect clinical concepts from radiographs). These methods have yet to be used for MIR. In this paper, we adapt concept learning to the realm of music, with its particularities. For instance, music concepts are typically non-independent and of mixed nature (e.g. genre, instruments, mood), unlike previous work that assumed disentangled concepts. We propose a method to learn numerous music concepts from audio and then automatically hierarchise them to expose their mutual relationships. We conduct experiments on datasets of playlists from a music streaming service, serving as a few annotated examples for diverse concepts. Evaluations show that the mined hierarchies are aligned with both ground-truth hierarchies of concepts -- when available -- and with proxy sources of concept similarity in the general case.
abstract_zh: 音乐信号很难从其低级特征来解释，甚至可能比图像更难以解释：例如突出显示频谱图或图像的一部分通常不足以传达与人类真正相关的高级想法。在计算机视觉中，概念学习被提出来将解释调整到正确的抽象水平（例如从射线照片中检测临床概念）。这些方法尚未用于 MIR。在本文中，我们将概念学习应用到具有特殊性的音乐领域。例如，音乐概念通常是非独立的且具有混合性质（例如流派、乐器、情绪），这与之前假设解开概念的作品不同。我们提出了一种从音频中学习大量音乐概念的方法，然后自动对它们进行分层以揭示它们的相互关系。我们对音乐流媒体服务的播放列表数据集进行实验，作为不同概念的一些带注释的示例。评估表明，挖掘的层次结构与概念的真实层次结构（如果可用）以及一般情况下概念相似性的代理源一致。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督方法，从音频中学习音乐概念并自动构建其层次结构，以揭示概念间的关联。
AI.motivation: 音乐信号难以通过低层特征解释，且现有方法未充分考虑音乐概念的非独立性和混合特性，需适应音乐领域的特殊性。
AI.method: 通过分析音乐流媒体平台的播放列表数据，利用无监督学习挖掘多类音乐概念（如流派、乐器、情绪），并自动构建概念间的关系层次。
AI.result: 实验表明，挖掘出的层次结构与真实概念层次及通用概念相似性指标均高度一致。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了音乐概念的层次化组织，为音乐信息检索提供了更符合人类认知的抽象表示。

ai_content.result: 实验表明，挖掘出的层次结构与真实概念层次及通用概念相似性指标均高度一致。

authors_text: Thibault Clérice
title: You Actually Look Twice At it (YALTAi): using an object detection approach instead of region segmentation within the Kraken engine
title_zh: 你实际上看了两次（YALTAi）：在 Kraken 引擎中使用对象检测方法而不是区域分割
comment: Journal of Data Mining and Digital Humanities, 2023, Historical Documents and automatic text recognition
comments: Journal of Data Mining and Digital Humanities, 2023, Historical Documents and automatic text recognition
abstract: Layout Analysis (the identification of zones and their classification) is the first step along line segmentation in Optical Character Recognition and similar tasks. The ability of identifying main body of text from marginal text or running titles makes the difference between extracting the work full text of a digitized book and noisy outputs. We show that most segmenters focus on pixel classification and that polygonization of this output has not been used as a target for the latest competition on historical document (ICDAR 2017 and onwards), despite being the focus in the early 2010s. We propose to shift, for efficiency, the task from a pixel classification-based polygonization to an object detection using isothetic rectangles. We compare the output of Kraken and YOLOv5 in terms of segmentation and show that the later severely outperforms the first on small datasets (1110 samples and below). We release two datasets for training and evaluation on historical documents as well as a new package, YALTAi, which injects YOLOv5 in the segmentation pipeline of Kraken 4.1.
summary: Layout Analysis (the identification of zones and their classification) is the first step along line segmentation in Optical Character Recognition and similar tasks. The ability of identifying main body of text from marginal text or running titles makes the difference between extracting the work full text of a digitized book and noisy outputs. We show that most segmenters focus on pixel classification and that polygonization of this output has not been used as a target for the latest competition on historical document (ICDAR 2017 and onwards), despite being the focus in the early 2010s. We propose to shift, for efficiency, the task from a pixel classification-based polygonization to an object detection using isothetic rectangles. We compare the output of Kraken and YOLOv5 in terms of segmentation and show that the later severely outperforms the first on small datasets (1110 samples and below). We release two datasets for training and evaluation on historical documents as well as a new package, YALTAi, which injects YOLOv5 in the segmentation pipeline of Kraken 4.1.
abstract_zh: 布局分析（区域识别及其分类）是光学字符识别和类似任务中线分割的第一步。从边缘文本或连续标题中识别文本主体的能力使得提取数字化书籍的作品全文和嘈杂的输出之间存在差异。我们表明，大多数分割器都专注于像素分类，并且该输出的多边形化尚未用作历史文档最新竞赛（ICDAR 2017 及以后）的目标，尽管它是 2010 年代初的焦点。为了提高效率，我们建议将任务从基于像素分类的多边形化转移到使用等角矩形的对象检测。我们在分割方面比较了 Kraken 和 YOLOv5 的输出，结果表明后者在小数据集（1110 个样本及以下）上严重优于第一个。我们发布了两个用于历史文档训练和评估的数据集，以及一个新包 YALTAi，它将 YOLOv5 注入到 Kraken 4.1 的分割管道中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将Kraken引擎中的区域分割任务替换为基于YOLOv5的目标检测方法，以提高历史文档布局分析的效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统像素分类和多边形化方法在历史文档布局分析中效果有限，且近年竞赛（如ICDAR 2017）未将其作为主要目标，需寻找更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 采用YOLOv5的等轴矩形目标检测替代原有像素分类多边形化流程，并集成至Kraken 4.1分割流水线中，同时发布两个历史文档数据集及YALTAi工具包。
AI.result: 在小型数据集（≤1110样本）上，YOLOv5显著优于Kraken，且新工具包与数据集已公开可用。
AI.conclusion: 目标检测方法在效率和小数据集表现上优于传统分割，YALTAi为历史文档分析提供了更优工具链。

search_text: You Actually Look Twice At it (YALTAi): using an object detection approach instead of region segmentation within the Kraken engine 你实际上看了两次（YALTAi）：在 Kraken 引擎中使用对象检测方法而不是区域分割 Layout Analysis (the identification of zones and their classification) is the first step along line segmentation in Optical Character Recognition and similar tasks. The ability of identifying main body of text from marginal text or running titles makes the difference between extracting the work full text of a digitized book and noisy outputs. We show that most segmenters focus on pixel classification and that polygonization of this output has not been used as a target for the latest competition on historical document (ICDAR 2017 and onwards), despite being the focus in the early 2010s. We propose to shift, for efficiency, the task from a pixel classification-based polygonization to an object detection using isothetic rectangles. We compare the output of Kraken and YOLOv5 in terms of segmentation and show that the later severely outperforms the first on small datasets (1110 samples and below). We release two datasets for training and evaluation on historical documents as well as a new package, YALTAi, which injects YOLOv5 in the segmentation pipeline of Kraken 4.1. 布局分析（区域识别及其分类）是光学字符识别和类似任务中线分割的第一步。从边缘文本或连续标题中识别文本主体的能力使得提取数字化书籍的作品全文和嘈杂的输出之间存在差异。我们表明，大多数分割器都专注于像素分类，并且该输出的多边形化尚未用作历史文档最新竞赛（ICDAR 2017 及以后）的目标，尽管它是 2010 年代初的焦点。为了提高效率，我们建议将任务从基于像素分类的多边形化转移到使用等角矩形的对象检测。我们在分割方面比较了 Kraken 和 YOLOv5 的输出，结果表明后者在小数据集（1110 个样本及以下）上严重优于第一个。我们发布了两个用于历史文档训练和评估的数据集，以及一个新包 YALTAi，它将 YOLOv5 注入到 Kraken 4.1 的分割管道中。 本文提出将Kraken引擎中的区域分割任务替换为基于YOLOv5的目标检测方法，以提高历史文档布局分析的效率和准确性。 Thibault Clérice cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Bill Basener
title: Classifying Crop Types using Gaussian Bayesian Models and Neural Networks on GHISACONUS USGS data from NASA Hyperspectral Satellite Imagery
title_zh: 使用高斯贝叶斯模型和神经网络对来自 NASA 高光谱卫星图像的 GHISACONUS USGS 数据进行作物类型分类
abstract: Hyperspectral Imagining is a type of digital imaging in which each pixel contains typically hundreds of wavelengths of light providing spectroscopic information about the materials present in the pixel. In this paper we provide classification methods for determining crop type in the USGS GHISACONUS data, which contains around 7,000 pixel spectra from the five major U.S. agricultural crops (winter wheat, rice, corn, soybeans, and cotton) collected by the NASA Hyperion satellite, and includes the spectrum, geolocation, crop type, and stage of growth for each pixel. We apply standard LDA and QDA as well as Bayesian custom versions that compute the joint probability of crop type and stage, and then the marginal probability for crop type, outperforming the non-Bayesian methods. We also test a single layer neural network with dropout on the data, which performs comparable to LDA and QDA but not as well as the Bayesian methods.
summary: Hyperspectral Imagining is a type of digital imaging in which each pixel contains typically hundreds of wavelengths of light providing spectroscopic information about the materials present in the pixel. In this paper we provide classification methods for determining crop type in the USGS GHISACONUS data, which contains around 7,000 pixel spectra from the five major U.S. agricultural crops (winter wheat, rice, corn, soybeans, and cotton) collected by the NASA Hyperion satellite, and includes the spectrum, geolocation, crop type, and stage of growth for each pixel. We apply standard LDA and QDA as well as Bayesian custom versions that compute the joint probability of crop type and stage, and then the marginal probability for crop type, outperforming the non-Bayesian methods. We also test a single layer neural network with dropout on the data, which performs comparable to LDA and QDA but not as well as the Bayesian methods.
abstract_zh: 高光谱成像是一种数字成像，其中每个像素通常包含数百个波长的光，提供有关像素中存在的材料的光谱信息。在本文中，我们提供了用于确定 USGS GHISACONUS 数据中作物类型的分类方法，该数据包含由 NASA Hyperion 卫星收集的美国五种主要农作物（冬小麦、水稻、玉米、大豆和棉花）的约 7,000 个像素光谱，包括每个像素的光谱、地理位置、作物类型和生长阶段。我们应用标准 LDA 和 QDA 以及贝叶斯自定义版本来计算作物类型和阶段的联合概率，然后计算作物类型的边际概率，优于非贝叶斯方法。我们还测试了对数据进行 dropout 的单层神经网络，其性能与 LDA 和 QDA 相当，但不如贝叶斯方法。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在利用高斯贝叶斯模型和神经网络对NASA高光谱卫星影像中的作物类型进行分类。
AI.motivation: 高光谱影像能提供丰富的光谱信息，但需要有效方法提取作物特征。现有分类方法可能存在精度不足的问题，需探索更优模型。
AI.method: 采用LDA/QDA方法及改进的贝叶斯模型（联合概率与边缘概率计算），并测试带dropout的单层神经网络进行作物分类。
AI.result: 贝叶斯方法在作物分类任务中表现优于传统LDA/QDA和神经网络，后者仅与LDA/QDA性能相当。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯模型在处理高光谱作物分类任务中更具优势，未来可进一步优化模型结构以提升分类效果。

authors_text: Parthak Mehta,Sarthak Mishra,Nikhil Chouhan,Neel Pethani,Ishani Saha
title: Face editing with GAN -- A Review
title_zh: 使用 GAN 进行面部编辑——回顾
abstract: In recent years, Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have become a hot topic among researchers and engineers that work with deep learning. It has been a ground-breaking technique which can generate new pieces of content of data in a consistent way. The topic of GANs has exploded in popularity due to its applicability in fields like image generation and synthesis, and music production and composition. GANs have two competing neural networks: a generator and a discriminator. The generator is used to produce new samples or pieces of content, while the discriminator is used to recognize whether the piece of content is real or generated. What makes it different from other generative models is its ability to learn unlabeled samples. In this review paper, we will discuss the evolution of GANs, several improvements proposed by the authors and a brief comparison between the different models. Index Terms generative adversarial networks, unsupervised learning, deep learning.
summary: In recent years, Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have become a hot topic among researchers and engineers that work with deep learning. It has been a ground-breaking technique which can generate new pieces of content of data in a consistent way. The topic of GANs has exploded in popularity due to its applicability in fields like image generation and synthesis, and music production and composition. GANs have two competing neural networks: a generator and a discriminator. The generator is used to produce new samples or pieces of content, while the discriminator is used to recognize whether the piece of content is real or generated. What makes it different from other generative models is its ability to learn unlabeled samples. In this review paper, we will discuss the evolution of GANs, several improvements proposed by the authors and a brief comparison between the different models. Index Terms generative adversarial networks, unsupervised learning, deep learning.
abstract_zh: 近年来，生成对抗网络（GAN）已成为深度学习研究人员和工程师的热门话题。这是一项突破性的技术，可以以一致的方式生成新的数据内容。 GAN 因其在图像生成和合成、音乐制作和作曲等领域的应用而广受欢迎。 GAN 有两个相互竞争的神经网络：生成器和判别器。生成器用于产生新的样本或内容片段，而鉴别器用于识别该内容片段是真实的还是生成的。它与其他生成模型的不同之处在于它能够学习未标记的样本。在这篇综述论文中，我们将讨论 GAN 的演变、作者提出的几项改进以及不同模型之间的简要比较。索引术语生成对抗网络、无监督学习、深度学习。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了生成对抗网络（GAN）在人脸编辑领域的研究进展，讨论了其发展演变、改进方法及不同模型的比较。
AI.motivation: GANs因其在图像生成与合成等领域的强大能力而备受关注，但现有研究缺乏系统性梳理，需总结其发展脉络与技术改进方向。
AI.method: 通过回顾GANs的演化历程，分析各阶段提出的关键改进方法，并对主流模型进行性能与应用的对比分析。
AI.result: 总结了GANs从基础框架到先进变体的技术演进，归纳了不同模型在人脸编辑任务中的优缺点及适用场景。
AI.conclusion: GANs为人脸编辑提供了有效工具，但训练稳定性与生成质量仍是挑战，未来需结合更优训练策略与跨领域技术进一步突破。

In this review paper, we will discuss the evolution of GANs, several improvements proposed by the authors and a brief comparison between the different models. Index Terms generative adversarial networks, unsupervised learning, deep learning. 近年来，生成对抗网络（GAN）已成为深度学习研究人员和工程师的热门话题。这是一项突破性的技术，可以以一致的方式生成新的数据内容。 GAN 因其在图像生成和合成、音乐制作和作曲等领域的应用而广受欢迎。 GAN 有两个相互竞争的神经网络：生成器和判别器。生成器用于产生新的样本或内容片段，而鉴别器用于识别该内容片段是真实的还是生成的。它与其他生成模型的不同之处在于它能够学习未标记的样本。在这篇综述论文中，我们将讨论 GAN 的演变、作者提出的几项改进以及不同模型之间的简要比较。索引术语生成对抗网络、无监督学习、深度学习。 本文综述了生成对抗网络（GAN）在人脸编辑领域的研究进展，讨论了其发展演变、改进方法及不同模型的比较。 Parthak Mehta,Sarthak Mishra,Nikhil Chouhan,Neel Pethani,Ishani Saha cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.NE,eess.IV

authors_text: Lior Ben-Moshe,Sagie Benaim,Lior Wolf
title: FewGAN: Generating from the Joint Distribution of a Few Images
title_zh: FewGAN：通过几个图像的联合分布生成
abstract: We introduce FewGAN, a generative model for generating novel, high-quality and diverse images whose patch distribution lies in the joint patch distribution of a small number of N>1 training samples. The method is, in essence, a hierarchical patch-GAN that applies quantization at the first coarse scale, in a similar fashion to VQ-GAN, followed by a pyramid of residual fully convolutional GANs at finer scales. Our key idea is to first use quantization to learn a fixed set of patch embeddings for training images. We then use a separate set of side images to model the structure of generated images using an autoregressive model trained on the learned patch embeddings of training images. Using quantization at the coarsest scale allows the model to generate both conditional and unconditional novel images. Subsequently, a patch-GAN renders the fine details, resulting in high-quality images. In an extensive set of experiments, it is shown that FewGAN outperforms baselines both quantitatively and qualitatively.
summary: We introduce FewGAN, a generative model for generating novel, high-quality and diverse images whose patch distribution lies in the joint patch distribution of a small number of N>1 training samples. The method is, in essence, a hierarchical patch-GAN that applies quantization at the first coarse scale, in a similar fashion to VQ-GAN, followed by a pyramid of residual fully convolutional GANs at finer scales. Our key idea is to first use quantization to learn a fixed set of patch embeddings for training images. We then use a separate set of side images to model the structure of generated images using an autoregressive model trained on the learned patch embeddings of training images. Using quantization at the coarsest scale allows the model to generate both conditional and unconditional novel images. Subsequently, a patch-GAN renders the fine details, resulting in high-quality images. In an extensive set of experiments, it is shown that FewGAN outperforms baselines both quantitatively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍FewGAN，一种生成模型，用于生成新颖、高质量和多样化的图像，其补丁分布在于少量N>1训练样本的联合补丁分布。该方法本质上是一种分层 patch-GAN，它以与 VQ-GAN 类似的方式在第一个粗尺度上应用量化，然后在更精细的尺度上应用残差全卷积 GAN 的金字塔。我们的关键思想是首先使用量化来学习一组固定的补丁嵌入来训练图像。然后，我们使用一组单独的侧面图像，使用在训练图像的学习补丁嵌入上训练的自回归模型来对生成图像的结构进行建模。使用最粗尺度的量化允许模型生成有条件和无条件的新图像。随后，patch-GAN 渲染精细细节，从而产生高质量图像。在一系列广泛的实验中，结果表明 FewGAN 在数量和质量上都优于基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FewGAN，一种从少量样本中生成高质量、多样化图像的生成模型。
AI.motivation: 传统生成对抗网络（GAN）需要大量训练数据才能生成高质量图像，而FewGAN旨在解决在仅有少量样本（N>1）情况下生成图像的挑战。
AI.method: FewGAN采用分层的patch-GAN结构，首先通过量化学习固定训练图像的patch嵌入，再利用自回归模型结合侧边图像建模生成图像结构，最后通过patch-GAN细化细节。
AI.result: 实验表明，FewGAN在定量和定性指标上均优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: FewGAN通过分层量化与自回归建模，有效实现了基于少量样本的高质量图像生成，推动了少样本生成领域的发展。

authors_text: Hao Li,Yang Nan,Javier Del Ser,Guang Yang
title: Large-Kernel Attention for 3D Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 3D 医学图像分割的大核关注
comment: 22 pages, 5 figures, submitted to Cognitive Computation
comments: 22 pages, 5 figures, submitted to Cognitive Computation
abstract: Automatic segmentation of multiple organs and tumors from 3D medical images such as magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) and computed tomography (CT) scans using deep learning methods can aid in diagnosing and treating cancer. However, organs often overlap and are complexly connected, characterized by extensive anatomical variation and low contrast. In addition, the diversity of tumor shape, location, and appearance, coupled with the dominance of background voxels, makes accurate 3D medical image segmentation difficult. In this paper, a novel large-kernel (LK) attention module is proposed to address these problems to achieve accurate multi-organ segmentation and tumor segmentation. The advantages of convolution and self-attention are combined in the proposed LK attention module, including local contextual information, long-range dependence, and channel adaptation. The module also decomposes the LK convolution to optimize the computational cost and can be easily incorporated into FCNs such as U-Net. Comprehensive ablation experiments demonstrated the feasibility of convolutional decomposition and explored the most efficient and effective network design. Among them, the best Mid-type LK attention-based U-Net network was evaluated on CT-ORG and BraTS 2020 datasets, achieving state-of-the-art segmentation performance. The performance improvement due to the proposed LK attention module was also statistically validated.
summary: Automatic segmentation of multiple organs and tumors from 3D medical images such as magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) and computed tomography (CT) scans using deep learning methods can aid in diagnosing and treating cancer. However, organs often overlap and are complexly connected, characterized by extensive anatomical variation and low contrast. In addition, the diversity of tumor shape, location, and appearance, coupled with the dominance of background voxels, makes accurate 3D medical image segmentation difficult. In this paper, a novel large-kernel (LK) attention module is proposed to address these problems to achieve accurate multi-organ segmentation and tumor segmentation. The advantages of convolution and self-attention are combined in the proposed LK attention module, including local contextual information, long-range dependence, and channel adaptation. The module also decomposes the LK convolution to optimize the computational cost and can be easily incorporated into FCNs such as U-Net. Comprehensive ablation experiments demonstrated the feasibility of convolutional decomposition and explored the most efficient and effective network design. Among them, the best Mid-type LK attention-based U-Net network was evaluated on CT-ORG and BraTS 2020 datasets, achieving state-of-the-art segmentation performance. The performance improvement due to the proposed LK attention module was also statistically validated.
abstract_zh: 使用深度学习方法从 3D 医学图像（例如磁共振成像 (MRI) 和计算机断层扫描 (CT) 扫描）自动分割多个器官和肿瘤可以帮助诊断和治疗癌症。然而，器官经常重叠且连接复杂，其特点是广泛的解剖变异和低对比度。此外，肿瘤形状、位置和外观的多样性，加上背景体素的主导地位，使得精确的 3D 医学图像分割变得困难。本文提出了一种新颖的大内核（LK）注意模块来解决这些问题，以实现准确的多器官分割和肿瘤分割。所提出的LK注意力模块结合了卷积和自注意力的优点，包括局部上下文信息、远程依赖和通道适应。该模块还分解 LK 卷积以优化计算成本，并且可以轻松合并到 U-Net 等 FCN 中。全面的消融实验证明了卷积分解的可行性，并探索了最高效、最有效的网络设计。其中，最好的 Mid-type LK 基于注意力的 U-Net 网络在 CT-ORG 和 BraTS 2020 数据集上进行了评估，实现了最先进的分割性能。所提出的 LK 注意力模块带来的性能改进也得到了统计验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种大核注意力模块（LK attention module），用于解决3D医学图像分割中器官重叠、肿瘤形状多样性和低对比度等挑战，提升分割精度。
AI.motivation: 3D医学图像中器官结构复杂且存在重叠，肿瘤形态和位置多样，传统方法难以有效捕捉长距离依赖关系和局部上下文信息，导致分割精度不足。
AI.method: 设计结合卷积与自注意力机制的大核注意力模块，通过分解大核卷积降低计算成本，并将其嵌入U-Net等全卷积网络（FCN）中，优化网络结构。
AI.result: 在CT-ORG和BraTS 2020数据集上，基于LK注意力的U-Net网络达到最先进的分割性能，且改进效果通过统计验证显著。
AI.conclusion: LK注意力模块有效融合局部与全局信息，兼顾计算效率与分割精度，为复杂3D医学图像分割提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种大核注意力模块（LK attention module），用于解决3D医学图像分割中器官重叠、肿瘤形状多样性和低对比度等挑战，提升分割精度。

authors_text: Osman Darici,Arthur D. Kuo
title: Humans plan for the near future to walk economically on uneven terrain
title_zh: 人类计划在不久的将来在不平坦的地形上经济地行走
abstract: Humans experience small fluctuations in their gait when walking on uneven terrain. The fluctuations deviate from the steady, energy-minimizing pattern for level walking, and have no obvious organization. But humans often look ahead when they walk, and could potentially plan anticipatory fluctuations for the terrain. Such planning is only sensible if it serves some an objective purpose, such as maintaining constant speed or reducing energy expenditure, that is also attainable within finite planning capacity. Here we show that humans do plan and perform optimal control strategies on uneven terrain. Rather than maintain constant speed, they make purposeful, anticipatory speed adjustments that are consistent with minimizing energy expenditure. A simple optimal control model predicts economical speed fluctuations that agree well with experiments with humans (N = 12) walking on seven different terrain profiles (correlated with model ro=0.55+-0.11, P<0.05 all terrains). Participants made repeatable speed fluctuations starting about six to eight steps ahead of each terrain feature (up to +-7.5 cm height difference each step, up to 16 consecutive features). Nearer features matter more, because energy is dissipated with each succeeding step collision with ground, preventing momentum from persisting indefinitely. A finite horizon of continuous look ahead and motor working space thus suffice to practically optimize for any length of terrain. Humans reason about walking in the near future to plan complex optimal control sequences.

A simple optimal control model predicts economical speed fluctuations that agree well with experiments with humans (N = 12) walking on seven different terrain profiles (correlated with model ro=0.55+-0.11, P<0.05 all terrains). Participants made repeatable speed fluctuations starting about six to eight steps ahead of each terrain feature (up to +-7.5 cm height difference each step, up to 16 consecutive features). A finite horizon of continuous look ahead and motor working space thus suffice to practically optimize for any length of terrain. Humans reason about walking in the near future to plan complex optimal control sequences.
abstract_zh: 当人类在不平坦的地形上行走时，步态会出现微小的波动。这些波动偏离了水平行走的稳定、能量最小化模式，并且没有明显的组织。但人类在行走时经常向前看，并且可能会计划地形的预期波动。这种规划只有在服务于某种客观目的时才有意义，例如保持恒定速度或减少能源消耗，而这在有限的规划能力内也是可以实现的。在这里，我们表明人类确实可以在不平坦的地形上计划并执行最佳控制策略。他们不是保持恒定的速度，而是进行有目的的、预期的速度调整，以最大限度地减少能量消耗。一个简单的最优控制模型预测了经济的速度波动，这与人类 (N = 12) 在七个不同地形剖面上行走的实验非常吻合（与模型 ro=0.55+-0.11 相关，P<0.05 所有地形）。参与者在每个地形特征之前大约六到八步开始进行可重复的速度波动（每一步高达 +-7.5 厘米的高度差，最多 16 个连续特征）。越近的特征越重要，因为能量会随着每一步与地面的后续碰撞而消散，从而防止动量无限期地持续下去。因此，连续前视和电机工作空间的有限视野足以针对任何长度的地形进行实际优化。人类在不久的将来对行走进行推理，以规划复杂的最优控制序列。

AI.tldr: 本文研究人类在不平坦地形上行走时如何通过前瞻性速度调整实现节能行走，验证其最优控制策略。
AI.motivation: 人类在不平坦地形上的步态波动被认为缺乏组织性，但通过前瞻性规划可能实现节能目标。研究旨在验证人类是否通过有限规划能力实现能量最小化。
AI.method: 构建最优控制模型预测节能速度波动，通过12名受试者在7种地形上的行走实验验证（相关系数ro=0.55±0.11，P<0.05），分析步态调整与地形特征的对应关系。
AI.result: 人类在地形特征前6-8步开始可重复速度调整，近处地形影响更大。模型预测与实验数据高度吻合，证实有限前瞻视野和运动能力可实现地形优化。
AI.conclusion: 人类通过有限前瞻规划和运动空间，在不平坦地形上实现复杂最优控制序列，以节能为目标调整步态。

search_text: Humans plan for the near future to walk economically on uneven terrain 人类计划在不久的将来在不平坦的地形上经济地行走 Humans experience small fluctuations in their gait when walking on uneven terrain. The fluctuations deviate from the steady, energy-minimizing pattern for level walking, and have no obvious organization. But humans often look ahead when they walk, and could potentially plan anticipatory fluctuations for the terrain. Such planning is only sensible if it serves some an objective purpose, such as maintaining constant speed or reducing energy expenditure, that is also attainable within finite planning capacity. Here we show that humans do plan and perform optimal control strategies on uneven terrain. Rather than maintain constant speed, they make purposeful, anticipatory speed adjustments that are consistent with minimizing energy expenditure. A simple optimal control model predicts economical speed fluctuations that agree well with experiments with humans (N = 12) walking on seven different terrain profiles (correlated with model ro=0.55+-0.11, P<0.05 all terrains). Participants made repeatable speed fluctuations starting about six to eight steps ahead of each terrain feature (up to +-7.5 cm height difference each step, up to 16 consecutive features). Nearer features matter more, because energy is dissipated with each succeeding step collision with ground, preventing momentum from persisting indefinitely. A finite horizon of continuous look ahead and motor working space thus suffice to practically optimize for any length of terrain. Humans reason about walking in the near future to plan complex optimal control sequences. 当人类在不平坦的地形上行走时，步态会出现微小的波动。这些波动偏离了水平行走的稳定、能量最小化模式，并且没有明显的组织。但人类在行走时经常向前看，并且可能会计划地形的预期波动。这种规划只有在服务于某种客观目的时才有意义，例如保持恒定速度或减少能源消耗，而这在有限的规划能力内也是可以实现的。在这里，我们表明人类确实可以在不平坦的地形上计划并执行最佳控制策略。他们不是保持恒定的速度，而是进行有目的的、预期的速度调整，以最大限度地减少能量消耗。一个简单的最优控制模型预测了经济的速度波动，这与人类 (N = 12) 在七个不同地形剖面上行走的实验非常吻合（与模型 ro=0.55+-0.11 相关，P<0.05 所有地形）。参与者在每个地形特征之前大约六到八步开始进行可重复的速度波动（每一步高达 +-7.5 厘米的高度差，最多 16 个连续特征）。越近的特征越重要，因为能量会随着每一步与地面的后续碰撞而消散，从而防止动量无限期地持续下去。因此，连续前视和电机工作空间的有限视野足以针对任何长度的地形进行实际优化。人类在不久的将来对行走进行推理，以规划复杂的最优控制序列。 本文研究人类在不平坦地形上行走时如何通过前瞻性速度调整实现节能行走，验证其最优控制策略。 Osman Darici,Arthur D.
