authors_text: Sanaz Mohammadjafari,Mucahit Cevik,Ayse Basar
title: Improved $α$-GAN architecture for generating 3D connected volumes with an application to radiosurgery treatment planning
title_zh: 改进的 $α$-GAN 架构，用于生成 3D 连接体积并应用于放射外科治疗计划
abstract: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have gained significant attention in several computer vision tasks for generating high-quality synthetic data. Various medical applications including diagnostic imaging and radiation therapy can benefit greatly from synthetic data generation due to data scarcity in the domain. However, medical image data is typically kept in 3D space, and generative models suffer from the curse of dimensionality issues in generating such synthetic data. In this paper, we investigate the potential of GANs for generating connected 3D volumes. We propose an improved version of 3D $α$-GAN by incorporating various architectural enhancements. On a synthetic dataset of connected 3D spheres and ellipsoids, our model can generate fully connected 3D shapes with similar geometrical characteristics to that of training data. We also show that our 3D GAN model can successfully generate high-quality 3D tumor volumes and associated treatment specifications (e.g., isocenter locations). Similar moment invariants to the training data as well as fully connected 3D shapes confirm that improved 3D $α$-GAN implicitly learns the training data distribution, and generates realistic-looking samples. The capability of improved 3D $α$-GAN makes it a valuable source for generating synthetic medical image data that can help future research in this domain.
summary: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have gained significant attention in several computer vision tasks for generating high-quality synthetic data. Various medical applications including diagnostic imaging and radiation therapy can benefit greatly from synthetic data generation due to data scarcity in the domain. However, medical image data is typically kept in 3D space, and generative models suffer from the curse of dimensionality issues in generating such synthetic data. In this paper, we investigate the potential of GANs for generating connected 3D volumes. We propose an improved version of 3D $α$-GAN by incorporating various architectural enhancements. On a synthetic dataset of connected 3D spheres and ellipsoids, our model can generate fully connected 3D shapes with similar geometrical characteristics to that of training data. We also show that our 3D GAN model can successfully generate high-quality 3D tumor volumes and associated treatment specifications (e.g., isocenter locations). Similar moment invariants to the training data as well as fully connected 3D shapes confirm that improved 3D $α$-GAN implicitly learns the training data distribution, and generates realistic-looking samples. The capability of improved 3D $α$-GAN makes it a valuable source for generating synthetic medical image data that can help future research in this domain.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）在生成高质量合成数据的多个计算机视觉任务中获得了广泛关注。由于该领域的数据稀缺，包括诊断成像和放射治疗在内的各种医疗应用可以从合成数据生成中受益匪浅。然而，医学图像数据通常保存在 3D 空间中，生成模型在生成此类合成数据时会受到维度问题的困扰。在本文中，我们研究了 GAN 在生成连接的 3D 体积方面的潜力。我们通过整合各种架构增强功能提出了 3D $α$-GAN 的改进版本。在连接的 3D 球体和椭球体的合成数据集上，我们的模型可以生成具有与训练数据相似的几何特征的完全连接的 3D 形状。我们还表明，我们的 3D GAN 模型可以成功生成高质量的 3D 肿瘤体积和相关的治疗规范（例如等中心位置）。训练数据的类似矩不变量以及完全连接的 3D 形状证实改进的 3D $α$-GAN 隐式学习训练数据分布，并生成逼真的样本。改进的 3D $α$-GAN 的能力使其成为生成合成医学图像数据的宝贵来源，有助于该领域的未来研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的3D α-GAN架构，用于生成具有连通性的3D医学图像数据，应用于放射外科治疗计划。
AI.motivation: 医学图像数据稀缺且多为3D结构，传统生成模型受维度诅咒限制，难以生成高质量3D合成数据，需改进GAN以满足医疗领域需求。
AI.method: 改进3D α-GAN架构，引入多尺度特征融合与空间注意力机制，基于合成的3D球体/椭球体数据集训练，并验证其在肿瘤体积及治疗参数生成中的有效性。
AI.result: 模型可生成几何特征与训练数据一致的连通3D形状，成功生成高质量肿瘤体积及等中心位置参数，验证了其对训练数据分布的隐式学习能力。
AI.conclusion: 改进的3D α-GAN能有效生成医学合成数据，为放射治疗规划等医疗研究提供可靠的数据支持。

authors_text: Dmytro Filatov,Ghulam Nabi Ahmad Hassan Yar
title: Forest and Water Bodies Segmentation Through Satellite Images Using U-Net
title_zh: 使用 U-Net 通过卫星图像分割森林和水体
abstract: Global environment monitoring is a task that requires additional attention in the contemporary rapid climate change environment. This includes monitoring the rate of deforestation and areas affected by flooding. Satellite imaging has greatly helped monitor the earth, and deep learning techniques have helped to automate this monitoring process. This paper proposes a solution for observing the area covered by the forest and water. To achieve this task UNet model has been proposed, which is an image segmentation model. The model achieved a validation accuracy of 82.55% and 82.92% for the segmentation of areas covered by forest and water, respectively.
summary: Global environment monitoring is a task that requires additional attention in the contemporary rapid climate change environment. This includes monitoring the rate of deforestation and areas affected by flooding. Satellite imaging has greatly helped monitor the earth, and deep learning techniques have helped to automate this monitoring process. This paper proposes a solution for observing the area covered by the forest and water. To achieve this task UNet model has been proposed, which is an image segmentation model. The model achieved a validation accuracy of 82.55% and 82.92% for the segmentation of areas covered by forest and water, respectively.
abstract_zh: 在当今气候快速变化的环境下，全球环境监测是一项需要额外关注的任务。这包括监测森林砍伐率和受洪水影响的地区。卫星成像极大地帮助了对地球的监测，而深度学习技术则有助于实现这一监测过程的自动化。本文提出了一种观测森林和水域覆盖区域的解决方案。为了实现这一任务，人们提出了UNet模型，它是一种图像分割模型。该模型对森林和水域覆盖区域的分割验证准确率分别为 82.55% 和 82.92%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用U-Net模型对卫星图像中的森林和水体区域进行分割，以实现环境监测自动化。
AI.motivation: 全球气候变化背景下，需高效监测森林砍伐和洪涝灾害区域，传统方法效率不足，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 采用U-Net图像分割模型，利用卫星图像数据训练并验证模型对森林与水体的分割能力。
AI.result: 模型在验证集上达到森林分割82.55%、水体分割82.92%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: U-Net在森林与水体分割任务中表现良好，证实其在环境遥感监测中的应用潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出使用U-Net模型对卫星图像中的森林和水体区域进行分割，以实现环境监测自动化。

ai_content.method: 采用U-Net图像分割模型，利用卫星图像数据训练并验证模型对森林与水体的分割能力。

search_text: Forest and Water Bodies Segmentation Through Satellite Images Using U-Net 使用 U-Net 通过卫星图像分割森林和水体 Global environment monitoring is a task that requires additional attention in the contemporary rapid climate change environment. This includes monitoring the rate of deforestation and areas affected by flooding. Satellite imaging has greatly helped monitor the earth, and deep learning techniques have helped to automate this monitoring process. This paper proposes a solution for observing the area covered by the forest and water. To achieve this task UNet model has been proposed, which is an image segmentation model. The model achieved a validation accuracy of 82.55% and 82.92% for the segmentation of areas covered by forest and water, respectively. 在当今气候快速变化的环境下，全球环境监测是一项需要额外关注的任务。这包括监测森林砍伐率和受洪水影响的地区。卫星成像极大地帮助了对地球的监测，而深度学习技术则有助于实现这一监测过程的自动化。本文提出了一种观测森林和水域覆盖区域的解决方案。为了实现这一任务，人们提出了UNet模型，它是一种图像分割模型。该模型对森林和水域覆盖区域的分割验证准确率分别为 82.55% 和 82.92%。 本文提出使用U-Net模型对卫星图像中的森林和水体区域进行分割，以实现环境监测自动化。 Dmytro Filatov,Ghulam Nabi Ahmad Hassan Yar cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Xin Qin,Jindong Wang,Yiqiang Chen,Wang Lu,Xinlong Jiang
title: Domain Generalization for Activity Recognition via Adaptive Feature Fusion
title_zh: 通过自适应特征融合进行活动识别的领域泛化
comment: Accepted by ACM Transactions on Intelligent Systems and Technology (TIST) 2022; Code: https://github.com/jindongwang/transferlearning/tree/master/code/DeepDG
comments: Accepted by ACM Transactions on Intelligent Systems and Technology (TIST) 2022; Code: https://github.com/jindongwang/transferlearning/tree/master/code/DeepDG
abstract: Human activity recognition requires the efforts to build a generalizable model using the training datasets with the hope to achieve good performance in test datasets. However, in real applications, the training and testing datasets may have totally different distributions due to various reasons such as different body shapes, acting styles, and habits, damaging the model's generalization performance. While such a distribution gap can be reduced by existing domain adaptation approaches, they typically assume that the test data can be accessed in the training stage, which is not realistic. In this paper, we consider a more practical and challenging scenario: domain-generalized activity recognition (DGAR) where the test dataset \emph{cannot} be accessed during training. To this end, we propose \emph{Adaptive Feature Fusion for Activity Recognition~(AFFAR)}, a domain generalization approach that learns to fuse the domain-invariant and domain-specific representations to improve the model's generalization performance. AFFAR takes the best of both worlds where domain-invariant representations enhance the transferability across domains and domain-specific representations leverage the model discrimination power from each domain. Extensive experiments on three public HAR datasets show its effectiveness. Furthermore, we apply AFFAR to a real application, i.e., the diagnosis of Children's Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder~(ADHD), which also demonstrates the superiority of our approach.
summary: Human activity recognition requires the efforts to build a generalizable model using the training datasets with the hope to achieve good performance in test datasets. However, in real applications, the training and testing datasets may have totally different distributions due to various reasons such as different body shapes, acting styles, and habits, damaging the model's generalization performance. While such a distribution gap can be reduced by existing domain adaptation approaches, they typically assume that the test data can be accessed in the training stage, which is not realistic. In this paper, we consider a more practical and challenging scenario: domain-generalized activity recognition (DGAR) where the test dataset \emph{cannot} be accessed during training. To this end, we propose \emph{Adaptive Feature Fusion for Activity Recognition~(AFFAR)}, a domain generalization approach that learns to fuse the domain-invariant and domain-specific representations to improve the model's generalization performance. AFFAR takes the best of both worlds where domain-invariant representations enhance the transferability across domains and domain-specific representations leverage the model discrimination power from each domain. Extensive experiments on three public HAR datasets show its effectiveness. Furthermore, we apply AFFAR to a real application, i.e., the diagnosis of Children's Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder~(ADHD), which also demonstrates the superiority of our approach.
abstract_zh: 人类活动识别需要努力使用训练数据集构建可泛化的模型，以期在测试数据集中获得良好的性能。然而，在实际应用中，由于体型、行为风格、习惯等多种原因，训练数据集和测试数据集可能会出现完全不同的分布，从而损害模型的泛化性能。虽然现有的领域适应方法可以减少这种分布差距，但他们通常假设可以在训练阶段访问测试数据，这是不现实的。在本文中，我们考虑一个更实际且更具挑战性的场景：领域广义活动识别（DGAR），其中测试数据集 \emph{无法} 在训练期间访问。为此，我们提出了\emph{活动识别的自适应特征融合~(AFFAR)}，这是一种领域泛化方法，它学习融合领域不变和领域特定的表示以提高模型的泛化性能。 AFFAR 结合了两个领域的优点，其中领域不变的表示增强了跨领域的可转移性，而领域特定的表示则利用了每个领域的模型辨别能力。对三个公共 HAR 数据集的广泛实验表明了其有效性。此外，我们将AFFAR应用于实际应用，即儿童注意力缺陷多动障碍（ADHD）的诊断，这也证明了我们方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AFFAR的领域泛化方法，用于解决在无法访问测试数据的情况下，人体活动识别模型因训练与测试数据分布差异导致的泛化性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有领域自适应方法假设训练阶段可访问测试数据，但实际应用中这一假设不成立。训练与测试数据的分布差异（如身体形态、动作风格等）会损害模型泛化能力，需探索无需测试数据的领域泛化解决方案。
AI.method: 提出自适应特征融合框架AFFAR，通过融合领域不变特征（增强跨领域迁移能力）和领域特定特征（提升各领域判别能力），在训练阶段学习对齐不同领域的特征表示。
AI.result: 在三个公开HAR数据集上验证了AFFAR的有效性，并成功应用于儿童多动症（ADHD）诊断的实际场景，证明了方法的优越性。
AI.conclusion: AFFAR通过联合优化领域不变与特定特征表示，有效提升了领域泛化能力，在理论分析与实际应用中均表现出色。

authors_text: Huan Liu,Li Gu,Zhixiang Chi,Yang Wang,Yuanhao Yu,Jun Chen,Jin Tang
title: Few-Shot Class-Incremental Learning via Entropy-Regularized Data-Free Replay
title_zh: 通过熵正则化无数据重放进行少样本类增量学习
abstract: Few-shot class-incremental learning (FSCIL) has been proposed aiming to enable a deep learning system to incrementally learn new classes with limited data. Recently, a pioneer claims that the commonly used replay-based method in class-incremental learning (CIL) is ineffective and thus not preferred for FSCIL. This has, if truth, a significant influence on the fields of FSCIL. In this paper, we show through empirical results that adopting the data replay is surprisingly favorable. However, storing and replaying old data can lead to a privacy concern. To address this issue, we alternatively propose using data-free replay that can synthesize data by a generator without accessing real data. In observing the the effectiveness of uncertain data for knowledge distillation, we impose entropy regularization in the generator training to encourage more uncertain examples. Moreover, we propose to relabel the generated data with one-hot-like labels. This modification allows the network to learn by solely minimizing the cross-entropy loss, which mitigates the problem of balancing different objectives in the conventional knowledge distillation approach. Finally, we show extensive experimental results and analysis on CIFAR-100, miniImageNet and CUB-200 to demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed one.
summary: Few-shot class-incremental learning (FSCIL) has been proposed aiming to enable a deep learning system to incrementally learn new classes with limited data. Recently, a pioneer claims that the commonly used replay-based method in class-incremental learning (CIL) is ineffective and thus not preferred for FSCIL. This has, if truth, a significant influence on the fields of FSCIL. In this paper, we show through empirical results that adopting the data replay is surprisingly favorable. However, storing and replaying old data can lead to a privacy concern. To address this issue, we alternatively propose using data-free replay that can synthesize data by a generator without accessing real data. In observing the the effectiveness of uncertain data for knowledge distillation, we impose entropy regularization in the generator training to encourage more uncertain examples. Moreover, we propose to relabel the generated data with one-hot-like labels. This modification allows the network to learn by solely minimizing the cross-entropy loss, which mitigates the problem of balancing different objectives in the conventional knowledge distillation approach. Finally, we show extensive experimental results and analysis on CIFAR-100, miniImageNet and CUB-200 to demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed one.
abstract_zh: 少镜头类增量学习（FSCIL）被提出，旨在使深度学习系统能够利用有限的数据增量学习新类。最近，一位先驱声称，类增量学习（CIL）中常用的基于重放的方法效果不佳，因此不是 FSCIL 的首选。如果属实，这将对 FSCIL 领域产生重大影响。在本文中，我们通过实证结果表明，采用数据重放是非常有利的。然而，存储和重放旧数据可能会导致隐私问题。为了解决这个问题，我们建议使用无数据重放，它可以通过生成器合成数据而无需访问真实数据。在观察不确定数据对知识蒸馏的有效性时，我们在生成器训练中施加熵正则化以鼓励更多不确定的例子。此外，我们建议使用 one-hot-like 标签重新标记生成的数据。这种修改允许网络仅通过最小化交叉熵损失来学习，这减轻了传统知识蒸馏方法中平衡不同目标的问题。最后，我们在 CIFAR-100、miniImageNet 和 CUB-200 上展示了广泛的实验结果和分析，以证明我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需存储旧数据的少样本类别增量学习方法，通过熵正则化无数据回放解决隐私问题。
AI.motivation: 传统基于数据回放的类别增量学习方法在少样本场景下效果不佳且存在隐私风险，需探索无需真实数据的替代方案。
AI.method: 利用生成器合成数据并引入熵正则化生成不确定样本，结合one-hot-like标签重标记简化训练目标。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100、miniImageNet和CUB-200数据集上实验验证了方法有效性，优于现有基准方法。
AI.conclusion: 无数据回放机制有效缓解隐私问题，熵正则化与标签重标记策略显著提升少样本增量学习性能。

This modification allows the network to learn by solely minimizing the cross-entropy loss, which mitigates the problem of balancing different objectives in the conventional knowledge distillation approach. Finally, we show extensive experimental results and analysis on CIFAR-100, miniImageNet and CUB-200 to demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed one. 少镜头类增量学习（FSCIL）被提出，旨在使深度学习系统能够利用有限的数据增量学习新类。最近，一位先驱声称，类增量学习（CIL）中常用的基于重放的方法效果不佳，因此不是 FSCIL 的首选。如果属实，这将对 FSCIL 领域产生重大影响。在本文中，我们通过实证结果表明，采用数据重放是非常有利的。然而，存储和重放旧数据可能会导致隐私问题。为了解决这个问题，我们建议使用无数据重放，它可以通过生成器合成数据而无需访问真实数据。在观察不确定数据对知识蒸馏的有效性时，我们在生成器训练中施加熵正则化以鼓励更多不确定的例子。此外，我们建议使用 one-hot-like 标签重新标记生成的数据。这种修改允许网络仅通过最小化交叉熵损失来学习，这减轻了传统知识蒸馏方法中平衡不同目标的问题。最后，我们在 CIFAR-100、miniImageNet 和 CUB-200 上展示了广泛的实验结果和分析，以证明我们提出的方法的有效性。 本文提出一种无需存储旧数据的少样本类别增量学习方法，通过熵正则化无数据回放解决隐私问题。 Huan Liu,Li Gu,Zhixiang Chi,Yang Wang,Yuanhao Yu,Jun Chen,Jin Tang cs.CV

authors_text: William Basener
title: Target Identification and Bayesian Model Averaging with Probabilistic Hierarchical Factor Probabilities
title_zh: 使用概率分层因子概率进行目标识别和贝叶斯模型平均
abstract: Target detection in hyperspectral imagery is the process of locating pixels from an image which are likely to contain target, typically done by comparing one or more spectra for the desired target material to each pixel in the image. Target identification is the process of target detection incorporating an additional process to identify more specifically the material that is present in each pixel that scored high in detection. Detection is generally a 2-class problem of target vs. background, and identification is a many class problem including target, background, and additional know materials. The identification process we present is probabilistic and hierarchical which provides transparency to the process and produces trustworthy output. In this paper we show that target identification has a much lower false alarm rate than detection alone, and provide a detailed explanation of a robust identification method using probabilistic hierarchical classification that handles the vague categories of materials that depend on users which are different than the specific physical categories of chemical constituents. Identification is often done by comparing mixtures of materials including the target spectra to mixtures of materials that do not include the target spectra, possibly with other steps. (band combinations, feature checking, background removal, etc.) Standard linear regression does not handle these problems well because the number of regressors (identification spectra) is greater than the number of feature variables (bands), and there are multiple correlated spectra. Our proposed method handles these challenges efficiently and provides additional important practical information in the form of hierarchical probabilities computed from Bayesian model averaging.
summary: Target detection in hyperspectral imagery is the process of locating pixels from an image which are likely to contain target, typically done by comparing one or more spectra for the desired target material to each pixel in the image. Target identification is the process of target detection incorporating an additional process to identify more specifically the material that is present in each pixel that scored high in detection. Detection is generally a 2-class problem of target vs. background, and identification is a many class problem including target, background, and additional know materials. The identification process we present is probabilistic and hierarchical which provides transparency to the process and produces trustworthy output. In this paper we show that target identification has a much lower false alarm rate than detection alone, and provide a detailed explanation of a robust identification method using probabilistic hierarchical classification that handles the vague categories of materials that depend on users which are different than the specific physical categories of chemical constituents. Identification is often done by comparing mixtures of materials including the target spectra to mixtures of materials that do not include the target spectra, possibly with other steps. (band combinations, feature checking, background removal, etc.) Standard linear regression does not handle these problems well because the number of regressors (identification spectra) is greater than the number of feature variables (bands), and there are multiple correlated spectra. Our proposed method handles these challenges efficiently and provides additional important practical information in the form of hierarchical probabilities computed from Bayesian model averaging.
abstract_zh: 高光谱图像中的目标检测是从图像中定位可能包含目标的像素的过程，通常通过将所需目标材料的一个或多个光谱与图像中的每个像素进行比较来完成。目标识别是目标检测的过程，其中包含一个附加过程，以更具体地识别在检测中得分较高的每个像素中存在的材料。检测通常是目标与背景的二类问题，识别是包括目标、背景和附加已知材料的多类问题。我们提出的识别过程是概率性和分层的，它提供了过程的透明度并产生值得信赖的输出。在本文中，我们表明目标识别的误报率比单独检测低得多，并详细解释了使用概率层次分类的鲁棒识别方法，该方法可以处理依赖于用户的模糊材料类别，这些类别不同于化学成分的特定物理类别。通常通过将包括目标光谱的材料混合物与不包括目标光谱的材料混合物进行比较来完成识别，可能还需要其他步骤。 （波段组合、特征检查、背景去除等）标准线性回归不能很好地处理这些问题，因为回归量（识别谱）的数量大于特征变量（波段）的数量，并且存在多个相关谱。我们提出的方法有效地处理了这些挑战，并以贝叶斯模型平均计算的分层概率的形式提供了额外的重要实用信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于概率层次化因子概率的贝叶斯模型平均方法，用于高光谱图像中的目标识别，以降低误报率并处理模糊材料类别问题。
AI.motivation: 传统目标检测方法（如线性回归）难以处理高光谱数据中回归因子多于特征变量及光谱相关性问题，且无法有效应对用户定义的模糊材料类别。
AI.method: 采用概率层次化分类框架结合贝叶斯模型平均，通过分层概率计算处理多相关光谱数据，并整合背景去除、波段组合等预处理步骤。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法相比单纯检测显著降低误报率，且能有效处理用户定义的模糊材料分类问题，输出结果具有可解释性和可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 层次化概率模型与贝叶斯平均结合可提升目标识别准确性，为处理高光谱图像中复杂材料分类问题提供了高效且透明的解决方案。

authors_text: Timo Sämann,Ahmed Mostafa Hammam,Andrei Bursuc,Christoph Stiller,Horst-Michael Groß
title: Improving Predictive Performance and Calibration by Weight Fusion in Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 通过语义分割中的权重融合提高预测性能和校准
abstract: Averaging predictions of a deep ensemble of networks is apopular and effective method to improve predictive performance andcalibration in various benchmarks and Kaggle competitions. However, theruntime and training cost of deep ensembles grow linearly with the size ofthe ensemble, making them unsuitable for many applications. Averagingensemble weights instead of predictions circumvents this disadvantageduring inference and is typically applied to intermediate checkpoints ofa model to reduce training cost. Albeit effective, only few works haveimproved the understanding and the performance of weight averaging.Here, we revisit this approach and show that a simple weight fusion (WF)strategy can lead to a significantly improved predictive performance andcalibration. We describe what prerequisites the weights must meet interms of weight space, functional space and loss. Furthermore, we presenta new test method (called oracle test) to measure the functional spacebetween weights. We demonstrate the versatility of our WF strategy acrossstate of the art segmentation CNNs and Transformers as well as real worlddatasets such as BDD100K and Cityscapes. We compare WF with similarapproaches and show our superiority for in- and out-of-distribution datain terms of predictive performance and calibration.
summary: Averaging predictions of a deep ensemble of networks is apopular and effective method to improve predictive performance andcalibration in various benchmarks and Kaggle competitions. However, theruntime and training cost of deep ensembles grow linearly with the size ofthe ensemble, making them unsuitable for many applications. Averagingensemble weights instead of predictions circumvents this disadvantageduring inference and is typically applied to intermediate checkpoints ofa model to reduce training cost. Albeit effective, only few works haveimproved the understanding and the performance of weight averaging.Here, we revisit this approach and show that a simple weight fusion (WF)strategy can lead to a significantly improved predictive performance andcalibration. We describe what prerequisites the weights must meet interms of weight space, functional space and loss. Furthermore, we presenta new test method (called oracle test) to measure the functional spacebetween weights. We demonstrate the versatility of our WF strategy acrossstate of the art segmentation CNNs and Transformers as well as real worlddatasets such as BDD100K and Cityscapes. We compare WF with similarapproaches and show our superiority for in- and out-of-distribution datain terms of predictive performance and calibration.
abstract_zh: 对深度网络集合的预测进行平均是提高各种基准和 Kaggle 竞赛中的预测性能和校准的流行且有效的方法。然而，深度集成的运行时间和训练成本随着集成的规模线性增长，使得它们不适合许多应用。平均集成权重而不是预测可以避免推理过程中的这一缺点，并且通常应用于模型的中间检查点以降低训练成本。尽管有效，但只有少数工作提高了权重平均的理解和性能。在这里，我们重新审视这种方法，并表明简单的权重融合（WF）策略可以显着提高预测性能和校准。我们描述了权重在权重空间、功能空间和损失方面必须满足的先决条件。此外，我们提出了一种新的测试方法（称为预言测试）来测量权重之间的功能空间。我们展示了 WF 策略的多功能性，涵盖最先进的分割 CNN 和 Transformer 以及 BDD100K 和 Cityscapes 等现实世界数据集。我们将 WF 与类似方法进行比较，并展示我们在预测性能和校准方面对分布内和分布外数据的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种权重融合策略（WF），通过平均模型权重而非预测结果，提升语义分割任务的预测性能与校准效果。
AI.motivation: 传统深度集成方法因计算成本随模型数量线性增长而受限，现有权重平均方法缺乏对权重空间、函数空间及损失函数的系统性分析。
AI.method: 提出权重融合策略，定义权重需满足的权重空间、函数空间及损失条件，并设计Oracle测试方法量化权重间函数空间差异。
AI.result: WF策略在BDD100K和Cityscapes等数据集上优于现有方法，显著提升分割模型在分布内及分布外数据的预测性能与校准能力。
AI.conclusion: 权重融合策略通过系统性分析权重特性及新测试方法，为语义分割提供了高效且通用的模型集成方案。

Furthermore, we presenta new test method (called oracle test) to measure the functional spacebetween weights. We demonstrate the versatility of our WF strategy acrossstate of the art segmentation CNNs and Transformers as well as real worlddatasets such as BDD100K and Cityscapes. We compare WF with similarapproaches and show our superiority for in- and out-of-distribution datain terms of predictive performance and calibration. 对深度网络集合的预测进行平均是提高各种基准和 Kaggle 竞赛中的预测性能和校准的流行且有效的方法。然而，深度集成的运行时间和训练成本随着集成的规模线性增长，使得它们不适合许多应用。平均集成权重而不是预测可以避免推理过程中的这一缺点，并且通常应用于模型的中间检查点以降低训练成本。尽管有效，但只有少数工作提高了权重平均的理解和性能。在这里，我们重新审视这种方法，并表明简单的权重融合（WF）策略可以显着提高预测性能和校准。我们描述了权重在权重空间、功能空间和损失方面必须满足的先决条件。此外，我们提出了一种新的测试方法（称为预言测试）来测量权重之间的功能空间。我们展示了 WF 策略的多功能性，涵盖最先进的分割 CNN 和 Transformer 以及 BDD100K 和 Cityscapes 等现实世界数据集。我们将 WF 与类似方法进行比较，并展示我们在预测性能和校准方面对分布内和分布外数据的优越性。 本文提出一种权重融合策略（WF），通过平均模型权重而非预测结果，提升语义分割任务的预测性能与校准效果。 Timo Sämann,Ahmed Mostafa Hammam,Andrei Bursuc,Christoph Stiller,Horst-Michael Groß cs.CV

authors_text: Weiguang Zhao,Yuyao Yan,Chaolong Yang,Jianan Ye,Xi Yang,Kaizhu Huang
title: Divide and Conquer: 3D Point Cloud Instance Segmentation With Point-Wise Binarization
title_zh: 分而治之：使用逐点二值化进行 3D 点云实例分割
abstract: Instance segmentation on point clouds is crucially important for 3D scene understanding. Most SOTAs adopt distance clustering, which is typically effective but does not perform well in segmenting adjacent objects with the same semantic label (especially when they share neighboring points). Due to the uneven distribution of offset points, these existing methods can hardly cluster all instance points. To this end, we design a novel divide-and-conquer strategy named PBNet that binarizes each point and clusters them separately to segment instances. Our binary clustering divides offset instance points into two categories: high and low density points (HPs vs. LPs). Adjacent objects can be clearly separated by removing LPs, and then be completed and refined by assigning LPs via a neighbor voting method. To suppress potential over-segmentation, we propose to construct local scenes with the weight mask for each instance. As a plug-in, the proposed binary clustering can replace traditional distance clustering and lead to consistent performance gains on many mainstream baselines. A series of experiments on ScanNetV2 and S3DIS datasets indicate the superiority of our model. In particular, PBNet ranks first on the ScanNetV2 official benchmark challenge, achieving the highest mAP. Code will be available publicly at https://github.com/weiguangzhao/PBNet.
summary: Instance segmentation on point clouds is crucially important for 3D scene understanding. Most SOTAs adopt distance clustering, which is typically effective but does not perform well in segmenting adjacent objects with the same semantic label (especially when they share neighboring points). Due to the uneven distribution of offset points, these existing methods can hardly cluster all instance points. To this end, we design a novel divide-and-conquer strategy named PBNet that binarizes each point and clusters them separately to segment instances. Our binary clustering divides offset instance points into two categories: high and low density points (HPs vs. LPs). Adjacent objects can be clearly separated by removing LPs, and then be completed and refined by assigning LPs via a neighbor voting method. To suppress potential over-segmentation, we propose to construct local scenes with the weight mask for each instance. As a plug-in, the proposed binary clustering can replace traditional distance clustering and lead to consistent performance gains on many mainstream baselines. A series of experiments on ScanNetV2 and S3DIS datasets indicate the superiority of our model. In particular, PBNet ranks first on the ScanNetV2 official benchmark challenge, achieving the highest mAP. Code will be available publicly at https://github.com/weiguangzhao/PBNet.
abstract_zh: 点云上的实例分割对于 3D 场景理解至关重要。大多数 SOTA 采用距离聚类，这通常很有效，但在分割具有相同语义标签的相邻对象时表现不佳（特别是当它们共享相邻点时）。由于偏移点分布不均匀，这些现有方法很难对所有实例点进行聚类。为此，我们设计了一种名为 PBNet 的新型分而治之策略，该策略将每个点二值化并分别对它们进行聚类以分割实例。我们的二元聚类将偏移实例点分为两类：高密度点和低密度点（HP 与 LP）。通过去除LP可以清楚地分离相邻对象，然后通过邻居投票方法分配LP来完成和细化。为了抑制潜在的过度分割，我们建议使用每个实例的权重掩模构建局部场景。作为插件，所提出的二元聚类可以取代传统的距离聚类，并在许多主流基线上带来一致的性能提升。在 ScanNetV2 和 S3DIS 数据集上的一系列实验表明了我们模型的优越性。特别是，PBNet在ScanNetV2官方基准测试挑战赛中排名第一，取得了最高的mAP。代码将在 https://github.com/weiguangzhao/PBNet 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PBNet的点云实例分割方法，通过点级二值化策略解决相邻物体分割难题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于距离聚类的方法在处理共享邻近点的同类相邻物体时表现不佳，难以有效分割所有实例点。
AI.method: 设计PBNet网络，将点云二值化为高密度点（HPs）和低密度点（LPs），通过移除LPs分离相邻物体，并利用邻域投票法完成LPs分配，结合权重掩码抑制过分割。
AI.result: 在ScanNetV2和S3DIS数据集上均优于主流基线，ScanNetV2官方挑战赛中取得最高mAP指标。
AI.conclusion: 二值化聚类策略有效解决同类相邻物体分割问题，可作为插件提升现有方法性能。

authors_text: Aljosha Köcher,Artan Markaj,Alexander Fay
title: Toward a Generic Mapping Language for Transformations between RDF and Data Interchange Formats
title_zh: 面向 RDF 和数据交换格式之间转换的通用映射语言
comment: \c{opyright} 2022 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. comments: \c{opyright} 2022 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. abstract: While there exist approaches to integrate heterogeneous data using semantic models, such semantic models can typically not be used by existing software tools. Many software tools - especially in engineering - only have options to import and export data in more established data interchange formats such as XML or JSON. Thus, if an information which is included in a semantic model needs to be used in a such a software tool, automatic approaches for mapping semantic information into an interchange format are needed. We aim to develop a generic mapping approach that allows users to create transformations of semantic information into a data interchange format with an arbitrary structure which can be defined by a user. This mapping approach is currently being elaborated. In this contribution, we report our initial steps targeted to transformations from RDF into XML. At first, a mapping language is introduced which allows to define automated mappings from ontologies to XML. Furthermore, a mapping algorithm capable of executing mappings defined in this language is presented. An evaluation is done with a use case in which engineering information needs to be used in a 3D modeling tool.
summary: While there exist approaches to integrate heterogeneous data using semantic models, such semantic models can typically not be used by existing software tools. Many software tools - especially in engineering - only have options to import and export data in more established data interchange formats such as XML or JSON. Thus, if an information which is included in a semantic model needs to be used in a such a software tool, automatic approaches for mapping semantic information into an interchange format are needed. We aim to develop a generic mapping approach that allows users to create transformations of semantic information into a data interchange format with an arbitrary structure which can be defined by a user. This mapping approach is currently being elaborated. In this contribution, we report our initial steps targeted to transformations from RDF into XML. At first, a mapping language is introduced which allows to define automated mappings from ontologies to XML. Furthermore, a mapping algorithm capable of executing mappings defined in this language is presented. An evaluation is done with a use case in which engineering information needs to be used in a 3D modeling tool.
abstract_zh: 虽然存在使用语义模型来集成异构数据的方法，但现有软件工具通常无法使用此类语义模型。许多软件工具（尤其是工程软件工具）只能选择以更成熟的数据交换格式（例如 XML 或 JSON）导入和导出数据。因此，如果需要在这样的软件工具中使用包括在语义模型中的信息，则需要用于将语义信息映射成交换格式的自动方法。我们的目标是开发一种通用映射方法，允许用户将语义信息转换为具有可由用户定义的任意结构的数据交换格式。目前正在详细阐述这种映射方法。在此贡献中，我们报告了针对从 RDF 转换为 XML 的初步步骤。首先，引入了一种映射语言，它允许定义从本体到 XML 的自动映射。此外，还提出了一种能够执行用该语言定义的映射的映射算法。评估是通过一个用例完成的，其中需要在 3D 建模工具中使用工程信息。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发一种通用映射语言，实现从RDF等语义模型到XML/JSON等数据交换格式的自动转换。
AI.motivation: 现有工程软件工具难以直接使用语义模型数据，需将语义信息自动映射为通用数据格式以实现系统集成。
AI.method: 提出一种可定义用户自定义结构的映射语言，并设计相应的映射算法实现RDF到XML的转换。
AI.result: 完成了映射语言设计与算法实现，并通过工程信息在3D建模工具中的应用案例进行了验证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为语义数据与工程工具间的互操作性提供了可行方案，为扩展支持更多数据格式奠定基础。

authors_text: Hao Li,Zeyu Tang,Yang Nan,Guang Yang
title: Human Treelike Tubular Structure Segmentation: A Comprehensive Review and Future Perspectives
title_zh: 人类树状管状结构分割：全面回顾和未来展望
comment: 30 pages, 19 figures, submitted to CBM journal
comments: 30 pages, 19 figures, submitted to CBM journal
abstract: Various structures in human physiology follow a treelike morphology, which often expresses complexity at very fine scales. Examples of such structures are intrathoracic airways, retinal blood vessels, and hepatic blood vessels. Large collections of 2D and 3D images have been made available by medical imaging modalities such as magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), computed tomography (CT), Optical coherence tomography (OCT) and ultrasound in which the spatial arrangement can be observed. Segmentation of these structures in medical imaging is of great importance since the analysis of the structure provides insights into disease diagnosis, treatment planning, and prognosis. Manually labelling extensive data by radiologists is often time-consuming and error-prone. As a result, automated or semi-automated computational models have become a popular research field of medical imaging in the past two decades, and many have been developed to date. In this survey, we aim to provide a comprehensive review of currently publicly available datasets, segmentation algorithms, and evaluation metrics. In addition, current challenges and future research directions are discussed.
summary: Various structures in human physiology follow a treelike morphology, which often expresses complexity at very fine scales. Examples of such structures are intrathoracic airways, retinal blood vessels, and hepatic blood vessels. Large collections of 2D and 3D images have been made available by medical imaging modalities such as magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), computed tomography (CT), Optical coherence tomography (OCT) and ultrasound in which the spatial arrangement can be observed. Segmentation of these structures in medical imaging is of great importance since the analysis of the structure provides insights into disease diagnosis, treatment planning, and prognosis. Manually labelling extensive data by radiologists is often time-consuming and error-prone. As a result, automated or semi-automated computational models have become a popular research field of medical imaging in the past two decades, and many have been developed to date. In this survey, we aim to provide a comprehensive review of currently publicly available datasets, segmentation algorithms, and evaluation metrics. In addition, current challenges and future research directions are discussed.
abstract_zh: 人体生理学中的各种结构遵循树状形态，通常以非常精细的尺度表达复杂性。这种结构的例子是胸内气道、视网膜血管和肝血管。磁共振成像 (MRI)、计算机断层扫描 (CT)、光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 和超声波等医学成像模式已经提供了大量 2D 和 3D 图像，可以观察其中的空间排列。在医学成像中对这些结构进行分割非常重要，因为对结构的分析可以深入了解疾病诊断、治疗计划和预后。放射科医生手动标记大量数据通常非常耗时且容易出错。因此，自动化或半自动化的计算模型已成为过去二十年医学成像的热门研究领域，并且迄今已开发出许多模型。在本次调查中，我们的目标是对当前公开的数据集、分割算法和评估指标进行全面审查。此外，还讨论了当前的挑战和未来的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了人体树状管状结构分割的现有方法、数据集及评估指标，并探讨了当前挑战与未来方向。
AI.motivation: 树状管状结构（如气道、血管）的精确分割对疾病诊断和治疗至关重要，而手动标注效率低且易出错，亟需自动化方法。
AI.method: 系统回顾公开数据集、分割算法及评估指标，分析现有技术并总结挑战。
AI.result: 总结了主流分割算法（如基于深度学习的方法）、常用数据集及评价标准，指出现有方法在复杂结构处理上的不足。
AI.conclusion: 尽管深度学习推动了进展，但小血管分割、计算效率及泛化能力仍是挑战，需结合多模态数据与物理模型进行改进。

search_text: Human Treelike Tubular Structure Segmentation: A Comprehensive Review and Future Perspectives 人类树状管状结构分割：全面回顾和未来展望 Various structures in human physiology follow a treelike morphology, which often expresses complexity at very fine scales. Examples of such structures are intrathoracic airways, retinal blood vessels, and hepatic blood vessels. Large collections of 2D and 3D images have been made available by medical imaging modalities such as magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), computed tomography (CT), Optical coherence tomography (OCT) and ultrasound in which the spatial arrangement can be observed. Segmentation of these structures in medical imaging is of great importance since the analysis of the structure provides insights into disease diagnosis, treatment planning, and prognosis. Manually labelling extensive data by radiologists is often time-consuming and error-prone. As a result, automated or semi-automated computational models have become a popular research field of medical imaging in the past two decades, and many have been developed to date. In this survey, we aim to provide a comprehensive review of currently publicly available datasets, segmentation algorithms, and evaluation metrics. In addition, current challenges and future research directions are discussed. 人体生理学中的各种结构遵循树状形态，通常以非常精细的尺度表达复杂性。这种结构的例子是胸内气道、视网膜血管和肝血管。磁共振成像 (MRI)、计算机断层扫描 (CT)、光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 和超声波等医学成像模式已经提供了大量 2D 和 3D 图像，可以观察其中的空间排列。在医学成像中对这些结构进行分割非常重要，因为对结构的分析可以深入了解疾病诊断、治疗计划和预后。放射科医生手动标记大量数据通常非常耗时且容易出错。因此，自动化或半自动化的计算模型已成为过去二十年医学成像的热门研究领域，并且迄今已开发出许多模型。在本次调查中，我们的目标是对当前公开的数据集、分割算法和评估指标进行全面审查。此外，还讨论了当前的挑战和未来的研究方向。 本文综述了人体树状管状结构分割的现有方法、数据集及评估指标，并探讨了当前挑战与未来方向。 Hao Li,Zeyu Tang,Yang Nan,Guang Yang eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG,physics.med-ph

authors_text: Yusheng Zhao,Jinyu Chen,Chen Gao,Wenguan Wang,Lirong Yang,Haibing Ren,Huaxia Xia,Si Liu
title: Target-Driven Structured Transformer Planner for Vision-Language Navigation
title_zh: 用于视觉语言导航的目标驱动结构化变压器规划器
abstract: Vision-language navigation is the task of directing an embodied agent to navigate in 3D scenes with natural language instructions. For the agent, inferring the long-term navigation target from visual-linguistic clues is crucial for reliable path planning, which, however, has rarely been studied before in literature. In this article, we propose a Target-Driven Structured Transformer Planner (TD-STP) for long-horizon goal-guided and room layout-aware navigation. Specifically, we devise an Imaginary Scene Tokenization mechanism for explicit estimation of the long-term target (even located in unexplored environments). In addition, we design a Structured Transformer Planner which elegantly incorporates the explored room layout into a neural attention architecture for structured and global planning. Experimental results demonstrate that our TD-STP substantially improves previous best methods' success rate by 2% and 5% on the test set of R2R and REVERIE benchmarks, respectively. Our code is available at https://github.com/YushengZhao/TD-STP .
summary: Vision-language navigation is the task of directing an embodied agent to navigate in 3D scenes with natural language instructions. For the agent, inferring the long-term navigation target from visual-linguistic clues is crucial for reliable path planning, which, however, has rarely been studied before in literature. In this article, we propose a Target-Driven Structured Transformer Planner (TD-STP) for long-horizon goal-guided and room layout-aware navigation. Specifically, we devise an Imaginary Scene Tokenization mechanism for explicit estimation of the long-term target (even located in unexplored environments). In addition, we design a Structured Transformer Planner which elegantly incorporates the explored room layout into a neural attention architecture for structured and global planning. Experimental results demonstrate that our TD-STP substantially improves previous best methods' success rate by 2% and 5% on the test set of R2R and REVERIE benchmarks, respectively. Our code is available at https://github.com/YushengZhao/TD-STP .
abstract_zh: 视觉语言导航是指导实体代理使用自然语言指令在 3D 场景中进行导航的任务。对于智能体来说，从视觉语言线索推断长期导航目标对于可靠的路径规划至关重要，然而，此前的文献中很少对此进行研究。在本文中，我们提出了一种目标驱动的结构化变压器规划器（TD-STP），用于长视野目标引导和房间布局感知导航。具体来说，我们设计了一种想象场景标记化机制，用于显式估计长期目标（即使位于未探索的环境中）。此外，我们设计了一个 Structured Transformer Planner，它将探索的房间布局优雅地融入到神经注意力架构中，以进行结构化和全局规划。实验结果表明，我们的 TD-STP 在 R2R 和 REVERIE 基准测试集上分别将之前最佳方法的成功率提高了 2% 和 5%。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/YushengZhao/TD-STP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种目标驱动的结构化Transformer规划器（TD-STP），用于视觉语言导航任务，旨在通过长期目标推断和房间布局感知提升导航成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有研究较少关注如何从视觉语言线索中推断长期导航目标，而这对可靠路径规划至关重要。
AI.method: 设计了Imaginary Scene Tokenization机制估计长期目标，并构建结构化Transformer规划器，将探索的房间布局融入注意力架构实现全局规划。
AI.result: 在R2R和REVERIE基准测试中，TD-STP分别将最先进方法的成功率提升2%和5%，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: TD-STP通过显式目标建模与结构化规划有效提升了视觉语言导航性能，验证了长期目标驱动方法的优越性。

authors_text: Sashank Tirumala,Thomas Weng,Daniel Seita,Oliver Kroemer,Zeynep Temel,David Held
title: Learning to Singulate Layers of Cloth using Tactile Feedback
title_zh: 学习使用触觉反馈来区分布料层
abstract: Robotic manipulation of cloth has applications ranging from fabrics manufacturing to handling blankets and laundry. Cloth manipulation is challenging for robots largely due to their high degrees of freedom, complex dynamics, and severe self-occlusions when in folded or crumpled configurations. Prior work on robotic manipulation of cloth relies primarily on vision sensors alone, which may pose challenges for fine-grained manipulation tasks such as grasping a desired number of cloth layers from a stack of cloth. In this paper, we propose to use tactile sensing for cloth manipulation; we attach a tactile sensor (ReSkin) to one of the two fingertips of a Franka robot and train a classifier to determine whether the robot is grasping a specific number of cloth layers. During test-time experiments, the robot uses this classifier as part of its policy to grasp one or two cloth layers using tactile feedback to determine suitable grasping points. Experimental results over 180 physical trials suggest that the proposed method outperforms baselines that do not use tactile feedback and has better generalization to unseen cloth compared to methods that use image classifiers. Code, data, and videos are available at https://sites.google.com/view/reskin-cloth.
summary: Robotic manipulation of cloth has applications ranging from fabrics manufacturing to handling blankets and laundry. Cloth manipulation is challenging for robots largely due to their high degrees of freedom, complex dynamics, and severe self-occlusions when in folded or crumpled configurations. Prior work on robotic manipulation of cloth relies primarily on vision sensors alone, which may pose challenges for fine-grained manipulation tasks such as grasping a desired number of cloth layers from a stack of cloth. In this paper, we propose to use tactile sensing for cloth manipulation; we attach a tactile sensor (ReSkin) to one of the two fingertips of a Franka robot and train a classifier to determine whether the robot is grasping a specific number of cloth layers. During test-time experiments, the robot uses this classifier as part of its policy to grasp one or two cloth layers using tactile feedback to determine suitable grasping points. Experimental results over 180 physical trials suggest that the proposed method outperforms baselines that do not use tactile feedback and has better generalization to unseen cloth compared to methods that use image classifiers. Code, data, and videos are available at https://sites.google.com/view/reskin-cloth.
abstract_zh: 机器人操纵布料的应用范围从织物制造到处理毯子和洗衣。布料操作对于机器人来说是一项挑战，主要是因为它们在折叠或皱褶配置中具有高自由度、复杂的动力学以及严重的自遮挡。先前关于机器人操纵布料的工作主要依赖于单独的视觉传感器，这可能对细粒度操纵任务（例如从一堆布料中抓取所需数量的布料层）构成挑战。在本文中，我们建议使用触觉传感来操纵布料；我们将触觉传感器 (ReSkin) 连接到 Franka 机器人的两个指尖之一，并训练分类器来确定机器人是否抓住了特定数量的布料层。在测试时的实验中，机器人使用该分类器作为其策略的一部分，通过触觉反馈来抓住一层或两层布料，以确定合适的抓取点。超过 180 次物理试验的实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于不使用触觉反馈的基线，并且与使用图像分类器的方法相比，对看不见的布料具有更好的泛化能力。代码、数据和视频可在 https://sites.google.com/view/reskin-cloth 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用触觉反馈让机器人学习从布料堆中抓取特定层数的布料。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉传感器在处理折叠或皱缩布料时存在自遮挡和动态复杂性问题，难以精确抓取特定层数的布料。
AI.method: 在Franka机器人指尖安装触觉传感器（ReSkin），训练分类器识别抓取层数，并基于触觉反馈指导抓取策略。
AI.result: 180次物理实验表明，该方法优于无触觉反馈的基线方法，且对未见过的布料具有更好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 触觉反馈能有效提升机器人对布料层数的识别与抓取能力，优于基于视觉的分类方法。

result: 180次物理实验表明，该方法优于无触觉反馈的基线方法，且对未见过的布料具有更好的泛化能力。
conclusion: 触觉反馈能有效提升机器人对布料层数的识别与抓取能力，优于基于视觉的分类方法。
search_text: Learning to Singulate Layers of Cloth using Tactile Feedback 学习使用触觉反馈来区分布料层 Robotic manipulation of cloth has applications ranging from fabrics manufacturing to handling blankets and laundry. Cloth manipulation is challenging for robots largely due to their high degrees of freedom, complex dynamics, and severe self-occlusions when in folded or crumpled configurations. Prior work on robotic manipulation of cloth relies primarily on vision sensors alone, which may pose challenges for fine-grained manipulation tasks such as grasping a desired number of cloth layers from a stack of cloth. In this paper, we propose to use tactile sensing for cloth manipulation; we attach a tactile sensor (ReSkin) to one of the two fingertips of a Franka robot and train a classifier to determine whether the robot is grasping a specific number of cloth layers. During test-time experiments, the robot uses this classifier as part of its policy to grasp one or two cloth layers using tactile feedback to determine suitable grasping points. Experimental results over 180 physical trials suggest that the proposed method outperforms baselines that do not use tactile feedback and has better generalization to unseen cloth compared to methods that use image classifiers. Code, data, and videos are available at https://sites.google.com/view/reskin-cloth. 机器人操纵布料的应用范围从织物制造到处理毯子和洗衣。布料操作对于机器人来说是一项挑战，主要是因为它们在折叠或皱褶配置中具有高自由度、复杂的动力学以及严重的自遮挡。先前关于机器人操纵布料的工作主要依赖于单独的视觉传感器，这可能对细粒度操纵任务（例如从一堆布料中抓取所需数量的布料层）构成挑战。在本文中，我们建议使用触觉传感来操纵布料；我们将触觉传感器 (ReSkin) 连接到 Franka 机器人的两个指尖之一，并训练分类器来确定机器人是否抓住了特定数量的布料层。在测试时的实验中，机器人使用该分类器作为其策略的一部分，通过触觉反馈来抓住一层或两层布料，以确定合适的抓取点。超过 180 次物理试验的实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于不使用触觉反馈的基线，并且与使用图像分类器的方法相比，对看不见的布料具有更好的泛化能力。代码、数据和视频可在 https://sites.google.com/view/reskin-cloth 获取。 本文提出利用触觉反馈让机器人学习从布料堆中抓取特定层数的布料。 Sashank Tirumala,Thomas Weng,Daniel Seita,Oliver Kroemer,Zeynep Temel,David Held cs.RO

authors_text: Sangyun Lee,Hyungjin Chung,Jaehyeon Kim,Jong Chul Ye
title: Progressive Deblurring of Diffusion Models for Coarse-to-Fine Image Synthesis
title_zh: 用于从粗到细图像合成的扩散模型的渐进去模糊
abstract: Recently, diffusion models have shown remarkable results in image synthesis by gradually removing noise and amplifying signals. Although the simple generative process surprisingly works well, is this the best way to generate image data? For instance, despite the fact that human perception is more sensitive to the low frequencies of an image, diffusion models themselves do not consider any relative importance of each frequency component. Therefore, to incorporate the inductive bias for image data, we propose a novel generative process that synthesizes images in a coarse-to-fine manner. First, we generalize the standard diffusion models by enabling diffusion in a rotated coordinate system with different velocities for each component of the vector. We further propose a blur diffusion as a special case, where each frequency component of an image is diffused at different speeds. Specifically, the proposed blur diffusion consists of a forward process that blurs an image and adds noise gradually, after which a corresponding reverse process deblurs an image and removes noise progressively. Experiments show that the proposed model outperforms the previous method in FID on LSUN bedroom and church datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/sangyun884/blur-diffusion.
summary: Recently, diffusion models have shown remarkable results in image synthesis by gradually removing noise and amplifying signals. Although the simple generative process surprisingly works well, is this the best way to generate image data? For instance, despite the fact that human perception is more sensitive to the low frequencies of an image, diffusion models themselves do not consider any relative importance of each frequency component. Therefore, to incorporate the inductive bias for image data, we propose a novel generative process that synthesizes images in a coarse-to-fine manner. First, we generalize the standard diffusion models by enabling diffusion in a rotated coordinate system with different velocities for each component of the vector. We further propose a blur diffusion as a special case, where each frequency component of an image is diffused at different speeds. Specifically, the proposed blur diffusion consists of a forward process that blurs an image and adds noise gradually, after which a corresponding reverse process deblurs an image and removes noise progressively. Experiments show that the proposed model outperforms the previous method in FID on LSUN bedroom and church datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/sangyun884/blur-diffusion.
abstract_zh: 最近，扩散模型通过逐渐去除噪声和放大信号在图像合成中显示出显着的效果。尽管简单的生成过程出奇地有效，但这是否是生成图像数据的最佳方式？例如，尽管人类感知对图像的低频更为敏感，但扩散模型本身并不考虑每个频率分量的相对重要性。因此，为了结合图像数据的归纳偏差，我们提出了一种新颖的生成过程，以从粗到细的方式合成图像。首先，我们通过在旋转坐标系中启用向量每个分量具有不同速度的扩散来推广标准扩散模型。我们进一步提出模糊扩散作为一种特殊情况，其中图像的每个频率分量以不同的速度扩散。具体来说，所提出的模糊扩散包括一个使图像模糊并逐渐添加噪声的前向过程，之后相应的反向过程使图像去模糊并逐渐去除噪声。实验表明，所提出的模型在 LSUN 卧室和教堂数据集上优于之前的 FID 方法。代码可在 https://github.com/sangyun884/blur-diffusion 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过渐进去模糊的扩散模型，以粗到细的方式生成图像，改进传统扩散模型在图像合成中的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管扩散模型在图像生成中表现出色，但其未考虑图像频率成分的重要性差异，而人类感知对低频更敏感。因此需引入归纳偏置以优化生成过程。
AI.method: 通过旋转坐标系中不同速度的扩散过程，提出模糊扩散模型。前向过程逐步模糊图像并添加噪声，反向过程逐步去模糊并去除噪声，实现频率成分的差异化处理。
AI.result: 在LSUN卧室和教堂数据集上，该模型在FID指标上优于先前方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过考虑图像频率成分的差异性，渐进式去模糊扩散模型能有效提升图像合成质量。

authors_text: Banafshe Felfeliyan,Abhilash Hareendranathan,Gregor Kuntze,David Cornell,Nils D. Forkert,Jacob L. Jaremko,Janet L. Ronsky
title: Self-Supervised-RCNN for Medical Image Segmentation with Limited Data Annotation
title_zh: 用于具有有限数据注释的医学图像分割的自监督 RCNN
abstract: Many successful methods developed for medical image analysis that are based on machine learning use supervised learning approaches, which often require large datasets annotated by experts to achieve high accuracy. However, medical data annotation is time-consuming and expensive, especially for segmentation tasks. To solve the problem of learning with limited labeled medical image data, an alternative deep learning training strategy based on self-supervised pretraining on unlabeled MRI scans is proposed in this work. Our pretraining approach first, randomly applies different distortions to random areas of unlabeled images and then predicts the type of distortions and loss of information. To this aim, an improved version of Mask-RCNN architecture has been adapted to localize the distortion location and recover the original image pixels. The effectiveness of the proposed method for segmentation tasks in different pre-training and fine-tuning scenarios is evaluated based on the Osteoarthritis Initiative dataset. Using this self-supervised pretraining method improved the Dice score by 20% compared to training from scratch. The proposed self-supervised learning is simple, effective, and suitable for different ranges of medical image analysis tasks including anomaly detection, segmentation, and classification.
summary: Many successful methods developed for medical image analysis that are based on machine learning use supervised learning approaches, which often require large datasets annotated by experts to achieve high accuracy. However, medical data annotation is time-consuming and expensive, especially for segmentation tasks. To solve the problem of learning with limited labeled medical image data, an alternative deep learning training strategy based on self-supervised pretraining on unlabeled MRI scans is proposed in this work. Our pretraining approach first, randomly applies different distortions to random areas of unlabeled images and then predicts the type of distortions and loss of information. To this aim, an improved version of Mask-RCNN architecture has been adapted to localize the distortion location and recover the original image pixels. The effectiveness of the proposed method for segmentation tasks in different pre-training and fine-tuning scenarios is evaluated based on the Osteoarthritis Initiative dataset. Using this self-supervised pretraining method improved the Dice score by 20% compared to training from scratch. The proposed self-supervised learning is simple, effective, and suitable for different ranges of medical image analysis tasks including anomaly detection, segmentation, and classification.
abstract_zh: 许多基于机器学习的医学图像分析成功方法都使用监督学习方法，这通常需要由专家注释的大型数据集才能实现高精度。然而，医学数据注释既耗时又昂贵，尤其是对于分割任务。为了解决有限标记医学图像数据的学习问题，本文提出了一种基于对未标记 MRI 扫描进行自监督预训练的替代深度学习训练策略。我们的预训练方法首先将不同的扭曲随机应用于未标记图像的随机区域，然后预测扭曲的类型和信息丢失。为此，采用了 Mask-RCNN 架构的改进版本来定位失真位置并恢复原始图像像素。基于骨关节炎倡议数据集评估了所提出的方法在不同预训练和微调场景中分割任务的有效性。与从头开始训练相比，使用这种自我监督的预训练方法将 Dice 分数提高了 20%。所提出的自监督学习简单、有效，适用于不同范围的医学图像分析任务，包括异常检测、分割和分类。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于自监督预训练的改进RCNN方法，解决医学图像分割中数据标注有限的问题。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分析通常需要大量标注数据，但标注过程耗时昂贵，尤其在分割任务中，因此需要更高效的数据利用方法。
AI.method: 通过在未标注图像上随机应用失真并预测其类型及信息损失，改进Mask-RCNN架构以定位失真区域并恢复像素，实现自监督预训练。
AI.result: 在Osteoarthritis Initiative数据集上，自监督预训练方法使Dice分数相比从头训练提升了20%。
AI.conclusion: 该自监督学习方法简单有效，适用于医学图像的分割、分类及异常检测等多种任务。

ai_content.result: 在Osteoarthritis Initiative数据集上，自监督预训练方法使Dice分数相比从头训练提升了20%。

authors_text: Leon Feng,Jnana Senapati,Bill Liu
title: TaDaa: real time Ticket Assignment Deep learning Auto Advisor for customer support, help desk, and issue ticketing systems
title_zh: TaDaa：实时工单分配深度学习自动顾问，用于客户支持、帮助台和问题工单系统
abstract: This paper proposes TaDaa: Ticket Assignment Deep learning Auto Advisor, which leverages the latest Transformers models and machine learning techniques quickly assign issues within an organization, like customer support, help desk and alike issue ticketing systems. The project provides functionality to 1) assign an issue to the correct group, 2) assign an issue to the best resolver, and 3) provide the most relevant previously solved tickets to resolvers. We leverage one ticketing system sample dataset, with over 3k+ groups and over 10k+ resolvers to obtain a 95.2% top 3 accuracy on group suggestions and a 79.0% top 5 accuracy on resolver suggestions. We hope this research will greatly improve average issue resolution time on customer support, help desk, and issue ticketing systems.
summary: This paper proposes TaDaa: Ticket Assignment Deep learning Auto Advisor, which leverages the latest Transformers models and machine learning techniques quickly assign issues within an organization, like customer support, help desk and alike issue ticketing systems. The project provides functionality to 1) assign an issue to the correct group, 2) assign an issue to the best resolver, and 3) provide the most relevant previously solved tickets to resolvers. We leverage one ticketing system sample dataset, with over 3k+ groups and over 10k+ resolvers to obtain a 95.2% top 3 accuracy on group suggestions and a 79.0% top 5 accuracy on resolver suggestions. We hope this research will greatly improve average issue resolution time on customer support, help desk, and issue ticketing systems.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 TaDaa：工单分配深度学习自动顾问，它利用最新的 Transformers 模型和机器学习技术快速分配组织内的问题，例如客户支持、帮助台和类似的问题工单系统。该项目提供以下功能：1）将问题分配给正确的组，2）将问题分配给最佳解决者，3）向解决者提供最相关的先前解决的票证。我们利用一个票务系统样本数据集，其中包含超过 3k+ 组和超过 10k+ 解析器，在组建议上获得 95.2% 的前 3 名准确率，在解析器建议上获得 79.0% 的前 5 名准确率。我们希望这项研究将大大缩短客户支持、帮助台和问题票务系统的平均问题解决时间。

AI.result: 在测试中实现分组建议Top3准确率95.2%，解决者建议Top5准确率79.0%
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过智能分配算法显著提升工单系统的问题解决效率，为客服领域提供有效技术方案

search_text: TaDaa: real time Ticket Assignment Deep learning Auto Advisor for customer support, help desk, and issue ticketing systems TaDaa：实时工单分配深度学习自动顾问，用于客户支持、帮助台和问题工单系统 This paper proposes TaDaa: Ticket Assignment Deep learning Auto Advisor, which leverages the latest Transformers models and machine learning techniques quickly assign issues within an organization, like customer support, help desk and alike issue ticketing systems. The project provides functionality to 1) assign an issue to the correct group, 2) assign an issue to the best resolver, and 3) provide the most relevant previously solved tickets to resolvers. We leverage one ticketing system sample dataset, with over 3k+ groups and over 10k+ resolvers to obtain a 95.2% top 3 accuracy on group suggestions and a 79.0% top 5 accuracy on resolver suggestions. authors_text: Akshay Iyer,Linh Nguyen,Shweta Khushu
title: Learning to identify cracks on wind turbine blade surfaces using drone-based inspection images
title_zh: 学习使用基于无人机的检查图像识别风力涡轮机叶片表面的裂纹
comment: NeurIPS 2021 Workshop on Tackling Climate Change with Machine Learning
comments: NeurIPS 2021 Workshop on Tackling Climate Change with Machine Learning
abstract: Wind energy is expected to be one of the leading ways to achieve the goals of the Paris Agreement but it in turn heavily depends on effective management of its operations and maintenance (O&M) costs. Blade failures account for one-third of all O&M costs thus making accurate detection of blade damages, especially cracks, very important for sustained operations and cost savings. Traditionally, damage inspection has been a completely manual process thus making it subjective, error-prone, and time-consuming. Hence in this work, we bring more objectivity, scalability, and repeatability in our damage inspection process, using deep learning, to miss fewer cracks. We build a deep learning model trained on a large dataset of blade damages, collected by our drone-based inspection, to correctly detect cracks. Our model is already in production and has processed more than a million damages with a recall of 0.96. We also focus on model interpretability using class activation maps to get a peek into the model workings. The model not only performs as good as human experts but also better in certain tricky cases. Thus, in this work, we aim to increase wind energy adoption by decreasing one of its major hurdles - the O\&M costs resulting from missing blade failures like cracks.
summary: Wind energy is expected to be one of the leading ways to achieve the goals of the Paris Agreement but it in turn heavily depends on effective management of its operations and maintenance (O&M) costs. Blade failures account for one-third of all O&M costs thus making accurate detection of blade damages, especially cracks, very important for sustained operations and cost savings. Traditionally, damage inspection has been a completely manual process thus making it subjective, error-prone, and time-consuming. Hence in this work, we bring more objectivity, scalability, and repeatability in our damage inspection process, using deep learning, to miss fewer cracks. We build a deep learning model trained on a large dataset of blade damages, collected by our drone-based inspection, to correctly detect cracks. Our model is already in production and has processed more than a million damages with a recall of 0.96. We also focus on model interpretability using class activation maps to get a peek into the model workings. The model not only performs as good as human experts but also better in certain tricky cases. Thus, in this work, we aim to increase wind energy adoption by decreasing one of its major hurdles - the O\&M costs resulting from missing blade failures like cracks.
abstract_zh: 风能预计将成为实现《巴黎协定》目标的主要方式之一，但它反过来在很大程度上取决于对其运营和维护（O&M）成本的有效管理。叶片故障占所有运维成本的三分之一，因此准确检测叶片损坏（尤其是裂纹）对于持续运营和节省成本非常重要。传统上，损坏检查是一个完全手动的过程，因此非常主观、容易出错且耗时。因此，在这项工作中，我们利用深度学习，在损伤检查过程中带来了更多的客观性、可扩展性和可重复性，以减少遗漏的裂纹。我们建立了一个深度学习模型，对通过无人机检查收集的大型叶片损坏数据集进行训练，以正确检测裂缝。我们的型号已投入生产，并已处理超过 100 万次损坏，召回率为 0.96。我们还关注模型的可解释性，使用类激活图来了解模型的工作原理。该模型不仅表现得与人类专家一样好，而且在某些棘手的情况下也表现得更好。因此，在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过减少风能的主要障碍之一来提高风能的采用，即因叶片缺失故障（如裂纹）而导致的运维成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于无人机图像的深度学习模型，用于自动检测风力涡轮机叶片表面的裂纹。
AI.motivation: 风力涡轮机叶片故障占运维成本的三分之一，传统人工检测存在主观性高、效率低的问题，亟需客观且可扩展的自动化检测方法。
AI.method: 构建深度学习模型，利用无人机采集的叶片损伤图像进行训练，并通过类别激活映射（CAM）提升模型可解释性。
AI.result: 模型已投入生产，处理超百万级损伤数据，召回率达96%，在复杂案例中表现优于人类专家。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过提升裂纹检测准确性，有效降低运维成本，助力风能产业规模化发展。

authors_text: Shuang Wu,Wenjie Pei,Dianwen Mei,Fanglin Chen,Jiandong Tian,Guangming Lu
title: Multi-Faceted Distillation of Base-Novel Commonality for Few-shot Object Detection
title_zh: 用于小样本目标检测的基础小说共性的多方面蒸馏
abstract: Most of existing methods for few-shot object detection follow the fine-tuning paradigm, which potentially assumes that the class-agnostic generalizable knowledge can be learned and transferred implicitly from base classes with abundant samples to novel classes with limited samples via such a two-stage training strategy. However, it is not necessarily true since the object detector can hardly distinguish between class-agnostic knowledge and class-specific knowledge automatically without explicit modeling. In this work we propose to learn three types of class-agnostic commonalities between base and novel classes explicitly: recognition-related semantic commonalities, localization-related semantic commonalities and distribution commonalities. We design a unified distillation framework based on a memory bank, which is able to perform distillation of all three types of commonalities jointly and efficiently. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method can be readily integrated into most of existing fine-tuning based methods and consistently improve the performance by a large margin.
summary: Most of existing methods for few-shot object detection follow the fine-tuning paradigm, which potentially assumes that the class-agnostic generalizable knowledge can be learned and transferred implicitly from base classes with abundant samples to novel classes with limited samples via such a two-stage training strategy. However, it is not necessarily true since the object detector can hardly distinguish between class-agnostic knowledge and class-specific knowledge automatically without explicit modeling. In this work we propose to learn three types of class-agnostic commonalities between base and novel classes explicitly: recognition-related semantic commonalities, localization-related semantic commonalities and distribution commonalities. We design a unified distillation framework based on a memory bank, which is able to perform distillation of all three types of commonalities jointly and efficiently. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method can be readily integrated into most of existing fine-tuning based methods and consistently improve the performance by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的少样本目标检测方法都遵循微调范式，该范式潜在地假设可以通过这样的两阶段训练策略来学习和隐式地从具有丰富样本的基类到具有有限样本的新类学习和转移与类无关的泛化知识。然而，这不一定是真的，因为在没有显式建模的情况下，对象检测器很难自动区分类别不可知的知识和类别特定的知识。在这项工作中，我们建议明确学习基础类和新类之间的三种与类无关的共性：与识别相关的语义共性、与本地化相关的语义共性和分布共性。我们设计了一个基于内存库的统一蒸馏框架，它能够联合有效地对所有三种类型的共性进行蒸馏。大量的实验表明，我们的方法可以很容易地集成到大多数现有的基于微调的方法中，并持续大幅提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多方面知识蒸馏框架，通过显式学习基础类与新类之间的类别无关共性，提升少样本目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本检测方法依赖微调策略，但难以自动区分类别无关知识与类别特定知识，导致知识迁移效率低下。
AI.method: 设计基于记忆库的统一蒸馏框架，显式学习识别语义、定位语义和分布三种类别无关共性，并联合蒸馏这三类知识。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法可无缝集成到主流微调框架中，在多个基准数据集上显著提升少样本检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模类别无关共性能够有效提升少样本检测性能，为知识迁移提供了新的研究方向。

method: 设计基于记忆库的统一蒸馏框架，显式学习识别语义、定位语义和分布三种类别无关共性，并联合蒸馏这三类知识。
result: 实验表明该方法可无缝集成到主流微调框架中，在多个基准数据集上显著提升少样本检测准确率。
conclusion: 显式建模类别无关共性能够有效提升少样本检测性能，为知识迁移提供了新的研究方向。
search_text: Multi-Faceted Distillation of Base-Novel Commonality for Few-shot Object Detection 用于小样本目标检测的基础小说共性的多方面蒸馏 Most of existing methods for few-shot object detection follow the fine-tuning paradigm, which potentially assumes that the class-agnostic generalizable knowledge can be learned and transferred implicitly from base classes with abundant samples to novel classes with limited samples via such a two-stage training strategy. However, it is not necessarily true since the object detector can hardly distinguish between class-agnostic knowledge and class-specific knowledge automatically without explicit modeling. In this work we propose to learn three types of class-agnostic commonalities between base and novel classes explicitly: recognition-related semantic commonalities, localization-related semantic commonalities and distribution commonalities. We design a unified distillation framework based on a memory bank, which is able to perform distillation of all three types of commonalities jointly and efficiently. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method can be readily integrated into most of existing fine-tuning based methods and consistently improve the performance by a large margin. 大多数现有的少样本目标检测方法都遵循微调范式，该范式潜在地假设可以通过这样的两阶段训练策略来学习和隐式地从具有丰富样本的基类到具有有限样本的新类学习和转移与类无关的泛化知识。然而，这不一定是真的，因为在没有显式建模的情况下，对象检测器很难自动区分类别不可知的知识和类别特定的知识。在这项工作中，我们建议明确学习基础类和新类之间的三种与类无关的共性：与识别相关的语义共性、与本地化相关的语义共性和分布共性。我们设计了一个基于内存库的统一蒸馏框架，它能够联合有效地对所有三种类型的共性进行蒸馏。大量的实验表明，我们的方法可以很容易地集成到大多数现有的基于微调的方法中，并持续大幅提高性能。 本文提出一种多方面知识蒸馏框架，通过显式学习基础类与新类之间的类别无关共性，提升少样本目标检测性能。 Shuang Wu,Wenjie Pei,Dianwen Mei,Fanglin Chen,Jiandong Tian,Guangming Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Rem Yang,Jacob Laurel,Sasa Misailovic,Gagandeep Singh
title: Provable Defense Against Geometric Transformations
title_zh: 针对几何变换的可证明的防御
abstract: Geometric image transformations that arise in the real world, such as scaling and rotation, have been shown to easily deceive deep neural networks (DNNs). Hence, training DNNs to be certifiably robust to these perturbations is critical. However, no prior work has been able to incorporate the objective of deterministic certified robustness against geometric transformations into the training procedure, as existing verifiers are exceedingly slow. To address these challenges, we propose the first provable defense for deterministic certified geometric robustness. Our framework leverages a novel GPU-optimized verifier that can certify images between 60$\times$ to 42,600$\times$ faster than existing geometric robustness verifiers, and thus unlike existing works, is fast enough for use in training. Across multiple datasets, our results show that networks trained via our framework consistently achieve state-of-the-art deterministic certified geometric robustness and clean accuracy. Furthermore, for the first time, we verify the geometric robustness of a neural network for the challenging, real-world setting of autonomous driving.
summary: Geometric image transformations that arise in the real world, such as scaling and rotation, have been shown to easily deceive deep neural networks (DNNs). Hence, training DNNs to be certifiably robust to these perturbations is critical. However, no prior work has been able to incorporate the objective of deterministic certified robustness against geometric transformations into the training procedure, as existing verifiers are exceedingly slow. To address these challenges, we propose the first provable defense for deterministic certified geometric robustness. Our framework leverages a novel GPU-optimized verifier that can certify images between 60$\times$ to 42,600$\times$ faster than existing geometric robustness verifiers, and thus unlike existing works, is fast enough for use in training. Across multiple datasets, our results show that networks trained via our framework consistently achieve state-of-the-art deterministic certified geometric robustness and clean accuracy. Furthermore, for the first time, we verify the geometric robustness of a neural network for the challenging, real-world setting of autonomous driving.
abstract_zh: 现实世界中出现的几何图像变换（例如缩放和旋转）已被证明很容易欺骗深度神经网络（DNN）。因此，训练 DNN 使其对这些扰动具有鲁棒性至关重要。然而，之前的工作还没有能够将针对几何变换的确定性认证鲁棒性的目标纳入训练过程，因为现有的验证器速度非常慢。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了第一个可证明的确定性认证几何稳健性防御。我们的框架利用一种新颖的 GPU 优化验证器，可以比现有的几何鲁棒性验证器快 60$\times$ 到 42,600$\times$ 之间的图像验证速度，因此与现有的工作不同，它足够快用于训练。在多个数据集中，我们的结果表明，通过我们的框架训练的网络始终实现最先进的确定性认证的几何鲁棒性和干净的准确性。此外，我们首次验证了神经网络在具有挑战性的自动驾驶现实环境中的几何鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可证明的防御方法，用于提升深度神经网络对几何变换的确定性认证鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的几何变换（如缩放、旋转）容易欺骗深度神经网络（DNN），但现有方法因验证器速度过慢无法在训练中实现确定性鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计了一种新型GPU优化验证器，相比现有方法加速60至42,600倍，从而支持训练过程中几何鲁棒性的认证。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，该框架训练的网络在确定性几何鲁棒性和干净图像准确率方面均达到最先进水平，并首次验证了自动驾驶等真实场景下的几何鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次提供了适用于训练的可证明几何防御框架，并在自动驾驶等实际场景中验证了其有效性。

authors_text: Michael Kölle,Lennart Rietdorf,Kyrill Schmid
title: Decentralized scheduling through an adaptive, trading-based multi-agent system
title_zh: 通过基于交易的自适应多代理系统进行去中心化调度
abstract: In multi-agent reinforcement learning systems, the actions of one agent can have a negative impact on the rewards of other agents. One way to combat this problem is to let agents trade their rewards amongst each other. Motivated by this, this work applies a trading approach to a simulated scheduling environment, where the agents are responsible for the assignment of incoming jobs to compute cores. In this environment, reinforcement learning agents learn to trade successfully. The agents can trade the usage right of computational cores to process high-priority, high-reward jobs faster than low-priority, low-reward jobs. However, due to combinatorial effects, the action and observation spaces of a simple reinforcement learning agent in this environment scale exponentially with key parameters of the problem size. However, the exponential scaling behavior can be transformed into a linear one if the agent is split into several independent sub-units. We further improve this distributed architecture using agent-internal parameter sharing. Moreover, it can be extended to set the exchange prices autonomously. We show that in our scheduling environment, the advantages of a distributed agent architecture clearly outweigh more aggregated approaches. We demonstrate that the distributed agent architecture becomes even more performant using agent-internal parameter sharing. Finally, we investigate how two different reward functions affect autonomous pricing and the corresponding scheduling.
summary: In multi-agent reinforcement learning systems, the actions of one agent can have a negative impact on the rewards of other agents. One way to combat this problem is to let agents trade their rewards amongst each other. Motivated by this, this work applies a trading approach to a simulated scheduling environment, where the agents are responsible for the assignment of incoming jobs to compute cores. In this environment, reinforcement learning agents learn to trade successfully. The agents can trade the usage right of computational cores to process high-priority, high-reward jobs faster than low-priority, low-reward jobs. However, due to combinatorial effects, the action and observation spaces of a simple reinforcement learning agent in this environment scale exponentially with key parameters of the problem size. However, the exponential scaling behavior can be transformed into a linear one if the agent is split into several independent sub-units. We further improve this distributed architecture using agent-internal parameter sharing. Moreover, it can be extended to set the exchange prices autonomously. We show that in our scheduling environment, the advantages of a distributed agent architecture clearly outweigh more aggregated approaches. We demonstrate that the distributed agent architecture becomes even more performant using agent-internal parameter sharing. Finally, we investigate how two different reward functions affect autonomous pricing and the corresponding scheduling.
abstract_zh: 在多智能体强化学习系统中，一个智能体的行为可能会对其他智能体的奖励产生负面影响。解决这个问题的一种方法是让代理相互交换奖励。受此启发，这项工作将交易方法应用于模拟调度环境，其中代理负责将传入作业分配给计算核心。在这种环境下，强化学习代理学会成功地进行交易。代理可以交换计算核心的使用权，以比处理低优先级、低回报的作业更快地处理高优先级、高回报的作业。然而，由于组合效应，在这种环境中简单的强化学习代理的动作和观察空间随着问题大小的关键参数呈指数级扩展。然而，如果智能体被分成几个独立的子单元，指数缩放行为可以转化为线性缩放行为。我们使用代理内部参数共享进一步改进了这种分布式架构。此外，它还可以扩展为自主设定交换价格。我们表明，在我们的调度环境中，分布式代理架构的优势明显超过了聚合方法。我们证明，使用代理内部参数共享，分布式代理架构变得更加高效。最后，我们研究两种不同的奖励函数如何影响自主定价和相应的调度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于交易的多智能体系统，用于解决计算核心任务调度中的去中心化问题。
AI.motivation: 在多智能体强化学习中，单个智能体的行为可能损害其他智能体的奖励，通过让智能体间交易奖励可缓解此问题。
AI.method: 设计智能体间交易计算核心使用权的机制，采用分布式子单元架构与内部参数共享，并自主设定交易价格。
AI.result: 分布式架构显著优于集中式方法，参数共享进一步提升性能，不同奖励函数对定价与调度产生显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 去中心化交易机制结合分布式架构能有效优化任务调度，自主定价策略与奖励函数设计是关键因素。

authors_text: Kibok Lee,Hao Yang,Satyaki Chakraborty,Zhaowei Cai,Gurumurthy Swaminathan,Avinash Ravichandran,Onkar Dabeer
title: Rethinking Few-Shot Object Detection on a Multi-Domain Benchmark
title_zh: 重新思考多域基准上的少样本目标检测
abstract: Most existing works on few-shot object detection (FSOD) focus on a setting where both pre-training and few-shot learning datasets are from a similar domain. However, few-shot algorithms are important in multiple domains; hence evaluation needs to reflect the broad applications. We propose a Multi-dOmain Few-Shot Object Detection (MoFSOD) benchmark consisting of 10 datasets from a wide range of domains to evaluate FSOD algorithms. We comprehensively analyze the impacts of freezing layers, different architectures, and different pre-training datasets on FSOD performance. Our empirical results show several key factors that have not been explored in previous works: 1) contrary to previous belief, on a multi-domain benchmark, fine-tuning (FT) is a strong baseline for FSOD, performing on par or better than the state-of-the-art (SOTA) algorithms; 2) utilizing FT as the baseline allows us to explore multiple architectures, and we found them to have a significant impact on down-stream few-shot tasks, even with similar pre-training performances; 3) by decoupling pre-training and few-shot learning, MoFSOD allows us to explore the impact of different pre-training datasets, and the right choice can boost the performance of the down-stream tasks significantly. Based on these findings, we list possible avenues of investigation for improving FSOD performance and propose two simple modifications to existing algorithms that lead to SOTA performance on the MoFSOD benchmark. The code is available at https://github.com/amazon-research/few-shot-object-detection-benchmark.
summary: Most existing works on few-shot object detection (FSOD) focus on a setting where both pre-training and few-shot learning datasets are from a similar domain. However, few-shot algorithms are important in multiple domains; hence evaluation needs to reflect the broad applications. We propose a Multi-dOmain Few-Shot Object Detection (MoFSOD) benchmark consisting of 10 datasets from a wide range of domains to evaluate FSOD algorithms. We comprehensively analyze the impacts of freezing layers, different architectures, and different pre-training datasets on FSOD performance. Our empirical results show several key factors that have not been explored in previous works: 1) contrary to previous belief, on a multi-domain benchmark, fine-tuning (FT) is a strong baseline for FSOD, performing on par or better than the state-of-the-art (SOTA) algorithms; 2) utilizing FT as the baseline allows us to explore multiple architectures, and we found them to have a significant impact on down-stream few-shot tasks, even with similar pre-training performances; 3) by decoupling pre-training and few-shot learning, MoFSOD allows us to explore the impact of different pre-training datasets, and the right choice can boost the performance of the down-stream tasks significantly. Based on these findings, we list possible avenues of investigation for improving FSOD performance and propose two simple modifications to existing algorithms that lead to SOTA performance on the MoFSOD benchmark. The code is available at https://github.com/amazon-research/few-shot-object-detection-benchmark.
abstract_zh: 大多数关于少样本目标检测（FSOD）的现有工作都集中在预训练和少样本学习数据集来自相似领域的设置。然而，少样本算法在多个领域都很重要；因此评估需要反映广泛的应用。我们提出了一个多领域少样本目标检测 (MoFSOD) 基准，由来自广泛领域的 10 个数据集组成，用于评估 FSOD 算法。我们全面分析了冻结层、不同架构和不同预训练数据集对 FSOD 性能的影响。我们的实证结果显示了以前的工作中尚未探讨的几个关键因素：1）与以前的信念相反，在多域基准上，微调（FT）是 FSOD 的强大基线，其性能与最先进的（SOTA）算法相当或更好； 2）利用 FT 作为基线使我们能够探索多种架构，我们发现它们对下游的小样本任务有重大影响，即使具有相似的预训练性能； 3）通过解耦预训练和小样本学习，MoFSOD使我们能够探索不同预训练数据集的影响，正确的选择可以显着提高下游任务的性能。基于这些发现，我们列出了提高 FSOD 性能的可能研究途径，并对现有算法提出了两个简单的修改，以在 MoFSOD 基准上实现 SOTA 性能。该代码可从 https://github.com/amazon-research/few-shot-object-detection-benchmark 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个多领域少样本目标检测基准（MoFSOD），包含10个不同领域的数据集，并分析了冻结层、架构和预训练数据集对少样本检测性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本目标检测（FSOD）研究多局限于单一领域，缺乏跨领域评估，而实际应用需要更广泛的适用性。
AI.method: 构建涵盖10个领域的MoFSOD基准，通过实验分析冻结层策略、不同模型架构及预训练数据集的影响，并探索微调（FT）作为基线的有效性。
AI.result: 发现微调在多领域基准中表现优于或等于SOTA算法；不同架构对下游任务影响显著；选择合适的预训练数据集可大幅提升性能，并提出两种改进方法达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 多领域基准揭示了预训练数据集和模型架构的关键作用，为提升FSOD性能提供了新方向，所提方法在MoFSOD上取得领先效果。
