authors_text: Bryan Zhu,Nicholas Lui,Jeremy Irvin,Jimmy Le,Sahil Tadwalkar,Chenghao Wang,Zutao Ouyang,Frankie Y. Liu,Andrew Y. Ng,Robert B. Jackson
title: METER-ML: A Multi-Sensor Earth Observation Benchmark for Automated Methane Source Mapping
title_zh: METER-ML：自动甲烷源绘图的多传感器地球观测基准
comment: Workshop on Complex Data Challenges in Earth Observation at IJCAI-ECAI 2022
comments: Workshop on Complex Data Challenges in Earth Observation at IJCAI-ECAI 2022
abstract: Reducing methane emissions is essential for mitigating global warming. To attribute methane emissions to their sources, a comprehensive dataset of methane source infrastructure is necessary. Recent advancements with deep learning on remotely sensed imagery have the potential to identify the locations and characteristics of methane sources, but there is a substantial lack of publicly available data to enable machine learning researchers and practitioners to build automated mapping approaches. To help fill this gap, we construct a multi-sensor dataset called METER-ML containing 86,599 georeferenced NAIP, Sentinel-1, and Sentinel-2 images in the U.S. labeled for the presence or absence of methane source facilities including concentrated animal feeding operations, coal mines, landfills, natural gas processing plants, oil refineries and petroleum terminals, and wastewater treatment plants. We experiment with a variety of models that leverage different spatial resolutions, spatial footprints, image products, and spectral bands. We find that our best model achieves an area under the precision recall curve of 0.915 for identifying concentrated animal feeding operations and 0.821 for oil refineries and petroleum terminals on an expert-labeled test set, suggesting the potential for large-scale mapping. We make METER-ML freely available at https://stanfordmlgroup.github.io/projects/meter-ml/ to support future work on automated methane source mapping.
summary: Reducing methane emissions is essential for mitigating global warming. To attribute methane emissions to their sources, a comprehensive dataset of methane source infrastructure is necessary. Recent advancements with deep learning on remotely sensed imagery have the potential to identify the locations and characteristics of methane sources, but there is a substantial lack of publicly available data to enable machine learning researchers and practitioners to build automated mapping approaches. To help fill this gap, we construct a multi-sensor dataset called METER-ML containing 86,599 georeferenced NAIP, Sentinel-1, and Sentinel-2 images in the U.S. labeled for the presence or absence of methane source facilities including concentrated animal feeding operations, coal mines, landfills, natural gas processing plants, oil refineries and petroleum terminals, and wastewater treatment plants. We experiment with a variety of models that leverage different spatial resolutions, spatial footprints, image products, and spectral bands. We find that our best model achieves an area under the precision recall curve of 0.915 for identifying concentrated animal feeding operations and 0.821 for oil refineries and petroleum terminals on an expert-labeled test set, suggesting the potential for large-scale mapping. We make METER-ML freely available at https://stanfordmlgroup.github.io/projects/meter-ml/ to support future work on automated methane source mapping.
abstract_zh: 减少甲烷排放对于缓解全球变暖至关重要。为了将甲烷排放归因于其来源，需要甲烷源基础设施的综合数据集。遥感图像深度学习的最新进展有可能识别甲烷源的位置和特征，但严重缺乏公开数据来使机器学习研究人员和从业者能够构建自动绘图方法。为了帮助填补这一空白，我们构建了一个名为 METER-ML 的多传感器数据集，其中包含美国的 86,599 个地理参考 NAIP、Sentinel-1 和 Sentinel-2 图像，标记是否存在甲烷源设施，包括集中动物饲养场、煤矿、垃圾填埋场、天然气加工厂、炼油厂和石油码头以及废水处理厂。我们尝试了各种利用不同空间分辨率、空间足迹、图像产品和光谱带的模型。我们发现，在专家标记的测试集上，我们的最佳模型在识别集中动物饲养操作时达到了 0.915 的精确召回曲线下面积，在炼油厂和石油码头上达到了 0.821 的精确召回曲线下面积，这表明了大规模绘图的潜力。我们在 https://stanfordmlgroup.github.io/projects/meter-ml/ 免费提供 METER-ML，以支持未来自动甲烷源绘图的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个多传感器地球观测基准数据集METER-ML，用于自动化甲烷源映射。
AI.motivation: 甲烷减排对缓解全球变暖至关重要，但缺乏公开数据阻碍了机器学习研究者开发自动化甲烷源识别方法。
AI.method: 整合86,599张美国地理定位的NAIP、Sentinel-1和Sentinel-2影像，标注集中饲养场、煤矿等甲烷源设施，并测试多种模型在不同空间分辨率和光谱波段下的性能。
AI.result: 最佳模型在专家标注测试集上达到0.915（集中饲养场）和0.821（炼油厂）的AUPRC指标，数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: METER-ML为大规模甲烷源自动化测绘提供了基础，可支持未来相关研究。

authors_text: Chen Feng,Ioannis Patras
title: Adaptive Soft Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 自适应软对比学习
abstract: Self-supervised learning has recently achieved great success in representation learning without human annotations. The dominant method -- that is contrastive learning, is generally based on instance discrimination tasks, i.e., individual samples are treated as independent categories. However, presuming all the samples are different contradicts the natural grouping of similar samples in common visual datasets, e.g., multiple views of the same dog. To bridge the gap, this paper proposes an adaptive method that introduces soft inter-sample relations, namely Adaptive Soft Contrastive Learning (ASCL). More specifically, ASCL transforms the original instance discrimination task into a multi-instance soft discrimination task, and adaptively introduces inter-sample relations. As an effective and concise plug-in module for existing self-supervised learning frameworks, ASCL achieves the best performance on several benchmarks in terms of both performance and efficiency. Code is available at https://github.com/MrChenFeng/ASCL_ICPR2022.
summary: Self-supervised learning has recently achieved great success in representation learning without human annotations. The dominant method -- that is contrastive learning, is generally based on instance discrimination tasks, i.e., individual samples are treated as independent categories. However, presuming all the samples are different contradicts the natural grouping of similar samples in common visual datasets, e.g., multiple views of the same dog. To bridge the gap, this paper proposes an adaptive method that introduces soft inter-sample relations, namely Adaptive Soft Contrastive Learning (ASCL). More specifically, ASCL transforms the original instance discrimination task into a multi-instance soft discrimination task, and adaptively introduces inter-sample relations. As an effective and concise plug-in module for existing self-supervised learning frameworks, ASCL achieves the best performance on several benchmarks in terms of both performance and efficiency. Code is available at https://github.com/MrChenFeng/ASCL_ICPR2022.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习最近在无需人工注释的表示学习方面取得了巨大成功。主导方法——对比学习，通常基于实例区分任务，即单个样本被视为独立类别。然而，假设所有样本都不同与常见视觉数据集中相似样本的自然分组相矛盾，例如同一只狗的多个视图。为了弥补这一差距，本文提出了一种引入软样本间关系的自适应方法，即自适应软对比学习（ASCL）。更具体地说，ASCL将原始实例判别任务转变为多实例软判别任务，并自适应地引入样本间关系。作为现有自监督学习框架的有效且简洁的插件模块，ASCL 在性能和效率方面在多个基准测试中均取得了最佳性能。代码可在 https://github.com/MrChenFeng/ASCL_ICPR2022 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出自适应软对比学习方法，改进自监督学习中的实例区分任务，以适应视觉数据集中相似样本的自然分组。
AI.motivation: 传统对比学习假设所有样本独立，但实际数据中存在相似样本的自然分组，导致方法效果受限，需改进以适应这种结构。
AI.method: 通过引入软样本间关系，将实例区分任务转化为多实例软区分任务，自适应调整样本关系，作为现有框架的插件模块。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中取得最佳性能和效率，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: ASCL有效解决了传统对比学习的局限性，提升了自监督学习的性能和效率。

search_text: Adaptive Soft Contrastive Learning 自适应软对比学习 Self-supervised learning has recently achieved great success in representation learning without human annotations. The dominant method -- that is contrastive learning, is generally based on instance discrimination tasks, i.e., individual samples are treated as independent categories. However, presuming all the samples are different contradicts the natural grouping of similar samples in common visual datasets, e.g., multiple views of the same dog. To bridge the gap, this paper proposes an adaptive method that introduces soft inter-sample relations, namely Adaptive Soft Contrastive Learning (ASCL). More specifically, ASCL transforms the original instance discrimination task into a multi-instance soft discrimination task, and adaptively introduces inter-sample relations. As an effective and concise plug-in module for existing self-supervised learning frameworks, ASCL achieves the best performance on several benchmarks in terms of both performance and efficiency. Code is available at https://github.com/MrChenFeng/ASCL_ICPR2022. 自监督学习最近在无需人工注释的表示学习方面取得了巨大成功。主导方法——对比学习，通常基于实例区分任务，即单个样本被视为独立类别。然而，假设所有样本都不同与常见视觉数据集中相似样本的自然分组相矛盾，例如同一只狗的多个视图。为了弥补这一差距，本文提出了一种引入软样本间关系的自适应方法，即自适应软对比学习（ASCL）。更具体地说，ASCL将原始实例判别任务转变为多实例软判别任务，并自适应地引入样本间关系。作为现有自监督学习框架的有效且简洁的插件模块，ASCL 在性能和效率方面在多个基准测试中均取得了最佳性能。代码可在 https://github.com/MrChenFeng/ASCL_ICPR2022 获取。 提出自适应软对比学习方法，改进自监督学习中的实例区分任务，以适应视觉数据集中相似样本的自然分组。 Chen Feng,Ioannis Patras cs.CV

authors_text: Huang Bojun
title: Lagrangian Method for Q-Function Learning (with Applications to Machine Translation)
title_zh: Q 函数学习的拉格朗日方法（及其在机器翻译中的应用）
abstract: This paper discusses a new approach to the fundamental problem of learning optimal Q-functions. In this approach, optimal Q-functions are formulated as saddle points of a nonlinear Lagrangian function derived from the classic Bellman optimality equation. The paper shows that the Lagrangian enjoys strong duality, in spite of its nonlinearity, which paves the way to a general Lagrangian method to Q-function learning. As a demonstration, the paper develops an imitation learning algorithm based on the duality theory, and applies the algorithm to a state-of-the-art machine translation benchmark. The paper then turns to demonstrate a symmetry breaking phenomenon regarding the optimality of the Lagrangian saddle points, which justifies a largely overlooked direction in developing the Lagrangian method.
summary: This paper discusses a new approach to the fundamental problem of learning optimal Q-functions. In this approach, optimal Q-functions are formulated as saddle points of a nonlinear Lagrangian function derived from the classic Bellman optimality equation. The paper shows that the Lagrangian enjoys strong duality, in spite of its nonlinearity, which paves the way to a general Lagrangian method to Q-function learning. As a demonstration, the paper develops an imitation learning algorithm based on the duality theory, and applies the algorithm to a state-of-the-art machine translation benchmark. The paper then turns to demonstrate a symmetry breaking phenomenon regarding the optimality of the Lagrangian saddle points, which justifies a largely overlooked direction in developing the Lagrangian method.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了一种解决学习最优 Q 函数这一基本问题的新方法。在这种方法中，最优 Q 函数被公式化为从经典贝尔曼最优方程导出的非线性拉格朗日函数的鞍点。该论文表明，尽管拉格朗日函数具有非线性，但它仍具有很强的对偶性，这为 Q 函数学习的通用拉格朗日方法铺平了道路。作为示范，本文开发了一种基于对偶理论的模仿学习算法，并将该算法应用于最先进的机器翻译基准。然后，本文转而证明了关于拉格朗日鞍点最优性的对称破缺现象，这证明了拉格朗日方法发展过程中很大程度上被忽视的方向的合理性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于拉格朗日函数鞍点的Q函数学习方法，并应用于机器翻译
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理Q函数学习中的非线性问题存在局限，需探索利用强对偶性理论的新方法
AI.method: 通过构建非线性拉格朗日函数，利用其强对偶性，开发基于对偶理论的模仿学习算法
AI.result: 算法在机器翻译任务中表现优异，并揭示了鞍点对称性破缺现象
AI.conclusion: 拉格朗日方法为Q函数学习提供新途径，对称性破缺现象为方法发展提供理论依据

authors_text: Piero Bonatti,Gianluca Cima,Domenico Lembo,Lorenzo Marconi,Riccardo Rosati,Luigi Sauro,Domenico Fabio Savo
title: CQE in OWL 2 QL: A "Longest Honeymoon" Approach (extended version)
title_zh: OWL 2 QL 中的 CQE：“最长的蜜月”方法（扩展版）
comment: This paper is the extended version of "P.Bonatti, G.Cima, D.Lembo, L.Marconi, R.Rosati, L.Sauro, and D.F.Savo. Controlled query evaluation in OWL 2 QL: A "Longest Honeymoon" approach" accepted for publication at ISWC 2022
comments: This paper is the extended version of "P.Bonatti, G.Cima, D.Lembo, L.Marconi, R.Rosati, L.Sauro, and D.F.Savo. Controlled query evaluation in OWL 2 QL: A "Longest Honeymoon" approach" accepted for publication at ISWC 2022
abstract: Controlled Query Evaluation (CQE) has been recently studied in the context of Semantic Web ontologies. The goal of CQE is concealing some query answers so as to prevent external users from inferring confidential information. In general, there exist multiple, mutually incomparable ways of concealing answers, and previous CQE approaches choose in advance which answers are visible and which are not. In this paper, instead, we study a dynamic CQE method, namely, we propose to alter the answer to the current query based on the evaluation of previous ones. We aim at a system that, besides being able to protect confidential data, is maximally cooperative, which intuitively means that it answers affirmatively to as many queries as possible; it achieves this goal by delaying answer modifications as much as possible. We also show that the behavior we get cannot be intensionally simulated through a static approach, independent of query history. Interestingly, for OWL 2 QL ontologies and policy expressed through denials, query evaluation under our semantics is first-order rewritable, and thus in AC0 in data complexity. This paves the way for the development of practical algorithms, which we also preliminarily discuss in the paper.
summary: Controlled Query Evaluation (CQE) has been recently studied in the context of Semantic Web ontologies. The goal of CQE is concealing some query answers so as to prevent external users from inferring confidential information. In general, there exist multiple, mutually incomparable ways of concealing answers, and previous CQE approaches choose in advance which answers are visible and which are not. In this paper, instead, we study a dynamic CQE method, namely, we propose to alter the answer to the current query based on the evaluation of previous ones. We aim at a system that, besides being able to protect confidential data, is maximally cooperative, which intuitively means that it answers affirmatively to as many queries as possible; it achieves this goal by delaying answer modifications as much as possible. We also show that the behavior we get cannot be intensionally simulated through a static approach, independent of query history. Interestingly, for OWL 2 QL ontologies and policy expressed through denials, query evaluation under our semantics is first-order rewritable, and thus in AC0 in data complexity. This paves the way for the development of practical algorithms, which we also preliminarily discuss in the paper.
abstract_zh: 最近在语义网本体的背景下研究了受控查询评估（CQE）。 CQE的目标是隐藏一些查询答案，以防止外部用户推断机密信息。一般来说，存在多种、相互无法比较的隐藏答案的方式，并且之前的 CQE 方法会提前选择哪些答案可见，哪些答案不可见。相反，在本文中，我们研究了一种动态 CQE 方法，即我们建议根据先前查询的评估来更改当前查询的答案。我们的目标是建立一个系统，除了能够保护机密数据之外，还具有最大程度的合作性，这直观地意味着它能够对尽可能多的查询做出肯定的回答；它通过尽可能延迟答案修改来实现这一目标。我们还表明，我们得到的行为无法通过独立于查询历史的静态方法进行深入模拟。有趣的是，对于通过拒绝表达的 OWL 2 QL 本体和策略，我们语义下的查询评估是一阶可重写的，因此数据复杂性在 AC0 中。这为实用算法的开发铺平了道路，我们也在论文中对此进行了初步讨论。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态受控查询评估方法，通过延迟答案修改以最大化系统合作性，同时保护机密数据。
AI.motivation: 传统静态CQE方法预先确定可见答案，无法适应查询历史导致合作性不足，需动态调整以提升系统灵活性。
AI.method: 采用"最长蜜月期"策略，根据历史查询动态调整当前答案，延迟修改直至必要，确保尽可能多的肯定回答。
AI.result: 针对OWL 2 QL本体和否认策略，该方法在数据复杂度下达到AC0效率，且无法通过静态方法模拟其行为。
AI.conclusion: 动态方法在保护隐私与系统合作性间取得平衡，为实际算法开发奠定理论基础。

authors_text: Zhengqi Li,Qianqian Wang,Noah Snavely,Angjoo Kanazawa
title: InfiniteNature-Zero: Learning Perpetual View Generation of Natural Scenes from Single Images
title_zh: InfiniteNature-Zero：学习从单张图像生成自然场景的永久视图
abstract: We present a method for learning to generate unbounded flythrough videos of natural scenes starting from a single view, where this capability is learned from a collection of single photographs, without requiring camera poses or even multiple views of each scene. To achieve this, we propose a novel self-supervised view generation training paradigm, where we sample and rendering virtual camera trajectories, including cyclic ones, allowing our model to learn stable view generation from a collection of single views. At test time, despite never seeing a video during training, our approach can take a single image and generate long camera trajectories comprised of hundreds of new views with realistic and diverse content. We compare our approach with recent state-of-the-art supervised view generation methods that require posed multi-view videos and demonstrate superior performance and synthesis quality.
summary: We present a method for learning to generate unbounded flythrough videos of natural scenes starting from a single view, where this capability is learned from a collection of single photographs, without requiring camera poses or even multiple views of each scene. To achieve this, we propose a novel self-supervised view generation training paradigm, where we sample and rendering virtual camera trajectories, including cyclic ones, allowing our model to learn stable view generation from a collection of single views. At test time, despite never seeing a video during training, our approach can take a single image and generate long camera trajectories comprised of hundreds of new views with realistic and diverse content. We compare our approach with recent state-of-the-art supervised view generation methods that require posed multi-view videos and demonstrate superior performance and synthesis quality.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种学习从单个视图开始生成自然场景的无界飞越视频的方法，其中这种能力是从单个照片的集合中学习的，不需要相机姿势，甚至不需要每个场景的多个视图。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种新颖的自监督视图生成训练范例，其中我们采样并渲染虚拟相机轨迹（包括循环轨迹），使我们的模型能够从单个视图集合中学习稳定的视图生成。在测试时，尽管在训练期间从未看过视频，但我们的方法可以拍摄单个图像并生成由数百个具有真实和多样化内容的新视图组成的长相机轨迹。我们将我们的方法与最近最先进的监督视图生成方法进行比较，这些方法需要摆出多视图视频并展示出卓越的性能和合成质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从单张自然场景图像生成无限连续视角视频的方法，无需多视角数据或相机姿态信息。
AI.motivation: 传统视角生成方法依赖多视角视频或相机姿态数据，而实际场景中获取这些数据成本高且受限，需探索单图生成无限视角的新范式。
AI.method: 设计自监督训练框架，通过虚拟相机轨迹采样与渲染（含循环轨迹），使模型从单张图像学习稳定视角生成能力。
AI.result: 在无视频训练数据情况下，模型可生成数百帧高质量、多样化的连续视角视频，优于需多视角输入的监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破传统视角生成对多视角数据的依赖，在单图输入下实现高质量无限视角生成，为自然场景视频合成提供新思路。

authors_text: Mayuresh Savargaonkar,Abdallah Chehade
title: VTrackIt: A Synthetic Self-Driving Dataset with Infrastructure and Pooled Vehicle Information
title_zh: VTrackIt：具有基础设施和汇集车辆信息的综合自动驾驶数据集
abstract: Artificial intelligence solutions for Autonomous Vehicles (AVs) have been developed using publicly available datasets such as Argoverse, ApolloScape, Level5, and NuScenes. One major limitation of these datasets is the absence of infrastructure and/or pooled vehicle information like lane line type, vehicle speed, traffic signs, and intersections. Such information is necessary and not complementary to eliminating high-risk edge cases. The rapid advancements in Vehicle-to-Infrastructure and Vehicle-to-Vehicle technologies show promise that infrastructure and pooled vehicle information will soon be accessible in near real-time. Taking a leap in the future, we introduce the first comprehensive synthetic dataset with intelligent infrastructure and pooled vehicle information for advancing the next generation of AVs, named VTrackIt. We also introduce the first deep learning model (InfraGAN) for trajectory predictions that considers such information. Our experiments with InfraGAN show that the comprehensive information offered by VTrackIt reduces the number of high-risk edge cases. The VTrackIt dataset is available upon request under the Creative Commons CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 license at http://vtrackit.irda.club.
summary: Artificial intelligence solutions for Autonomous Vehicles (AVs) have been developed using publicly available datasets such as Argoverse, ApolloScape, Level5, and NuScenes. One major limitation of these datasets is the absence of infrastructure and/or pooled vehicle information like lane line type, vehicle speed, traffic signs, and intersections. Such information is necessary and not complementary to eliminating high-risk edge cases. The rapid advancements in Vehicle-to-Infrastructure and Vehicle-to-Vehicle technologies show promise that infrastructure and pooled vehicle information will soon be accessible in near real-time. Taking a leap in the future, we introduce the first comprehensive synthetic dataset with intelligent infrastructure and pooled vehicle information for advancing the next generation of AVs, named VTrackIt. We also introduce the first deep learning model (InfraGAN) for trajectory predictions that considers such information. Our experiments with InfraGAN show that the comprehensive information offered by VTrackIt reduces the number of high-risk edge cases. The VTrackIt dataset is available upon request under the Creative Commons CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 license at http://vtrackit.irda.club.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 的人工智能解决方案是使用 Argoverse、ApolloScape、Level5 和 NuScenes 等公开数据集开发的。这些数据集的一个主要限制是缺乏基础设施和/或汇集的车辆信息，例如车道线类型、车辆速度、交通标志和交叉路口。这些信息是必要的，而不是消除高风险边缘情况的补充。车辆到基础设施和车辆到车辆技术的快速进步表明基础设施和汇集的车辆信息将很快可以近乎实时地访问。面向未来，我们推出了第一个具有智能基础设施和汇集车辆信息的综合综合数据集，用于推进下一代自动驾驶汽车，名为 VTrackIt。我们还引入了第一个考虑此类信息的轨迹预测深度学习模型（InfraGAN）。我们对 InfraGAN 的实验表明，VTrackIt 提供的全面信息减少了高风险边缘情况的数量。 VTrackIt 数据集可根据 Creative Commons CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 许可证在 http://vtrackit.irda.club 上请求获得。

AI.tldr: 本文提出名为VTrackIt的合成数据集及InfraGAN模型，用于自动驾驶车辆轨迹预测，包含基础设施和共享车辆信息。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶数据集缺乏基础设施和共享车辆信息（如车道线类型、交通标志等），难以有效处理高风险边缘案例。
AI.method: 构建包含智能基础设施和共享车辆信息的合成数据集VTrackIt，并设计深度学习模型InfraGAN进行轨迹预测。
AI.result: 实验表明，VTrackIt提供的综合信息可减少高风险边缘案例，数据集已通过Creative Commons许可开放获取。
AI.conclusion: VTrackIt和InfraGAN为下一代自动驾驶技术提供了关键数据支持和安全提升方案。

authors_text: Jianing Ye,Chenghao Li,Yongqiang Dou,Jianhao Wang,Guangwen Yang,Chongjie Zhang
title: Towards Global Optimality in Cooperative MARL with the Transformation And Distillation Framework
title_zh: 利用转换和蒸馏框架实现合作 MARL 的全局最优性
abstract: Decentralized execution is one core demand in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL). Recently, most popular MARL algorithms have adopted decentralized policies to enable decentralized execution, and use gradient descent as the optimizer. However, there is hardly any theoretical analysis of these algorithms taking the optimization method into consideration, and we find that various popular MARL algorithms with decentralized policies are suboptimal in toy tasks when gradient descent is chosen as their optimization method. In this paper, we theoretically analyze two common classes of algorithms with decentralized policies -- multi-agent policy gradient methods and value-decomposition methods, and prove their suboptimality when gradient descent is used. To address the suboptimality issue, we propose the Transformation And Distillation (TAD) framework, which reformulates a multi-agent MDP as a special single-agent MDP with a sequential structure and enables decentralized execution by distilling the learned policy on the derived "single-agent" MDP. The approach is a two-stage learning paradigm that addresses the optimization problem in cooperative MARL, providing optimality guarantee with decent execution performance. Empirically, we implement TAD-PPO based on PPO, which can theoretically perform optimal policy learning in the finite multi-agent MDPs and shows significant outperformance on a large set of cooperative multi-agent tasks, from matrix game, hallway task, to StarCraft II, and football game.
summary: Decentralized execution is one core demand in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL). Recently, most popular MARL algorithms have adopted decentralized policies to enable decentralized execution, and use gradient descent as the optimizer. However, there is hardly any theoretical analysis of these algorithms taking the optimization method into consideration, and we find that various popular MARL algorithms with decentralized policies are suboptimal in toy tasks when gradient descent is chosen as their optimization method. In this paper, we theoretically analyze two common classes of algorithms with decentralized policies -- multi-agent policy gradient methods and value-decomposition methods, and prove their suboptimality when gradient descent is used. To address the suboptimality issue, we propose the Transformation And Distillation (TAD) framework, which reformulates a multi-agent MDP as a special single-agent MDP with a sequential structure and enables decentralized execution by distilling the learned policy on the derived "single-agent" MDP. The approach is a two-stage learning paradigm that addresses the optimization problem in cooperative MARL, providing optimality guarantee with decent execution performance. Empirically, we implement TAD-PPO based on PPO, which can theoretically perform optimal policy learning in the finite multi-agent MDPs and shows significant outperformance on a large set of cooperative multi-agent tasks, from matrix game, hallway task, to StarCraft II, and football game.
abstract_zh: 去中心化执行是多智能体强化学习（MARL）的核心需求之一。最近，最流行的 MARL 算法都采用去中心化策略来实现去中心化执行，并使用梯度下降作为优化器。然而，几乎没有对这些算法进行任何考虑优化方法的理论分析，而且我们发现，当选择梯度下降作为优化方法时，各种流行的具有分散策略的 MARL 算法在玩具任务中并不是最优的。在本文中，我们从理论上分析了两类常见的去中心化策略算法——多智能体策略梯度方法和价值分解方法，并证明了它们在使用梯度下降时的次优性。为了解决次优问题，我们提出了转换和蒸馏（TAD）框架，它将多智能体 MDP 重新表述为具有顺序结构的特殊单智能体 MDP，并通过在派生的“单智能体”MDP 上提取学习策略来实现去中心化执行。该方法是一种两阶段学习范例，解决协作 MARL 中的优化问题，提供具有良好执行性能的最优性保证。根据经验，我们在 PPO 的基础上实现了 TAD-PPO，理论上它可以在有限多智能体 MDP 中执行最优策略学习，并且在大量协作多智能体任务（从矩阵游戏、走廊任务到星际争霸 II 和足球游戏）上表现出显着的性能优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TAD的框架，通过将多智能体马尔可夫决策过程转换为单智能体结构并结合策略蒸馏，解决合作型多智能体强化学习中的次优问题。
AI.motivation: 现有去中心化多智能体强化学习算法在使用梯度下降优化时存在理论分析不足且在简单任务中表现次优的问题，缺乏兼顾优化方法与全局最优性的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计TAD框架，将多智能体MDP转化为具有序列结构的单智能体MDP，并通过策略蒸馏实现去中心化执行，采用两阶段学习范式保证优化过程的全局最优性。
AI.result: 基于PPO实现的TAD-PPO算法在矩阵博弈、走廊任务、星际争霸II和足球游戏等多类合作型任务中显著优于现有算法，理论证明其能在有限MDP中实现最优策略学习。
AI.conclusion: TAD框架通过结构转换与策略蒸馏有效解决了去中心化多智能体强化学习的次优问题，在理论保证与实际性能上均取得突破性进展。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TAD的框架，通过将多智能体马尔可夫决策过程转换为单智能体结构并结合策略蒸馏，解决合作型多智能体强化学习中的次优问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有去中心化多智能体强化学习算法在使用梯度下降优化时存在理论分析不足且在简单任务中表现次优的问题，缺乏兼顾优化方法与全局最优性的解决方案。
ai_content.method: 设计TAD框架，将多智能体MDP转化为具有序列结构的单智能体MDP，并通过策略蒸馏实现去中心化执行，采用两阶段学习范式保证优化过程的全局最优性。
ai_content.result: 基于PPO实现的TAD-PPO算法在矩阵博弈、走廊任务、星际争霸II和足球游戏等多类合作型任务中显著优于现有算法，理论证明其能在有限MDP中实现最优策略学习。
ai_content.conclusion: TAD框架通过结构转换与策略蒸馏有效解决了去中心化多智能体强化学习的次优问题，在理论保证与实际性能上均取得突破性进展。

search_text: Towards Global Optimality in Cooperative MARL with the Transformation And Distillation Framework 利用转换和蒸馏框架实现合作 MARL 的全局最优性 Decentralized execution is one core demand in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL). Recently, most popular MARL algorithms have adopted decentralized policies to enable decentralized execution, and use gradient descent as the optimizer. However, there is hardly any theoretical analysis of these algorithms taking the optimization method into consideration, and we find that various popular MARL algorithms with decentralized policies are suboptimal in toy tasks when gradient descent is chosen as their optimization method. In this paper, we theoretically analyze two common classes of algorithms with decentralized policies -- multi-agent policy gradient methods and value-decomposition methods, and prove their suboptimality when gradient descent is used. To address the suboptimality issue, we propose the Transformation And Distillation (TAD) framework, which reformulates a multi-agent MDP as a special single-agent MDP with a sequential structure and enables decentralized execution by distilling the learned policy on the derived "single-agent" MDP. The approach is a two-stage learning paradigm that addresses the optimization problem in cooperative MARL, providing optimality guarantee with decent execution performance. Empirically, we implement TAD-PPO based on PPO, which can theoretically perform optimal policy learning in the finite multi-agent MDPs and shows significant outperformance on a large set of cooperative multi-agent tasks, from matrix game, hallway task, to StarCraft II, and football game. 去中心化执行是多智能体强化学习（MARL）的核心需求之一。最近，最流行的 MARL 算法都采用去中心化策略来实现去中心化执行，并使用梯度下降作为优化器。然而，几乎没有对这些算法进行任何考虑优化方法的理论分析，而且我们发现，当选择梯度下降作为优化方法时，各种流行的具有分散策略的 MARL 算法在玩具任务中并不是最优的。在本文中，我们从理论上分析了两类常见的去中心化策略算法——多智能体策略梯度方法和价值分解方法，并证明了它们在使用梯度下降时的次优性。为了解决次优问题，我们提出了转换和蒸馏（TAD）框架，它将多智能体 MDP 重新表述为具有顺序结构的特殊单智能体 MDP，并通过在派生的“单智能体”MDP 上提取学习策略来实现去中心化执行。该方法是一种两阶段学习范例，解决协作 MARL 中的优化问题，提供具有良好执行性能的最优性保证。根据经验，我们在 PPO 的基础上实现了 TAD-PPO，理论上它可以在有限多智能体 MDP 中执行最优策略学习，并且在大量协作多智能体任务（从矩阵游戏、走廊任务到星际争霸 II 和足球游戏）上表现出显着的性能优势。 本文提出一种名为TAD的框架，通过将多智能体马尔可夫决策过程转换为单智能体结构并结合策略蒸馏，解决合作型多智能体强化学习中的次优问题。 Jianing Ye,Chenghao Li,Yongqiang Dou,Jianhao Wang,Guangwen Yang,Chongjie Zhang cs.MA,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ayoub Raji,Alexander Liniger,Andrea Giove,Alessandro Toschi,Nicola Musiu,Daniele Morra,Micaela Verucchi,Danilo Caporale,Marko Bertogna
title: Motion Planning and Control for Multi Vehicle Autonomous Racing at High Speeds
title_zh: 多车辆高速自主赛车的运动规划与控制
comment: Accepted to the 25th IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (IEEE ITSC 2022)
comments: Accepted to the 25th IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (IEEE ITSC 2022)
abstract: This paper presents a multi-layer motion planning and control architecture for autonomous racing, capable of avoiding static obstacles, performing active overtakes, and reaching velocities above 75 $m/s$. The used offline global trajectory generation and the online model predictive controller are highly based on optimization and dynamic models of the vehicle, where the tires and camber effects are represented in an extended version of the basic Pacejka Magic Formula. The proposed single-track model is identified and validated using multi-body motorsport libraries which allow simulating the vehicle dynamics properly, especially useful when real experimental data are missing. The fundamental regularization terms and constraints of the controller are tuned to reduce the rate of change of the inputs while assuring an acceptable velocity and path tracking. The motion planning strategy consists of a Frenét-Frame-based planner which considers a forecast of the opponent produced by a Kalman filter. The planner chooses the collision-free path and velocity profile to be tracked on a 3 seconds horizon to realize different goals such as following and overtaking. The proposed solution has been applied on a Dallara AV-21 racecar and tested at oval race tracks achieving lateral accelerations up to 25 $m/s^{2}$.
summary: This paper presents a multi-layer motion planning and control architecture for autonomous racing, capable of avoiding static obstacles, performing active overtakes, and reaching velocities above 75 $m/s$. The used offline global trajectory generation and the online model predictive controller are highly based on optimization and dynamic models of the vehicle, where the tires and camber effects are represented in an extended version of the basic Pacejka Magic Formula. The proposed single-track model is identified and validated using multi-body motorsport libraries which allow simulating the vehicle dynamics properly, especially useful when real experimental data are missing. The fundamental regularization terms and constraints of the controller are tuned to reduce the rate of change of the inputs while assuring an acceptable velocity and path tracking. The motion planning strategy consists of a Frenét-Frame-based planner which considers a forecast of the opponent produced by a Kalman filter. The planner chooses the collision-free path and velocity profile to be tracked on a 3 seconds horizon to realize different goals such as following and overtaking. The proposed solution has been applied on a Dallara AV-21 racecar and tested at oval race tracks achieving lateral accelerations up to 25 $m/s^{2}$.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于自动驾驶赛车的多层运动规划和控制架构，能够避开静态障碍物、执行主动超车并达到 75 $m/s$ 以上的速度。所使用的离线全局轨迹生成和在线模型预测控制器高度基于车辆的优化和动态模型，其中轮胎和外倾角效应以基本 Pacejka Magic Formula 的扩展版本表示。所提出的单轨模型使用多体赛车运动库进行识别和验证，该库允许正确模拟车辆动力学，在缺少真实实验数据时特别有用。调整控制器的基本正则化项和约束以降低输入的变化率，同时确保可接受的速度和路径跟踪。运动规划策略由基于 Frenét-Frame 的规划器组成，该规划器考虑卡尔曼滤波器产生的对手预测。规划器选择在3秒范围内跟踪的无碰撞路径和速度曲线，以实现跟随和超车等不同目标。所提出的解决方案已应用于 Dallara AV-21 赛车，并在椭圆形赛道上进行了测试，横向加速度高达 25 $m/s^{2}$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多层运动规划与控制架构，用于实现高速自动驾驶赛车的避障、主动超车及超过75m/s的速度控制。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶系统难以满足高速赛车场景下对动态路径规划、实时避障及高精度轨迹跟踪的严苛要求。
AI.method: 结合离线全局轨迹生成与在线模型预测控制（MPC），基于扩展的Pacejka Magic公式建模轮胎特性，并采用Frenét框架路径规划器配合卡尔曼滤波预测对手轨迹。
AI.result: 在Dallara AV-21赛车上验证，实现最大25m/s²侧向加速度，成功完成避障与超车等复杂任务。
AI.conclusion: 该架构通过多层级优化与动态模型结合，有效解决了高速自动驾驶赛车的运动规划与控制难题。

search_text: Motion Planning and Control for Multi Vehicle Autonomous Racing at High Speeds 多车辆高速自主赛车的运动规划与控制 This paper presents a multi-layer motion planning and control architecture for autonomous racing, capable of avoiding static obstacles, performing active overtakes, and reaching velocities above 75 $m/s$. The used offline global trajectory generation and the online model predictive controller are highly based on optimization and dynamic models of the vehicle, where the tires and camber effects are represented in an extended version of the basic Pacejka Magic Formula. The proposed single-track model is identified and validated using multi-body motorsport libraries which allow simulating the vehicle dynamics properly, especially useful when real experimental data are missing. The fundamental regularization terms and constraints of the controller are tuned to reduce the rate of change of the inputs while assuring an acceptable velocity and path tracking. The motion planning strategy consists of a Frenét-Frame-based planner which considers a forecast of the opponent produced by a Kalman filter. The planner chooses the collision-free path and velocity profile to be tracked on a 3 seconds horizon to realize different goals such as following and overtaking. The proposed solution has been applied on a Dallara AV-21 racecar and tested at oval race tracks achieving lateral accelerations up to 25 $m/s^{2}$. 本文提出了一种用于自动驾驶赛车的多层运动规划和控制架构，能够避开静态障碍物、执行主动超车并达到 75 $m/s$ 以上的速度。所使用的离线全局轨迹生成和在线模型预测控制器高度基于车辆的优化和动态模型，其中轮胎和外倾角效应以基本 Pacejka Magic Formula 的扩展版本表示。所提出的单轨模型使用多体赛车运动库进行识别和验证，该库允许正确模拟车辆动力学，在缺少真实实验数据时特别有用。调整控制器的基本正则化项和约束以降低输入的变化率，同时确保可接受的速度和路径跟踪。运动规划策略由基于 Frenét-Frame 的规划器组成，该规划器考虑卡尔曼滤波器产生的对手预测。规划器选择在3秒范围内跟踪的无碰撞路径和速度曲线，以实现跟随和超车等不同目标。所提出的解决方案已应用于 Dallara AV-21 赛车，并在椭圆形赛道上进行了测试，横向加速度高达 25 $m/s^{2}$。 本文提出了一种多层运动规划与控制架构，用于实现高速自动驾驶赛车的避障、主动超车及超过75m/s的速度控制。 Ayoub Raji,Alexander Liniger,Andrea Giove,Alessandro Toschi,Nicola Musiu,Daniele Morra,Micaela Verucchi,Danilo Caporale,Marko Bertogna cs.RO,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Justice Darko,Hyoshin Park
title: Proactive Distributed Emergency Response with Heterogeneous Tasks Allocation
title_zh: 异构任务分配的主动分布式应急响应
abstract: Traditionally, traffic incident management (TIM) programs coordinate the deployment of emergency resources to immediate incident requests without accommodating the interdependencies on incident evolutions in the environment. However, ignoring inherent interdependencies on the evolution of incidents in the environment while making current deployment decisions is shortsighted, and the resulting naive deployment strategy can significantly worsen the overall incident delay impact on the network. The interdependencies on incident evolution in the environment, including those between incident occurrences, and those between resource availability in near-future requests and the anticipated duration of the immediate incident request, should be considered through a look-ahead model when making current-stage deployment decisions. This study develops a new proactive framework based on the distributed constraint optimization problem (DCOP) to address the above limitations, overcoming conventional TIM models that cannot accommodate the dependencies in the TIM problem. Furthermore, the optimization objective is formulated to incorporate Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). The UAVs' role in TIM includes exploring uncertain traffic conditions, detecting unexpected events, and augmenting information from roadway traffic sensors. Robustness analysis of our model for multiple TIM scenarios shows satisfactory performance using local search exploration heuristics. Overall, our model reports a significant reduction in total incident delay compared to conventional TIM models. With UAV support, we demonstrate a further decrease in the total incident delay ranging between 5% and 45% for the different number of incidents. UAV's active sensing can shorten response time of emergency vehicles, and a reduction in uncertainties associated with the estimated incident delay impact.
summary: Traditionally, traffic incident management (TIM) programs coordinate the deployment of emergency resources to immediate incident requests without accommodating the interdependencies on incident evolutions in the environment. However, ignoring inherent interdependencies on the evolution of incidents in the environment while making current deployment decisions is shortsighted, and the resulting naive deployment strategy can significantly worsen the overall incident delay impact on the network. The interdependencies on incident evolution in the environment, including those between incident occurrences, and those between resource availability in near-future requests and the anticipated duration of the immediate incident request, should be considered through a look-ahead model when making current-stage deployment decisions. This study develops a new proactive framework based on the distributed constraint optimization problem (DCOP) to address the above limitations, overcoming conventional TIM models that cannot accommodate the dependencies in the TIM problem. Furthermore, the optimization objective is formulated to incorporate Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). The UAVs' role in TIM includes exploring uncertain traffic conditions, detecting unexpected events, and augmenting information from roadway traffic sensors. Robustness analysis of our model for multiple TIM scenarios shows satisfactory performance using local search exploration heuristics. Overall, our model reports a significant reduction in total incident delay compared to conventional TIM models. With UAV support, we demonstrate a further decrease in the total incident delay ranging between 5% and 45% for the different number of incidents. UAV's active sensing can shorten response time of emergency vehicles, and a reduction in uncertainties associated with the estimated incident delay impact.
abstract_zh: 传统上，交通事故管理 (TIM) 计划协调紧急资源的部署以立即处理事故请求，但没有考虑到环境中事故演变的相互依赖性。然而，在做出当前部署决策时忽略环境中事件演变的固有相互依赖性是短视的，并且由此产生的幼稚部署策略可能会显着恶化总体事件延迟对网络的影响。在做出当前阶段的部署决策时，应通过前瞻模型来考虑环境中事件演变的相互依赖性，包括事件发生之间的相互依赖性，以及近期请求中的资源可用性与当前事件请求的预期持续时间之间的相互依赖性。本研究开发了一种基于分布式约束优化问题（DCOP）的新主动框架来解决上述局限性，克服了传统 TIM 模型无法适应 TIM 问题中的依赖性的问题。此外，制定了优化目标以纳入无人机（UAV）。无人机在 TIM 中的作用包括探索不确定的交通状况、检测意外事件以及增强来自道路交通传感器的信息。我们的模型针对多个 TIM 场景的稳健性分析显示，使用本地搜索探索启发法具有令人满意的性能。总体而言，与传统 TIM 模型相比，我们的模型报告了总事件延迟显着减少。在无人机的支持下，我们证明了不同事件数量的总事件延迟进一步降低了 5% 至 45%。无人机的主动传感可以缩短应急车辆的响应时间，并减少与估计事件延迟影响相关的不确定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分布式约束优化问题（DCOP）的主动框架，结合无人机（UAV）技术，优化交通事件管理中的应急资源部署与异构任务分配。
AI.motivation: 传统交通事件管理（TIM）模型忽视事件演化间的依赖关系，导致资源部署策略低效，加剧网络拥堵。需通过前瞻性模型整合未来事件关联性，并利用UAV提升信息获取能力。
AI.method: 构建考虑事件间依赖关系的DCOP框架，结合UAV的主动感知能力，通过局部搜索启发式算法优化资源分配与任务调度。
AI.result: 实验表明，相比传统模型，该方法使总事件延误减少显著，UAV支持下延误降低5%-45%，并缩短应急响应时间、减少不确定性。
AI.conclusion: 融合DCOP与UAV的主动框架有效提升了TIM效率，为动态环境下的应急资源分配提供了更优解决方案。

search_text: Proactive Distributed Emergency Response with Heterogeneous Tasks Allocation 异构任务分配的主动分布式应急响应 Traditionally, traffic incident management (TIM) programs coordinate the deployment of emergency resources to immediate incident requests without accommodating the interdependencies on incident evolutions in the environment. However, ignoring inherent interdependencies on the evolution of incidents in the environment while making current deployment decisions is shortsighted, and the resulting naive deployment strategy can significantly worsen the overall incident delay impact on the network. The interdependencies on incident evolution in the environment, including those between incident occurrences, and those between resource availability in near-future requests and the anticipated duration of the immediate incident request, should be considered through a look-ahead model when making current-stage deployment decisions. This study develops a new proactive framework based on the distributed constraint optimization problem (DCOP) to address the above limitations, overcoming conventional TIM models that cannot accommodate the dependencies in the TIM problem. Furthermore, the optimization objective is formulated to incorporate Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). The UAVs' role in TIM includes exploring uncertain traffic conditions, detecting unexpected events, and augmenting information from roadway traffic sensors. Robustness analysis of our model for multiple TIM scenarios shows satisfactory performance using local search exploration heuristics. Overall, our model reports a significant reduction in total incident delay compared to conventional TIM models. With UAV support, we demonstrate a further decrease in the total incident delay ranging between 5% and 45% for the different number of incidents. UAV's active sensing can shorten response time of emergency vehicles, and a reduction in uncertainties associated with the estimated incident delay impact. 传统上，交通事故管理 (TIM) 计划协调紧急资源的部署以立即处理事故请求，但没有考虑到环境中事故演变的相互依赖性。然而，在做出当前部署决策时忽略环境中事件演变的固有相互依赖性是短视的，并且由此产生的幼稚部署策略可能会显着恶化总体事件延迟对网络的影响。在做出当前阶段的部署决策时，应通过前瞻模型来考虑环境中事件演变的相互依赖性，包括事件发生之间的相互依赖性，以及近期请求中的资源可用性与当前事件请求的预期持续时间之间的相互依赖性。本研究开发了一种基于分布式约束优化问题（DCOP）的新主动框架来解决上述局限性，克服了传统 TIM 模型无法适应 TIM 问题中的依赖性的问题。此外，制定了优化目标以纳入无人机（UAV）。无人机在 TIM 中的作用包括探索不确定的交通状况、检测意外事件以及增强来自道路交通传感器的信息。我们的模型针对多个 TIM 场景的稳健性分析显示，使用本地搜索探索启发法具有令人满意的性能。总体而言，与传统 TIM 模型相比，我们的模型报告了总事件延迟显着减少。在无人机的支持下，我们证明了不同事件数量的总事件延迟进一步降低了 5% 至 45%。无人机的主动传感可以缩短应急车辆的响应时间，并减少与估计事件延迟影响相关的不确定性。 本文提出一种基于分布式约束优化问题（DCOP）的主动框架，结合无人机（UAV）技术，优化交通事件管理中的应急资源部署与异构任务分配。 Justice Darko,Hyoshin Park eess.SY,cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: Yangtao Du,Qingqing Wang,Yujie Xiong
title: Adaptive Graph-Based Feature Normalization for Facial Expression Recognition
title_zh: 用于面部表情识别的基于自适应图的特征归一化
abstract: Facial Expression Recognition (FER) suffers from data uncertainties caused by ambiguous facial images and annotators' subjectiveness, resulting in excursive semantic and feature covariate shifting problem. Existing works usually correct mislabeled data by estimating noise distribution, or guide network training with knowledge learned from clean data, neglecting the associative relations of expressions. In this work, we propose an Adaptive Graph-based Feature Normalization (AGFN) method to protect FER models from data uncertainties by normalizing feature distributions with the association of expressions. Specifically, we propose a Poisson graph generator to adaptively construct topological graphs for samples in each mini-batches via a sampling process, and correspondingly design a coordinate descent strategy to optimize proposed network. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art works with accuracies of 91.84% and 91.11% on the benchmark datasets FERPlus and RAF-DB, respectively, and when the percentage of mislabeled data increases (e.g., to 20%), our network surpasses existing works significantly by 3.38% and 4.52%.
summary: Facial Expression Recognition (FER) suffers from data uncertainties caused by ambiguous facial images and annotators' subjectiveness, resulting in excursive semantic and feature covariate shifting problem. Existing works usually correct mislabeled data by estimating noise distribution, or guide network training with knowledge learned from clean data, neglecting the associative relations of expressions. In this work, we propose an Adaptive Graph-based Feature Normalization (AGFN) method to protect FER models from data uncertainties by normalizing feature distributions with the association of expressions. Specifically, we propose a Poisson graph generator to adaptively construct topological graphs for samples in each mini-batches via a sampling process, and correspondingly design a coordinate descent strategy to optimize proposed network. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art works with accuracies of 91.84% and 91.11% on the benchmark datasets FERPlus and RAF-DB, respectively, and when the percentage of mislabeled data increases (e.g., to 20%), our network surpasses existing works significantly by 3.38% and 4.52%.
abstract_zh: 面部表情识别（FER）由于模糊的面部图像和注释者的主观性而受到数据不确定性的影响，从而导致偏移语义和特征协变量转移问题。现有的工作通常通过估计噪声分布来纠正错误标记的数据，或者用从干净数据中学到的知识来指导网络训练，而忽略了表达式的关联关系。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于自适应图的特征归一化（AGFN）方法，通过用表达式关联对特征分布进行归一化来保护 FER 模型免受数据不确定性的影响。具体来说，我们提出了一种泊松图生成器，通过采样过程自适应地为每个小批量中的样本构建拓扑图，并相应地设计坐标下降策略来优化所提出的网络。我们的方法在基准数据集 FERPlus 和 RAF-DB 上的准确率分别为 91.84% 和 91.11%，优于最先进的工作，并且当错误标记数据的百分比增加（例如，达到 20%）时，我们的网络显着超过现有工作 3.38% 和 4.52%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应图基特征归一化方法（AGFN），通过构建表达关联图来解决面部表情识别中的数据不确定性问题，提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过修正误标签或利用干净数据训练，但忽视表情间的关联性，难以有效应对标注噪声和特征分布偏移问题。
AI.method: 设计泊松图生成器自适应构建样本拓扑图，并结合坐标下降策略优化网络，利用表达关联性归一化特征分布。
AI.result: 在FERPlus和RAF-DB数据集上分别达到91.84%和91.11%准确率，当误标签数据达20%时，相较现有方法提升3.38%和4.52%。
AI.conclusion: AGFN通过建模表达关联性有效缓解数据不确定性，显著提升面部表情识别在噪声环境下的性能，验证了方法的优越性。

authors_text: Jie Yan,Yunlei Lu,Liting Chen,Si Qin,Yixin Fang,Qingwei Lin,Thomas Moscibroda,Saravan Rajmohan,Dongmei Zhang
title: Solving the Batch Stochastic Bin Packing Problem in Cloud: A Chance-constrained Optimization Approach
title_zh: 解决云中的批量随机装箱问题：机会约束优化方法
comment: To appear in SIGKDD 2022 as Research Track paper
comments: To appear in SIGKDD 2022 as Research Track paper
abstract: This paper investigates a critical resource allocation problem in the first party cloud: scheduling containers to machines. There are tens of services and each service runs a set of homogeneous containers with dynamic resource usage; containers of a service are scheduled daily in a batch fashion. This problem can be naturally formulated as Stochastic Bin Packing Problem (SBPP). However, traditional SBPP research often focuses on cases of empty machines, whose objective, i.e., to minimize the number of used machines, is not well-defined for the more common reality with nonempty machines. This paper aims to close this gap. First, we define a new objective metric, Used Capacity at Confidence (UCaC), which measures the maximum used resources at a probability and is proved to be consistent for both empty and nonempty machines, and reformulate the SBPP under chance constraints. Second, by modeling the container resource usage distribution in a generative approach, we reveal that UCaC can be approximated with Gaussian, which is verified by trace data of real-world applications. Third, we propose an exact solver by solving the equivalent cutting stock variant as well as two heuristics-based solvers -- UCaC best fit, bi-level heuristics. We experimentally evaluate these solvers on both synthetic datasets and real application traces, demonstrating our methodology's advantage over traditional SBPP optimal solver minimizing the number of used machines, with a low rate of resource violations.
summary: This paper investigates a critical resource allocation problem in the first party cloud: scheduling containers to machines. There are tens of services and each service runs a set of homogeneous containers with dynamic resource usage; containers of a service are scheduled daily in a batch fashion. This problem can be naturally formulated as Stochastic Bin Packing Problem (SBPP). However, traditional SBPP research often focuses on cases of empty machines, whose objective, i.e., to minimize the number of used machines, is not well-defined for the more common reality with nonempty machines. This paper aims to close this gap. First, we define a new objective metric, Used Capacity at Confidence (UCaC), which measures the maximum used resources at a probability and is proved to be consistent for both empty and nonempty machines, and reformulate the SBPP under chance constraints. Second, by modeling the container resource usage distribution in a generative approach, we reveal that UCaC can be approximated with Gaussian, which is verified by trace data of real-world applications. Third, we propose an exact solver by solving the equivalent cutting stock variant as well as two heuristics-based solvers -- UCaC best fit, bi-level heuristics. We experimentally evaluate these solvers on both synthetic datasets and real application traces, demonstrating our methodology's advantage over traditional SBPP optimal solver minimizing the number of used machines, with a low rate of resource violations.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了第一方云中的一个关键资源分配问题：将容器调度到机器。有数十个服务，每个服务运行一组具有动态资源使用的同构容器；服务的容器每天以批量方式调度。这个问题可以自然地表述为随机装箱问题（SBPP）。然而，传统的 SBPP 研究通常侧重于空机器的情况，其目标（即最大限度地减少已用机器的数量）对于非空机器的更常见现实并没有明确定义。本文旨在缩小这一差距。首先，我们定义了一个新的客观指标，置信度已用容量（UCaC），它以概率测量最大使用资源，并被证明对于空机和非空机都是一致的，并在机会约束下重新制定 SBPP。其次，通过以生成方法对容器资源使用分布进行建模，我们揭示了 UCaC 可以用高斯近似，并通过实际应用程序的跟踪数据进行了验证。第三，我们通过求解等效切削坯料变体以及两个基于启发式的求解器（UCaC 最佳拟合、双层启发式）提出了一个精确求解器。我们在合成数据集和实际应用程序跟踪上对这些求解器进行了实验评估，证明了我们的方法相对于传统 SBPP 最优求解器的优势，可以最大限度地减少使用的机器数量，并且资源违规率较低。

AI.tldr: 本文研究云环境中容器调度的资源分配问题，提出基于机会约束优化的随机装箱问题解决方案。
AI.motivation: 传统随机装箱问题（SBPP）假设机器初始为空，但实际云环境机器常有非空状态，导致现有方法无法有效处理现实场景中的资源分配。
AI.method: 定义新目标指标'置信度使用容量'（UCaC），通过高斯分布近似资源使用情况，并提出精确求解器与两种启发式算法（UCaC最佳适配、双层启发式）。
AI.result: 实验表明，相比传统SBPP求解器，新方法在合成数据集和真实应用追踪中均能有效降低资源违规率，且保持较高资源利用率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过机会约束建模和UCaC指标，有效解决了非空机器场景下的云资源调度问题，为实际应用提供了可行优化方案。

search_text: Solving the Batch Stochastic Bin Packing Problem in Cloud: A Chance-constrained Optimization Approach 解决云中的批量随机装箱问题：机会约束优化方法 This paper investigates a critical resource allocation problem in the first party cloud: scheduling containers to machines. There are tens of services and each service runs a set of homogeneous containers with dynamic resource usage; containers of a service are scheduled daily in a batch fashion. This problem can be naturally formulated as Stochastic Bin Packing Problem (SBPP). However, traditional SBPP research often focuses on cases of empty machines, whose objective, i.e., to minimize the number of used machines, is not well-defined for the more common reality with nonempty machines. This paper aims to close this gap. First, we define a new objective metric, Used Capacity at Confidence (UCaC), which measures the maximum used resources at a probability and is proved to be consistent for both empty and nonempty machines, and reformulate the SBPP under chance constraints. Second, by modeling the container resource usage distribution in a generative approach, we reveal that UCaC can be approximated with Gaussian, which is verified by trace data of real-world applications. Third, we propose an exact solver by solving the equivalent cutting stock variant as well as two heuristics-based solvers -- UCaC best fit, bi-level heuristics. We experimentally evaluate these solvers on both synthetic datasets and real application traces, demonstrating our methodology's advantage over traditional SBPP optimal solver minimizing the number of used machines, with a low rate of resource violations. 本文研究了第一方云中的一个关键资源分配问题：将容器调度到机器。有数十个服务，每个服务运行一组具有动态资源使用的同构容器；服务的容器每天以批量方式调度。这个问题可以自然地表述为随机装箱问题（SBPP）。然而，传统的 SBPP 研究通常侧重于空机器的情况，其目标（即最大限度地减少已用机器的数量）对于非空机器的更常见现实并没有明确定义。本文旨在缩小这一差距。首先，我们定义了一个新的客观指标，置信度已用容量（UCaC），它以概率测量最大使用资源，并被证明对于空机和非空机都是一致的，并在机会约束下重新制定 SBPP。其次，通过以生成方法对容器资源使用分布进行建模，我们揭示了 UCaC 可以用高斯近似，并通过实际应用程序的跟踪数据进行了验证。第三，我们通过求解等效切削坯料变体以及两个基于启发式的求解器（UCaC 最佳拟合、双层启发式）提出了一个精确求解器。我们在合成数据集和实际应用程序跟踪上对这些求解器进行了实验评估，证明了我们的方法相对于传统 SBPP 最优求解器的优势，可以最大限度地减少使用的机器数量，并且资源违规率较低。 本文研究云环境中容器调度的资源分配问题，提出基于机会约束优化的随机装箱问题解决方案。 Jie Yan,Yunlei Lu,Liting Chen,Si Qin,Yixin Fang,Qingwei Lin,Thomas Moscibroda,Saravan Rajmohan,Dongmei Zhang math.OC,cs.AI

authors_text: Yangjun Mao,Long Chen,Zhihong Jiang,Dong Zhang,Zhimeng Zhang,Jian Shao,Jun Xiao
title: Rethinking the Reference-based Distinctive Image Captioning
title_zh: 重新思考基于参考的独特图像描述
abstract: Distinctive Image Captioning (DIC) -- generating distinctive captions that describe the unique details of a target image -- has received considerable attention over the last few years. A recent DIC work proposes to generate distinctive captions by comparing the target image with a set of semantic-similar reference images, i.e., reference-based DIC (Ref-DIC). It aims to make the generated captions can tell apart the target and reference images. Unfortunately, reference images used by existing Ref-DIC works are easy to distinguish: these reference images only resemble the target image at scene-level and have few common objects, such that a Ref-DIC model can trivially generate distinctive captions even without considering the reference images. To ensure Ref-DIC models really perceive the unique objects (or attributes) in target images, we first propose two new Ref-DIC benchmarks. Specifically, we design a two-stage matching mechanism, which strictly controls the similarity between the target and reference images at object-/attribute- level (vs. scene-level). Secondly, to generate distinctive captions, we develop a strong Transformer-based Ref-DIC baseline, dubbed as TransDIC. It not only extracts visual features from the target image, but also encodes the differences between objects in the target and reference images. Finally, for more trustworthy benchmarking, we propose a new evaluation metric named DisCIDEr for Ref-DIC, which evaluates both the accuracy and distinctiveness of the generated captions. Experimental results demonstrate that our TransDIC can generate distinctive captions. Besides, it outperforms several state-of-the-art models on the two new benchmarks over different metrics.
summary: Distinctive Image Captioning (DIC) -- generating distinctive captions that describe the unique details of a target image -- has received considerable attention over the last few years. A recent DIC work proposes to generate distinctive captions by comparing the target image with a set of semantic-similar reference images, i.e., reference-based DIC (Ref-DIC). It aims to make the generated captions can tell apart the target and reference images. Unfortunately, reference images used by existing Ref-DIC works are easy to distinguish: these reference images only resemble the target image at scene-level and have few common objects, such that a Ref-DIC model can trivially generate distinctive captions even without considering the reference images. To ensure Ref-DIC models really perceive the unique objects (or attributes) in target images, we first propose two new Ref-DIC benchmarks. Specifically, we design a two-stage matching mechanism, which strictly controls the similarity between the target and reference images at object-/attribute- level (vs. scene-level). Secondly, to generate distinctive captions, we develop a strong Transformer-based Ref-DIC baseline, dubbed as TransDIC. It not only extracts visual features from the target image, but also encodes the differences between objects in the target and reference images. Finally, for more trustworthy benchmarking, we propose a new evaluation metric named DisCIDEr for Ref-DIC, which evaluates both the accuracy and distinctiveness of the generated captions. Experimental results demonstrate that our TransDIC can generate distinctive captions. Besides, it outperforms several state-of-the-art models on the two new benchmarks over different metrics.
abstract_zh: 独特图像字幕 (DIC)——生成描述目标图像独特细节的独特字幕——在过去几年中受到了相当多的关注。最近的 DIC 工作提出通过将目标图像与一组语义相似的参考图像进行比较来生成独特的标题，即基于参考的 DIC（Ref-DIC）。其目的是使生成的标题能够区分目标图像和参考图像。不幸的是，现有 Ref-DIC 作品使用的参考图像很容易区分：这些参考图像仅在场景级别与目标图像相似，并且几乎没有共同对象，因此即使不考虑参考图像，Ref-DIC 模型也可以轻松生成独特的标题。为了确保 Ref-DIC 模型真正感知目标图像中的独特对象（或属性），我们首先提出两个新的 Ref-DIC 基准。具体来说，我们设计了一种两阶段匹配机制，在对象/属性级别（与场景级别）严格控制目标图像和参考图像之间的相似性。其次，为了生成独特的字幕，我们开发了一个强大的基于 Transformer 的 Ref-DIC 基线，称为 TransDIC。它不仅从目标图像中提取视觉特征，而且对目标图像和参考图像中的对象之间的差异进行编码。最后，为了更值得信赖的基准测试，我们为 Ref-DIC 提出了一个名为 DisCIDEr 的新评估指标，它评估生成的标题的准确性和独特性。实验结果表明，我们的 TransDIC 可以生成独特的字幕。此外，它在两个新基准的不同指标上优于几种最先进的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于参考图像的差异性图像字幕生成方法（TransDIC），通过改进基准和评估指标提升模型对目标图像独特细节的捕捉能力。
AI.motivation: 现有参考图像差异性字幕生成（Ref-DIC）方法使用的参考图像仅在场景层面相似，缺乏对象/属性层面的区分性，导致模型无需真正对比即可生成字幕。
AI.method: 设计两阶段匹配机制严格控制参考图像与目标图像的对象/属性相似度；提出基于Transformer的TransDIC模型，同时编码目标与参考图像的差异；开发新评估指标DisCIDEr综合衡量字幕准确性和差异性。
AI.result: TransDIC在两个新基准上优于现有方法，实验验证其能有效生成突出目标图像独特性的字幕。
AI.conclusion: 通过更严格的基准和更有效的模型结构，本文显著提升了参考图像差异性字幕生成的效果和可靠性。

authors_text: Inès Meraoumia,Emanuele Dalsasso,Loïc Denis,Florence Tupin
title: Fast strategies for multi-temporal speckle reduction of Sentinel-1 GRD images
title_zh: Sentinel-1 GRD 图像多时相散斑减少的快速策略
abstract: Reducing speckle and limiting the variations of the physical parameters in Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) images is often a key-step to fully exploit the potential of such data. Nowadays, deep learning approaches produce state of the art results in single-image SAR restoration. Nevertheless, huge multi-temporal stacks are now often available and could be efficiently exploited to further improve image quality. This paper explores two fast strategies employing a single-image despeckling algorithm, namely SAR2SAR, in a multi-temporal framework. The first one is based on Quegan filter and replaces the local reflectivity pre-estimation by SAR2SAR. The second one uses SAR2SAR to suppress speckle from a ratio image encoding the multi-temporal information under the form of a "super-image", i.e. the temporal arithmetic mean of a time series. Experimental results on Sentinel-1 GRD data show that these two multi-temporal strategies provide improved filtering results while adding a limited computational cost.
summary: Reducing speckle and limiting the variations of the physical parameters in Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) images is often a key-step to fully exploit the potential of such data. Nowadays, deep learning approaches produce state of the art results in single-image SAR restoration. Nevertheless, huge multi-temporal stacks are now often available and could be efficiently exploited to further improve image quality. This paper explores two fast strategies employing a single-image despeckling algorithm, namely SAR2SAR, in a multi-temporal framework. The first one is based on Quegan filter and replaces the local reflectivity pre-estimation by SAR2SAR. The second one uses SAR2SAR to suppress speckle from a ratio image encoding the multi-temporal information under the form of a "super-image", i.e. the temporal arithmetic mean of a time series. Experimental results on Sentinel-1 GRD data show that these two multi-temporal strategies provide improved filtering results while adding a limited computational cost.
abstract_zh: 减少合成孔径雷达 (SAR) 图像中的散斑并限制物理参数的变化通常是充分利用此类数据潜力的关键步骤。如今，深度学习方法在单图像 SAR 恢复方面产生了最先进的结果。尽管如此，现在经常可以使用巨大的多时态堆栈，并且可以有效地利用它来进一步提高图像质量。本文探讨了在多时相框架中采用单图像去斑算法（即 SAR2SAR）的两种快速策略。第一个基于Quegan滤波器，用SAR2SAR代替局部反射率预估计。第二个方法使用 SAR2SAR 来抑制比率图像中的散斑，该比率图像以“超级图像”（即时间序列的时间算术平均值）的形式编码多时间信息。 Sentinel-1 GRD 数据的实验结果表明，这两种多时相策略提供了改进的过滤结果，同时增加了有限的计算成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种快速策略，利用单图像去斑点算法SAR2SAR结合多时相框架，提升Sentinel-1 GRD图像的斑点抑制效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在单图像SAR修复中表现优异，但多时相SAR数据栈的潜力尚未被充分挖掘，需开发高效方法以进一步提升图像质量。
AI.method: 第一种策略用Quegan滤波器替代局部反射率预估，第二种策略通过SAR2SAR处理多时相信息生成的'超级图像'（时间序列算术均值）进行斑点抑制。
AI.result: 实验表明两种多时相策略在保持较低计算成本的同时，显著提升了Sentinel-1 GRD数据的去斑点效果。
AI.conclusion: 多时相框架结合SAR2SAR算法能有效提升SAR图像质量，且计算开销可控，为后续研究提供可行方向。

tldr: 本文提出两种快速策略，利用单图像去斑点算法SAR2SAR结合多时相框架，提升Sentinel-1 GRD图像的斑点抑制效果。
motivation: 尽管深度学习在单图像SAR修复中表现优异，但多时相SAR数据栈的潜力尚未被充分挖掘，需开发高效方法以进一步提升图像质量。
method: 第一种策略用Quegan滤波器替代局部反射率预估，第二种策略通过SAR2SAR处理多时相信息生成的'超级图像'（时间序列算术均值）进行斑点抑制。
result: 实验表明两种多时相策略在保持较低计算成本的同时，显著提升了Sentinel-1 GRD数据的去斑点效果。
conclusion: 多时相框架结合SAR2SAR算法能有效提升SAR图像质量，且计算开销可控，为后续研究提供可行方向。
search_text: Fast strategies for multi-temporal speckle reduction of Sentinel-1 GRD images Sentinel-1 GRD 图像多时相散斑减少的快速策略 Reducing speckle and limiting the variations of the physical parameters in Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) images is often a key-step to fully exploit the potential of such data. Nowadays, deep learning approaches produce state of the art results in single-image SAR restoration. Nevertheless, huge multi-temporal stacks are now often available and could be efficiently exploited to further improve image quality. This paper explores two fast strategies employing a single-image despeckling algorithm, namely SAR2SAR, in a multi-temporal framework. The first one is based on Quegan filter and replaces the local reflectivity pre-estimation by SAR2SAR. The second one uses SAR2SAR to suppress speckle from a ratio image encoding the multi-temporal information under the form of a "super-image", i.e. the temporal arithmetic mean of a time series. Experimental results on Sentinel-1 GRD data show that these two multi-temporal strategies provide improved filtering results while adding a limited computational cost. 减少合成孔径雷达 (SAR) 图像中的散斑并限制物理参数的变化通常是充分利用此类数据潜力的关键步骤。如今，深度学习方法在单图像 SAR 恢复方面产生了最先进的结果。尽管如此，现在经常可以使用巨大的多时态堆栈，并且可以有效地利用它来进一步提高图像质量。本文探讨了在多时相框架中采用单图像去斑算法（即 SAR2SAR）的两种快速策略。第一个基于Quegan滤波器，用SAR2SAR代替局部反射率预估计。第二个方法使用 SAR2SAR 来抑制比率图像中的散斑，该比率图像以“超级图像”（即时间序列的时间算术平均值）的形式编码多时间信息。 Sentinel-1 GRD 数据的实验结果表明，这两种多时相策略提供了改进的过滤结果，同时增加了有限的计算成本。 本文提出两种快速策略，利用单图像去斑点算法SAR2SAR结合多时相框架，提升Sentinel-1 GRD图像的斑点抑制效果。 Inès Meraoumia,Emanuele Dalsasso,Loïc Denis,Florence Tupin eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Xiaohuai Le,Tong Lei,Kai Chen,Jing Lu
title: Inference skipping for more efficient real-time speech enhancement with parallel RNNs
title_zh: 使用并行 RNN 跳过推理以实现更高效的实时语音增强
comment: 11 pages, 8 figures, accepted by IEEE/ACM TASLP
comments: 11 pages, 8 figures, accepted by IEEE/ACM TASLP
abstract: Deep neural network (DNN) based speech enhancement models have attracted extensive attention due to their promising performance. However, it is difficult to deploy a powerful DNN in real-time applications because of its high computational cost. Typical compression methods such as pruning and quantization do not make good use of the data characteristics. In this paper, we introduce the Skip-RNN strategy into speech enhancement models with parallel RNNs. The states of the RNNs update intermittently without interrupting the update of the output mask, which leads to significant reduction of computational load without evident audio artifacts. To better leverage the difference between the voice and the noise, we further regularize the skipping strategy with voice activity detection (VAD) guidance, saving more computational load. Experiments on a high-performance speech enhancement model, dual-path convolutional recurrent network (DPCRN), show the superiority of our strategy over strategies like network pruning or directly training a smaller model. We also validate the generalization of the proposed strategy on two other competitive speech enhancement models.
summary: Deep neural network (DNN) based speech enhancement models have attracted extensive attention due to their promising performance. However, it is difficult to deploy a powerful DNN in real-time applications because of its high computational cost. Typical compression methods such as pruning and quantization do not make good use of the data characteristics. In this paper, we introduce the Skip-RNN strategy into speech enhancement models with parallel RNNs. The states of the RNNs update intermittently without interrupting the update of the output mask, which leads to significant reduction of computational load without evident audio artifacts. To better leverage the difference between the voice and the noise, we further regularize the skipping strategy with voice activity detection (VAD) guidance, saving more computational load. Experiments on a high-performance speech enhancement model, dual-path convolutional recurrent network (DPCRN), show the superiority of our strategy over strategies like network pruning or directly training a smaller model. We also validate the generalization of the proposed strategy on two other competitive speech enhancement models.
abstract_zh: 基于深度神经网络（DNN）的语音增强模型因其良好的性能而引起了广泛的关注。然而，由于计算成本较高，在实时应用中部署强大的 DNN 很困难。剪枝和量化等典型的压缩方法没有很好地利用数据特征。在本文中，我们将 Skip-RNN 策略引入具有并行 RNN 的语音增强模型中。 RNN 的状态间歇性更新，不会中断输出掩码的更新，这会显着减少计算负载，而不会出现明显的音频伪影。为了更好地利用语音和噪声之间的差异，我们通过语音活动检测（VAD）指导进一步规范跳跃策略，从而节省更多的计算负载。高性能语音增强模型双路径卷积循环网络（DPCRN）的实验表明，我们的策略比网络剪枝或直接训练较小模型等策略具有优越性。我们还在其他两个竞争性语音增强模型上验证了所提出策略的泛化性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于并行RNN的推理跳过策略，通过间歇更新RNN状态和结合VAD指导，实现更高效的实时语音增强。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在语音增强中计算成本高，传统压缩方法未能有效利用数据特征，需更高效的实时解决方案。
AI.method: 引入Skip-RNN策略，使RNN状态间歇更新以减少计算量，并结合语音活动检测（VAD）指导优化跳过机制。
AI.result: 在DPCRN模型上验证了策略优越性，相比剪枝或直接训练小模型效果更优，且策略在其他模型中具有泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效降低计算负载且保持音频质量，为实时语音增强提供新思路，具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Adrià Caelles,Tim Meinhardt,Guillem Brasó,Laura Leal-Taixé
title: DeVIS: Making Deformable Transformers Work for Video Instance Segmentation
title_zh: DeVIS：使可变形变压器用于视频实例分割
abstract: Video Instance Segmentation (VIS) jointly tackles multi-object detection, tracking, and segmentation in video sequences. In the past, VIS methods mirrored the fragmentation of these subtasks in their architectural design, hence missing out on a joint solution. Transformers recently allowed to cast the entire VIS task as a single set-prediction problem. Nevertheless, the quadratic complexity of existing Transformer-based methods requires long training times, high memory requirements, and processing of low-single-scale feature maps. Deformable attention provides a more efficient alternative but its application to the temporal domain or the segmentation task have not yet been explored. In this work, we present Deformable VIS (DeVIS), a VIS method which capitalizes on the efficiency and performance of deformable Transformers. To reason about all VIS subtasks jointly over multiple frames, we present temporal multi-scale deformable attention with instance-aware object queries. We further introduce a new image and video instance mask head with multi-scale features, and perform near-online video processing with multi-cue clip tracking. DeVIS reduces memory as well as training time requirements, and achieves state-of-the-art results on the YouTube-VIS 2021, as well as the challenging OVIS dataset. Code is available at https://github.com/acaelles97/DeVIS.
summary: Video Instance Segmentation (VIS) jointly tackles multi-object detection, tracking, and segmentation in video sequences. In the past, VIS methods mirrored the fragmentation of these subtasks in their architectural design, hence missing out on a joint solution. Transformers recently allowed to cast the entire VIS task as a single set-prediction problem. Nevertheless, the quadratic complexity of existing Transformer-based methods requires long training times, high memory requirements, and processing of low-single-scale feature maps. Deformable attention provides a more efficient alternative but its application to the temporal domain or the segmentation task have not yet been explored. In this work, we present Deformable VIS (DeVIS), a VIS method which capitalizes on the efficiency and performance of deformable Transformers. To reason about all VIS subtasks jointly over multiple frames, we present temporal multi-scale deformable attention with instance-aware object queries. We further introduce a new image and video instance mask head with multi-scale features, and perform near-online video processing with multi-cue clip tracking. DeVIS reduces memory as well as training time requirements, and achieves state-of-the-art results on the YouTube-VIS 2021, as well as the challenging OVIS dataset. Code is available at https://github.com/acaelles97/DeVIS.
abstract_zh: 视频实例分割 (VIS) 联合处理视频序列中的多对象检测、跟踪和分割。过去，VIS 方法在架构设计中反映了这些子任务的碎片化，因此错过了联合解决方案。 Transformers 最近允许将整个 VIS 任务转换为单个集合预测问题。然而，现有基于 Transformer 的方法的二次复杂度需要较长的训练时间、较高的内存要求以及低单尺度特征图的处理。可变形注意力提供了一种更有效的替代方案，但其在时域或分割任务中的应用尚未被探索。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Deformable VIS (DeVIS)，这是一种利用可变形 Transformer 的效率和性能的 VIS 方法。为了在多个帧上联合推理所有 VIS 子任务，我们提出了具有实例感知对象查询的时间多尺度可变形注意力。我们进一步引入了具有多尺度特征的新图像和视频实例掩模头，并通过多线索剪辑跟踪执行近在线视频处理。 DeVIS 减少了内存和训练时间要求，并在 YouTube-VIS 2021 以及具有挑战性的 OVIS 数据集上取得了最先进的结果。代码可在 https://github.com/acaelles97/DeVIS 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeVIS方法，利用可变形Transformer解决视频实例分割（VIS）任务，实现高效且联合处理多目标检测、跟踪与分割。
AI.motivation: 传统VIS方法因子任务分割导致效率低下，而基于Transformer的方法虽统一了任务但存在二次复杂度问题。可变形注意力机制未被应用于VIS的时序域或分割任务，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计时序多尺度可变形注意力与实例感知对象查询，结合多尺度特征的实例掩码头，并引入多线索片段跟踪实现近在线视频处理。
AI.result: 在YouTube-VIS 2021和OVIS数据集上达到最先进性能，同时降低内存和训练时间需求。
AI.conclusion: DeVIS通过可变形Transformer高效统一处理VIS子任务，在保持性能的同时显著提升计算效率。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出DeVIS方法，利用可变形Transformer解决视频实例分割（VIS）任务，实现高效且联合处理多目标检测、跟踪与分割。

authors_text: Martin J. Menten,Johannes C. Paetzold,Alina Dima,Bjoern H. Menze,Benjamin Knier,Daniel Rueckert
title: Physiology-based simulation of the retinal vasculature enables annotation-free segmentation of OCT angiographs
title_zh: 基于生理学的视网膜脉管系统模拟可实现 OCT 血管造影的无注释分割
abstract: Optical coherence tomography angiography (OCTA) can non-invasively image the eye's circulatory system. In order to reliably characterize the retinal vasculature, there is a need to automatically extract quantitative metrics from these images. The calculation of such biomarkers requires a precise semantic segmentation of the blood vessels. However, deep-learning-based methods for segmentation mostly rely on supervised training with voxel-level annotations, which are costly to obtain. In this work, we present a pipeline to synthesize large amounts of realistic OCTA images with intrinsically matching ground truth labels; thereby obviating the need for manual annotation of training data. Our proposed method is based on two novel components: 1) a physiology-based simulation that models the various retinal vascular plexuses and 2) a suite of physics-based image augmentations that emulate the OCTA image acquisition process including typical artifacts. In extensive benchmarking experiments, we demonstrate the utility of our synthetic data by successfully training retinal vessel segmentation algorithms. Encouraged by our method's competitive quantitative and superior qualitative performance, we believe that it constitutes a versatile tool to advance the quantitative analysis of OCTA images.
summary: Optical coherence tomography angiography (OCTA) can non-invasively image the eye's circulatory system. In order to reliably characterize the retinal vasculature, there is a need to automatically extract quantitative metrics from these images. The calculation of such biomarkers requires a precise semantic segmentation of the blood vessels. However, deep-learning-based methods for segmentation mostly rely on supervised training with voxel-level annotations, which are costly to obtain. In this work, we present a pipeline to synthesize large amounts of realistic OCTA images with intrinsically matching ground truth labels; thereby obviating the need for manual annotation of training data. Our proposed method is based on two novel components: 1) a physiology-based simulation that models the various retinal vascular plexuses and 2) a suite of physics-based image augmentations that emulate the OCTA image acquisition process including typical artifacts. In extensive benchmarking experiments, we demonstrate the utility of our synthetic data by successfully training retinal vessel segmentation algorithms. Encouraged by our method's competitive quantitative and superior qualitative performance, we believe that it constitutes a versatile tool to advance the quantitative analysis of OCTA images.
abstract_zh: 光学相干断层扫描血管造影（OCTA）可以对眼睛的循环系统进行非侵入性成像。为了可靠地表征视网膜脉管系统，需要从这些图像中自动提取定量指标。此类生物标记物的计算需要对血管进行精确的语义分割。然而，基于深度学习的分割方法大多依赖于体素级注释的监督训练，而获得这些方法的成本很高。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个管道来合成大量具有本质上匹配的地面真实标签的真实 OCTA 图像；从而消除了对训练数据进行手动注释的需要。我们提出的方法基于两个新颖的组件：1）基于生理学的模拟，对各种视网膜血管丛进行建模；2）一套基于物理的图像增强，模拟 OCTA 图像采集过程，包括典型的伪影。在广泛的基准测试实验中，我们通过成功训练视网膜血管分割算法来展示合成数据的实用性。受到我们方法具有竞争力的定量和卓越的定性性能的鼓舞，我们相信它构成了推进 OCTA 图像定量分析的多功能工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生理学模拟的视网膜血管生成方法，无需人工标注即可实现OCT血管造影图像的分割。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习分割方法依赖昂贵的人工标注数据，而获取高质量标注数据成本高且耗时。
AI.method: 构建生理学驱动的视网膜血管仿真模型，并结合物理特性生成包含典型伪影的合成OCTA图像。
AI.result: 实验表明合成数据可有效训练分割算法，在定量指标和视觉效果上均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为OCTA图像的定量分析提供了无需标注数据的通用解决方案。

authors_text: Yoad Tewel,Yoav Shalev,Roy Nadler,Idan Schwartz,Lior Wolf
title: Zero-Shot Video Captioning with Evolving Pseudo-Tokens
title_zh: 具有不断发展的伪令牌的零镜头视频字幕
abstract: We introduce a zero-shot video captioning method that employs two frozen networks: the GPT-2 language model and the CLIP image-text matching model. The matching score is used to steer the language model toward generating a sentence that has a high average matching score to a subset of the video frames. Unlike zero-shot image captioning methods, our work considers the entire sentence at once. This is achieved by optimizing, during the generation process, part of the prompt from scratch, by modifying the representation of all other tokens in the prompt, and by repeating the process iteratively, gradually improving the specificity and comprehensiveness of the generated sentence. Our experiments show that the generated captions are coherent and display a broad range of real-world knowledge. Our code is available at: https://github.com/YoadTew/zero-shot-video-to-text
summary: We introduce a zero-shot video captioning method that employs two frozen networks: the GPT-2 language model and the CLIP image-text matching model. The matching score is used to steer the language model toward generating a sentence that has a high average matching score to a subset of the video frames. Unlike zero-shot image captioning methods, our work considers the entire sentence at once. This is achieved by optimizing, during the generation process, part of the prompt from scratch, by modifying the representation of all other tokens in the prompt, and by repeating the process iteratively, gradually improving the specificity and comprehensiveness of the generated sentence. Our experiments show that the generated captions are coherent and display a broad range of real-world knowledge. Our code is available at: https://github.com/YoadTew/zero-shot-video-to-text
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种零样本视频字幕方法，该方法采用两个冻结网络：GPT-2 语言模型和 CLIP 图文匹配模型。匹配分数用于引导语言模型生成与视频帧子集具有高平均匹配分数的句子。与零样本图像字幕方法不同，我们的工作一次考虑整个句子。这是通过在生成过程中从头开始优化部分提示，修改提示中所有其他标记的表示，并通过迭代重复该过程，逐步提高生成句子的特异性和综合性来实现的。我们的实验表明，生成的标题是连贯的，并显示了广泛的现实世界知识。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/YoadTew/zero-shot-video-to-text

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于进化伪标记的零样本视频字幕生成方法
AI.motivation: 传统零样本视频字幕方法难以同时考虑整个句子，导致生成结果不够准确和全面，需改进生成策略以提高连贯性和知识覆盖范围
AI.method: 结合冻结的GPT-2语言模型与CLIP图像-文本匹配模型，通过动态优化提示中的伪标记表示，迭代生成高匹配度的视频字幕
AI.result: 实验表明生成的字幕连贯且涵盖广泛真实世界知识，代码已开源验证有效性
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升零样本视频字幕质量，通过伪标记迭代优化策略，为视频理解任务提供新思路

authors_text: Inès Meraoumia,Emanuele Dalsasso,Loïc Denis,Rémy Abergel,Florence Tupin
title: Multi-temporal speckle reduction with self-supervised deep neural networks
title_zh: 利用自监督深度神经网络进行多时相散斑抑制
abstract: Speckle filtering is generally a prerequisite to the analysis of synthetic aperture radar (SAR) images. Tremendous progress has been achieved in the domain of single-image despeckling. Latest techniques rely on deep neural networks to restore the various structures and textures peculiar to SAR images. The availability of time series of SAR images offers the possibility of improving speckle filtering by combining different speckle realizations over the same area. The supervised training of deep neural networks requires ground-truth speckle-free images. Such images can only be obtained indirectly through some form of averaging, by spatial or temporal integration, and are imperfect. Given the potential of very high quality restoration reachable by multi-temporal speckle filtering, the limitations of ground-truth images need to be circumvented. We extend a recent self-supervised training strategy for single-look complex SAR images, called MERLIN, to the case of multi-temporal filtering. This requires modeling the sources of statistical dependencies in the spatial and temporal dimensions as well as between the real and imaginary components of the complex amplitudes. Quantitative analysis on datasets with simulated speckle indicates a clear improvement of speckle reduction when additional SAR images are included. Our method is then applied to stacks of TerraSAR-X images and shown to outperform competing multi-temporal speckle filtering approaches. The code of the trained models is made freely available on the Gitlab of the IMAGES team of the LTCI Lab, Télécom Paris Institut Polytechnique de Paris (https://gitlab.telecom-paris.fr/ring/multi-temporal-merlin/).
summary: Speckle filtering is generally a prerequisite to the analysis of synthetic aperture radar (SAR) images. Tremendous progress has been achieved in the domain of single-image despeckling. Latest techniques rely on deep neural networks to restore the various structures and textures peculiar to SAR images. The availability of time series of SAR images offers the possibility of improving speckle filtering by combining different speckle realizations over the same area. The supervised training of deep neural networks requires ground-truth speckle-free images. Such images can only be obtained indirectly through some form of averaging, by spatial or temporal integration, and are imperfect. Given the potential of very high quality restoration reachable by multi-temporal speckle filtering, the limitations of ground-truth images need to be circumvented. We extend a recent self-supervised training strategy for single-look complex SAR images, called MERLIN, to the case of multi-temporal filtering. This requires modeling the sources of statistical dependencies in the spatial and temporal dimensions as well as between the real and imaginary components of the complex amplitudes. Quantitative analysis on datasets with simulated speckle indicates a clear improvement of speckle reduction when additional SAR images are included. Our method is then applied to stacks of TerraSAR-X images and shown to outperform competing multi-temporal speckle filtering approaches. The code of the trained models is made freely available on the Gitlab of the IMAGES team of the LTCI Lab, Télécom Paris Institut Polytechnique de Paris (https://gitlab.telecom-paris.fr/ring/multi-temporal-merlin/).
abstract_zh: 散斑滤波通常是分析合成孔径雷达 (SAR) 图像的先决条件。单图像去斑领域取得了巨大进展。最新技术依靠深度神经网络来恢复 SAR 图像特有的各种结构和纹理。 SAR 图像时间序列的可用性提供了通过组合同一区域上的不同散斑实现来改进散斑滤波的可能性。深度神经网络的监督训练需要真实的无散斑图像。此类图像只能通过某种形式的平均、空间或时间积分间接获得，并且是不完美的。考虑到通过多时相散斑滤波可以实现非常高质量的恢复的潜力，需要规避地面实况图像的局限性。我们将最近的单视复杂 SAR 图像的自监督训练策略（称为 MERLIN）扩展到多时态滤波的情况。这需要对空间和时间维度以及复振幅的实部和虚部之间的统计依赖性的来源进行建模。对模拟散斑数据集的定量分析表明，当包含额外的 SAR 图像时，散斑减少效果明显改善。然后，我们的方法被应用于 TerraSAR-X 图像堆栈，并显示出优于竞争的多时相散斑过滤方法。经过训练的模型的代码在巴黎理工学院 LTCI 实验室 IMAGES 团队的 Gitlab 上免费提供 (https://gitlab.telecom-paris.fr/ring/multi-temporal-merlin/)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督深度神经网络的多时相SAR图像斑点噪声抑制方法。
AI.motivation: 传统单幅图像去斑点方法依赖监督学习需要真实干净图像，而多时相SAR数据可提供更丰富的统计信息，但缺乏有效利用的自监督方法。
AI.method: 扩展MERLIN自监督框架至多时相场景，建模时空维度及复振幅实虚部间的统计依赖关系，通过多时相数据联合优化网络参数。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实TerraSAR-X数据集上均优于现有方法，且无需真实标注数据即可实现有效斑点抑制。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过自监督学习有效利用多时相数据统计特性，在无监督条件下实现了优于现有方法的SAR图像斑点抑制效果。
