motivation: 传统单幅图像去斑点方法依赖监督学习需要真实干净图像，而多时相SAR数据可提供更丰富的统计信息，但缺乏有效利用的自监督方法。
method: 扩展MERLIN自监督框架至多时相场景，建模时空维度及复振幅实虚部间的统计依赖关系，通过多时相数据联合优化网络参数。
result: 在模拟和真实TerraSAR-X数据集上均优于现有方法，且无需真实标注数据即可实现有效斑点抑制。
conclusion: 所提方法通过自监督学习有效利用多时相数据统计特性，在无监督条件下实现了优于现有方法的SAR图像斑点抑制效果。
search_text: Multi-temporal speckle reduction with self-supervised deep neural networks 利用自监督深度神经网络进行多时相散斑抑制 Speckle filtering is generally a prerequisite to the analysis of synthetic aperture radar (SAR) images. Tremendous progress has been achieved in the domain of single-image despeckling. Latest techniques rely on deep neural networks to restore the various structures and textures peculiar to SAR images. The availability of time series of SAR images offers the possibility of improving speckle filtering by combining different speckle realizations over the same area. The supervised training of deep neural networks requires ground-truth speckle-free images. Such images can only be obtained indirectly through some form of averaging, by spatial or temporal integration, and are imperfect. Given the potential of very high quality restoration reachable by multi-temporal speckle filtering, the limitations of ground-truth images need to be circumvented. We extend a recent self-supervised training strategy for single-look complex SAR images, called MERLIN, to the case of multi-temporal filtering. This requires modeling the sources of statistical dependencies in the spatial and temporal dimensions as well as between the real and imaginary components of the complex amplitudes. Quantitative analysis on datasets with simulated speckle indicates a clear improvement of speckle reduction when additional SAR images are included. Our method is then applied to stacks of TerraSAR-X images and shown to outperform competing multi-temporal speckle filtering approaches. The code of the trained models is made freely available on the Gitlab of the IMAGES team of the LTCI Lab, Télécom Paris Institut Polytechnique de Paris (https://gitlab.telecom-paris.fr/ring/multi-temporal-merlin/). 散斑滤波通常是分析合成孔径雷达 (SAR) 图像的先决条件。单图像去斑领域取得了巨大进展。最新技术依靠深度神经网络来恢复 SAR 图像特有的各种结构和纹理。 SAR 图像时间序列的可用性提供了通过组合同一区域上的不同散斑实现来改进散斑滤波的可能性。深度神经网络的监督训练需要真实的无散斑图像。此类图像只能通过某种形式的平均、空间或时间积分间接获得，并且是不完美的。考虑到通过多时相散斑滤波可以实现非常高质量的恢复的潜力，需要规避地面实况图像的局限性。我们将最近的单视复杂 SAR 图像的自监督训练策略（称为 MERLIN）扩展到多时态滤波的情况。这需要对空间和时间维度以及复振幅的实部和虚部之间的统计依赖性的来源进行建模。对模拟散斑数据集的定量分析表明，当包含额外的 SAR 图像时，散斑减少效果明显改善。然后，我们的方法被应用于 TerraSAR-X 图像堆栈，并显示出优于竞争的多时相散斑过滤方法。经过训练的模型的代码在巴黎理工学院 LTCI 实验室 IMAGES 团队的 Gitlab 上免费提供 (https://gitlab.telecom-paris.fr/ring/multi-temporal-merlin/)。 本文提出了一种基于自监督深度神经网络的多时相SAR图像斑点噪声抑制方法。 Inès Meraoumia,Emanuele Dalsasso,Loïc Denis,Rémy Abergel,Florence Tupin eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Panagiotis P. Filntisis,George Retsinas,Foivos Paraperas-Papantoniou,Athanasios Katsamanis,Anastasios Roussos,Petros Maragos
title: Visual Speech-Aware Perceptual 3D Facial Expression Reconstruction from Videos
title_zh: 从视频中进行视觉语音感知感知 3D 面部表情重建
abstract: The recent state of the art on monocular 3D face reconstruction from image data has made some impressive advancements, thanks to the advent of Deep Learning. However, it has mostly focused on input coming from a single RGB image, overlooking the following important factors: a) Nowadays, the vast majority of facial image data of interest do not originate from single images but rather from videos, which contain rich dynamic information. b) Furthermore, these videos typically capture individuals in some form of verbal communication (public talks, teleconferences, audiovisual human-computer interactions, interviews, monologues/dialogues in movies, etc). When existing 3D face reconstruction methods are applied in such videos, the artifacts in the reconstruction of the shape and motion of the mouth area are often severe, since they do not match well with the speech audio. To overcome the aforementioned limitations, we present the first method for visual speech-aware perceptual reconstruction of 3D mouth expressions. We do this by proposing a "lipread" loss, which guides the fitting process so that the elicited perception from the 3D reconstructed talking head resembles that of the original video footage. We demonstrate that, interestingly, the lipread loss is better suited for 3D reconstruction of mouth movements compared to traditional landmark losses, and even direct 3D supervision. Furthermore, the devised method does not rely on any text transcriptions or corresponding audio, rendering it ideal for training in unlabeled datasets. We verify the efficiency of our method through exhaustive objective evaluations on three large-scale datasets, as well as subjective evaluation with two web-based user studies.
summary: The recent state of the art on monocular 3D face reconstruction from image data has made some impressive advancements, thanks to the advent of Deep Learning. However, it has mostly focused on input coming from a single RGB image, overlooking the following important factors: a) Nowadays, the vast majority of facial image data of interest do not originate from single images but rather from videos, which contain rich dynamic information. b) Furthermore, these videos typically capture individuals in some form of verbal communication (public talks, teleconferences, audiovisual human-computer interactions, interviews, monologues/dialogues in movies, etc). When existing 3D face reconstruction methods are applied in such videos, the artifacts in the reconstruction of the shape and motion of the mouth area are often severe, since they do not match well with the speech audio. To overcome the aforementioned limitations, we present the first method for visual speech-aware perceptual reconstruction of 3D mouth expressions. We do this by proposing a "lipread" loss, which guides the fitting process so that the elicited perception from the 3D reconstructed talking head resembles that of the original video footage. We demonstrate that, interestingly, the lipread loss is better suited for 3D reconstruction of mouth movements compared to traditional landmark losses, and even direct 3D supervision. Furthermore, the devised method does not rely on any text transcriptions or corresponding audio, rendering it ideal for training in unlabeled datasets. We verify the efficiency of our method through exhaustive objective evaluations on three large-scale datasets, as well as subjective evaluation with two web-based user studies.
abstract_zh: 由于深度学习的出现，基于图像数据的单目 3D 人脸重建的最新技术取得了一些令人印象深刻的进步。然而，它主要关注来自单个 RGB 图像的输入，忽略了以下重要因素： a) 如今，绝大多数感兴趣的面部图像数据并非源自单个图像，而是来自包含丰富动态信息的视频。 b) 此外，这些视频通常以某种形式的口头交流（公开演讲、电话会议、视听人机交互、采访、电影中的独白/对话等）捕捉个人。当现有的3D人脸重建方法应用于此类视频时，嘴部区域的形状和运动的重建中的伪影通常很严重，因为它们与语音音频不能很好地匹配。为了克服上述限制，我们提出了第一种用于 3D 嘴巴表情的视觉语音感知感知重建的方法。我们通过提出“唇读”损失来实现这一点，该损失指导拟合过程，以便从 3D 重建的说话头部引发的感知类似于原始视频片段的感知。有趣的是，我们证明，与传统的地标损失甚至直接 3D 监督相比，唇读损失更适合嘴部运动的 3D 重建。此外，所设计的方法不依赖于任何文本转录或相应的音频，使其非常适合在未标记的数据集中进行训练。我们通过对三个大型数据集进行详尽的客观评估以及两个基于网络的用户研究的主观评估来验证我们方法的效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉语音感知的3D面部表情重建方法，专注于从视频中重建与语音同步的嘴巴运动。
AI.motivation: 现有单目3D人脸重建方法多依赖静态图像，忽视了视频中的动态信息及语音与口型的同步性，导致嘴巴区域重建失真。
AI.method: 设计一种'唇读'损失函数，通过感知匹配视频中原有的口型动态，无需依赖音频或文本标注，直接优化3D重建结果。
AI.result: 在三个大规模数据集上通过客观指标验证方法有效性，并通过两个用户研究证实主观重建质量优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过视觉语音感知损失实现了更自然的3D嘴巴运动重建，且适用于无标注视频数据的训练场景。

authors_text: Yongchao Huang
title: Classification via score-based generative modelling
title_zh: 通过基于分数的生成模型进行分类
abstract: In this work, we investigated the application of score-based gradient learning in discriminative and generative classification settings. Score function can be used to characterize data distribution as an alternative to density. It can be efficiently learned via score matching, and used to flexibly generate credible samples to enhance discriminative classification quality, to recover density and to build generative classifiers. We analysed the decision theories involving score-based representations, and performed experiments on simulated and real-world datasets, demonstrating its effectiveness in achieving and improving binary classification performance, and robustness to perturbations, particularly in high dimensions and imbalanced situations.
summary: In this work, we investigated the application of score-based gradient learning in discriminative and generative classification settings. Score function can be used to characterize data distribution as an alternative to density. It can be efficiently learned via score matching, and used to flexibly generate credible samples to enhance discriminative classification quality, to recover density and to build generative classifiers. We analysed the decision theories involving score-based representations, and performed experiments on simulated and real-world datasets, demonstrating its effectiveness in achieving and improving binary classification performance, and robustness to perturbations, particularly in high dimensions and imbalanced situations.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了基于分数的梯度学习在判别和生成分类设置中的应用。得分函数可用于表征数据分布，作为密度的替代方法。它可以通过分数匹配进行有效学习，并用于灵活生成可信样本，以提高判别性分类质量、恢复密度并构建生成分类器。我们分析了涉及基于分数的表示的决策理论，并对模拟和现实数据集进行了实验，证明了其在实现和提高二元分类性能以及对扰动的鲁棒性方面的有效性，特别是在高维度和不平衡的情况下。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于分数生成模型在分类任务中的应用，通过分数匹配学习数据分布并生成样本以提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统分类方法在高维和不平衡数据中表现不足，需探索更灵活的数据分布建模方式以增强鲁棒性。
AI.method: 利用分数匹配学习数据分布，通过生成可信样本辅助判别分类，并构建基于分数表示的生成分类器。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实数据集上验证了方法有效性，尤其在高维和不平衡场景下表现出更强的分类性能和抗扰动能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于分数的生成模型能有效提升分类质量，为处理复杂数据分布提供了新思路。

authors_text: Eduardo C. Garrido-Merchán,Carlos Blanco
title: Do Artificial Intelligence Systems Understand?
title_zh: 人工智能系统能理解吗？
abstract: Are intelligent machines really intelligent? Is the underlying philosophical concept of intelligence satisfactory for describing how the present systems work? Is understanding a necessary and sufficient condition for intelligence? If a machine could understand, should we attribute subjectivity to it? This paper addresses the problem of deciding whether the so-called "intelligent machines" are capable of understanding, instead of merely processing signs. It deals with the relationship between syntaxis and semantics. The main thesis concerns the inevitability of semantics for any discussion about the possibility of building conscious machines, condensed into the following two tenets: "If a machine is capable of understanding (in the strong sense), then it must be capable of combining rules and intuitions"; "If semantics cannot be reduced to syntaxis, then a machine cannot understand." Our conclusion states that it is not necessary to attribute understanding to a machine in order to explain its exhibited "intelligent" behavior; a merely syntactic and mechanistic approach to intelligence as a task-solving tool suffices to justify the range of operations that it can display in the current state of technological development.
summary: Are intelligent machines really intelligent? Is the underlying philosophical concept of intelligence satisfactory for describing how the present systems work? Is understanding a necessary and sufficient condition for intelligence? If a machine could understand, should we attribute subjectivity to it? This paper addresses the problem of deciding whether the so-called "intelligent machines" are capable of understanding, instead of merely processing signs. It deals with the relationship between syntaxis and semantics. The main thesis concerns the inevitability of semantics for any discussion about the possibility of building conscious machines, condensed into the following two tenets: "If a machine is capable of understanding (in the strong sense), then it must be capable of combining rules and intuitions"; "If semantics cannot be reduced to syntaxis, then a machine cannot understand." Our conclusion states that it is not necessary to attribute understanding to a machine in order to explain its exhibited "intelligent" behavior; a merely syntactic and mechanistic approach to intelligence as a task-solving tool suffices to justify the range of operations that it can display in the current state of technological development.
abstract_zh: 智能机器真的智能吗？智能的基本哲学概念是否足以描述当前系统的工作原理？理解是智力的充分必要条件吗？如果机器能够理解，我们是否应该赋予它主观性？本文解决的问题是确定所谓的“智能机器”是否能够理解而不仅仅是处理符号。它处理语法和语义之间的关系。主要论文涉及任何关于构建有意识机器的可能性的讨论中不可避免的语义学，浓缩为以下两个原则：“如果机器能够理解（在强意义上），那么它必须能够将规则和直觉结合起来”； “如果语义不能简化为语法，那么机器就无法理解。”我们的结论是，没有必要将理解归因于机器来解释其表现出的“智能”行为；仅将情报作为一种任务解决工具的句法和机械方法就足以证明其在当前技术发展状态下可以展示的操作范围是合理的。

AI.tldr: 探讨人工智能系统是否具备真正理解能力，而非仅处理符号。
AI.motivation: 质疑当前对智能机器的理解是否满足哲学意义上的智能定义，并探讨语义与语法的关系对机器意识的影响。
AI.method: 通过哲学分析与语法语义关系的理论探讨，提出两个核心命题进行论证。
AI.result: 无需赋予机器理解能力即可解释其智能行为，仅需语法和机械方法即可实现当前技术范围内的操作。
AI.conclusion: 语义是构建有意识机器的必要条件，但现阶段技术发展无需将理解作为智能行为的必要属性。

search_text: Do Artificial Intelligence Systems Understand? 人工智能系统能理解吗？ Are intelligent machines really intelligent? Is the underlying philosophical concept of intelligence satisfactory for describing how the present systems work? Is understanding a necessary and sufficient condition for intelligence? If a machine could understand, should we attribute subjectivity to it? This paper addresses the problem of deciding whether the so-called "intelligent machines" are capable of understanding, instead of merely processing signs. It deals with the relationship between syntaxis and semantics. The main thesis concerns the inevitability of semantics for any discussion about the possibility of building conscious machines, condensed into the following two tenets: "If a machine is capable of understanding (in the strong sense), then it must be capable of combining rules and intuitions"; "If semantics cannot be reduced to syntaxis, then a machine cannot understand." Our conclusion states that it is not necessary to attribute understanding to a machine in order to explain its exhibited "intelligent" behavior; a merely syntactic and mechanistic approach to intelligence as a task-solving tool suffices to justify the range of operations that it can display in the current state of technological development. 智能机器真的智能吗？智能的基本哲学概念是否足以描述当前系统的工作原理？理解是智力的充分必要条件吗？如果机器能够理解，我们是否应该赋予它主观性？本文解决的问题是确定所谓的“智能机器”是否能够理解而不仅仅是处理符号。它处理语法和语义之间的关系。主要论文涉及任何关于构建有意识机器的可能性的讨论中不可避免的语义学，浓缩为以下两个原则：“如果机器能够理解（在强意义上），那么它必须能够将规则和直觉结合起来”； “如果语义不能简化为语法，那么机器就无法理解。”我们的结论是，没有必要将理解归因于机器来解释其表现出的“智能”行为；仅将情报作为一种任务解决工具的句法和机械方法就足以证明其在当前技术发展状态下可以展示的操作范围是合理的。 探讨人工智能系统是否具备真正理解能力，而非仅处理符号。 Eduardo C. authors_text: Jia Li,Jiantao Nie,Dan Guo,Richang Hong,Meng Wang
title: Emotion Separation and Recognition from a Facial Expression by Generating the Poker Face with Vision Transformers
title_zh: 通过使用视觉变压器生成扑克脸来进行面部表情的情感分离和识别
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication in the IEEE Transactions on Computational Social Systems (TCSS)
comments: This paper has been accepted for publication in the IEEE Transactions on Computational Social Systems (TCSS)
abstract: Representation learning and feature disentanglement have garnered significant research interest in the field of facial expression recognition (FER). The inherent ambiguity of emotion labels poses challenges for conventional supervised representation learning methods. Moreover, directly learning the mapping from a facial expression image to an emotion label lacks explicit supervision signals for capturing fine-grained facial features. In this paper, we propose a novel FER model, named Poker Face Vision Transformer or PF-ViT, to address these challenges. PF-ViT aims to separate and recognize the disturbance-agnostic emotion from a static facial image via generating its corresponding poker face, without the need for paired images. Inspired by the Facial Action Coding System, we regard an expressive face as the combined result of a set of facial muscle movements on one's poker face (i.e., an emotionless face). PF-ViT utilizes vanilla Vision Transformers, and its components are firstly pre-trained as Masked Autoencoders on a large facial expression dataset without emotion labels, yielding excellent representations. Subsequently, we train PF-ViT using a GAN framework. During training, the auxiliary task of poke face generation promotes the disentanglement between emotional and emotion-irrelevant components, guiding the FER model to holistically capture discriminative facial details. Quantitative and qualitative results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, surpassing the state-of-the-art methods on four popular FER datasets.
summary: Representation learning and feature disentanglement have garnered significant research interest in the field of facial expression recognition (FER). The inherent ambiguity of emotion labels poses challenges for conventional supervised representation learning methods. Moreover, directly learning the mapping from a facial expression image to an emotion label lacks explicit supervision signals for capturing fine-grained facial features. In this paper, we propose a novel FER model, named Poker Face Vision Transformer or PF-ViT, to address these challenges. PF-ViT aims to separate and recognize the disturbance-agnostic emotion from a static facial image via generating its corresponding poker face, without the need for paired images. Inspired by the Facial Action Coding System, we regard an expressive face as the combined result of a set of facial muscle movements on one's poker face (i.e., an emotionless face). PF-ViT utilizes vanilla Vision Transformers, and its components are firstly pre-trained as Masked Autoencoders on a large facial expression dataset without emotion labels, yielding excellent representations. Subsequently, we train PF-ViT using a GAN framework. During training, the auxiliary task of poke face generation promotes the disentanglement between emotional and emotion-irrelevant components, guiding the FER model to holistically capture discriminative facial details. Quantitative and qualitative results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, surpassing the state-of-the-art methods on four popular FER datasets.
abstract_zh: 表示学习和特征解缠在面部表情识别（FER）领域引起了广泛的研究兴趣。情感标签固有的模糊性给传统的监督表示学习方法带来了挑战。此外，直接学习从面部表情图像到情绪标签的映射缺乏用于捕获细粒度面部特征的明确监督信号。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 FER 模型，名为 Poker Face Vision Transformer 或 PF-ViT，来应对这些挑战。 PF-ViT 旨在通过生成相应的扑克脸，从静态面部图像中分离和识别与干扰无关的情绪，而不需要配对图像。受面部动作编码系统的启发，我们将富有表现力的面部视为扑克脸（即无表情的面部）上一组面部肌肉运动的综合结果。 PF-ViT 利用普通的 Vision Transformers，其组件首先在没有情感标签的大型面部表情数据集上预先训练为 Masked Autoencoders，从而产生出色的表示。随后，我们使用 GAN 框架训练 PF-ViT。在训练过程中，戳脸生成的辅助任务促进了情感和与情感无关的成分之间的解开，指导 FER 模型整体捕捉有区别的面部细节。定量和定性结果证明了我们方法的有效性，在四个流行的 FER 数据集上超越了最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PF-ViT的新型面部表情识别模型，通过生成扑克脸（无表情脸）分离并识别静态面部图像中的情绪信息，无需配对图像。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习方法因情绪标签的模糊性和缺乏细粒度监督信号难以捕捉面部细节，需开发无需配对图像且能解耦情绪相关与无关特征的模型。
AI.method: 基于Vision Transformer构建PF-ViT，先通过无标签大规模数据集预训练Masked Autoencoder获得优质表示，再采用GAN框架训练，利用扑克脸生成任务促进情绪与无关特征的解耦。
AI.result: 在四个主流FER数据集上，该方法在定量和定性结果上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过扑克脸生成辅助任务，PF-ViT有效实现了情绪特征解耦，为面部表情识别提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yunhui Han,Kunming Luo,Ao Luo,Jiangyu Liu,Haoqiang Fan,Guiming Luo,Shuaicheng Liu
title: RealFlow: EM-based Realistic Optical Flow Dataset Generation from Videos
title_zh: RealFlow：从视频生成基于 EM 的真实光流数据集
abstract: Obtaining the ground truth labels from a video is challenging since the manual annotation of pixel-wise flow labels is prohibitively expensive and laborious. Besides, existing approaches try to adapt the trained model on synthetic datasets to authentic videos, which inevitably suffers from domain discrepancy and hinders the performance for real-world applications. To solve these problems, we propose RealFlow, an Expectation-Maximization based framework that can create large-scale optical flow datasets directly from any unlabeled realistic videos. Specifically, we first estimate optical flow between a pair of video frames, and then synthesize a new image from this pair based on the predicted flow. Thus the new image pairs and their corresponding flows can be regarded as a new training set. Besides, we design a Realistic Image Pair Rendering (RIPR) module that adopts softmax splatting and bi-directional hole filling techniques to alleviate the artifacts of the image synthesis. In the E-step, RIPR renders new images to create a large quantity of training data. In the M-step, we utilize the generated training data to train an optical flow network, which can be used to estimate optical flows in the next E-step. During the iterative learning steps, the capability of the flow network is gradually improved, so is the accuracy of the flow, as well as the quality of the synthesized dataset. Experimental results show that RealFlow outperforms previous dataset generation methods by a considerably large margin. Moreover, based on the generated dataset, our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on two standard benchmarks compared with both supervised and unsupervised optical flow methods. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/megvii-research/RealFlow
summary: Obtaining the ground truth labels from a video is challenging since the manual annotation of pixel-wise flow labels is prohibitively expensive and laborious. Besides, existing approaches try to adapt the trained model on synthetic datasets to authentic videos, which inevitably suffers from domain discrepancy and hinders the performance for real-world applications. To solve these problems, we propose RealFlow, an Expectation-Maximization based framework that can create large-scale optical flow datasets directly from any unlabeled realistic videos. Specifically, we first estimate optical flow between a pair of video frames, and then synthesize a new image from this pair based on the predicted flow. Thus the new image pairs and their corresponding flows can be regarded as a new training set. Besides, we design a Realistic Image Pair Rendering (RIPR) module that adopts softmax splatting and bi-directional hole filling techniques to alleviate the artifacts of the image synthesis. In the E-step, RIPR renders new images to create a large quantity of training data. In the M-step, we utilize the generated training data to train an optical flow network, which can be used to estimate optical flows in the next E-step. During the iterative learning steps, the capability of the flow network is gradually improved, so is the accuracy of the flow, as well as the quality of the synthesized dataset. Experimental results show that RealFlow outperforms previous dataset generation methods by a considerably large margin. Moreover, based on the generated dataset, our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on two standard benchmarks compared with both supervised and unsupervised optical flow methods. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/megvii-research/RealFlow
abstract_zh: 从视频中获取真实标签具有挑战性，因为逐像素流标签的手动注释非常昂贵且费力。此外，现有的方法试图将合成数据集上的训练模型适应真实的视频，这不可避免地会遇到域差异并阻碍实际应用程序的性能。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 RealFlow，一种基于期望最大化的框架，可以直接从任何未标记的真实视频创建大规模光流数据集。具体来说，我们首先估计一对视频帧之间的光流，然后根据预测的流从这对视频帧中合成一个新图像。因此，新的图像对及其相应的流可以被视为新的训练集。此外，我们设计了真实图像对渲染（RIPR）模块，该模块采用softmax splatting和双向孔填充技术来减轻图像合成的伪影。在E-step中，RIPR渲染新图像以创建大量训练数据。在M步中，我们利用生成的训练数据来训练光流网络，该网络可用于估计下一个E步中的光流。在迭代学习步骤中，流网络的能力逐渐提高，流的准确性以及合成数据集的质量也逐渐提高。实验结果表明，RealFlow 大大优于以前的数据集生成方法。此外，基于生成的数据集，与监督和无监督光流方法相比，我们的方法在两个标准基准上实现了最先进的性能。我们的代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/megvii-research/RealFlow 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出RealFlow，一种基于EM算法的框架，可直接从未标记的真实视频中生成大规模真实光学流数据集。
AI.motivation: 真实视频的手动像素级流标注成本高昂且劳动密集，现有方法依赖合成数据集导致领域差异，限制了实际应用效果。
AI.method: 通过EM迭代框架，首先估计视频帧间光流并合成新图像对，设计RIPR模块采用softmax splatting和双向补洞技术减少合成伪影，迭代优化光流网络与数据集质量。
AI.result: 实验表明RealFlow显著优于现有数据集生成方法，在两个标准基准测试中达到优于监督和无监督光流方法的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: RealFlow通过自迭代优化有效生成高质量真实光学流数据集，提升了光流估计的实用性与准确性。

search_text: RealFlow: EM-based Realistic Optical Flow Dataset Generation from Videos RealFlow：从视频生成基于 EM 的真实光流数据集 Obtaining the ground truth labels from a video is challenging since the manual annotation of pixel-wise flow labels is prohibitively expensive and laborious. Besides, existing approaches try to adapt the trained model on synthetic datasets to authentic videos, which inevitably suffers from domain discrepancy and hinders the performance for real-world applications. To solve these problems, we propose RealFlow, an Expectation-Maximization based framework that can create large-scale optical flow datasets directly from any unlabeled realistic videos. Specifically, we first estimate optical flow between a pair of video frames, and then synthesize a new image from this pair based on the predicted flow. Thus the new image pairs and their corresponding flows can be regarded as a new training set. Besides, we design a Realistic Image Pair Rendering (RIPR) module that adopts softmax splatting and bi-directional hole filling techniques to alleviate the artifacts of the image synthesis. In the E-step, RIPR renders new images to create a large quantity of training data. In the M-step, we utilize the generated training data to train an optical flow network, which can be used to estimate optical flows in the next E-step. During the iterative learning steps, the capability of the flow network is gradually improved, so is the accuracy of the flow, as well as the quality of the synthesized dataset. Experimental results show that RealFlow outperforms previous dataset generation methods by a considerably large margin. Moreover, based on the generated dataset, our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on two standard benchmarks compared with both supervised and unsupervised optical flow methods. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/megvii-research/RealFlow 从视频中获取真实标签具有挑战性，因为逐像素流标签的手动注释非常昂贵且费力。此外，现有的方法试图将合成数据集上的训练模型适应真实的视频，这不可避免地会遇到域差异并阻碍实际应用程序的性能。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 RealFlow，一种基于期望最大化的框架，可以直接从任何未标记的真实视频创建大规模光流数据集。具体来说，我们首先估计一对视频帧之间的光流，然后根据预测的流从这对视频帧中合成一个新图像。因此，新的图像对及其相应的流可以被视为新的训练集。此外，我们设计了真实图像对渲染（RIPR）模块，该模块采用softmax splatting和双向孔填充技术来减轻图像合成的伪影。在E-step中，RIPR渲染新图像以创建大量训练数据。在M步中，我们利用生成的训练数据来训练光流网络，该网络可用于估计下一个E步中的光流。在迭代学习步骤中，流网络的能力逐渐提高，流的准确性以及合成数据集的质量也逐渐提高。实验结果表明，RealFlow 大大优于以前的数据集生成方法。此外，基于生成的数据集，与监督和无监督光流方法相比，我们的方法在两个标准基准上实现了最先进的性能。我们的代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/megvii-research/RealFlow 获取 本文提出RealFlow，一种基于EM算法的框架，可直接从未标记的真实视频中生成大规模真实光学流数据集。 Yunhui Han,Kunming Luo,Ao Luo,Jiangyu Liu,Haoqiang Fan,Guiming Luo,Shuaicheng Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Dominik Scheder
title: PPSZ is better than you think
title_zh: PPSZ比你想象的更好
comment: Journal version of this work. The previous arxiv version is the "full version", which contains the proof for the k=3 case
comments: Journal version of this work. The previous arxiv version is the "full version", which contains the proof for the k=3 case
abstract: PPSZ, for long time the fastest known algorithm for $k$-SAT, works by going through the variables of the input formula in random order; each variable is then set randomly to $0$ or $1$, unless the correct value can be inferred by an efficiently implementable rule (like small-width resolution; or being implied by a small set of clauses). We show that PPSZ performs exponentially better than previously known, for all $k \geq 3$. For Unique-$3$-SAT we bound its running time by $O(1.306973^{n})$, which is somewhat better than the algorithm of Hansen, Kaplan, Zamir, and Zwick, which runs in time $O(1.306995^n)$. Before that, the best known upper bound for Unique-$3$-SAT was $O(1.3070319^n)$. All improvements are achieved without changing the original PPSZ. The core idea is to pretend that PPSZ does not process the variables in uniformly random order, but according to a carefully designed distribution. We write "pretend" since this can be done without any actual change to the algorithm.
summary: PPSZ, for long time the fastest known algorithm for $k$-SAT, works by going through the variables of the input formula in random order; each variable is then set randomly to $0$ or $1$, unless the correct value can be inferred by an efficiently implementable rule (like small-width resolution; or being implied by a small set of clauses). We show that PPSZ performs exponentially better than previously known, for all $k \geq 3$. For Unique-$3$-SAT we bound its running time by $O(1.306973^{n})$, which is somewhat better than the algorithm of Hansen, Kaplan, Zamir, and Zwick, which runs in time $O(1.306995^n)$. Before that, the best known upper bound for Unique-$3$-SAT was $O(1.3070319^n)$. All improvements are achieved without changing the original PPSZ. The core idea is to pretend that PPSZ does not process the variables in uniformly random order, but according to a carefully designed distribution. We write "pretend" since this can be done without any actual change to the algorithm.
abstract_zh: PPSZ 是长期以来已知最快的 $k$-SAT 算法，它的工作原理是按随机顺序遍历输入公式的变量；然后，每个变量被随机设置为 $0$ 或 $1$，除非可以通过有效可实现的规则推断出正确的值（例如小宽度分辨率；或由一小组子句暗示）。我们证明，对于所有 $k \geq 3$，PPSZ 的性能比之前已知的要好得多。对于 Unique-$3$-SAT，我们将其运行时间限制为 $O(1.306973^{n})$，这比 Hansen、Kaplan、Zamir 和 Zwick 的算法（运行时间为 $O(1.306995^n)$）要好一些。在此之前，Unique-$3$-SAT 最著名的上限是 $O(1.3070319^n)$。所有改进都是在不改变原有PPSZ的情况下实现的。核心思想是假设 PPSZ 不是按照统一随机顺序处理变量，而是按照精心设计的分布处理变量。我们写“假装”，因为这可以在不对算法进行任何实际更改的情况下完成。

AI.tldr: 本文证明了PPSZ算法在解决k-SAT问题时比之前已知算法更高效，尤其在Unique-3-SAT情况下表现更优。
AI.motivation: 尽管PPSZ长期被认为是k-SAT的最快算法，但其性能潜力尚未被充分挖掘，尤其在Unique-3-SAT上存在更优时间复杂度的理论空间。
AI.method: 通过设计特定的变量处理顺序分布，无需修改原始PPSZ算法结构，仅在理论分析中假设变量按此分布处理以获得性能提升。
AI.result: PPSZ在Unique-3-SAT上的时间复杂度达到O(1.306973^n)，优于此前Hansen等人的O(1.306995^n)及更早的O(1.3070319^n)结果。
AI.conclusion: PPSZ算法通过理论上的顺序分布优化，在保持原有实现不变的情况下实现了指数级性能提升，验证了其比现有认知更强大的潜力。

authors_text: Knut J. Strømmen,Jim Tørresen,Ulysse Côté-Allard
title: Latent Space Unsupervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 潜在空间无监督语义分割
comment: Ongoing peer-review process 17 pages, 10 Figures, 7 Tables
comments: Ongoing peer-review process 17 pages, 10 Figures, 7 Tables
abstract: The development of compact and energy-efficient wearable sensors has led to an increase in the availability of biosignals. To analyze these continuously recorded, and often multidimensional, time series at scale, being able to conduct meaningful unsupervised data segmentation is an auspicious target. A common way to achieve this is to identify change-points within the time series as the segmentation basis. However, traditional change-point detection algorithms often come with drawbacks, limiting their real-world applicability. Notably, they generally rely on the complete time series to be available and thus cannot be used for real-time applications. Another common limitation is that they poorly (or cannot) handle the segmentation of multidimensional time series. Consequently, the main contribution of this work is to propose a novel unsupervised segmentation algorithm for multidimensional time series named Latent Space Unsupervised Semantic Segmentation (LS-USS), which was designed to work easily with both online and batch data. When comparing LS-USS against other state-of-the-art change-point detection algorithms on a variety of real-world datasets, in both the offline and real-time setting, LS-USS systematically achieves on par or better performances.
summary: The development of compact and energy-efficient wearable sensors has led to an increase in the availability of biosignals. To analyze these continuously recorded, and often multidimensional, time series at scale, being able to conduct meaningful unsupervised data segmentation is an auspicious target. A common way to achieve this is to identify change-points within the time series as the segmentation basis. However, traditional change-point detection algorithms often come with drawbacks, limiting their real-world applicability. Notably, they generally rely on the complete time series to be available and thus cannot be used for real-time applications. Another common limitation is that they poorly (or cannot) handle the segmentation of multidimensional time series. Consequently, the main contribution of this work is to propose a novel unsupervised segmentation algorithm for multidimensional time series named Latent Space Unsupervised Semantic Segmentation (LS-USS), which was designed to work easily with both online and batch data. When comparing LS-USS against other state-of-the-art change-point detection algorithms on a variety of real-world datasets, in both the offline and real-time setting, LS-USS systematically achieves on par or better performances.
abstract_zh: 紧凑且节能的可穿戴传感器的发展导致生物信号的可用性增加。为了大规模分析这些连续记录的、通常是多维的时间序列，能够进行有意义的无监督数据分割是一个美好的目标。实现此目的的常见方法是识别时间序列内的变化点作为分段基础。然而，传统的变化点检测算法通常存在缺陷，限制了其现实世界的适用性。值得注意的是，它们通常依赖于完整的时间序列可用，因此不能用于实时应用程序。另一个常见的限制是它们不能很好地（或不能）处理多维时间序列的分割。因此，这项工作的主要贡献是提出了一种新颖的多维时间序列无监督分割算法，称为潜在空间无监督语义分割（LS-USS），该算法旨在轻松处理在线和批量数据。当在各种现实世界数据集上将 LS-USS 与其他最先进的变化点检测算法进行比较时，无论是离线还是实时设置，LS-USS 系统地实现了同等或更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LS-USS的无监督语义分割算法，用于处理多维时间序列数据，适用于在线和批量数据场景。
AI.motivation: 传统变点检测算法存在依赖完整时间序列和难以处理多维数据的局限性，而可穿戴设备产生的连续多维生物信号需要更高效的实时分割方法。
AI.method: 通过构建潜在空间表示，设计LS-USS算法以处理多维时间序列，支持在线和批量数据处理模式。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集的离线和实时测试中，LS-USS性能优于或至少等同于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: LS-USS有效解决了传统方法的局限性，为多维时间序列的实时无监督分割提供了可行方案。

Another common limitation is that they poorly (or cannot) handle the segmentation of multidimensional time series. Consequently, the main contribution of this work is to propose a novel unsupervised segmentation algorithm for multidimensional time series named Latent Space Unsupervised Semantic Segmentation (LS-USS), which was designed to work easily with both online and batch data. When comparing LS-USS against other state-of-the-art change-point detection algorithms on a variety of real-world datasets, in both the offline and real-time setting, LS-USS systematically achieves on par or better performances. 紧凑且节能的可穿戴传感器的发展导致生物信号的可用性增加。为了大规模分析这些连续记录的、通常是多维的时间序列，能够进行有意义的无监督数据分割是一个美好的目标。实现此目的的常见方法是识别时间序列内的变化点作为分段基础。然而，传统的变化点检测算法通常存在缺陷，限制了其现实世界的适用性。值得注意的是，它们通常依赖于完整的时间序列可用，因此不能用于实时应用程序。另一个常见的限制是它们不能很好地（或不能）处理多维时间序列的分割。因此，这项工作的主要贡献是提出了一种新颖的多维时间序列无监督分割算法，称为潜在空间无监督语义分割（LS-USS），该算法旨在轻松处理在线和批量数据。当在各种现实世界数据集上将 LS-USS 与其他最先进的变化点检测算法进行比较时，无论是离线还是实时设置，LS-USS 系统地实现了同等或更好的性能。 本文提出了一种名为LS-USS的无监督语义分割算法，用于处理多维时间序列数据，适用于在线和批量数据场景。 Knut J. Strømmen,Jim Tørresen,Ulysse Côté-Allard cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Hao Meng,Sheng Jin,Wentao Liu,Chen Qian,Mengxiang Lin,Wanli Ouyang,Ping Luo
title: 3D Interacting Hand Pose Estimation by Hand De-occlusion and Removal
title_zh: 通过手去遮挡和移除进行 3D 交互手部姿势估计
abstract: Estimating 3D interacting hand pose from a single RGB image is essential for understanding human actions. Unlike most previous works that directly predict the 3D poses of two interacting hands simultaneously, we propose to decompose the challenging interacting hand pose estimation task and estimate the pose of each hand separately. In this way, it is straightforward to take advantage of the latest research progress on the single-hand pose estimation system. However, hand pose estimation in interacting scenarios is very challenging, due to (1) severe hand-hand occlusion and (2) ambiguity caused by the homogeneous appearance of hands. To tackle these two challenges, we propose a novel Hand De-occlusion and Removal (HDR) framework to perform hand de-occlusion and distractor removal. We also propose the first large-scale synthetic amodal hand dataset, termed Amodal InterHand Dataset (AIH), to facilitate model training and promote the development of the related research. Experiments show that the proposed method significantly outperforms previous state-of-the-art interacting hand pose estimation approaches. Codes and data are available at https://github.com/MengHao666/HDR.
summary: Estimating 3D interacting hand pose from a single RGB image is essential for understanding human actions. Unlike most previous works that directly predict the 3D poses of two interacting hands simultaneously, we propose to decompose the challenging interacting hand pose estimation task and estimate the pose of each hand separately. In this way, it is straightforward to take advantage of the latest research progress on the single-hand pose estimation system. However, hand pose estimation in interacting scenarios is very challenging, due to (1) severe hand-hand occlusion and (2) ambiguity caused by the homogeneous appearance of hands. To tackle these two challenges, we propose a novel Hand De-occlusion and Removal (HDR) framework to perform hand de-occlusion and distractor removal. We also propose the first large-scale synthetic amodal hand dataset, termed Amodal InterHand Dataset (AIH), to facilitate model training and promote the development of the related research. Experiments show that the proposed method significantly outperforms previous state-of-the-art interacting hand pose estimation approaches. Codes and data are available at https://github.com/MengHao666/HDR.
abstract_zh: 从单个 RGB 图像估计 3D 交互手部姿势对于理解人类行为至关重要。与大多数先前同时直接预测两只交互手的 3D 姿势的工作不同，我们建议分解具有挑战性的交互手姿势估计任务并分别估计每只手的姿势。这样，就可以直接利用单手姿态估计系统的最新研究进展。然而，交互场景中的手部姿势估计非常具有挑战性，因为（1）严重的手部遮挡和（2）手部均匀外观引起的模糊性。为了解决这两个挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的手部去遮挡和去除（HDR）框架来执行手部去遮挡和干扰物去除。我们还提出了第一个大规模合成非模态手数据集，称为Amodal InterHand数据集（AIH），以促进模型训练并促进相关研究的发展。实验表明，所提出的方法明显优于以前最先进的交互手势估计方法。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/MengHao666/HDR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过手部去遮挡和移除来估计交互手部3D姿态的方法，解决单目图像中双手交互时的遮挡和外观歧义问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法直接同时预测交互双手的3D姿态，但面临严重遮挡和手部外观相似性导致的歧义问题，难以有效利用单手姿态估计的最新进展。
AI.method: 提出HDR框架实现手部去遮挡和干扰移除，并构建首个大规模合成的Amodal InterHand数据集（AIH）辅助模型训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在交互手部姿态估计任务上显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: HDR框架与AIH数据集有效解决了交互场景下的遮挡和歧义问题，推动了相关研究的发展。

authors_text: Adam Seewald,Héctor García de Marina,Henrik Skov Midtiby,Ulrik Pagh Schultz
title: Energy-Aware Planning-Scheduling for Autonomous Aerial Robots
title_zh: 自主空中机器人的能源感知规划调度
abstract: In this paper, we present an online planning-scheduling approach for battery-powered autonomous aerial robots. The approach consists of simultaneously planning a coverage path and scheduling onboard computational tasks. We further derive a novel variable coverage motion robust to airborne constraints and an empirically motivated energy model. The model includes the energy contribution of the schedule based on an automatic computational energy modeling tool. Our experiments show how an initial flight plan is adjusted online as a function of the available battery, accounting for uncertainty. Our approach remedies possible in-flight failure in case of unexpected battery drops, e.g., due to adverse atmospheric conditions, and increases the overall fault tolerance.
summary: In this paper, we present an online planning-scheduling approach for battery-powered autonomous aerial robots. The approach consists of simultaneously planning a coverage path and scheduling onboard computational tasks. We further derive a novel variable coverage motion robust to airborne constraints and an empirically motivated energy model. The model includes the energy contribution of the schedule based on an automatic computational energy modeling tool. Our experiments show how an initial flight plan is adjusted online as a function of the available battery, accounting for uncertainty. Our approach remedies possible in-flight failure in case of unexpected battery drops, e.g., due to adverse atmospheric conditions, and increases the overall fault tolerance.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于电池供电的自主飞行机器人的在线计划调度方法。该方法包括同时规划覆盖路径和调度机载计算任务。我们进一步推导了一种新颖的可变覆盖运动，对机载约束具有鲁棒性，并建立了一个基于经验的能量模型。该模型包括基于自动计算能源建模工具的时间表的能源贡献。我们的实验展示了如何根据可用电池在线调整初始飞行计划，并考虑到不确定性。我们的方法可以补救在电池意外掉落（例如由于不利的大气条件）的情况下可能出现的飞行故障，并提高整体容错能力。

AI.tldr: 提出一种在线规划调度方法，用于电池驱动的自主空中机器人，同时优化覆盖路径和计算任务调度，以提高能源效率和任务可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在电池电量突变时可能无法有效调整，导致任务失败，需要一种能动态调整的节能规划调度方法以提高自主空中机器人的可靠性。
AI.method: 结合变量覆盖运动模型和经验能量模型，通过在线调整飞行计划和任务调度，动态适应电池电量变化，确保任务完成。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法能有效根据电池状态调整飞行路径，应对突发情况，减少飞行中故障风险，提高任务成功率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了自主空中机器人在电池电量不确定情况下的任务可靠性，为复杂环境下的自主飞行提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: Shingo Takemoto,Kazuki Naganuma,Shunsuke Ono
title: Graph Spatio-Spectral Total Variation Model for Hyperspectral Image Denoising
title_zh: 高光谱图像去噪的图时空光谱全变分模型
comment: Accepted to IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Letters. The code is available at https://www.mdi.c.titech.ac.jp/publications/gsstv
comments: Accepted to IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Letters. The code is available at https://www.mdi.c.titech.ac.jp/publications/gsstv
abstract: The spatio-spectral total variation (SSTV) model has been widely used as an effective regularization of hyperspectral images (HSI) for various applications such as mixed noise removal. However, since SSTV computes local spatial differences uniformly, it is difficult to remove noise while preserving complex spatial structures with fine edges and textures, especially in situations of high noise intensity. To solve this problem, we propose a new TV-type regularization called Graph-SSTV (GSSTV), which generates a graph explicitly reflecting the spatial structure of the target HSI from noisy HSIs and incorporates a weighted spatial difference operator designed based on this graph. Furthermore, we formulate the mixed noise removal problem as a convex optimization problem involving GSSTV and develop an efficient algorithm based on the primal-dual splitting method to solve this problem. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of GSSTV compared with existing HSI regularization models through experiments on mixed noise removal. The source code will be available at https://www.mdi.c.titech.ac.jp/publications/gsstv.
summary: The spatio-spectral total variation (SSTV) model has been widely used as an effective regularization of hyperspectral images (HSI) for various applications such as mixed noise removal. However, since SSTV computes local spatial differences uniformly, it is difficult to remove noise while preserving complex spatial structures with fine edges and textures, especially in situations of high noise intensity. To solve this problem, we propose a new TV-type regularization called Graph-SSTV (GSSTV), which generates a graph explicitly reflecting the spatial structure of the target HSI from noisy HSIs and incorporates a weighted spatial difference operator designed based on this graph. Furthermore, we formulate the mixed noise removal problem as a convex optimization problem involving GSSTV and develop an efficient algorithm based on the primal-dual splitting method to solve this problem. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of GSSTV compared with existing HSI regularization models through experiments on mixed noise removal. The source code will be available at https://www.mdi.c.titech.ac.jp/publications/gsstv.
abstract_zh: 空间光谱全变分（SSTV）模型已被广泛用作高光谱图像（HSI）的有效正则化，用于混合噪声去除等各种应用。然而，由于SSTV统一计算局部空间差异，因此很难在去除噪声的同时保留具有精细边缘和纹理的复杂空间结构，特别是在高噪声强度的情况下。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的 TV 型正则化，称为 Graph-SSTV (GSSTV)，它从噪声 HSI 中生成一个明确反映目标 HSI 空间结构的图，并结合基于该图设计的加权空间差分算子。此外，我们将混合噪声去除问题表述为涉及 GSSTV 的凸优化问题，并开发了一种基于原对偶分裂方法的有效算法来解决该问题。最后，我们通过混合噪声去除实验证明了 GSSTV 与现有 HSI 正则化模型相比的有效性。源代码可在 https://www.mdi.c.titech.ac.jp/publications/gsstv 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图空谱总变分（GSSTV）的正则化模型，用于改进高光谱图像（HSI）的混合噪声去除效果。
AI.motivation: 现有SSTV模型因统一计算局部空间差异，难以在高噪声强度下有效保留复杂空间结构中的细边缘和纹理。
AI.method: 构建反映HSI空间结构的图，设计基于该图的加权空间差分算子，将混合噪声去除问题建模为包含GSSTV的凸优化问题，并采用对偶分裂法求解。
AI.result: 实验表明GSSTV在混合噪声去除任务中优于现有HSI正则化模型，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: GSSTV通过图结构建模和加权差分算子设计，有效提升了高噪声下HSI的去噪性能。

search_text: Graph Spatio-Spectral Total Variation Model for Hyperspectral Image Denoising 高光谱图像去噪的图时空光谱全变分模型 The spatio-spectral total variation (SSTV) model has been widely used as an effective regularization of hyperspectral images (HSI) for various applications such as mixed noise removal. However, since SSTV computes local spatial differences uniformly, it is difficult to remove noise while preserving complex spatial structures with fine edges and textures, especially in situations of high noise intensity. To solve this problem, we propose a new TV-type regularization called Graph-SSTV (GSSTV), which generates a graph explicitly reflecting the spatial structure of the target HSI from noisy HSIs and incorporates a weighted spatial difference operator designed based on this graph. Furthermore, we formulate the mixed noise removal problem as a convex optimization problem involving GSSTV and develop an efficient algorithm based on the primal-dual splitting method to solve this problem. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of GSSTV compared with existing HSI regularization models through experiments on mixed noise removal. The source code will be available at https://www.mdi.c.titech.ac.jp/publications/gsstv. 空间光谱全变分（SSTV）模型已被广泛用作高光谱图像（HSI）的有效正则化，用于混合噪声去除等各种应用。然而，由于SSTV统一计算局部空间差异，因此很难在去除噪声的同时保留具有精细边缘和纹理的复杂空间结构，特别是在高噪声强度的情况下。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的 TV 型正则化，称为 Graph-SSTV (GSSTV)，它从噪声 HSI 中生成一个明确反映目标 HSI 空间结构的图，并结合基于该图设计的加权空间差分算子。此外，我们将混合噪声去除问题表述为涉及 GSSTV 的凸优化问题，并开发了一种基于原对偶分裂方法的有效算法来解决该问题。最后，我们通过混合噪声去除实验证明了 GSSTV 与现有 HSI 正则化模型相比的有效性。源代码可在 https://www.mdi.c.titech.ac.jp/publications/gsstv 上获取。 本文提出一种基于图空谱总变分（GSSTV）的正则化模型，用于改进高光谱图像（HSI）的混合噪声去除效果。 Shingo Takemoto,Kazuki Naganuma,Shunsuke Ono eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Ankit Jha,Ishita,Pratham G. Shenwai,Ayush Batra,Siddharth Kotian,Piyush Modi
title: GesSure- A Robust Face-Authentication enabled Dynamic Gesture Recognition GUI Application
title_zh: GesSure - 一款强大的面部验证启用动态手势识别 GUI 应用程序
comment: Accepted at International Conference on Artificial Intelligence Advances (AIAD 2022)
comments: Accepted at International Conference on Artificial Intelligence Advances (AIAD 2022)
abstract: Using physical interactive devices like mouse and keyboards hinders naturalistic human-machine interaction and increases the probability of surface contact during a pandemic. Existing gesture-recognition systems do not possess user authentication, making them unreliable. Static gestures in current gesture-recognition technology introduce long adaptation periods and reduce user compatibility. Our technology places a strong emphasis on user recognition and safety. We use meaningful and relevant gestures for task operation, resulting in a better user experience. This paper aims to design a robust, face-verification-enabled gesture recognition system that utilizes a graphical user interface and primarily focuses on security through user recognition and authorization. The face model uses MTCNN and FaceNet to verify the user, and our LSTM-CNN architecture for gesture recognition, achieving an accuracy of 95% with five classes of gestures. The prototype developed through our research has successfully executed context-dependent tasks like save, print, control video-player operations and exit, and context-free operating system tasks like sleep, shut-down, and unlock intuitively. Our application and dataset are available as open source.

Our application and dataset are available as open source.
abstract_zh: 使用鼠标和键盘等物理交互设备会阻碍自然的人机交互，并增加大流行期间表面接触的可能性。现有的手势识别系统不具备用户身份验证，因此不可靠。当前手势识别技术中的静态手势引入了较长的适应期并降低了用户兼容性。我们的技术非常重视用户识别和安全。我们使用有意义且相关的手势来进行任务操作，从而带来更好的用户体验。本文旨在设计一个强大的、支持面部验证的手势识别系统，该系统利用图形用户界面，主要关注通过用户识别和授权的安全性。人脸模型使用 MTCNN 和 FaceNet 来验证用户，并使用我们的 LSTM-CNN 架构进行手势识别，对五类手势实现 95% 的准确率。通过我们的研究开发的原型成功地执行了上下文相关的任务，如保存、打印、控制视频播放器操作和退出，以及上下文无关的操作系统任务，如直观的睡眠、关闭和解锁。我们的应用程序和数据集是开源的。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一款基于人脸识别的动态手势识别GUI应用，以提高人机交互的安全性和用户体验。
AI.motivation: 传统的人机交互方式如鼠标和键盘存在接触传播风险，且现有手势识别系统缺乏用户认证，导致安全性不足。
AI.method: 该技术结合MTCNN和FaceNet进行人脸识别，使用LSTM-CNN架构进行手势识别，并通过图形用户界面实现任务操作。
AI.result: 系统实现了95%的识别准确率，能够执行上下文相关和无关的任务，如保存、打印、控制视频播放器、睡眠、关机和解锁等。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过用户识别和授权提升了安全性和用户体验，应用和数据集已开源。

authors_text: Mohammad Hajizadeh,Mohammad Sabokrou,Adel Rahmani
title: MobileDenseNet: A new approach to object detection on mobile devices
title_zh: MobileDenseNet：移动设备上对象检测的新方法
abstract: Object detection problem solving has developed greatly within the past few years. There is a need for lighter models in instances where hardware limitations exist, as well as a demand for models to be tailored to mobile devices. In this article, we will assess the methods used when creating algorithms that address these issues. The main goal of this article is to increase accuracy in state-of-the-art algorithms while maintaining speed and real-time efficiency. The most significant issues in one-stage object detection pertains to small objects and inaccurate localization. As a solution, we created a new network by the name of MobileDenseNet suitable for embedded systems. We also developed a light neck FCPNLite for mobile devices that will aid with the detection of small objects. Our research revealed that very few papers cited necks in embedded systems. What differentiates our network from others is our use of concatenation features. A small yet significant change to the head of the network amplified accuracy without increasing speed or limiting parameters. In short, our focus on the challenging CoCo and Pascal VOC datasets were 24.8 and 76.8 in percentage terms respectively - a rate higher than that recorded by other state-of-the-art systems thus far. Our network is able to increase accuracy while maintaining real-time efficiency on mobile devices. We calculated operational speed on Pixel 3 (Snapdragon 845) to 22.8 fps. The source code of this research is available on https://github.com/hajizadeh/MobileDenseNet.
summary: Object detection problem solving has developed greatly within the past few years. There is a need for lighter models in instances where hardware limitations exist, as well as a demand for models to be tailored to mobile devices. In this article, we will assess the methods used when creating algorithms that address these issues. The main goal of this article is to increase accuracy in state-of-the-art algorithms while maintaining speed and real-time efficiency. The most significant issues in one-stage object detection pertains to small objects and inaccurate localization. As a solution, we created a new network by the name of MobileDenseNet suitable for embedded systems. We also developed a light neck FCPNLite for mobile devices that will aid with the detection of small objects. Our research revealed that very few papers cited necks in embedded systems. What differentiates our network from others is our use of concatenation features. A small yet significant change to the head of the network amplified accuracy without increasing speed or limiting parameters. In short, our focus on the challenging CoCo and Pascal VOC datasets were 24.8 and 76.8 in percentage terms respectively - a rate higher than that recorded by other state-of-the-art systems thus far. Our network is able to increase accuracy while maintaining real-time efficiency on mobile devices. We calculated operational speed on Pixel 3 (Snapdragon 845) to 22.8 fps. The source code of this research is available on https://github.com/hajizadeh/MobileDenseNet.
abstract_zh: 目标检测问题的解决在过去几年中取得了长足的发展。在存在硬件限制的情况下需要更轻的模型，并且需要针对移动设备定制模型。在本文中，我们将评估创建解决这些问题的算法时使用的方法。本文的主要目标是提高最先进算法的准确性，同时保持速度和实时效率。一阶段目标检测中最重要的问题与小目标和不准确的定位有关。作为解决方案，我们创建了一个名为 MobileDenseNet 的新网络，适用于嵌入式系统。我们还开发了适用于移动设备的灯颈 FCPNLite，有助于检测小物体。我们的研究表明，很少有论文引用嵌入式系统中的颈部。我们的网络与其他网络的区别在于我们使用串联功能。对网络头部进行微小但重大的改变可以提高准确性，而无需提高速度或限制参数。简而言之，我们对具有挑战性的 CoCo 和 Pascal VOC 数据集的关注百分比分别为 24.8 和 76.8 - 这一比率高于迄今为止其他最先进系统记录的比率。我们的网络能够提高准确性，同时保持移动设备上的实时效率。我们计算出 Pixel 3（Snapdragon 845）上的运行速度为 22.8 fps。这项研究的源代码可在 https://github.com/hajizadeh/MobileDenseNet 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MobileDenseNet的新网络架构，旨在提升移动设备上物体检测的准确性与实时效率。
AI.motivation: 移动设备硬件资源有限，现有算法在小物体检测和定位精度上存在不足，需设计轻量级模型以兼顾速度与准确率。
AI.method: 设计MobileDenseNet网络结合轻量级FPNLite结构，通过特征拼接优化小物体检测，并调整网络头部结构提升精度而不增加参数量。
AI.result: 在Coco和Pascal VOC数据集上分别达到24.8%和76.8%的准确率，Pixel 3设备上实现22.8 fps的实时检测速度。
AI.conclusion: MobileDenseNet通过创新网络结构与特征融合策略，在移动设备上实现了优于现有方法的检测精度与效率，代码已开源。

What differentiates our network from others is our use of concatenation features. In short, our focus on the challenging CoCo and Pascal VOC datasets were 24.8 and 76.8 in percentage terms respectively - a rate higher than that recorded by other state-of-the-art systems thus far. Our network is able to increase accuracy while maintaining real-time efficiency on mobile devices. We calculated operational speed on Pixel 3 (Snapdragon 845) to 22.8 fps. The source code of this research is available on https://github.com/hajizadeh/MobileDenseNet. 目标检测问题的解决在过去几年中取得了长足的发展。在存在硬件限制的情况下需要更轻的模型，并且需要针对移动设备定制模型。在本文中，我们将评估创建解决这些问题的算法时使用的方法。本文的主要目标是提高最先进算法的准确性，同时保持速度和实时效率。一阶段目标检测中最重要的问题与小目标和不准确的定位有关。作为解决方案，我们创建了一个名为 MobileDenseNet 的新网络，适用于嵌入式系统。我们还开发了适用于移动设备的灯颈 FCPNLite，有助于检测小物体。我们的研究表明，很少有论文引用嵌入式系统中的颈部。我们的网络与其他网络的区别在于我们使用串联功能。对网络头部进行微小但重大的改变可以提高准确性，而无需提高速度或限制参数。简而言之，我们对具有挑战性的 CoCo 和 Pascal VOC 数据集的关注百分比分别为 24.8 和 76.8 - 这一比率高于迄今为止其他最先进系统记录的比率。我们的网络能够提高准确性，同时保持移动设备上的实时效率。我们计算出 Pixel 3（Snapdragon 845）上的运行速度为 22.8 fps。这项研究的源代码可在 https://github.com/hajizadeh/MobileDenseNet 上获取。 本文提出一种名为MobileDenseNet的新网络架构，旨在提升移动设备上物体检测的准确性与实时效率。 Mohammad Hajizadeh,Mohammad Sabokrou,Adel Rahmani cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Guillermo Gomez-Trenado,Stéphane Lathuilière,Pablo Mesejo,Óscar Cordón
title: Custom Structure Preservation in Face Aging
title_zh: 面部老化中的定制结构保留
abstract: In this work, we propose a novel architecture for face age editing that can produce structural modifications while maintaining relevant details present in the original image. We disentangle the style and content of the input image and propose a new decoder network that adopts a style-based strategy to combine the style and content representations of the input image while conditioning the output on the target age. We go beyond existing aging methods allowing users to adjust the degree of structure preservation in the input image during inference. To this purpose, we introduce a masking mechanism, the CUstom Structure Preservation module, that distinguishes relevant regions in the input image from those that should be discarded. CUSP requires no additional supervision. Finally, our quantitative and qualitative analysis which include a user study, show that our method outperforms prior art and demonstrates the effectiveness of our strategy regarding image editing and adjustable structure preservation. Code and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/guillermogotre/CUSP.
summary: In this work, we propose a novel architecture for face age editing that can produce structural modifications while maintaining relevant details present in the original image. We disentangle the style and content of the input image and propose a new decoder network that adopts a style-based strategy to combine the style and content representations of the input image while conditioning the output on the target age. We go beyond existing aging methods allowing users to adjust the degree of structure preservation in the input image during inference. To this purpose, we introduce a masking mechanism, the CUstom Structure Preservation module, that distinguishes relevant regions in the input image from those that should be discarded. CUSP requires no additional supervision. Finally, our quantitative and qualitative analysis which include a user study, show that our method outperforms prior art and demonstrates the effectiveness of our strategy regarding image editing and adjustable structure preservation. Code and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/guillermogotre/CUSP.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的面部年龄编辑架构，可以产生结构修改，同时保持原始图像中存在的相关细节。我们解开了输入图像的风格和内容，并提出了一种新的解码器网络，该网络采用基于风格的策略来结合输入图像的风格和内容表示，同时根据目标年龄调节输出。我们超越了现有的老化方法，允许用户在推理过程中调整输入图像中的结构保留程度。为此，我们引入了一种掩蔽机制，即 CUstom 结构保留模块，它将输入图像中的相关区域与应丢弃的区域区分开来。 CUSP 不需要额外的监督。最后，我们的定量和定性分析（包括用户研究）表明我们的方法优于现有技术，并证明了我们在图像编辑和可调整结构保存方面的策略的有效性。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/guillermogotre/CUSP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种人脸衰老编辑方法，在生成结构修改的同时保持原始图像细节，并允许用户调整结构保留程度。
AI.motivation: 现有衰老方法难以在修改结构时保持细节或调整结构保留程度，需开发更灵活且无需额外监督的解决方案。
AI.method: 解耦输入图像风格与内容，设计基于风格的解码器网络，并引入无需监督的CUSP模块通过掩码机制区分保留与丢弃区域。
AI.result: 定量与定性分析及用户研究显示，该方法优于现有技术，有效实现了图像编辑与可调节的结构保持。
AI.conclusion: CUSP模块有效提升了结构保持的灵活性与编辑质量，代码与预训练模型已开源供研究使用。

authors_text: Peter B Marschik,Tomas Kulvicius,Sarah Flügge,Claudius Widmann,Karin Nielsen-Saines,Martin Schulte-Rüther,Britta Hüning,Sven Bölte,Luise Poustka,Jeff Sigafoos,Florentin Wörgötter,Christa Einspieler,Dajie Zhang
title: Open video data sharing in developmental and behavioural science
title_zh: 发展和行为科学中的开放视频数据共享
abstract: Video recording is a widely used method for documenting infant and child behaviours in research and clinical practice. Video data has rarely been shared due to ethical concerns of confidentiality, although the need of shared large-scaled datasets remains increasing. This demand is even more imperative when data-driven computer-based approaches are involved, such as screening tools to complement clinical assessments. To share data while abiding by privacy protection rules, a critical question arises whether efforts at data de-identification reduce data utility? We addressed this question by showcasing the Prechtl's general movements assessment (GMA), an established and globally practised video-based diagnostic tool in early infancy for detecting neurological deficits, such as cerebral palsy. To date, no shared expert-annotated large data repositories for infant movement analyses exist. Such datasets would massively benefit training and recalibration of human assessors and the development of computer-based approaches. In the current study, sequences from a prospective longitudinal infant cohort with a total of 19451 available general movements video snippets were randomly selected for human clinical reasoning and computer-based analysis. We demonstrated for the first time that pseudonymisation by face-blurring video recordings is a viable approach. The video redaction did not affect classification accuracy for either human assessors or computer vision methods, suggesting an adequate and easy-to-apply solution for sharing movement video data. We call for further explorations into efficient and privacy rule-conforming approaches for deidentifying video data in scientific and clinical fields beyond movement assessments. These approaches shall enable sharing and merging stand-alone video datasets into large data pools to advance science and public health.
summary: Video recording is a widely used method for documenting infant and child behaviours in research and clinical practice. Video data has rarely been shared due to ethical concerns of confidentiality, although the need of shared large-scaled datasets remains increasing. This demand is even more imperative when data-driven computer-based approaches are involved, such as screening tools to complement clinical assessments. To share data while abiding by privacy protection rules, a critical question arises whether efforts at data de-identification reduce data utility? We addressed this question by showcasing the Prechtl's general movements assessment (GMA), an established and globally practised video-based diagnostic tool in early infancy for detecting neurological deficits, such as cerebral palsy. To date, no shared expert-annotated large data repositories for infant movement analyses exist. Such datasets would massively benefit training and recalibration of human assessors and the development of computer-based approaches. In the current study, sequences from a prospective longitudinal infant cohort with a total of 19451 available general movements video snippets were randomly selected for human clinical reasoning and computer-based analysis. We demonstrated for the first time that pseudonymisation by face-blurring video recordings is a viable approach. The video redaction did not affect classification accuracy for either human assessors or computer vision methods, suggesting an adequate and easy-to-apply solution for sharing movement video data. We call for further explorations into efficient and privacy rule-conforming approaches for deidentifying video data in scientific and clinical fields beyond movement assessments. These approaches shall enable sharing and merging stand-alone video datasets into large data pools to advance science and public health.
abstract_zh: 视频录制是研究和临床实践中广泛使用的记录婴儿和儿童行为的方法。尽管共享大规模数据集的需求不断增加，但由于保密的道德问题，视频数据很少被共享。当涉及数据驱动的计算机方法时，例如补充临床评估的筛选工具，这种需求就更加迫切。为了在遵守隐私保护规则的情况下共享数据，一个关键问题出现了：数据去标识化的努力是否会降低数据效用？我们通过展示 Prechtl 的一般运动评估 (GMA) 来解决这个问题，这是一种成熟且全球通用的婴儿早期基于视频的诊断工具，用于检测脑瘫等神经缺陷。迄今为止，尚不存在用于婴儿运动分析的共享专家注释大数据存储库。此类数据集将极大地有益于人类评估员的培训和重新校准以及基于计算机的方法的开发。在当前的研究中，随机选择了来自前瞻性纵向婴儿队列的序列，总共有 19451 个可用的一般动作视频片段，用于人类临床推理和基于计算机的分析。我们首次证明，通过面部模糊视频录制进行假名化是一种可行的方法。视频编辑不会影响人类评估者或计算机视觉方法的分类准确性，这表明了一种用于共享运动视频数据的充分且易于应用的解决方案。我们呼吁进一步探索高效且符合隐私规则的方法，以在运动评估之外的科学和临床领域对视频数据进行去识别化。这些方法应能够共享独立视频数据集并将其合并到大型数据池中，以促进科学和公共卫生。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在保护隐私的前提下共享婴儿运动视频数据的可行性，并验证了通过模糊面部信息进行去标识化处理的有效性。
AI.motivation: 视频数据在发育与行为科学研究中至关重要，但因隐私问题难以共享。建立大规模标注数据集对训练评估人员和开发计算机分析工具具有重要意义。
AI.method: 选取包含19,451个视频片段的纵向婴儿队列，随机选择部分视频进行人工评估和计算机分析，通过面部模糊处理验证数据去标识化对分类准确性的影响。
AI.result: 面部模糊处理未影响人类评估者和计算机视觉方法的分类准确性，证实该方法可有效平衡隐私保护与数据共享需求。
AI.conclusion: 面部模糊是一种可行的视频数据共享方案，未来需探索更多符合隐私规范的去标识化方法以促进跨领域数据整合与科学研究。

These approaches shall enable sharing and merging stand-alone video datasets into large data pools to advance science and public health. 视频录制是研究和临床实践中广泛使用的记录婴儿和儿童行为的方法。尽管共享大规模数据集的需求不断增加，但由于保密的道德问题，视频数据很少被共享。当涉及数据驱动的计算机方法时，例如补充临床评估的筛选工具，这种需求就更加迫切。为了在遵守隐私保护规则的情况下共享数据，一个关键问题出现了：数据去标识化的努力是否会降低数据效用？我们通过展示 Prechtl 的一般运动评估 (GMA) 来解决这个问题，这是一种成熟且全球通用的婴儿早期基于视频的诊断工具，用于检测脑瘫等神经缺陷。迄今为止，尚不存在用于婴儿运动分析的共享专家注释大数据存储库。此类数据集将极大地有益于人类评估员的培训和重新校准以及基于计算机的方法的开发。在当前的研究中，随机选择了来自前瞻性纵向婴儿队列的序列，总共有 19451 个可用的一般动作视频片段，用于人类临床推理和基于计算机的分析。我们首次证明，通过面部模糊视频录制进行假名化是一种可行的方法。视频编辑不会影响人类评估者或计算机视觉方法的分类准确性，这表明了一种用于共享运动视频数据的充分且易于应用的解决方案。我们呼吁进一步探索高效且符合隐私规则的方法，以在运动评估之外的科学和临床领域对视频数据进行去识别化。这些方法应能够共享独立视频数据集并将其合并到大型数据池中，以促进科学和公共卫生。 本文探讨了在保护隐私的前提下共享婴儿运动视频数据的可行性，并验证了通过模糊面部信息进行去标识化处理的有效性。 Peter B Marschik,Tomas Kulvicius,Sarah Flügge,Claudius Widmann,Karin Nielsen-Saines,Martin Schulte-Rüther,Britta Hüning,Sven Bölte,Luise Poustka,Jeff Sigafoos,Florentin Wörgötter,Christa Einspieler,Dajie Zhang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yassine Hamoudi
title: Preparing Many Copies of a Quantum State in the Black-Box Model
title_zh: 在黑盒模型中制备量子态的多个副本
abstract: We describe a simple quantum algorithm for preparing $K$ copies of an $N$-dimensional quantum state whose amplitudes are given by a quantum oracle. Our result extends a previous work of Grover, who showed how to prepare one copy in time $O(\sqrt{N})$. In comparison with the naive $O(K\sqrt{N})$ solution obtained by repeating this procedure~$K$ times, our algorithm achieves the optimal running time of $θ(\sqrt{KN})$. Our technique uses a refinement of the quantum rejection sampling method employed by Grover. As a direct application, we obtain a similar speed-up for obtaining $K$ independent samples from a distribution whose probability vector is given by a quantum oracle.
summary: We describe a simple quantum algorithm for preparing $K$ copies of an $N$-dimensional quantum state whose amplitudes are given by a quantum oracle. Our result extends a previous work of Grover, who showed how to prepare one copy in time $O(\sqrt{N})$. In comparison with the naive $O(K\sqrt{N})$ solution obtained by repeating this procedure~$K$ times, our algorithm achieves the optimal running time of $θ(\sqrt{KN})$. Our technique uses a refinement of the quantum rejection sampling method employed by Grover. As a direct application, we obtain a similar speed-up for obtaining $K$ independent samples from a distribution whose probability vector is given by a quantum oracle.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了一种简单的量子算法，用于准备 $N$ 维量子态的 $K$ 个副本，其幅度由量子预言机给出。我们的结果扩展了 Grover 之前的工作，Grover 展示了如何及时准备一份副本 $O(\sqrt{N})$。与通过重复此过程 ~$K$ 次获得的简单 $O(K\sqrt{N})$ 解决方案相比，我们的算法实现了 $θ(\sqrt{KN})$ 的最佳运行时间。我们的技术采用了 Grover 采用的量子拒绝采样方法的改进。作为直接应用，我们获得了类似的加速，从概率向量由量子预言给出的分布中获取 $K$ 独立样本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在黑盒模型中高效制备多个量子态副本的量子算法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需重复调用Grover算法K次以制备K个副本，总时间复杂度为O(K√N)，存在冗余开销，需优化整体效率。
AI.method: 改进量子拒绝采样技术，通过并行化处理降低时间复杂度，避免重复独立执行Grover算法。
AI.result: 实现θ(√(KN))时间复杂度，较原始方法提升K倍效率，并可应用于分布采样问题。
AI.conclusion: 提出更优的量子态批量制备方案，为量子计算中的多副本生成任务提供了理论改进。

authors_text: Francisca Pessanha,Gizem Sogancioglu
title: Fact sheet: Automatic Self-Reported Personality Recognition Track
title_zh: 情况说明书：自动自我报告人格识别轨道
abstract: We propose an informed baseline to help disentangle the various contextual factors of influence in this type of case studies. For this purpose, we analysed the correlation between the given metadata and the self-assigned personality trait scores and developed a model based solely on this information. Further, we compared the performance of this informed baseline with models based on state-of-the-art visual, linguistic and audio features. For the present dataset, a model trained solely on simple metadata features (age, gender and number of sessions) proved to have superior or similar performance when compared with simple audio, linguistic or visual features-based systems.
summary: We propose an informed baseline to help disentangle the various contextual factors of influence in this type of case studies. For this purpose, we analysed the correlation between the given metadata and the self-assigned personality trait scores and developed a model based solely on this information. Further, we compared the performance of this informed baseline with models based on state-of-the-art visual, linguistic and audio features. For the present dataset, a model trained solely on simple metadata features (age, gender and number of sessions) proved to have superior or similar performance when compared with simple audio, linguistic or visual features-based systems.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个知情的基线，以帮助理清此类案例研究中影响的各种背景因素。为此，我们分析了给定元数据和自我分配的人格特质分数之间的相关性，并仅基于此信息开发了一个模型。此外，我们将这一知情基线的性能与基于最先进的视觉、语言和音频特征的模型进行了比较。对于目前的数据集，与简单的基于音频、语言或视觉特征的系统相比，仅基于简单元数据特征（年龄、性别和会话次数）训练的模型被证明具有优越或相似的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于元数据的基线模型，用于自动识别自我报告的人格特质，并将其与基于视觉、语言和音频特征的模型进行比较。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多依赖复杂特征（如视觉、语言、音频），但作者认为简单元数据（如年龄、性别）可能包含关键影响因素，需验证其有效性。
AI.method: 分析元数据（年龄、性别、会话次数）与人格分数的相关性，构建仅基于元数据的模型，并与传统特征模型对比性能。
AI.result: 仅使用元数据的模型在性能上优于或等于基于音频、语言或视觉特征的模型。
AI.conclusion: 简单元数据特征在人格识别任务中具有竞争力，可能为该领域提供更高效的研究方向。

authors_text: Victor Gallego-Fontenla,Juan C. Vidal,Manuel Lama
title: Gradual Drift Detection in Process Models Using Conformance Metrics
title_zh: 使用一致性指标的过程模型中的逐渐漂移检测
abstract: Changes, planned or unexpected, are common during the execution of real-life processes. Detecting these changes is a must for optimizing the performance of organizations running such processes. Most of the algorithms present in the state-of-the-art focus on the detection of sudden changes, leaving aside other types of changes. In this paper, we will focus on the automatic detection of gradual drifts, a special type of change, in which the cases of two models overlap during a period of time. The proposed algorithm relies on conformance checking metrics to carry out the automatic detection of the changes, performing also a fully automatic classification of these changes into sudden or gradual. The approach has been validated with a synthetic dataset consisting of 120 logs with different distributions of changes, getting better results in terms of detection and classification accuracy, delay and change region overlapping than the main state-of-the-art algorithms.
summary: Changes, planned or unexpected, are common during the execution of real-life processes. Detecting these changes is a must for optimizing the performance of organizations running such processes. Most of the algorithms present in the state-of-the-art focus on the detection of sudden changes, leaving aside other types of changes. In this paper, we will focus on the automatic detection of gradual drifts, a special type of change, in which the cases of two models overlap during a period of time. The proposed algorithm relies on conformance checking metrics to carry out the automatic detection of the changes, performing also a fully automatic classification of these changes into sudden or gradual. The approach has been validated with a synthetic dataset consisting of 120 logs with different distributions of changes, getting better results in terms of detection and classification accuracy, delay and change region overlapping than the main state-of-the-art algorithms.
abstract_zh: 在现实生活流程的执行过程中，计划内或意外的变化很常见。要优化运行此类流程的组织的性能，必须检测这些变化。大多数最先进的算法都专注于检测突然的变化，而忽略了其他类型的变化。在本文中，我们将重点关注逐渐漂移的自动检测，这是一种特殊类型的变化，其中两个模型的情况在一段时间内重叠。所提出的算法依赖于一致性检查指标来自动检测变化，并对这些变化进行全自动分类，分为突然的或渐进的。该方法已经通过由 120 个具有不同变化分布的日志组成的合成数据集进行了验证，在检测和分类精度、延迟和变化区域重叠方面比主要的最先进算法获得了更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于符合度指标的自动检测流程模型中渐进漂移的方法，并实现对变化类型的自动分类。
AI.motivation: 现有算法主要检测突然变化，忽视了渐进漂移这一常见变化类型，导致组织无法及时优化流程性能。
AI.method: 利用符合度检查指标构建检测算法，结合合成数据集验证，实现对渐进漂移的自动检测与分类。
AI.result: 在包含120个日志的合成数据集上，检测和分类准确率、延迟及变化区域重叠指标均优于主流算法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效识别渐进漂移并准确分类，为组织优化流程性能提供了新工具。

The approach has been validated with a synthetic dataset consisting of 120 logs with different distributions of changes, getting better results in terms of detection and classification accuracy, delay and change region overlapping than the main state-of-the-art algorithms. 在现实生活流程的执行过程中，计划内或意外的变化很常见。要优化运行此类流程的组织的性能，必须检测这些变化。大多数最先进的算法都专注于检测突然的变化，而忽略了其他类型的变化。在本文中，我们将重点关注逐渐漂移的自动检测，这是一种特殊类型的变化，其中两个模型的情况在一段时间内重叠。所提出的算法依赖于一致性检查指标来自动检测变化，并对这些变化进行全自动分类，分为突然的或渐进的。该方法已经通过由 120 个具有不同变化分布的日志组成的合成数据集进行了验证，在检测和分类精度、延迟和变化区域重叠方面比主要的最先进算法获得了更好的结果。 本文提出一种基于符合度指标的自动检测流程模型中渐进漂移的方法，并实现对变化类型的自动分类。 Victor Gallego-Fontenla,Juan C. Vidal,Manuel Lama cs.AI

authors_text: Yuqing Zhao,Divya Saxena,Jiannong Cao
title: AdaptCL: Adaptive Continual Learning for Tackling Heterogeneity in Sequential Datasets
title_zh: AdaptCL：用于解决序列数据集中异质性的自适应持续学习
comment: This article has been accepted by TNNLS
comments: This article has been accepted by TNNLS
abstract: Managing heterogeneous datasets that vary in complexity, size, and similarity in continual learning presents a significant challenge. Task-agnostic continual learning is necessary to address this challenge, as datasets with varying similarity pose difficulties in distinguishing task boundaries. Conventional task-agnostic continual learning practices typically rely on rehearsal or regularization techniques. However, rehearsal methods may struggle with varying dataset sizes and regulating the importance of old and new data due to rigid buffer sizes. Meanwhile, regularization methods apply generic constraints to promote generalization but can hinder performance when dealing with dissimilar datasets lacking shared features, necessitating a more adaptive approach. In this paper, we propose AdaptCL, a novel adaptive continual learning method to tackle heterogeneity in sequential datasets. AdaptCL employs fine-grained data-driven pruning to adapt to variations in data complexity and dataset size. It also utilizes task-agnostic parameter isolation to mitigate the impact of varying degrees of catastrophic forgetting caused by differences in data similarity. Through a two-pronged case study approach, we evaluate AdaptCL on both datasets of MNIST Variants and DomainNet, as well as datasets from different domains. The latter include both large-scale, diverse binary-class datasets and few-shot, multi-class datasets. Across all these scenarios, AdaptCL consistently exhibits robust performance, demonstrating its flexibility and general applicability in handling heterogeneous datasets.

In this paper, we propose AdaptCL, a novel adaptive continual learning method to tackle heterogeneity in sequential datasets. AdaptCL employs fine-grained data-driven pruning to adapt to variations in data complexity and dataset size. It also utilizes task-agnostic parameter isolation to mitigate the impact of varying degrees of catastrophic forgetting caused by differences in data similarity. Through a two-pronged case study approach, we evaluate AdaptCL on both datasets of MNIST Variants and DomainNet, as well as datasets from different domains. The latter include both large-scale, diverse binary-class datasets and few-shot, multi-class datasets. Across all these scenarios, AdaptCL consistently exhibits robust performance, demonstrating its flexibility and general applicability in handling heterogeneous datasets.
abstract_zh: 在持续学习中管理复杂性、大小和相似性各异的异构数据集是一项重大挑战。与任务无关的持续学习对于解决这一挑战是必要的，因为具有不同相似性的数据集给区分任务边界带来了困难。传统的与任务无关的持续学习实践通常依赖于排练或规范化技术。然而，由于严格的缓冲区大小，演练方法可能会难以应对不同的数据集大小以及调节新旧数据的重要性。同时，正则化方法应用通用约束来促进泛化，但在处理缺乏共享特征的不同数据集时可能会阻碍性能，因此需要更具适应性的方法。在本文中，我们提出了 AdaptCL，一种新颖的自适应持续学习方法，用于解决顺序数据集中的异质性。 AdaptCL 采用细粒度数据驱动的修剪来适应数据复杂性和数据集大小的变化。它还利用与任务无关的参数隔离来减轻由数据相似性差异引起的不同程度的灾难性遗忘的影响。通过双管齐下的案例研究方法，我们在 MNIST Variants 和 DomainNet 数据集以及来自不同领域的数据集上评估 AdaptCL。后者包括大规模、多样化的二元类数据集和少样本、多类数据集。在所有这些场景中，AdaptCL 始终表现出强大的性能，展示了其在处理异构数据集方面的灵活性和普遍适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaptCL方法，解决连续学习中序列数据集异质性带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统任务无关连续学习方法在处理数据集复杂度、规模和相似性差异时存在局限，难以适应不同场景需求。
AI.method: 采用细粒度数据驱动剪枝适应数据复杂度变化，结合任务无关参数隔离缓解灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.result: 在MNIST变体、DomainNet及跨领域数据集上均表现出色，验证了方法的鲁棒性和通用性。
AI.conclusion: AdaptCL通过自适应机制有效应对数据异质性，在多种连续学习场景中具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Christian Joppi,Geri Skenderi,Marco Cristani
title: POP: Mining POtential Performance of new fashion products via webly cross-modal query expansion
title_zh: POP：通过Webly跨模态查询扩展挖掘时尚新品潜力表现
abstract: We propose a data-centric pipeline able to generate exogenous observation data for the New Fashion Product Performance Forecasting (NFPPF) problem, i.e., predicting the performance of a brand-new clothing probe with no available past observations. Our pipeline manufactures the missing past starting from a single, available image of the clothing probe. It starts by expanding textual tags associated with the image, querying related fashionable or unfashionable images uploaded on the web at a specific time in the past. A binary classifier is robustly trained on these web images by confident learning, to learn what was fashionable in the past and how much the probe image conforms to this notion of fashionability. This compliance produces the POtential Performance (POP) time series, indicating how performing the probe could have been if it were available earlier. POP proves to be highly predictive for the probe's future performance, ameliorating the sales forecasts of all state-of-the-art models on the recent VISUELLE fast-fashion dataset. We also show that POP reflects the ground-truth popularity of new styles (ensembles of clothing items) on the Fashion Forward benchmark, demonstrating that our webly-learned signal is a truthful expression of popularity, accessible by everyone and generalizable to any time of analysis. Forecasting code, data and the POP time series are available at: https://github.com/HumaticsLAB/POP-Mining-POtential-Performance
summary: We propose a data-centric pipeline able to generate exogenous observation data for the New Fashion Product Performance Forecasting (NFPPF) problem, i.e., predicting the performance of a brand-new clothing probe with no available past observations. Our pipeline manufactures the missing past starting from a single, available image of the clothing probe. It starts by expanding textual tags associated with the image, querying related fashionable or unfashionable images uploaded on the web at a specific time in the past. A binary classifier is robustly trained on these web images by confident learning, to learn what was fashionable in the past and how much the probe image conforms to this notion of fashionability. This compliance produces the POtential Performance (POP) time series, indicating how performing the probe could have been if it were available earlier. POP proves to be highly predictive for the probe's future performance, ameliorating the sales forecasts of all state-of-the-art models on the recent VISUELLE fast-fashion dataset. We also show that POP reflects the ground-truth popularity of new styles (ensembles of clothing items) on the Fashion Forward benchmark, demonstrating that our webly-learned signal is a truthful expression of popularity, accessible by everyone and generalizable to any time of analysis. Forecasting code, data and the POP time series are available at: https://github.com/HumaticsLAB/POP-Mining-POtential-Performance
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个以数据为中心的管道，能够为新时尚产品性能预测（NPPF）问题生成外生观察数据，即在没有可用的过去观察结果的情况下预测全新服装探针的性能。我们的流程从单个可用的服装探针图像开始制造缺失的过去。它首先扩展与图像相关的文本标签，查询过去特定时间上传到网络上的相关时尚或不时尚图像。通过置信学习对这些网络图像进行稳健的二元分类器训练，以了解过去流行什么以及探测图像在多大程度上符合这种时尚概念。这种合规性会产生潜在性能 (POP) 时间序列，表明如果早期可用，探测器的性能如何。 POP 被证明对探针的未来表现具有高度预测性，改善了最近 VISUELLE 快时尚数据集上所有最先进模型的销售预测。我们还表明，POP 反映了 Fashion Forward 基准上新款式（服装组合）的真实流行程度，表明我们的网络学习信号是流行程度的真实表达，每个人都可以访问，并且可以推广到任何时间的分析。预测代码、数据和 POP 时间序列可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/HumaticsLAB/POP-Mining-POtential-Performance

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据驱动的管道，通过网络跨模态查询扩展生成新时尚产品性能预测所需的历史观测数据。
AI.motivation: 传统新时尚产品性能预测缺乏历史数据，需从单张产品图片出发构建虚拟历史观测数据以提升预测准确性。
AI.method: 基于产品图片扩展文本标签，检索历史网络图像训练二分类器，通过置信度学习判断时尚趋势，生成潜在性能时间序列POP。
AI.result: POP在VISUELLE数据集上提升所有SOTA模型销量预测效果，并与Fashion Forward基准的流行度数据高度吻合。
AI.conclusion: POP作为通用流行度信号，可通过网络数据实现新时尚产品性能预测，具有广泛适用性和可解释性。

authors_text: Pierre Raillard,Lorenzo Cristoni,Andrew Walden,Roberto Lazzari,Thomas Pulimood,Louis Grandjean,Claudia AM Gandini Wheeler-Kingshott,Yipeng Hu,Zachary MC Baum
title: Rapid Lung Ultrasound COVID-19 Severity Scoring with Resource-Efficient Deep Feature Extraction
title_zh: 通过资源高效的深度特征提取进行快速肺部超声 COVID-19 严重程度评分
comment: Accepted to ASMUS 2022 Workshop at MICCAI
comments: Accepted to ASMUS 2022 Workshop at MICCAI
abstract: Artificial intelligence-based analysis of lung ultrasound imaging has been demonstrated as an effective technique for rapid diagnostic decision support throughout the COVID-19 pandemic. However, such techniques can require days- or weeks-long training processes and hyper-parameter tuning to develop intelligent deep learning image analysis models. This work focuses on leveraging 'off-the-shelf' pre-trained models as deep feature extractors for scoring disease severity with minimal training time. We propose using pre-trained initializations of existing methods ahead of simple and compact neural networks to reduce reliance on computational capacity. This reduction of computational capacity is of critical importance in time-limited or resource-constrained circumstances, such as the early stages of a pandemic. On a dataset of 49 patients, comprising over 20,000 images, we demonstrate that the use of existing methods as feature extractors results in the effective classification of COVID-19-related pneumonia severity while requiring only minutes of training time. Our methods can achieve an accuracy of over 0.93 on a 4-level severity score scale and provides comparable per-patient region and global scores compared to expert annotated ground truths. These results demonstrate the capability for rapid deployment and use of such minimally-adapted methods for progress monitoring, patient stratification and management in clinical practice for COVID-19 patients, and potentially in other respiratory diseases.

However, such techniques can require days- or weeks-long training processes and hyper-parameter tuning to develop intelligent deep learning image analysis models. We propose using pre-trained initializations of existing methods ahead of simple and compact neural networks to reduce reliance on computational capacity.
